papers.title: Learning Neural Operator Surrogates for the Black Hole Accretion Code
papers.summary: General-relativistic magnetohydrodynamic (GR-MHD) simulations are essential for studying black hole accretion, relativistic jets, and magnetic reconnection, yet their computational cost severely limits systematic parameter exploration. We investigate neural operator surrogates for two astrophysically relevant simulation scenarios produced by the Black Hole Accretion Code (\texttt{BHAC}).   First, a Physics Informed Fourier Neural Operator (PINO) is trained on the special-relativistic resistive MHD (SRRMHD) evolution of the Orszag-Tang vortex over a range of resistivities spanning the Sweet-Parker and fast reconnection regimes. By embedding the governing equations as an additional loss term evaluated at finer temporal resolution than the available data supervision, the model learns dynamics at time steps where no simulation data is provided, enabling recovery of plasmoid formation that a data-only baseline trained on the same sparse snapshots fails to reproduce. To our knowledge, the present work is the first application of a physics informed neural operator to special relativistic resistive MHD, and the first to investigate the capability of such models to resolve plasmoid formation in SRRMHD.   In a second line of investigation, an OFormer-style Transformer Neural Operator is trained on the evolution of spine-sheath relativistic jets created with \texttt{BHAC}, in special-relativistic MHD (SRMHD). The model is directly applied on the adaptive mesh, highlighting the need for linear attention due to long sequences. The neural surrogate model is capable of capturing most of the major details, especially in early predictions. To our knowledge, this constitutes the first application of a neural operator directly on a high resolution adaptive mesh refinement grid in the context of MHD simulations.

ai.tldr: 本研究探索了神经算子代理模型在黑洞吸积代码模拟中的应用，包括物理信息傅里叶神经算子和OFormer变换器神经算子，分别用于特殊相对论性电阻MHD涡旋和相对论性射流演化，首次在自适应网格上直接应用神经算子。
ai.motivation: GR-MHD模拟计算成本高，限制了系统参数探索，需要高效的代理模型。
ai.method: 训练PINO模型嵌入控制方程作为额外损失项，在更细时间分辨率下学习动力学；训练OFormer模型直接处理自适应网格，采用线性注意力机制。
ai.result: PINO模型能恢复数据驱动基线无法复现的等离子体团形成；OFormer模型在早期预测中捕捉大部分主要细节。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解神经算子如何加速黑洞吸积和相对论性射流模拟，减少计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合物理信息损失和自适应网格处理，提升代理模型对复杂多尺度现象的预测能力。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能对高分辨率或长时间演化预测精度下降，需更多验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将物理约束嵌入神经算子以解决稀疏数据下的动力学学习问题。

en.tldr: This work explores neural operator surrogates for black hole accretion code simulations, including a Physics Informed Fourier Neural Operator and an OFormer Transformer Neural Operator, applied to special-relativistic resistive MHD vortex and relativistic jet evolution, marking the first direct application of neural operators on adaptive mesh refinement grids.
en.motivation: GR-MHD simulations are computationally expensive, limiting systematic parameter exploration, necessitating efficient surrogates.
en.method: Train PINO with governing equations as additional loss term at finer temporal resolution; train OFormer directly on adaptive mesh with linear attention.
en.result: PINO recovers plasmoid formation missed by data-only baseline; OFormer captures most major details in early predictions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how neural operators can accelerate black hole accretion and relativistic jet simulations, reducing computational cost.

idea_spark.idea: Combine physics-informed loss and adaptive mesh handling to improve surrogate model prediction of complex multi-scale phenomena.
idea_spark.risk: Model accuracy may degrade for high-resolution or long-time evolution, requiring further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires embedding physical constraints in neural operators to learn dynamics from sparse data.

papers.title: Robust Model-Based Iteration for Passive Gamma Emission Tomography
papers.summary: Passive Gamma Emission Tomography (PGET) is an IAEA-approved technique for verifying spent nuclear fuel assemblies prior to geological disposal. Reconstructing the emission and attenuation maps from PGET measurements is a nonlinear ill-posed inverse problem, currently solved with a Levenberg-Marquardt (LM) scheme that requires 10-20 iterations to achieve sufficient accuracy. We propose an accelerated iterative solver that combines the LM algorithm with a Deep Gauss-Newton step, in which a learned operator refines the update proposed by the deterministic algorithm at each iteration. A safeguard condition based on the trust-region model ensures that the accelerated iterates perform no worse than LM and retain convergence to a critical point of the regularized objective. Within this framework we compare three architectures for the learned component: an encoder-decoder-style convolutional neural network, Fourier Neural Operators, and Wavelet Neural Operators. Each is trained on a small set of coarsely simulated 9x9 assemblies. Experiments on simulated and real measurements from Finnish nuclear power plants show that the proposed scheme reaches LM-quality reconstructions in roughly one third of the iterations, while revealing architecture-dependent trade-offs in robustness against out-of-distribution inputs.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合Levenberg-Marquardt算法与深度高斯-牛顿步的加速迭代求解器，用于被动伽马发射断层成像，在约三分之一的迭代次数内达到LM质量的重建。
ai.motivation: 被动伽马发射断层成像（PGET）是IAEA批准的乏核燃料组件验证技术，但其发射和衰减图重建是非线性不适定逆问题，现有LM方案需10-20次迭代，效率有待提升。
ai.method: 将LM算法与深度高斯-牛顿步结合，学习算子细化每次迭代的更新，并采用信赖域模型的安全条件确保加速迭代不劣于LM且收敛到正则化目标的临界点。比较了编码器-解码器CNN、傅里叶神经算子和小波神经算子三种架构。
ai.result: 在模拟和芬兰核电站实测数据上，所提方案约三分之一的迭代次数即可达到LM质量的重建，且不同架构在鲁棒性上存在权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用深度学习加速传统迭代重建算法，同时保持收敛保证和鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将信赖域安全条件与深度学习的更新步结合，确保加速不牺牲收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 学习算子可能对分布外输入敏感，需谨慎设计架构和训练数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典优化中信赖域方法启发，将数据驱动更新嵌入确定性迭代框架。

en.tldr: Proposes an accelerated iterative solver combining Levenberg-Marquardt with a Deep Gauss-Newton step for Passive Gamma Emission Tomography, achieving LM-quality reconstructions in roughly one third of the iterations.
en.motivation: Passive Gamma Emission Tomography (PGET) is an IAEA-approved technique for verifying spent nuclear fuel, but its reconstruction is a nonlinear ill-posed inverse problem; the current LM scheme requires 10-20 iterations, limiting efficiency.
en.method: Combines the LM algorithm with a Deep Gauss-Newton step where a learned operator refines the update, safeguarded by a trust-region condition to ensure no worse performance than LM and convergence. Compares encoder-decoder CNN, Fourier Neural Operators, and Wavelet Neural Operators.
en.result: On simulated and real measurements from Finnish nuclear plants, the scheme reaches LM-quality reconstructions in about one third of the iterations, with architecture-dependent robustness trade-offs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to accelerate iterative reconstruction with deep learning while preserving convergence guarantees and robustness.

idea_spark.idea: Combine trust-region safety conditions with learned updates to accelerate without sacrificing convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Learned operators may be sensitive to out-of-distribution inputs; careful architecture and training data design are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by trust-region methods in classical optimization, embedding data-driven steps into a deterministic iterative framework.

papers.title: Analytic semigroup generated by the dispersal process of a sylvatic transmission model of Chagas disease
papers.summary: In this work, we develop a new biological transmission model for Chagas disease. This model, set in two juxtaposed habitats with skew Brownian motion conditions at the interface, is composed of two reaction--diffusion equations and takes into account the sylvatic transmission. We write it as an abstract perturbed Cauchy problem using operator theory. Then, we show that the main operator, which models the dispersal process, generates an analytic semigroup in an adequate Banach space.

ai.tldr: 本文建立了一个包含两个反应扩散方程和斜布朗运动条件的恰加斯病森林传播模型，并证明了其扩散过程生成解析半群。
ai.motivation: 恰加斯病的森林传播机制复杂，现有模型未能充分描述栖息地交界处的扩散行为。
ai.method: 将模型转化为抽象柯西问题，利用算子理论证明主算子生成解析半群。
ai.result: 在适当的巴拿赫空间中，扩散过程对应的算子生成解析半群。
ai.help_to_user: 为恰加斯病传播的数学分析提供了半群理论框架，可用于后续稳定性与数值模拟研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用解析半群理论分析模型解的长时间行为，如渐近稳定性和收敛速率。
idea_spark.risk: 解析半群的存在性依赖于特定函数空间和边界条件，推广至更复杂几何时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将随机过程与确定性扩散结合，为异质环境中的传播建模提供新思路。

en.tldr: This work develops a sylvatic transmission model for Chagas disease using two reaction-diffusion equations with skew Brownian motion at habitat interfaces, and proves that the dispersal operator generates an analytic semigroup.
en.motivation: Existing models for Chagas disease fail to capture dispersal behavior at habitat boundaries in sylvatic cycles.
en.method: The model is formulated as an abstract Cauchy problem; operator theory is used to show the main operator generates an analytic semigroup in a suitable Banach space.
en.result: The dispersal process operator generates an analytic semigroup, enabling further functional analytic analysis.
en.help_to_user: Provides a semigroup framework for analyzing the Chagas disease model, facilitating studies on stability and numerical simulation.

idea_spark.idea: Use analytic semigroup theory to study long-time behavior, such as asymptotic stability and convergence rates of solutions.
idea_spark.risk: Existence of an analytic semigroup depends on specific function spaces and boundary conditions, which may not hold for more complex geometries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating stochastic processes with deterministic diffusion offers a novel approach to modeling transmission in heterogeneous environments.

papers.title: Hyper Input Convex Neural Networks for Shape Constrained Learning and Optimal Transport
papers.summary: We introduce Hyper Input Convex Neural Networks (HyCNNs), a novel neural network architecture designed for learning convex functions. HyCNNs combine the principles of Maxout networks with input convex neural networks (ICNNs) to create a neural network that is always convex in the input, theoretically capable of leveraging depth, and performs reliable when trained at scale compared to ICNNs. Concretely, we prove that HyCNNs require exponentially fewer parameters than ICNNs to approximate quadratic functions up to a given precision. Throughout a series of synthetic experiments, we demonstrate that HyCNNs outperform existing ICNNs and MLPs in terms of predictive performance for convex regression and interpolation tasks. We further apply HyCNNs to learn high-dimensional optimal transport maps for synthetic examples and for single-cell RNA sequencing data, where they oftentimes outperform ICNN-based neural optimal transport methods and other baselines across a wide range of settings.

ai.tldr: 提出超输入凸神经网络（HyCNN），结合Maxout与ICNN，在凸函数学习上参数效率更高，在凸回归、插值和最优传输任务中表现优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有输入凸神经网络（ICNN）在深度扩展时参数效率低且训练不稳定，需要更高效的凸函数学习架构。
ai.method: 将Maxout网络的线性分段特性与ICNN的凸性约束结合，设计HyCNN架构，并证明其逼近二次函数所需参数指数级少于ICNN。
ai.result: 在合成实验中，HyCNN在凸回归和插值上优于ICNN和MLP；在高维最优传输任务（包括单细胞RNA测序数据）中，HyCNN也优于ICNN基方法和其他基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种更高效、更稳定的凸函数学习神经网络，可用于形状约束学习、最优传输等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将HyCNN应用于生物医学中的细胞分化轨迹推断，利用凸性约束保证映射的单调性。
idea_spark.risk: 凸性约束可能限制模型对非凸真实函数的表达能力，需验证实际数据是否满足凸性假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: Maxout与ICNN的组合思路启发：将其他分段线性激活函数（如ReLU变体）与凸性约束结合，可能产生更多高效架构。

zh.tldr: 提出超输入凸神经网络（HyCNN），结合Maxout与ICNN，在凸函数学习上参数效率更高，在凸回归、插值和最优传输任务中表现优于现有方法。
zh.motivation: 现有输入凸神经网络（ICNN）在深度扩展时参数效率低且训练不稳定，需要更高效的凸函数学习架构。

idea_spark.idea: 将HyCNN应用于生物医学中的细胞分化轨迹推断，利用凸性约束保证映射的单调性。
idea_spark.risk: 凸性约束可能限制模型对非凸真实函数的表达能力，需验证实际数据是否满足凸性假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: Maxout与ICNN的组合思路启发：将其他分段线性激活函数（如ReLU变体）与凸性约束结合，可能产生更多高效架构。

en.tldr: Proposes Hyper Input Convex Neural Networks (HyCNNs), combining Maxout and ICNN principles for more parameter-efficient convex function learning, outperforming existing methods on convex regression, interpolation, and optimal transport tasks.
en.motivation: Existing Input Convex Neural Networks (ICNNs) suffer from low parameter efficiency and training instability when scaled in depth, motivating a more efficient architecture for learning convex functions.
en.method: Integrates the piecewise linear nature of Maxout networks with the convexity constraints of ICNNs, and proves that HyCNNs require exponentially fewer parameters than ICNNs to approximate quadratic functions.
en.result: On synthetic experiments, HyCNNs outperform ICNNs and MLPs in convex regression and interpolation; on high-dimensional optimal transport tasks including single-cell RNA sequencing data, HyCNNs often surpass ICNN-based methods and other baselines.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more efficient and stable neural network for learning convex functions, applicable to shape-constrained learning and optimal transport.

idea_spark.idea: Apply HyCNN to infer cell differentiation trajectories in biomedicine, leveraging convexity to ensure monotonicity of the mapping.
idea_spark.risk: Convexity constraints may limit the model's ability to represent non-convex real-world functions; validation on actual data is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of Maxout and ICNN inspires exploring other piecewise linear activations (e.g., ReLU variants) with convexity constraints to create more efficient architectures.

papers.title: NeuroPlastic: A Plasticity-Modulated Optimizer for Biologically Inspired Learning Dynamics
papers.summary: Optimization algorithms are fundamental to modern deep learning, yet most widely used methods rely on update rules based primarily on local gradient statistics. We introduce NeuroPlastic, a plasticity-modulated optimizer that augments gradient-based updates with an adaptive multi-signal modulation mechanism inspired by multi-factor synaptic plasticity, a concept from neurobiology. NeuroPlastic dynamically scales gradient updates using interacting components that capture gradient, activity-like, and memory-like statistics, forming a lightweight modulation layer compatible with standard deep learning training pipelines. Across image classification benchmarks, NeuroPlastic consistently improves over a controlled gradient-only ablation, with more pronounced gains on the Fashion-MNIST benchmark and in reduced-data regimes. In transfer experiments on CIFAR-10 with ResNet-18, the method remains stable and competitive without retuning. These results suggest that multi-signal plasticity-inspired modulation can provide a useful extension to conventional gradient-driven optimization, particularly when learning signals are limited or noisy, and offer a promising direction for gradient-based methods in deep learning.

ai.tldr: 提出一种受神经生物学多因子突触可塑性启发的优化器NeuroPlastic，通过自适应多信号调制增强梯度更新，在图像分类任务中表现优于纯梯度方法。
ai.motivation: 现有优化器主要依赖局部梯度统计，缺乏生物学习中的多信号协同机制，在信号有限或噪声环境下性能受限。
ai.method: 设计轻量级调制层，融合梯度、类活性和类记忆三种统计信号，动态缩放梯度更新，兼容标准训练流程。
ai.result: 在Fashion-MNIST和CIFAR-10上，NeuroPlastic持续优于纯梯度消融版本，尤其在少数据场景下增益显著；迁移实验稳定且无需重调参数。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种即插即用的优化器改进思路，可提升现有深度学习模型在数据稀缺或噪声条件下的学习效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将多因子突触可塑性规则扩展到强化学习或序列模型中的信用分配问题。
idea_spark.risk: 调制层引入额外超参数，可能增加调参成本；生物启发机制在极大规模任务上的泛化性待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经科学中突触可塑性的多因子调控启发，将生物学习原理转化为可计算的优化规则。

idea_spark.risk: 调制层引入额外超参数，可能增加调参成本；生物启发机制在极大规模任务上的泛化性待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经科学中突触可塑性的多因子调控启发，将生物学习原理转化为可计算的优化规则。

en.tldr: Proposes NeuroPlastic, a plasticity-modulated optimizer inspired by multi-factor synaptic plasticity, which enhances gradient updates via adaptive multi-signal modulation and outperforms gradient-only baselines on image classification.
en.motivation: Current optimizers rely mainly on local gradient statistics, lacking the multi-signal coordination found in biological learning, leading to suboptimal performance under limited or noisy signals.
en.method: Introduces a lightweight modulation layer that combines gradient, activity-like, and memory-like statistics to dynamically scale gradient updates, compatible with standard deep learning pipelines.
en.result: NeuroPlastic consistently improves over gradient-only ablation on Fashion-MNIST and CIFAR-10, with larger gains in low-data regimes; transfer experiments remain stable without retuning.
en.help_to_user: Offers a plug-and-play optimizer enhancement that can improve learning efficiency in data-scarce or noisy settings for existing deep learning models.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying multi-factor synaptic plasticity rules to credit assignment in reinforcement learning or sequence models.
idea_spark.risk: The modulation layer introduces extra hyperparameters, potentially increasing tuning effort; generalization to very large-scale tasks remains to be verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-factor regulation of synaptic plasticity in neuroscience, translating biological learning principles into computable optimization rules.

papers.title: Global boundedness and asymptotic behavior of the chemotaxis system for Alopecia Areata with weakly singular sensitivity
papers.summary: This paper considers the homogeneous Neumann initial-boundary value problem for Alopecia Areata chemotaxis model with weakly singular sensitivity. For any appropriately regular initial conditions,it is shown that the problem admits a global boundedness of classical solutions in two spatial dimensions. Moreover, through the explicit construction of Lyapunov functions, we establish that the globally bounded solution converges exponentially to a constant steady state. The paper concludes with numerical experiments that serve to visually illustrate and corroborate some of the theoretically derived findings.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了具有弱奇异灵敏度的斑秃趋化模型，证明了二维空间中经典解的全局有界性，并通过Lyapunov函数建立了指数收敛到常数稳态的结果。
ai.motivation: 斑秃的趋化模型在数学上尚未充分研究，特别是弱奇异灵敏度情形下的全局有界性和渐近行为。
ai.method: 利用Neumann初边值问题，通过Lyapunov函数显式构造和数值实验验证理论结果。
ai.result: 二维空间中经典解全局有界，且指数收敛到常数稳态。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了斑秃趋化模型的理论分析框架和数值验证方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将弱奇异灵敏度与免疫-毛囊相互作用结合，建立更完整的斑秃病理模型。
idea_spark.risk: 高维空间或强奇异灵敏度下全局有界性可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生物数学角度，可探索趋化信号对毛囊免疫逃逸的影响。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Alopecia Areata chemotaxis model with weakly singular sensitivity, proving global boundedness of classical solutions in two dimensions and exponential convergence to a constant steady state via Lyapunov functions.
en.motivation: The chemotaxis model for Alopecia Areata with weakly singular sensitivity lacks rigorous analysis of global boundedness and asymptotic behavior.
en.method: Using homogeneous Neumann initial-boundary value problem, explicit Lyapunov functions, and numerical experiments.
en.result: Global boundedness of classical solutions in 2D and exponential convergence to a constant steady state.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical analysis and numerical validation for the Alopecia Areata chemotaxis model.

idea_spark.idea: Combine weakly singular sensitivity with immune-hair follicle interactions for a more complete Alopecia Areata model.
idea_spark.risk: Global boundedness may fail in higher dimensions or with strongly singular sensitivity.
idea_spark.inspiration: From a biomathematical perspective, explore how chemotactic signals influence hair follicle immune evasion.

papers.title: Strong convergence rate of Euler-Maruyama approximations in temporal-spatial Hölder-norms for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations
papers.summary: This paper studies the error between the exact solution and it's Euler-Maruyama approximation in temporal-spatial Hölder-norms for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations.

ai.tldr: 研究Lévy驱动随机微分方程在时空Hölder范数下Euler-Maruyama近似的强收敛率。
ai.motivation: 分析Lévy噪声下随机微分方程数值解在强范数下的误差行为。
ai.method: 采用Euler-Maruyama离散化方案，在时空Hölder范数下推导收敛率。
ai.result: 给出了精确解与近似解在时空Hölder范数下的误差界。
ai.help_to_user: 为Lévy驱动SDE的数值模拟提供收敛性理论保证。

idea_spark.idea: 探索时空Hölder范数下其他离散化方法（如Milstein）的收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶范数下收敛率可能降低，需验证实际计算效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合自适应时间步长优化Hölder范数下的误差控制。

en.tldr: Studies the strong convergence rate of Euler-Maruyama approximations in temporal-spatial Hölder-norms for Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations.
en.motivation: To analyze the error behavior of numerical solutions under strong norms for SDEs driven by Lévy noise.
en.method: Uses Euler-Maruyama discretization and derives convergence rates in temporal-spatial Hölder-norms.
en.result: Provides error bounds between the exact solution and its approximation in Hölder-norms.
en.help_to_user: Offers theoretical convergence guarantees for numerical simulation of Lévy-driven SDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Explore convergence of other discretization methods (e.g., Milstein) under temporal-spatial Hölder-norms.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence rates may degrade in higher-order norms; computational efficiency needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine adaptive time-stepping to optimize error control in Hölder-norms.

papers.title: Grounding vs. Compositionality: On the Non-Complementarity of Reasoning in Neuro-Symbolic Systems
papers.summary: Compositional generalization remains a foundational weakness of modern neural networks, limiting their robustness and applicability in domains requiring out-of-distribution reasoning. A central, yet unverified, assumption in neuro-symbolic AI is that compositional reasoning will emerge as a byproduct of successful symbol grounding. This work presents the first systematic empirical analysis to challenge this assumption by disentangling the contributions of grounding and reasoning. To operationalize this investigation, we introduce the Iterative Logic Tensor Network ($i$LTN), a fully differentiable architecture designed for multi-step deduction. Using a formal taxonomy of generalization -- probing for novel entities, unseen relations, and complex rule compositions -- we demonstrate that a model trained solely on a grounding objective fails to generalize. In contrast, our full $i$LTN, trained jointly on perceptual grounding and multi-step reasoning, achieves high zero-shot accuracy across all tasks. Our findings provide conclusive evidence that symbol grounding, while necessary, is insufficient for generalization, establishing that reasoning is not an emergent property but a distinct capability that requires an explicit learning objective.

ai.tldr: 本文首次系统性地挑战了神经符号系统中“符号接地自动带来组合推理”的假设，通过引入可微分迭代逻辑张量网络（iLTN）进行多步演绎，证明推理并非接地能力的副产品，而是需要独立学习目标的能力。
ai.motivation: 神经网络的组合泛化能力薄弱，而神经符号AI中一个核心但未经验证的假设是：成功的符号接地会自动产生组合推理能力。本文旨在通过实验检验这一假设。
ai.method: 提出iLTN（迭代逻辑张量网络），一种全可微分的多步演绎架构，并设计形式化泛化分类（新实体、未见关系、复杂规则组合）来分离接地与推理的贡献。
ai.result: 仅训练接地目标的模型无法泛化；而联合训练接地与多步推理的完整iLTN在所有任务上实现了高零样本准确率。接地是必要的，但不足以实现泛化，推理不是涌现属性，而是需要显式学习目标的独立能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解神经符号系统中接地与推理的关系，明确推理需要独立优化，为设计更鲁棒的AI系统提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 可探索将iLTN的迭代推理机制与强化学习结合，使模型在动态环境中自主学习推理步骤。
idea_spark.risk: iLTN的完全可微分性可能在大规模规则库中面临计算效率问题，且对复杂逻辑规则的表示能力有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受逻辑张量网络和迭代推理的启发，可设计更高效的神经符号架构，例如使用图神经网络进行规则传播。

en.tldr: This paper presents the first systematic empirical analysis challenging the assumption that compositional reasoning emerges from symbol grounding in neuro-symbolic systems, introducing the Iterative Logic Tensor Network (iLTN) to show that reasoning is a distinct capability requiring an explicit learning objective.
en.motivation: Neural networks suffer from weak compositional generalization, and a key unverified assumption in neuro-symbolic AI is that successful symbol grounding automatically yields compositional reasoning. This work aims to test this assumption experimentally.
en.method: Proposes iLTN (Iterative Logic Tensor Network), a fully differentiable architecture for multi-step deduction, with a formal taxonomy of generalization (novel entities, unseen relations, complex rule compositions) to disentangle grounding and reasoning contributions.
en.result: A model trained solely on grounding fails to generalize; the full iLTN trained jointly on grounding and multi-step reasoning achieves high zero-shot accuracy across all tasks. Grounding is necessary but insufficient for generalization; reasoning is not emergent but a distinct capability requiring an explicit learning objective.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the relationship between grounding and reasoning in neuro-symbolic systems, clarifying that reasoning needs independent optimization, guiding the design of more robust AI systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining iLTN's iterative reasoning mechanism with reinforcement learning to enable the model to autonomously learn reasoning steps in dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: The full differentiability of iLTN may face computational efficiency issues with large rule bases, and its representation capacity for complex logical rules is limited.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by logic tensor networks and iterative reasoning, one could design more efficient neuro-symbolic architectures, e.g., using graph neural networks for rule propagation.

papers.title: On matrix Lax representations for (1+1)-dimensional evolutionary differential-difference equations
papers.summary: Differential-difference matrix Lax representations (Lax pairs), gauge transformations, and discrete Miura-type transformations (MTs) belong to the main tools in the theory of (nonlinear) integrable differential-difference equations.   For a given equation, two matrix Lax representations (MLRs) are said to be gauge equivalent if one of them can be obtained from the other by applying a matrix gauge transformation. Generalizing and extending several previous works on MLRs and MTs, we present new results on the following problems:   - When and how can one simplify a given MLR by means of gauge transformations?   - How can one use MLRs and gauge transformations for constructing MTs?   - A MLR is called fake if it is gauge equivalent to a trivial MLR. How to determine whether a given MLR is not fake?   We consider the general (1+1)-dimensional evolutionary differential-difference case when a MLR can depend on any shifts of dependent variables and can be non-autonomous. As applications and illustrations of the presented general theory, we construct several new two-component integrable equations (with new MLRs) connected by new MTs to known integrable equations from the papers [S. Konstantinou-Rizos, A.V. Mikhailov, P. Xenitidis, J. Math. Phys. 2015], [E. Mansfield, G. Mari Beffa, Jing Ping Wang, Found. Comput. Math. 2013]), including non-autonomous examples.

ai.tldr: 本文研究(1+1)维演化型微分-差分方程的矩阵Lax表示、规范变换和离散Miura型变换，提出简化、构造和判别假Lax表示的一般理论，并构造了若干新的两分量可积方程。
ai.motivation: 现有工作对矩阵Lax表示和Miura变换的研究尚不充分，缺乏系统的方法来简化给定MLR、利用MLR构造MT以及判断MLR是否为假。
ai.method: 通过推广和扩展前人的工作，建立了规范变换下MLR的简化准则，利用MLR和规范变换构造MT，并给出了判别假MLR的条件。
ai.result: 提出了适用于一般(1+1)维演化型微分-差分方程（包括非自治情形）的理论，并构造了多个新的两分量可积方程及其MLR，这些方程通过新的MT与已知可积方程相联系。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究可积微分-差分方程提供了系统工具，帮助用户简化Lax表示、构造Miura变换并验证表示的非平凡性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用规范变换将复杂MLR化为标准形，可系统发现新的可积方程及其变换关系。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导可能依赖特定代数结构，对非多项式或奇异情形需额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将规范变换思想与自动符号计算结合，开发可积性检测与方程分类的算法工具。

en.tldr: This paper studies matrix Lax representations, gauge transformations, and discrete Miura-type transformations for (1+1)-dimensional evolutionary differential-difference equations, presenting a general theory to simplify, construct, and detect fake MLRs, and constructing several new two-component integrable equations.
en.motivation: Existing work on matrix Lax representations and Miura transformations is insufficient, lacking systematic methods to simplify a given MLR, construct MTs using MLRs, and determine whether a MLR is fake.
en.method: By generalizing and extending previous works, we establish criteria for simplifying MLRs via gauge transformations, use MLRs and gauge transformations to construct MTs, and give conditions to detect fake MLRs.
en.result: We present a general theory applicable to general (1+1)-dimensional evolutionary differential-difference equations (including non-autonomous cases) and construct several new two-component integrable equations with new MLRs, connected by new MTs to known integrable equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides systematic tools for studying integrable differential-difference equations, helping users simplify Lax representations, construct Miura transformations, and verify non-triviality of representations.

idea_spark.idea: Using gauge transformations to reduce complex MLRs to normal forms can systematically discover new integrable equations and their transformation relations.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical derivations may rely on specific algebraic structures, requiring additional verification for non-polynomial or singular cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine gauge transformation ideas with automated symbolic computation to develop algorithmic tools for integrability detection and equation classification.

papers.title: Model-Free Dynamic Mode Adaptive Control for Data-Driven Control Synthesis
papers.summary: This paper presents a model-free, data-driven control synthesis method called dynamic mode adaptive control (DMAC) for systems whose mathematical models are unavailable or unsuitable for classical control design. The proposed approach combines data-driven dynamics approximation with adaptive control synthesis to enable online controller design using measured system data. DMAC comprises two main components: a dynamics-approximation module and a controller-synthesis module. The dynamics approximation module estimates a local linear representation of the system dynamics directly from measurements using a matrix recursive least-squares algorithm with a forgetting factor. The estimated dynamics are then used to compute an online stabilizing controller with full-state feedback and integral action. Theoretical analysis establishes convergence properties of the recursive dynamics approximation and boundedness of the closed-loop system under the DMAC controller. The performance of the proposed method is demonstrated through numerical examples involving representative dynamical systems, including an unstable linear system, the Van der Pol oscillator, and the Burgers' equation. Sensitivity studies further demonstrate the robustness of DMAC with respect to both algorithm hyperparameters and variations in system parameters.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无模型、数据驱动的动态模式自适应控制方法，结合递归最小二乘动力学近似与自适应控制综合，实现基于测量数据的在线控制器设计。
ai.motivation: 传统控制设计依赖精确数学模型，但许多实际系统模型不可用或不适合经典方法，需要无模型数据驱动方案。
ai.method: 采用带遗忘因子的矩阵递归最小二乘算法从测量数据中估计局部线性动力学，然后基于估计模型计算具有全状态反馈和积分作用的在线镇定控制器。
ai.result: 理论分析证明了递归近似的收敛性和闭环系统的有界性；数值实验在不稳定线性系统、范德波尔振荡器和伯格斯方程上验证了性能，并展示了超参数和系统参数变化的鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需系统模型即可在线设计控制器的实用框架，适用于模型未知或时变的控制场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将动力学近似与控制器综合解耦为两个独立模块，便于分别改进或替换，例如引入非线性近似或强化学习策略。
idea_spark.risk: 递归最小二乘在强非线性或高噪声环境下可能发散；在线更新计算开销需考虑实时性约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴自适应控制与系统辨识的经典思想，但完全基于数据驱动，启发未来研究将在线学习与鲁棒控制理论更紧密结合。

zh.motivation: 传统控制设计依赖精确数学模型，但许多实际系统模型不可用或不适合经典方法，需要无模型数据驱动方案。

zh.result: 理论分析证明了递归近似的收敛性和闭环系统的有界性；数值实验在不稳定线性系统、范德波尔振荡器和伯格斯方程上验证了性能，并展示了超参数和系统参数变化的鲁棒性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需系统模型即可在线设计控制器的实用框架，适用于模型未知或时变的控制场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将动力学近似与控制器综合解耦为两个独立模块，便于分别改进或替换，例如引入非线性近似或强化学习策略。
idea_spark.risk: 递归最小二乘在强非线性或高噪声环境下可能发散；在线更新计算开销需考虑实时性约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴自适应控制与系统辨识的经典思想，但完全基于数据驱动，启发未来研究将在线学习与鲁棒控制理论更紧密结合。

en.tldr: Proposes a model-free, data-driven control synthesis method called dynamic mode adaptive control, combining recursive least-squares dynamics approximation with adaptive control for online controller design using measured data.
en.motivation: Classical control design relies on accurate mathematical models, but many real systems lack such models or are unsuitable for classical methods, motivating a model-free data-driven approach.
en.method: Uses a matrix recursive least-squares algorithm with forgetting factor to estimate local linear dynamics from measurements, then computes an online stabilizing controller with full-state feedback and integral action based on the estimated model.
en.result: Theoretical analysis proves convergence of the recursive approximation and boundedness of the closed-loop system; numerical experiments on an unstable linear system, Van der Pol oscillator, and Burgers' equation demonstrate performance and robustness to hyperparameters and system parameter variations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical framework for online controller design without requiring a system model, suitable for control scenarios where models are unknown or time-varying.

idea_spark.idea: Decoupling dynamics approximation and controller synthesis into two independent modules allows separate improvement or replacement, e.g., introducing nonlinear approximation or reinforcement learning strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Recursive least-squares may diverge under strong nonlinearity or high noise; online update computational cost must consider real-time constraints.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws on classical ideas from adaptive control and system identification but is fully data-driven, inspiring future work to more closely integrate online learning with robust control theory.

papers.title: Optimal Asymptotic Behavior at Infinity of Solutions to the Lagrangian Mean Curvature Equation with Supercritical Phase in Dimension Two
papers.summary: We employ a nonlocal method to study the asymptotic behavior at infinity ofsolutions to the two-dimensional supercritical Lagrangian mean curvature equation   \[   \arctan λ_1(D^2u)+\arctan λ_2(D^2u) = θ+ f(x)   \] on exterior domains in $\mathbb{R}^2$, where $|θ| \in (0, π)$ is a constant and $f$ is a Lipschitz continuous perturbation satisfying $f(x) = O(|x|^{-β})$ with decay rate $β> 0$ at infinity. This work generalizes the convergence results in \cite{BJ2026}, where $f$ is required to be at least $C^3$ and $β>2$. Moreover, all asymptotic results established in this paper are optimal.

ai.tldr: 本文研究二维超临界拉格朗日平均曲率方程在外区域上解在无穷远处的渐近行为，通过非局部方法将扰动项的衰减条件从C³且β>2推广到Lipschitz连续且β>0，并证明所有渐近结果是最优的。
ai.motivation: 推广已有工作中对扰动项光滑性和衰减率的严格要求，建立更一般的渐近收敛理论。
ai.method: 采用非局部方法处理方程，利用积分估计和比较原理分析解在无穷远处的行为。
ai.result: 在β>0条件下得到解在无穷远处的渐近展开，并证明衰减指数β是最优的。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解超临界拉格朗日平均曲率方程解的远场性质提供理论基础，可用于相关偏微分方程和几何分析问题的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将非局部方法与变分框架结合，研究高维情形下解的渐近行为。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下非局部估计可能失效，需要新的分析工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优衰减条件出发，探索方程解在无穷远处的精细结构，可能揭示与几何测度论的联系。

idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下非局部估计可能失效，需要新的分析工具。

en.tldr: This paper studies the asymptotic behavior at infinity of solutions to the two-dimensional supercritical Lagrangian mean curvature equation on exterior domains, using a nonlocal method to relax the perturbation condition from C³ with β>2 to Lipschitz continuous with β>0, and proves optimality of all asymptotic results.
en.motivation: To generalize previous convergence results that required higher regularity and stronger decay of the perturbation.
en.method: A nonlocal approach combined with integral estimates and comparison principles.
en.result: Asymptotic expansions at infinity are obtained under β>0, and the decay exponent β is shown to be optimal.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for understanding far-field properties of solutions to the supercritical Lagrangian mean curvature equation, useful for research in PDEs and geometric analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the nonlocal method with variational frameworks to study asymptotic behavior in higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlocal estimates may fail in higher dimensions, requiring new analytical tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: The optimal decay condition may reveal deeper connections with geometric measure theory.

papers.title: The local Calderón problem and the determination at the boundary of a complex anisotropic admittivity
papers.summary: We address Calderón's problem of stably determining the anisotropic complex admittivity $σ$ in a domain $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^n$, with $n\geq3$, representing a conducting medium, in terms of a Dirichlet-to-Neumann map locally prescribed on a non-empty portion $Σ$ of the boundary of $Ω$, $\partialΩ$. $σ$ is assumed to be of type $σ(\cdot)=A(\cdot,a(\cdot))$ in $Ω$, where the one-parameter family of complex-symmetric matrices $[λ^{-1},\:λ]\ni t\mapsto A(\cdot,\: t)$ is assumed to be a-priori known and the scalar function $a$ is unknown. We establish Lipschitz and Hölder stability estimates at the boundary for $σ$ and its derivatives of arbitrary order on $Σ$, respectively, in terms of the local map.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了局部柯尔德隆问题，即在已知部分边界上的狄利克雷-诺伊曼映射时，稳定确定各向异性复电导率。
ai.motivation: 解决局部边界测量下各向异性复电导率的唯一确定性和稳定性问题。
ai.method: 假设电导率具有已知参数化形式，利用局部狄利克雷-诺伊曼映射建立Lipschitz和Hölder稳定性估计。
ai.result: 在边界上获得了电导率及其任意阶导数的Lipschitz和Hölder稳定性估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为电导率成像（如电阻抗断层成像）提供理论稳定性保证，指导实验设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用已知参数化形式简化各向异性参数反演。
idea_spark.risk: 参数化假设可能限制实际应用中的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合局部测量与先验信息可提高反演稳定性。

zh.motivation: 解决局部边界测量下各向异性复电导率的唯一确定性和稳定性问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合局部测量与先验信息可提高反演稳定性。

en.tldr: This paper addresses the local Calderón problem of stably determining an anisotropic complex admittivity from a local Dirichlet-to-Neumann map.
en.motivation: To establish unique determination and stability for anisotropic complex admittivity from partial boundary measurements.
en.method: Assuming a known parametric form of the admittivity, Lipschitz and Hölder stability estimates are derived from the local Dirichlet-to-Neumann map.
en.result: Lipschitz and Hölder stability estimates for the admittivity and its derivatives of arbitrary order on the boundary are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical stability guarantees for electrical impedance tomography and guides experimental design.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage known parametric forms to simplify inversion of anisotropic parameters.
idea_spark.risk: The parametric assumption may limit applicability in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining local measurements with prior information can enhance inversion stability.

papers.title: The Neumann problem for the generalized Hénon equation. Local analysis
papers.summary: For the boundary value problem $$\left\{ \begin{array}{rcll} -Δ_p u+u^{p-1}&=&|x|^αu^{q-1}&\mbox{in }Ω,\\ \frac{\displaystyle\partial u}{\displaystyle\partial{\bf n}}&=&0&\mbox{on }\partial Ω, \end{array}\right. $$ in the unit ball $Ω$, we investigate the properties of the positive radial solution. It is known, that for $1<p<n$, $\frac{(n-1)p}{n-p}<q<\frac{np}{n-p}$ and sufficiently large $α$ this solution does not provide global minimum to the corresponding energy functional, see [M. Gazzini, E. Serra, 2008] for $p=2$ and [A.P. Shcheglova, 2018] in general case. Nevertheless, it is shown in [M. Gazzini, E. Serra, 2008] that for $n\ge 4$, $p=2$, $2<q<\frac{2n}{n-2}$ and sufficiently large $α$ the radial solution is at least a local minimizer of the energy functional.   We partially generalize this result. Namely, let $n\ge4$ and let $p>2$ be sufficiently close to $2$. Then for all $p<q<\frac{np}{n-p}$, for sufficiently large $α$ the second variation of the energy functional is positive. The same holds true for all $2<p<n$ if $q>p$ is sufficiently close to $p$.

ai.tldr: 研究了单位球内广义Hénon方程Neumann问题正径向解的局部极小性，部分推广了已知结果。
ai.motivation: 已知对于某些参数范围，正径向解不是全局极小元，但可能是局部极小元；本文旨在将这一结论推广到p>2的情形。
ai.method: 通过分析能量泛函的第二变分，证明在特定参数条件下第二变分为正。
ai.result: 当n≥4且p充分接近2时，对于所有p<q<np/(n-p)和足够大的α，第二变分为正；对于所有2<p<n，当q充分接近p时同样成立。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解广义Hénon方程Neumann问题中径向解的稳定性条件。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将p-Laplacian替换为更一般的拟线性算子，研究类似局部极小性条件。
idea_spark.risk: 推广到更一般算子时，第二变分的显式表达式可能复杂，分析难度增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从p=2到p>2的推广思路可启发其他临界指数问题的局部性态研究。

zh.tldr: 研究了单位球内广义Hénon方程Neumann问题正径向解的局部极小性，部分推广了已知结果。

idea_spark.risk: 推广到更一般算子时，第二变分的显式表达式可能复杂，分析难度增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从p=2到p>2的推广思路可启发其他临界指数问题的局部性态研究。

en.tldr: Investigates the local minimality of positive radial solutions for the Neumann problem of the generalized Hénon equation in the unit ball, partially extending known results.
en.motivation: It is known that for certain parameter ranges the positive radial solution is not a global minimizer but may be a local minimizer; this paper aims to generalize this conclusion to the case p>2.
en.method: By analyzing the second variation of the energy functional, it is proved that under specific parameter conditions the second variation is positive.
en.result: When n≥4 and p is sufficiently close to 2, for all p<q<np/(n-p) and sufficiently large α, the second variation is positive; for all 2<p<n, the same holds when q is sufficiently close to p.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the stability conditions of radial solutions for the Neumann problem of the generalized Hénon equation.

idea_spark.idea: Consider replacing the p-Laplacian with a more general quasilinear operator and study analogous local minimality conditions.
idea_spark.risk: When generalizing to more general operators, the explicit expression of the second variation may become complicated, increasing analytical difficulty.
idea_spark.inspiration: The extension from p=2 to p>2 can inspire studies of local behavior in other critical exponent problems.

papers.title: Systems of Nonlocal Conservation Laws with Memory and Their Zero Retention Limit
papers.summary: We study the entropy solution for a class of systems of nonlocal conservation laws in which the convective flux is convoluted with a kernel in both spatial and temporal variables. This formulation models the flux dependence on the solution within its spatial neighbourhood (nonlocal in space) as well as on prior states in time (nonlocal in time), thereby incorporating memory effects. In addition, employing a convergent finite volume approximation, the existence of the entropy solution is discussed. The uniqueness of such entropy solutions is also established.   In addition, we analyze the asymptotic behaviour of the solutions as the support of the temporal convolution kernel shrinks, demonstrating the "memory-to-memoryless" effect and convergence to the entropy solution of the corresponding nonlocal conservation law without memory (i.e., nonlocal only in space). Convergence rate estimates are derived. In addition, the proposed numerical approximations are shown to be asymptotically compatible with this passage to the memoryless limit by deriving the corresponding asymptotic convergence rate estimates. The analysis is carried out in a very general setting, without imposing any geometric restrictions such as the convexity of the spatial and temporal convolution kernels, unlike the existing literature on the asymptotic analysis of nonlocal-in-space only conservation laws. To the best of our knowledge, this provides the first convergence and asymptotic analysis for finite volume schemes applied to nonlocal conservation laws with memory. Numerical experiments are included to illustrate the theory.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类具有时空非局部记忆效应的守恒律系统，证明了熵解的存在唯一性，并分析了当记忆核支撑收缩时解趋于无记忆非局部守恒律的渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 现有非局部守恒律研究多限于空间非局部性，缺乏对时间记忆效应的系统分析，且数值格式的渐近相容性尚未建立。
ai.method: 采用有限体积逼近构造熵解，通过紧性论证证明存在性，利用Kružkov型技巧证明唯一性，并推导记忆核收缩时的收敛率。
ai.result: 建立了带记忆非局部守恒律熵解的存在唯一性，证明了零记忆极限下解收敛到空间非局部守恒律的熵解，并给出了显式收敛率估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为含记忆效应的非局部守恒律提供了严格的数学框架和数值方法，可用于流体力学、交通流等具有滞后现象的建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间记忆核替换为可学习的参数化核，通过数据驱动方法识别最优记忆结构。
idea_spark.risk: 参数化核可能破坏熵解的唯一性，需额外正则化约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴本工作中渐近相容的数值格式，设计多尺度物理信息神经网络以同时逼近记忆和无记忆极限。

zh.help_to_user: 为含记忆效应的非局部守恒律提供了严格的数学框架和数值方法，可用于流体力学、交通流等具有滞后现象的建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间记忆核替换为可学习的参数化核，通过数据驱动方法识别最优记忆结构。
idea_spark.risk: 参数化核可能破坏熵解的唯一性，需额外正则化约束。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴本工作中渐近相容的数值格式，设计多尺度物理信息神经网络以同时逼近记忆和无记忆极限。

en.tldr: We study a class of conservation law systems with spatiotemporal memory, prove existence and uniqueness of entropy solutions, and analyze the asymptotic behavior as the memory kernel shrinks to the memoryless limit.
en.motivation: Existing nonlocal conservation laws focus on spatial nonlocality, lacking systematic analysis of temporal memory effects and asymptotic compatibility of numerical schemes.
en.method: Finite volume approximation is used to construct entropy solutions; existence is proved via compactness, uniqueness via Kružkov-type technique, and convergence rates are derived for the shrinking kernel.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness of entropy solutions for nonlocal conservation laws with memory are established; the zero-retention limit converges to the entropy solution of the spatially nonlocal memoryless law with explicit rate estimates.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and numerical method for conservation laws with memory effects, applicable to fluid dynamics, traffic flow, and other systems with hysteresis.

idea_spark.idea: Replace the temporal kernel with a learnable parameterized kernel to identify optimal memory structure via data-driven methods.
idea_spark.risk: Parameterized kernels may break uniqueness of entropy solutions, requiring additional regularization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design multi-scale physics-informed neural networks that simultaneously approximate the memory and memoryless limits, inspired by the asymptotically compatible scheme in this work.

papers.title: Geometric structure of singular free boundary points for the logarithmic obstacle problem
papers.summary: In the previous work [Interfaces Free Bound., 19, 351--369, 2017], de Queiroz and Shahgholian established the optimal $C^{1,\log}_{\mathrm{loc}}$ regularity of solutions for the obstacle problem with singular logarithmic forcing term $$-Δu = \log u\,χ_{\{u>0\}} \quad \text{in } Ω,$$ where $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^d$ ($d\geq 2$) is a smooth bounded domain. In our earlier work [arXiv:2408.08104, 2024], we proved the $C^{1,α}$ regularity of the free boundary $Ω\cap\partial\{u>0\}$ near regular points. In this paper, we investigate the more delicate structure of the \emph{singular} free boundary. Since the nonlinearity $-\log u$ is singular near the free boundary and destroys the scaling invariance, so that neither the classical blow-up arguments nor the standard epiperimetric inequality [Weiss, Invent.\ Math., 138, 23--50, 1999] apply directly; moreover, the Weiss type monotonicity formula requires a variable-parameter correction that introduces non-integrable remainder terms into the energy estimates. Motivated by Colombo--Spolaor--Velichkov [Geom.\ Funct.\ Anal., 28, 1029--1061, 2018], we develop a new \emph{log-epiperimetric inequality} for the modified Weiss energy, also proved by the direct method. A key novelty is the introduction of an auxiliary correction term $T$ that absorbs the non-integrable errors. As consequences, we establish a logarithmic energy decay, uniqueness of blow-ups at singular points, and a $C^{1,\log}$-type geometric description of the singular strata. In dimension two, the logarithmic modulus improves to a Hölder modulus.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了对数障碍问题中奇异自由边界的几何结构，提出了对数-等周不等式，证明了能量对数衰减、奇异点处爆破的唯一性以及奇异层的C^{1,log}几何描述。
ai.motivation: 对数障碍问题的非线性项在自由边界附近奇异，破坏了经典爆破方法和标准等周不等式的适用性，需要发展新的分析工具来刻画奇异自由边界的精细结构。
ai.method: 受Colombo-Spolaor-Velichkov启发，引入辅助修正项T吸收不可积误差，建立修正Weiss能量的对数-等周不等式，并通过直接法证明。
ai.result: 建立了能量对数衰减、奇异点处爆破的唯一性，以及奇异层的C^{1,log}型几何描述；在二维情形下对数模量改进为Hölder模量。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有奇异非线性的自由边界问题提供了新的分析框架，特别是对数-等周不等式可推广到其他奇异障碍问题。

idea_spark.idea: 通过引入辅助修正项吸收不可积误差，使得变参数单调性公式的余项可控制，从而建立能量衰减。
idea_spark.risk: 修正项的具体构造依赖于问题结构，推广到其他非线性时可能需要重新设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典等周不等式与对数修正结合，为奇异自由边界分析提供了新工具。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了对数障碍问题中奇异自由边界的几何结构，提出了对数-等周不等式，证明了能量对数衰减、奇异点处爆破的唯一性以及奇异层的C^{1,log}几何描述。
zh.motivation: 对数障碍问题的非线性项在自由边界附近奇异，破坏了经典爆破方法和标准等周不等式的适用性，需要发展新的分析工具来刻画奇异自由边界的精细结构。
zh.method: 受Colombo-Spolaor-Velichkov启发，引入辅助修正项T吸收不可积误差，建立修正Weiss能量的对数-等周不等式，并通过直接法证明。
zh.result: 建立了能量对数衰减、奇异点处爆破的唯一性，以及奇异层的C^{1,log}型几何描述；在二维情形下对数模量改进为Hölder模量。
zh.help_to_user: 为处理具有奇异非线性的自由边界问题提供了新的分析框架，特别是对数-等周不等式可推广到其他奇异障碍问题。

idea_spark.idea: 通过引入辅助修正项吸收不可积误差，使得变参数单调性公式的余项可控制，从而建立能量衰减。
idea_spark.risk: 修正项的具体构造依赖于问题结构，推广到其他非线性时可能需要重新设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典等周不等式与对数修正结合，为奇异自由边界分析提供了新工具。

en.tldr: This paper studies the geometric structure of singular free boundary points for the logarithmic obstacle problem, develops a log-epiperimetric inequality, and establishes logarithmic energy decay, uniqueness of blow-ups, and a C^{1,log} geometric description of the singular strata.
en.motivation: The singular nonlinearity near the free boundary breaks classical blow-up methods and standard epiperimetric inequalities, necessitating new analytical tools to describe the fine structure of the singular free boundary.
en.method: Inspired by Colombo-Spolaor-Velichkov, an auxiliary correction term T is introduced to absorb non-integrable errors, and a log-epiperimetric inequality for the modified Weiss energy is proved via a direct method.
en.result: Logarithmic energy decay, uniqueness of blow-ups at singular points, and a C^{1,log}-type geometric description of the singular strata are obtained; in dimension two, the logarithmic modulus improves to a Hölder modulus.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new analytical framework for free boundary problems with singular nonlinearities, particularly the log-epiperimetric inequality that can be extended to other singular obstacle problems.

idea_spark.idea: Introducing an auxiliary correction term to absorb non-integrable errors makes the remainder of the variable-parameter monotonicity formula controllable, enabling energy decay.
idea_spark.risk: The specific construction of the correction term depends on the problem structure; generalization to other nonlinearities may require redesign.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining classical epiperimetric inequalities with logarithmic corrections offers a new tool for singular free boundary analysis.

papers.title: VulStyle: A Multi-Modal Pre-Training for Code Stylometry-Augmented Vulnerability Detection
papers.summary: We present VulStyle, a multi-modal software vulnerability detection model that jointly encodes function-level source code, non-terminal Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) structure, and code stylometry (CStyle) features. Prior work in code representation primarily leverages token-level models or full AST trees, often missing stylistic cues indicative of risky programming practices, or incurring high structural overhead. Our approach selects only non-terminal AST nodes, reducing input complexity while preserving semantic hierarchy, and integrates syntactic and lexical CStyle features as auxiliary vulnerability signals.   VulStyle is pre-trained using masked language modeling on 4.9M functions across seven programming languages, and fine-tuned across five benchmark datasets: Devign, BigVul, DiverseVul, REVEAL, and VulDeePecker. VulStyle achieves state-of-the-art performance on BigVul and VulDeePecker, improving F1 by 4-48% over strong transformer baselines, and attains competitive or best-average performance across all benchmarks. We contribute an ablation study isolating the effect of CStyle and AST structure, error case analysis, and a threat model situating the detection task in attacker-realistic scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出VulStyle，一种多模态预训练模型，结合函数级源码、非终端AST和代码风格特征进行漏洞检测，在多个基准上达到最优或竞争性能。
ai.motivation: 现有代码表示方法多依赖token级模型或完整AST树，忽略了编程风格中的风险线索，且结构开销大。
ai.method: 仅选取非终端AST节点降低复杂度并保留语义层次，集成语法和词汇的代码风格特征作为辅助信号，在7种语言的490万函数上预训练，然后在5个基准上微调。
ai.result: 在BigVul和VulDeePecker上F1提升4-48%，达到最优；在其他基准上取得最佳平均或竞争性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员和开发者更准确地检测软件漏洞，尤其是利用编程风格线索发现隐藏风险。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将代码风格特征与动态执行轨迹结合，构建更全面的漏洞检测模型。
idea_spark.risk: 代码风格特征可能因开发者习惯变化或混淆而失效，需持续更新预训练数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受代码风格分析在作者识别中的应用启发，将其引入安全领域作为辅助信号。

en.tldr: Proposes VulStyle, a multi-modal pre-training model that combines function-level source code, non-terminal AST, and code stylometry features for vulnerability detection, achieving state-of-the-art or competitive results on multiple benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing code representations rely on token-level models or full AST trees, missing stylistic cues of risky practices and incurring high structural overhead.
en.method: Selects only non-terminal AST nodes to reduce complexity while preserving semantic hierarchy, integrates syntactic and lexical code stylometry features as auxiliary signals, pre-trains on 4.9M functions across 7 languages, and fine-tunes on 5 benchmarks.
en.result: Improves F1 by 4-48% on BigVul and VulDeePecker, achieving state-of-the-art; obtains best-average or competitive performance on all benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Helps security researchers and developers detect software vulnerabilities more accurately, especially by leveraging programming style cues to uncover hidden risks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining code stylometry features with dynamic execution traces to build a more comprehensive vulnerability detection model.
idea_spark.risk: Code stylometry features may become ineffective due to changes in developer habits or obfuscation, requiring continuous pre-training data updates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the use of code stylometry in authorship attribution, this work introduces it as an auxiliary signal in the security domain.

papers.title: A PDE approach to Benamou--Brenier formula for the Schrödinger problem
papers.summary: We studied the Benamou--Brenier formulation of the Schrödinger problem, focusing on a gap between theoretical results and applications, that often involve measures with unbounded support. While the existing proof in the literature relies on the compactness of the marginals' supports to ensure the necessary regularity of the Schrödinger potentials, we extend the validity of the Benamou--Brenier formula to the larger class of sub-Gaussian probability measures. Exploiting fine estimates on the Hessian of the potentials and the entropic interpolation, we provide an almost self-contained proof that establishes the existence of a velocity field with the appropriate polynomial growth that ensures the right integrability. This result justifies the use of the dynamic formulation in more general settings, such as Gaussian and mixture-of-Gaussians models, important also for the applications.

ai.tldr: 将Benamou-Brenier公式从紧支撑测度推广到次高斯概率测度，填补了理论与应用之间的空白。
ai.motivation: 现有证明依赖边缘测度的紧支撑性，限制了在无界支撑测度（如高斯混合模型）中的应用。
ai.method: 通过精细估计Schrödinger势的Hessian矩阵和熵插值，构造具有适当多项式增长的速度场。
ai.result: 证明了次高斯概率测度下Benamou-Brenier公式成立，保证了动态公式在更一般场景中的可用性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理无界支撑测度的最优传输问题提供了严格的理论基础，尤其适用于高斯和混合高斯模型。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将次高斯条件进一步放宽到更一般的重尾分布？或者利用该框架设计新的熵正则化算法？
idea_spark.risk: 推广到更重尾分布时，速度场的多项式增长可能不足以保证积分收敛，需引入新的正则化技术。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于将理论结果与机器学习中常见的高斯混合模型对接，可探索该公式在生成模型（如扩散模型）中的应用。

zh.motivation: 现有证明依赖边缘测度的紧支撑性，限制了在无界支撑测度（如高斯混合模型）中的应用。
zh.method: 通过精细估计Schrödinger势的Hessian矩阵和熵插值，构造具有适当多项式增长的速度场。

en.tldr: Extends the Benamou-Brenier formula from compactly supported measures to sub-Gaussian probability measures, bridging theory and applications.
en.motivation: Existing proofs rely on compact support of marginals, limiting applicability to measures with unbounded support (e.g., Gaussian mixtures).
en.method: Exploits fine Hessian estimates of Schrödinger potentials and entropic interpolation to construct a velocity field with polynomial growth.
en.result: Proves the Benamou-Brenier formula holds for sub-Gaussian measures, justifying the dynamic formulation in broader settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous foundation for optimal transport problems with unbounded measures, especially Gaussian and mixture-of-Gaussians models.

idea_spark.idea: Could the sub-Gaussian condition be relaxed to heavier-tailed distributions? Or can this framework inspire new entropy-regularized algorithms?
idea_spark.risk: For heavier tails, polynomial growth may not ensure integrability, requiring additional regularization techniques.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by bridging theory with common machine learning models (Gaussian mixtures), explore applications in generative models like diffusion models.

papers.title: Probabilistic representation of solutions to the parabolic $p$-Laplace equation
papers.summary:
This work is concerned with the probabilistic representation of solutions to the $p$-Laplace evolution equation $ rac{\partial u}{\partial t}={m div}(|
abla u|^{p-2}
abla u)$ in $(0,\infty)	imes\mathbb{R}^d$, $u(0,x)=u_0(x),$ $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$. One proves that, if $p\geq 4$, and if $u_0$ is a probability density with compact support and $u_0\in L^2$, $|
abla u_0|\in L^\infty$, then $u$ can be represented as $u(t,x)dx=\mathscr L_{X(t)}(dx)$, where $\mathscr L_{X(t)}$ denotes the time marginal law of $X$ at time $t$ with $X$ being a probabilistically weak solution to a corresponding McKean-Vlasov stochastic differential equation. This result is based on a new second order global regularity result for the weak solutions to the parabolic $p$-Laplace equation.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了当p≥4且初值为紧支撑概率密度时，抛物p-Laplace方程的弱解可表示为某McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程的时间边际分布。
ai.motivation: 为抛物p-Laplace方程建立概率表示，以利用随机分析工具研究其解的性质。
ai.method: 通过证明弱解的二阶全局正则性，构造对应的McKean-Vlasov随机微分方程，并验证其弱解的时间边际分布与原PDE解一致。
ai.result: 在p≥4、初值满足一定正则性条件下，解可表示为随机过程的概率分布。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了将非线性扩散PDE转化为随机过程表示的理论框架，有助于理解解的概率本质。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似概率表示用于求解或模拟高维非线性PDE，利用随机模拟替代传统数值方法。
idea_spark.risk: 条件限制较强（p≥4、初值正则性高），实际应用范围可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从正则性结果出发，可探索更弱条件下的概率表示，或用于设计新的随机算法。

en.tldr: This paper proves that for p≥4 and compactly supported probability density initial data, weak solutions to the parabolic p-Laplace equation can be represented as the time marginal law of a McKean-Vlasov stochastic differential equation.
en.motivation: To establish a probabilistic representation for the parabolic p-Laplace equation, enabling the use of stochastic analysis tools to study its solutions.
en.method: By proving second-order global regularity for weak solutions, constructing a corresponding McKean-Vlasov SDE, and verifying that its time marginal law coincides with the PDE solution.
en.result: Under the conditions p≥4 and regular initial data, the solution is represented as the probability distribution of a stochastic process.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework linking nonlinear diffusion PDEs to stochastic processes, aiding in understanding the probabilistic nature of solutions.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to use similar probabilistic representations for solving or simulating high-dimensional nonlinear PDEs, replacing traditional numerical methods with stochastic simulations.
idea_spark.risk: The conditions are restrictive (p≥4, high regularity of initial data), potentially limiting practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from the regularity result, one could explore probabilistic representations under weaker conditions or design new stochastic algorithms.

papers.title: Rigged Liouville space formulation for quasi-Hermitian Liouville operators
papers.summary: We discuss a super bra-ket formalism for quasi-Hermitian Liouvillian operators within the framework of rigged Hilbert spaces (RHS). An RHS in terms of the Liouville space, referred to as a rigged Liouville space (RLS), is reconstructed by exploiting the mathematical fact that the space of Hilbert-Schmidt operators is unitarily equivalent to the tensor product of Hilbert spaces. The obtained RLS endows a rigorous foundation of the construction for the super bra-ket and for the spectral decompositions of both Hermitian and quasi-Hermitian Liouville operators, which are characterized by the generalized eigenvectors in the dual spaces. Furthermore, within this framework, the non-Hermitian Liouvillian operator and its adjoint can be constructed symmetrically, with their symmetric structure preserved. As an application of our RLS methodology, we examine the Liouville operators corresponding to Hermitian and non-Hermitian harmonic oscillators and elucidate the differences between their spectral decomposition forms.

ai.tldr: 本文在装备希尔伯特空间框架下，为拟厄米刘维尔算子建立了超bra-ket形式，并构造了装备刘维尔空间，为谱分解提供了严格基础。
ai.motivation: 为拟厄米刘维尔算子的超bra-ket形式和谱分解提供严格的数学基础。
ai.method: 利用希尔伯特-施密特算子空间与希尔伯特空间张量积的酉等价性，重构了装备刘维尔空间。
ai.result: 得到了装备刘维尔空间，严格定义了超bra-ket，并对称地构造了非厄米刘维尔算子及其伴随，揭示了厄米与非厄米谐振子谱分解形式的差异。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解拟厄米刘维尔算子的严格数学框架及其在开放量子系统中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用装备刘维尔空间统一处理厄米与非厄米刘维尔算子的谱分解。
idea_spark.risk: 数学构造可能过于抽象，实际计算实现有难度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将装备希尔伯特空间思想引入刘维尔空间，为开放量子系统提供新工具。

en.tldr: This paper establishes a super bra-ket formalism for quasi-Hermitian Liouvillian operators within the rigged Hilbert space framework, constructing a rigged Liouville space that provides a rigorous foundation for spectral decompositions.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous mathematical foundation for the super bra-ket formalism and spectral decompositions of quasi-Hermitian Liouvillian operators.
en.method: By exploiting the unitary equivalence between the space of Hilbert-Schmidt operators and the tensor product of Hilbert spaces, a rigged Liouville space is reconstructed.
en.result: A rigged Liouville space is obtained, rigorously defining the super bra-ket, and symmetrically constructing non-Hermitian Liouvillian operators and their adjoints, revealing differences in spectral decomposition forms between Hermitian and non-Hermitian harmonic oscillators.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the rigorous mathematical framework for quasi-Hermitian Liouvillian operators and its application in open quantum systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use rigged Liouville space to unify spectral decompositions of Hermitian and non-Hermitian Liouvillian operators.
idea_spark.risk: The mathematical construction may be too abstract, posing challenges for practical computation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing rigged Hilbert space ideas into Liouville space provides new tools for open quantum systems.

papers.title: Non-uniqueness for the stochastic incompressible Euler equations with a passive tracer
papers.summary: In this work we investigate the phenomenon of pathwise non-uniqueness for the stochastic incompressible Euler equations with a passive tracer on the whole Euclidean space. The stochastic perturbations are interpreted as a transport noise and a linear multiplicative noise in the Stratonovich sense. In both cases, via classical transformations, we convert the SPDEs into PDEs with random coefficients. Using the Baire category method developed by De Lellis and Székelyhidi Jr., we then construct infinitely many global-in-time weak solutions to the random PDEs in any spatial dimension greater than or equal to two. By applying the inverse transformations, we obtain pathwise non-uniqueness for the original SPDEs. Finally, we present an application of our result to the three-dimensional stochastic ideal MHD equations. This study can be regarded as a stochastic counterpart of Bronzi et al.~[\textit{Commun.~Math.~Sci.},~2015]. In particular, our non-uniqueness result in the random setting extends theirs from a constant energy profile equal to one to arbitrary positive, bounded, and continuous time-dependent profiles, originally established in two dimensions via the convex integration technique.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了带被动示踪物的随机不可压缩欧拉方程在路径意义下的非唯一性，并推广到三维随机理想MHD方程。
ai.motivation: 研究随机不可压缩欧拉方程解的非唯一性，并推广至磁流体动力学。
ai.method: 通过经典变换将SPDE转化为随机系数PDE，利用Baire范畴法和凸积分技术构造无穷多全局弱解。
ai.result: 在任意维数≥2的空间中，得到路径非唯一性，并将能量剖面从常数推广到任意正有界连续时变函数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机流体方程解的非唯一性机制及凸积分方法的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将确定性非唯一性结果通过随机变换推广到随机情形。
idea_spark.risk: 随机噪声的选取可能限制方法的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用随机变换将SPDE转化为随机系数PDE，简化分析。

zh.tldr: 本文证明了带被动示踪物的随机不可压缩欧拉方程在路径意义下的非唯一性，并推广到三维随机理想MHD方程。
zh.motivation: 研究随机不可压缩欧拉方程解的非唯一性，并推广至磁流体动力学。
zh.method: 通过经典变换将SPDE转化为随机系数PDE，利用Baire范畴法和凸积分技术构造无穷多全局弱解。
zh.result: 在任意维数≥2的空间中，得到路径非唯一性，并将能量剖面从常数推广到任意正有界连续时变函数。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机流体方程解的非唯一性机制及凸积分方法的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将确定性非唯一性结果通过随机变换推广到随机情形。
idea_spark.risk: 随机噪声的选取可能限制方法的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用随机变换将SPDE转化为随机系数PDE，简化分析。

en.tldr: This paper proves pathwise non-uniqueness for the stochastic incompressible Euler equations with a passive tracer, extending to 3D stochastic ideal MHD equations.
en.motivation: To investigate non-uniqueness of solutions to stochastic incompressible Euler equations and generalize to magnetohydrodynamics.
en.method: Transform SPDEs into PDEs with random coefficients, then apply Baire category method and convex integration to construct infinitely many global weak solutions.
en.result: Pathwise non-uniqueness in any spatial dimension ≥2, with energy profiles extended from constant to arbitrary positive bounded continuous time-dependent functions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand non-uniqueness mechanisms in stochastic fluid equations and application of convex integration.

idea_spark.idea: Extend deterministic non-uniqueness results to stochastic settings via random transformations.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of stochastic noise may limit generality of the method.
idea_spark.inspiration: Simplify analysis by transforming SPDEs into PDEs with random coefficients.

papers.title: Probabilistic results for monoids of order-preserving transformations
papers.summary: Let $\mathcal{PO}_n$ be the monoid of all order-preserving partial transformations on $X_n=\{1,\dots, n\}$ with the natural order, and let $\mathcal{O}_n$ and $\mathcal{POI}_n$ denote its submonoids of order-preserving full and injective partial transformations, respectively. For each transformation $α\in\mathcal{PO}_n$, write the random variables $Y(α)=|{\im}α|$ and $Y_r(α)=|{\im}α|$ given that $|{\dom}α|=r$ for $0 \leqslant r \leqslant n$. We determine the probability distribution, expectation and variance of $Y_r$ and $Y$ for $\mathcal{PO}_n$ and $\mathcal{POI}_n$. In particular, $Y_r(α)$ follows a hypergeometric distribution $H(n+r-1,n,r)$ for $α\in \mathcal{PO}_n$, while $Y_r(α)$ is degenerate and $Y(α)$ follows a hypergeometric distribution $H(2n,n,n)$ for $α\in \mathcal{POI}_n$.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了保序部分变换幺半群及其子幺半群中变换的像集大小的概率分布、期望和方差，发现其服从超几何分布。
ai.motivation: 探索保序变换幺半群中随机变换的像集大小的统计性质，为代数组合与概率论的交叉提供新结果。
ai.method: 定义随机变量Y(α)=|im α|和给定定义域大小r时的Y_r(α)，利用组合计数推导其概率分布，并计算期望与方差。
ai.result: 对于保序部分变换幺半群PO_n，Y_r(α)服从超几何分布H(n+r-1,n,r)；对于保序单射部分变换幺半群POI_n，Y_r(α)退化，Y(α)服从超几何分布H(2n,n,n)。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解保序变换幺半群中随机变换的像集大小的概率规律，可用于相关代数结构的随机分析。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑保序变换幺半群中其他随机变量（如不动点个数、轨道长度）的概率分布。
idea_spark.risk: 推广到非保序变换时，组合计数可能更复杂，分布形式未必简单。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将概率方法引入半群代数结构的研究，可能发现更多经典分布与代数对象之间的对应关系。

en.tldr: This paper studies the probability distribution, expectation, and variance of the image size of transformations in the monoid of order-preserving partial transformations and its submonoids, revealing hypergeometric distributions.
en.motivation: To explore statistical properties of the image size of random transformations in order-preserving transformation monoids, bridging algebraic combinatorics and probability.
en.method: Define random variables Y(α)=|im α| and Y_r(α)=|im α| given |dom α|=r, derive probability distributions via combinatorial counting, and compute expectation and variance.
en.result: For the monoid PO_n of order-preserving partial transformations, Y_r(α) follows hypergeometric distribution H(n+r-1,n,r); for POI_n (order-preserving injective partial transformations), Y_r(α) is degenerate and Y(α) follows hypergeometric distribution H(2n,n,n).
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the probabilistic behavior of image sizes in order-preserving transformation monoids, useful for stochastic analysis of algebraic structures.

idea_spark.idea: Consider probability distributions of other random variables in order-preserving monoids, such as number of fixed points or orbit lengths.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization to non-order-preserving transformations may involve more complex combinatorics and less tractable distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing probabilistic methods into the study of semigroup algebraic structures may reveal further correspondences between classical distributions and algebraic objects.

papers.title: Planar Gaussian Splatting with Bilinear Spatial Transformer for Wireless Radiance Field Reconstruction
papers.summary: Wireless radiance field (WRF) reconstruction aims to learn a continuous, queryable representation of radio frequency characteristics over 3D space and direction, from which specific quantities, such as the spatial power spectrum (SPS) at a receiver given a transmitter position, can be predicted. While Gaussian splatting (GS)-based method has surpassed Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF)-based method for this task, existing adaptations largely transplant vision pipelines, limiting physical interpretability and accuracy. We introduce BiSplat-WRF, a planar GS framework that retains the expressiveness of 3D GS while removing unnecessary projections and incorporating global EM coupling and mutual scattering among primitives. Each primitive is a 2D planar Gaussian with 3D coordinates, rendered directly on the angular domain of the SPS. A bilinear spatial transformer (BST) aggregates inter-primitive relations on an angular grid and, via attention, captures long-range electromagnetic dependencies, thereby enforcing globally aware EM interactions that reflect the complex physics of the wireless environment. On spatial spectrum synthesis task, BiSplat-WRF surpasses NeRF-based and prior GS-based baselines with respect to the Structural Similarity Index (SSIM); comprehensive ablation studies validate the contribution of BST. We also provide a larger BiSplat-WRF+ variant that further increases SSIM at a higher computation cost, serving as a strong reference for future studies.

ai.tldr: 提出BiSplat-WRF，一种基于平面高斯溅射和双线性空间变换器的无线辐射场重建方法，在空间频谱合成任务上优于现有NeRF和GS基线。
ai.motivation: 现有GS方法直接移植视觉管线，缺乏物理可解释性和准确性，无法有效建模无线环境中的全局电磁耦合与互散射。
ai.method: 使用2D平面高斯作为基元，在SPS角域直接渲染；通过双线性空间变换器在角网格上聚合基元间关系，利用注意力机制捕获长程电磁依赖。
ai.result: 在空间频谱合成任务中，BiSplat-WRF在SSIM指标上超越NeRF和先前GS方法；消融实验验证了BST的贡献；更大变体BiSplat-WRF+进一步提升SSIM。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将平面高斯溅射与空间变换器结合用于无线辐射场重建，提升物理建模精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将基元间的长程依赖建模为图结构，结合图神经网络进一步捕获复杂电磁交互。
idea_spark.risk: 注意力机制可能带来较高计算开销，需权衡精度与效率；平面假设在极端多径环境下可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受电磁场互易定理启发，设计对称性约束的注意力机制，提升模型物理一致性。

en.tldr: Proposes BiSplat-WRF, a planar Gaussian splatting framework with a bilinear spatial transformer for wireless radiance field reconstruction, outperforming NeRF and prior GS baselines on spatial spectrum synthesis.
en.motivation: Existing GS methods transplant vision pipelines, lacking physical interpretability and accuracy for modeling global EM coupling and mutual scattering in wireless environments.
en.method: Uses 2D planar Gaussians as primitives rendered directly on the angular domain of SPS; a bilinear spatial transformer aggregates inter-primitive relations on an angular grid via attention to capture long-range EM dependencies.
en.result: BiSplat-WRF surpasses NeRF and prior GS baselines in SSIM on spatial spectrum synthesis; ablation studies confirm BST contribution; larger BiSplat-WRF+ variant further improves SSIM at higher cost.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to combine planar Gaussian splatting with spatial transformers for wireless radiance field reconstruction, enhancing physical modeling accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Model inter-primitive long-range dependencies as a graph structure and use graph neural networks to further capture complex EM interactions.
idea_spark.risk: Attention mechanism may incur high computational cost, requiring trade-off between accuracy and efficiency; planar assumption may be limited in extreme multipath environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the reciprocity theorem in electromagnetics, design symmetry-constrained attention mechanisms to improve physical consistency of the model.

papers.title: Reconstruction of the Support of an Inhomogeneity for the Fractional Helmholtz Equation
papers.summary: We consider the inverse scattering problem for inhomogeneous media of compact support governed by the fractional s-Helmholtz equation, with $0<s<1$, in dimensions $d=1,2,3$. In particular, we study the determination of the support of the inhomogeneity from the far-field pattern of the scattered field generated by plane waves for all incident directions at a fixed frequency. The far-field pattern is defined as the principal term in the asymptotic expansion of the scattered field at infinity. It is shown in \cite{zilberberg2026limiting} that, up to a multiplicative constant, this coincides with the far-field pattern corresponding to the classical Helmholtz equation with the same inhomogeneity. Our approach is based on the development of the factorization method, which not only leads to an efficient and easily implementable reconstruction algorithm, but also provides a uniqueness result for determining the support of an admissible set of inhomogeneities. A fundamental ingredient in the analysis is a new transmission eigenvalue problem, whose eigenvalues must be excluded. Therefore, we prove that they are discrete with no finite accumulation points. We present numerical examples in dimension $d=2$ for both the direct and inverse problems.

ai.tldr: 针对分数阶s-Helmholtz方程（0<s<1，d=1,2,3）的逆散射问题，提出基于因子化方法的重构算法，从固定频率平面波入射的远场模式恢复非均匀介质支撑，并证明传输特征值问题的离散性。
ai.motivation: 经典Helmholtz方程逆散射理论成熟，但分数阶情形（s-Helmholtz）的支撑重构缺乏系统方法。
ai.method: 发展因子化方法，利用远场模式渐近展开的主项（与经典情形仅差常数倍），并引入新的传输特征值问题以排除奇异点。
ai.result: 给出可容许非均匀介质支撑的唯一性证明，并在二维数值实验中验证了直接与逆问题的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可直接实现的分数阶波动方程逆散射支撑重构算法，并揭示了传输特征值的离散性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用分数阶远场模式与经典情形的简单关系，将经典Helmholtz逆散射算法直接迁移至分数阶情形。
idea_spark.risk: 传输特征值的存在可能影响算法稳定性，需在实现中仔细排除。
idea_spark.inspiration: 分数阶算子与经典算子的远场渐近等价性，暗示了更广泛的非局部逆问题可借用经典工具。

en.tldr: For the fractional s-Helmholtz equation (0<s<1, d=1,2,3), a factorization method is developed to reconstruct the support of an inhomogeneity from far-field patterns at a fixed frequency, with uniqueness and discrete transmission eigenvalues. Numerical examples in 2D are provided.
en.motivation: Classical Helmholtz inverse scattering is well-studied, but the fractional case lacks systematic support reconstruction methods.
en.method: Factorization method exploiting the asymptotic equivalence of far-field patterns (up to a constant) between fractional and classical Helmholtz equations, plus a new transmission eigenvalue problem to exclude singularities.
en.result: Uniqueness for admissible inhomogeneities and numerical validation in 2D for both direct and inverse problems.
en.help_to_user: Provides a directly implementable algorithm for fractional wave inverse scattering and reveals the discreteness of transmission eigenvalues.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the simple relation between fractional and classical far-field patterns to port classical Helmholtz inversion algorithms to the fractional setting.
idea_spark.risk: Transmission eigenvalues may cause instability; careful exclusion is needed in implementation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The asymptotic equivalence of far-field patterns between fractional and classical operators suggests that many nonlocal inverse problems can borrow classical tools.

papers.title: Degree-dependent and distance-dependent contact rates interpolate between explosive, exponential and polynomial epidemic growth
papers.summary: It is a fundamental question in epidemiology to estimate, model and predict the growth rate of a pandemic. Analogously, analysing the diffusion of innovation, (fake) news, memes, and rumours is of key importance in the social sciences. The resulting epidemic growth curves can be classified according to their growth rates. These have been found to range from exponential to both faster super-exponential curves and slower subexponential or polynomial curves. Previous research has lacked a unified explanatory framework capable of accommodating super-exponential, (stretched) exponential, and polynomial growth patterns within the same contact network. In this paper we propose a simple agent-based network model that can capture all these phases. We provide such a framework by modelling how transmission rates depend on spatial distance and on individuals' numbers of contacts. By comparing the growth rate of spreading processes with or without degree-dependent and/or distance-dependent contact rates through data-driven and synthetic simulations on real and modelled networks with underlying geometry, we find evidence that even a 'sublinear presence' of these causes may cause a significant slow down of the growth rate on the same underlying network. We find that the growth rate is governed by a combination of three factors: geometry, the prevalence of weak ties, and superspreaders. We confirm our results with rigorous proofs in a theoretical model, using a spatial multiscale-argument in long-range heterogeneous first passage percolation. Our results give a plausible explanation of why the consecutive waves of a single pandemic can differ in their growth even if their spreading mechanisms are similar.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于主体的网络模型，通过度依赖和距离依赖的接触率统一解释爆炸性、指数性和多项式增长模式。
ai.motivation: 现有研究缺乏统一框架来解释同一接触网络中不同增长模式（超指数、指数、亚指数/多项式）的共存。
ai.method: 构建基于主体的网络模型，引入度依赖和距离依赖的接触率，在真实和合成网络上进行数据驱动和模拟实验，并用空间多尺度长程异质首达渗流理论证明。
ai.result: 即使接触率的度/距离依赖呈亚线性，也会显著减缓增长；增长速率由几何结构、弱连接比例和超级传播者共同决定。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解疫情传播中增长模式变化的机制，为干预策略（如限制远距离接触、减少超级传播者影响）提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用距离依赖和度依赖的接触率设计更精准的社交距离政策，或优化网络结构以抑制虚假信息扩散。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化真实接触网络，实际中接触率的依赖关系可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将空间几何和网络拓扑结合，用于预测多波疫情中增长模式的变化。
