en.tldr: Proposes an agent-based network model with degree- and distance-dependent contact rates to unify explosive, exponential, and polynomial epidemic growth.
en.motivation: Previous work lacked a unified framework to explain different growth patterns (super-exponential, exponential, subexponential/polynomial) within the same contact network.
en.method: Develops an agent-based network model incorporating degree- and distance-dependent contact rates, validated via data-driven and synthetic simulations on real and modeled networks, with rigorous proofs using spatial multiscale long-range heterogeneous first passage percolation.
en.result: Even sublinear degree/distance dependence significantly slows growth; growth rate is governed by geometry, weak-tie prevalence, and superspreaders.
en.help_to_user: Provides mechanistic understanding of growth pattern shifts in epidemics, informing interventions like limiting long-range contacts or targeting superspreaders.

idea_spark.idea: Design more precise social distancing policies or optimize network structures to suppress misinformation using distance- and degree-dependent contact rates.
idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may oversimplify real contact networks; actual contact rate dependencies could be more complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining spatial geometry and network topology to predict growth pattern changes across epidemic waves.

papers.title: Quasar-Convex Optimization: Fundamental Properties and High-Order Proximal-Point Methods
papers.summary: We study the optimization of (strongly) quasar-convex functions, a class that arises naturally in many machine learning and data science applications due to its favorable properties. The fundamental properties of this class are first developed, including its stability under standard calculus operations, growth conditions, and the absence of spurious critical points, which together imply a benign global geometry with no saddle points. Motivated by these properties, a class of proximal-point algorithms (HiPPA) with high-order regularization of order $p>1$ is introduced. Conditions are identified under which the iterates converge globally to minimizers, and a unified convergence analysis is provided with explicit rates and iteration complexity bounds under appropriate regularity assumptions. The results reveal a sharp transition in behavior with respect to the order $p$: for $p\in(1,2)$, the method achieves local linear convergence with complexity $\mathcal{O}(\log(\varepsilon^{-1}))$ when initialized sufficiently close to a minimizer; for $p=2$, it attains global linear convergence with the same complexity; and for $p>2$, it exhibits superlinear convergence with complexity $\mathcal{O}(\log\log(\varepsilon^{-1}))$, where $\varepsilon>0$ denotes the target accuracy. The theory is complemented with preliminary numerical experiments on selected machine learning problems, which illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed methods and are consistent with the theoretical findings.

papers.title: Combinatorics and asymptotic behavior for double Hurwitz numbers
papers.summary: Polynomial-in-time algorithms for computing classical Hurwitz numbers were given in [4] based on the Pandharipande equation. The paritition function of double Hurwitz numbers was proved [21] to satisfy the 2-Toda hierarchy. In this paper, similar to [21] we derive Pandharipande-type equations for double Hurwitz numbers from 2-Toda hierarchy. Based on these equations and a method from [4], we study large genus as well as large degree asymptotics of double Hurwitz numbers.

ai.tldr: 本文从2-Toda层次推导出双Hurwitz数的Pandharipande型方程，并基于此研究了大亏格和大度数的渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 经典Hurwitz数已有多项式时间算法，但双Hurwitz数的渐近性质尚未充分研究。
ai.method: 利用2-Toda层次推导Pandharipande型方程，结合[4]中的方法分析渐近行为。
ai.result: 得到了双Hurwitz数在大亏格和大度数下的渐近公式。
ai.help_to_user: 为组合数学和数学物理中Hurwitz数的计算与渐近分析提供了新工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将2-Toda层次与Pandharipande方程结合，系统研究双Hurwitz数的渐近性。
idea_spark.risk: 渐近分析可能依赖于特定方程形式，推广时需验证可积结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从可积系统角度研究枚举组合问题，可能发现新的渐近规律。

papers.title: Induced Stackelberg Equilibrium Seeking via Iterative Tikhonov Regularization
papers.summary: Existing methods for learning Stackelberg equilibria typically assume that the followers' (variational, generalized) Nash equilibrium is unique. However, in the presence of multiple equilibria, without a selection convention, the problem may become ill-posed, thus leading standard algorithms to potentially fail to converge. This paper addresses this issue by introducing an optimal selection at the lower-level game, hereby defining a Stackelberg game with induced equilibrium selection. To this end, we enable the leader to augment the followers' game with an additional vanishing term that acts as an incentive. We then propose a follower-agnostic zeroth-order method, whereby the leader converges to a solution of the resulting problem by iteratively probing the followers and jointly updating its decision variable and the incentive term.

ai.tldr: 提出一种通过迭代Tikhonov正则化诱导下层博弈均衡选择的方法，解决多均衡下Stackelberg博弈的收敛问题。
ai.motivation: 现有方法假设下层博弈均衡唯一，但多均衡时算法可能失效。
ai.method: 领导者添加一个逐渐消失的激励项，并采用零阶方法迭代更新决策和激励。
ai.result: 领导者能收敛到诱导均衡解，且无需了解跟随者具体模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多均衡Stackelberg博弈的求解思路和正则化技术。

idea_spark.idea: 利用迭代正则化迫使下层选择对领导者有利的均衡。
idea_spark.risk: 激励项消失速度需谨慎调节，否则可能不收敛或收敛到次优解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Tikhonov正则化在逆问题中稳定解的思想启发。

papers.title: Almost-sharp $O(k^{-1} \log k)$ convergence rate for the Sinkhorn algorithm in the asymptotically scalable case
papers.summary: We prove that the Sinkhorn algorithm converges at a rate of $O(k^{-1} \log k)$ in $\ell_1$-norm marginal error, in the asymptotically scalable case. This almost closes the gap between the lower bound $Ω(k^{-1})$ (Qu et al., 2025) and the previously best known upper bound $O(k^{-1/2})$ (Léger, 2021), and generalizes the analysis for the positive case by Dvurechensky et al. (2018).

ai.tldr: 证明了在渐近可扩展情形下，Sinkhorn算法在ℓ1范数边际误差上达到O(k^{-1} log k)的收敛速度，几乎填补了已知下界Ω(k^{-1})与上界O(k^{-1/2})之间的差距。
ai.motivation: 缩小Sinkhorn算法收敛率理论下界与上界之间的差距，特别是在渐近可扩展情形下。
ai.method: 通过精细的迭代分析，推导出ℓ1范数边际误差的收敛上界为O(k^{-1} log k)。
ai.result: 获得了几乎最优的收敛率O(k^{-1} log k)，推广了正情形下的已有结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解Sinkhorn算法在最优传输问题中的实际收敛行为，指导算法参数选择。

idea_spark.idea: 利用对数因子改进上界，可能通过更紧的势函数或迭代耦合实现。
idea_spark.risk: 分析依赖于渐近可扩展假设，非渐近情形下结论可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似的对数上界技术应用于其他迭代算法（如镜像下降）的收敛分析。

papers.title: The Expiring Coupon Collector: Sliding-Window Surjection Flux and Rare-Entry Laws
papers.summary: We study the coupon collector with deterministic expiration: one coupon is drawn at each time, and each coupon remains active for exactly $M$ draws. Completion occurs when all $n$ coupon types are simultaneously active. Equivalently, the current length-$M$ sliding window of draws must contain all $n$ types.   The central object is not the one-time probability that a random window is onto, but the stationary flux of new entries into the onto-window set. We compute this flux exactly: \[   μ_{n,M}   =\Pbb(W_{t-1}\text{ is not onto},\ W_t\text{ is onto})   =\frac{(n-1)(n-1)!S(M-1,n-1)}{n^M}, \] where $S(\cdot,\cdot)$ denotes a Stirling number of the second kind. Under a quantitative subcritical separation condition, satisfied in particular by every fixed integer scale $M=\floor{αn\log n}$, $0<α<1$, we prove local declumping and obtain \[   μ_{n,M}T_{n,M}\Rightarrow \Exp(1). \] For the fixed subcritical scale $M=\floor{αn\log n}$, $0<α<1$, this gives the logarithmic scale \[   \log T_{n,M}=n^{1-α}+o_{\mathbb P}(n^{1-α}),   \qquad   \log \Ebb T_{n,M}=n^{1-α}+o(n^{1-α}), \] and, when $α>1/2$, the sharper normalization \[   n^{-α}e^{-n^{1-α}}T_{n,M}\Rightarrow \Exp(1),   \qquad   \Ebb T_{n,M}\sim n^αe^{n^{1-α}}. \] Thus the leading scale proposed in the Math StackExchange discussion is made rigorous; the exact finite-$n$ flux gives the canonical normalization throughout the subcritical range. The result is a sliding-window companion to rare-void entry-flux methods for nonmonotone coupon collectors.

ai.tldr: 研究具有确定性过期机制的优惠券收集问题，其中每个优惠券在M步后过期，窗口必须包含所有n种类型才算完成。精确计算了窗口变为满射的平稳通量，并推导了完成时间的极限分布。
ai.motivation: 经典优惠券收集问题假设优惠券永久有效，而实际场景中优惠券或物品会过期。本文旨在理解过期机制如何影响收集完成时间，特别是滑动窗口下稀有进入事件的统计规律。
ai.method: 定义滑动窗口满射通量μ_{n,M}，利用第二类斯特林数给出精确表达式。在亚临界分离条件下，证明局部聚集性质，并推导完成时间T_{n,M}的指数极限分布。
ai.result: 得到μ_{n,M}的精确公式；对于固定亚临界尺度M=⌊α n log n⌋ (0<α<1)，给出log T_{n,M}的渐近阶；当α>1/2时，得到归一化后的指数极限分布。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理带过期时间的收集问题提供了精确的数学工具和极限理论，可用于分析缓存、网络数据包、生物序列等滑动窗口场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将过期机制与优惠券收集结合，定义窗口满射通量作为关键统计量，利用组合恒等式精确计算，再通过局部聚集导出极限分布。
idea_spark.risk: 亚临界条件可能限制应用范围；精确公式依赖于第二类斯特林数，计算复杂度高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Math StackExchange讨论出发，将直观猜想严格化，展示了组合概率与极限理论的巧妙结合。

en.tldr: Studies the coupon collector with deterministic expiration, where each coupon expires after M draws and a sliding window must contain all n types. Computes the exact stationary flux of windows becoming onto and derives limit distributions for completion times.
en.motivation: Classic coupon collector assumes permanent coupons, but real-world coupons or items expire. This paper aims to understand how expiration affects collection completion, especially rare entry events in sliding windows.
en.method: Defines the sliding-window surjection flux μ_{n,M}, gives an exact expression using Stirling numbers of the second kind. Under a subcritical separation condition, proves local declumping and derives exponential limit distributions for T_{n,M}.
en.result: Obtains exact formula for μ_{n,M}; for fixed subcritical scale M=⌊α n log n⌋ (0<α<1), gives asymptotic order of log T_{n,M}; when α>1/2, obtains normalized exponential limit distribution.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise mathematical tools and limit theory for collection problems with expiration, applicable to sliding-window scenarios like caches, network packets, and biological sequences.

idea_spark.idea: Combines expiration with coupon collecting, defines window surjection flux as key statistic, computes exactly via combinatorial identities, then derives limit distributions via local declumping.
idea_spark.risk: Subcritical condition may limit applicability; exact formula relies on Stirling numbers, which are computationally expensive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Rigorizes an intuitive conjecture from Math StackExchange, showcasing a clever blend of combinatorial probability and limit theory.

keywords_raw: stirling numbers of the second kind

papers.title: DreamProver: Evolving Transferable Lemma Libraries via a Wake-Sleep Theorem-Proving Agent
papers.summary: We introduce DreamProver, an agentic framework that leverages a "wake-sleep" program induction paradigm to discover reusable lemmas for formal theorem proving. Existing approaches either rely on fixed lemma libraries, which limit adaptability, or synthesize highly specific intermediate lemmas tailored to individual theorems, thereby lacking generality. DreamProver addresses this gap through an iterative two-stage process. In the wake stage, DreamProver attempts to prove theorems from a training set using the current lemma library while proposing new candidate lemmas. In the "sleep" stage, it abstracts, refines, and consolidates these candidates to compress and optimize the library. Through this alternating cycle, DreamProver progressively evolves a compact set of high-level, transferable lemmas that can be effectively used to prove unseen theorems in related domains. Experimental results demonstrate that DreamProver substantially improves proof success rates across a diverse set of mathematical benchmarks, while also producing more concise proofs and reducing computational cost.

ai.tldr: 提出DreamProver框架，通过“醒-睡”程序归纳范式自动演化可迁移引理库，提升形式化定理证明的成功率与效率。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖固定引理库或生成过于特化的引理，缺乏通用性和适应性。
ai.method: 采用两阶段迭代：醒阶段用当前引理库证明定理并提议新引理；睡阶段对候选引理进行抽象、精炼和合并，压缩优化库。
ai.result: 在多个数学基准上显著提高证明成功率，同时产生更简洁的证明并降低计算成本。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动构建高质量、可迁移的引理库，加速形式化定理证明过程。

en.tldr: DreamProver uses a wake-sleep program induction paradigm to evolve a compact library of transferable lemmas, improving formal theorem proving success rates and efficiency.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on fixed lemma libraries or generate overly specific lemmas, lacking generality and adaptability.
en.method: Iterative two-stage process: wake stage proves theorems and proposes new lemmas; sleep stage abstracts, refines, and consolidates candidates to compress the library.
en.result: Substantially improves proof success rates across diverse mathematical benchmarks, yields more concise proofs, and reduces computational cost.
en.help_to_user: Automatically builds high-quality, transferable lemma libraries to accelerate formal theorem proving.

idea_spark.idea: Treat the lemma library as a learnable knowledge base, continuously optimized through alternating exploration and compression.
idea_spark.risk: Abstraction and consolidation may lose critical details, degrading lemma quality; transfer may be limited when training and test domains differ significantly.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by sleep consolidation of memory in biological learning, mapping lemma discovery in theorem proving to memory reorganization.

papers.title: Functional Dimensional Regularization for O(N) Models
papers.summary: The novel functional dimensional regularization (FDR) scheme has proven capable of yielding results that are competitive with the state-of-the-art in the computation of critical exponents in $d=3$, while also reproducing those from the $\varepsilon$-expansion for the Ising and other universality classes. In this work, we show that this is not a mere coincidence: by applying the scheme to the $O(N)$ universality class, we explicitly derive the flow equations and obtain critical exponents that are comparable to those obtained with higher-order non-perturbative approaches. In this case, FDR retains the features already highlighted in previous works -- namely, its efficiency and rapid convergence.

ai.tldr: 本文证明功能维度正则化（FDR）方案在O(N)普适类中能高效且快速收敛地计算临界指数，结果与高阶非微扰方法相当。
ai.motivation: 验证FDR方案在O(N)模型中的普适性和可靠性，并解释其与ε展开结果一致的原因。
ai.method: 将FDR方案应用于O(N)普适类，推导出流方程并计算临界指数。
ai.result: FDR得到的临界指数与高阶非微扰方法结果可比，且保持高效和快速收敛的特性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种计算临界指数的替代正则化方案，可能简化计算过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将FDR与机器学习结合，自动优化正则化参数以加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: FDR在非微扰区域的有效性可能依赖于模型细节，需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴FDR的维度正则化思想，设计新的数值方法处理强耦合系统。

en.tldr: This paper demonstrates that the functional dimensional regularization (FDR) scheme efficiently and rapidly converges to critical exponents for the O(N) universality class, comparable to higher-order non-perturbative methods.
en.motivation: To verify the universality and reliability of the FDR scheme in O(N) models and explain its agreement with epsilon-expansion results.
en.method: Apply the FDR scheme to the O(N) universality class, derive flow equations, and compute critical exponents.
en.result: FDR yields critical exponents comparable to higher-order non-perturbative approaches, retaining efficiency and rapid convergence.
en.help_to_user: Provides an alternative regularization scheme for computing critical exponents, potentially simplifying calculations.

papers.title: Global weak solutions to a diffuse-interface model for quasi-incompressible two-phase flows with unmatched densities and singular potential
papers.summary: We study a thermodynamically consistent diffuse-interface model that describes the motion of two macroscopically immiscible, incompressible, and viscous Newtonian fluids with unmatched densities. This model is compatible with continuum mixture theory. It adopts a mass-averaged (barycentric) velocity so that the two-phase flow is quasi-incompressible: the velocity is no longer divergence-free, and the pressure enters the equation of the chemical potential. For the initial-boundary value problem in $\mathbb{T}^3$ with a class of physically relevant singular free energy densities, we prove the existence of global-in-time weak solutions. The proof relies on a suitable reduction of the original system to a Korteweg-type fluid model combined with a two-layer approximation, together with delicate estimates for the mass density and the phase-field variable inspired by the celebrated Bresch-Desjardins entropy. A key observation is that capillarity at the free interface provides a damping effect on the density evolution. For the limiting procedure, we derive delicate tail estimates to exclude possible concentrations of the singular potential, since no integrability of the pressure is available \textit{a priori}. This work appears to be the first existence result for the Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard type system with unmatched densities and mass-averaged velocity without spatial regularization.

ai.tldr: 针对密度不匹配的准不可压缩两相流扩散界面模型，在奇异势下证明了全局弱解的存在性。
ai.motivation: 现有结果缺乏对密度不匹配且采用质量平均速度的Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard系统全局弱解的存在性证明。
ai.method: 将原系统约化为Korteweg型流体模型，结合两层逼近和Bresch-Desjardins熵估计，利用界面毛细作用对密度演化的阻尼效应，并通过精细尾估计排除奇异势的集中。
ai.result: 首次在无空间正则化条件下，证明了该模型在三维环面上全局弱解的存在性。
ai.help_to_user: 为两相流数值模拟和理论分析提供了严格的数学基础，特别是处理密度差异和奇异势的情形。

idea_spark.idea: 利用界面毛细阻尼控制密度演化，结合两层逼近处理奇异势，为类似非线性偏微分方程组提供分析框架。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖特定几何结构（环面）和奇异势形式，推广至一般边界条件或势函数可能需额外假设。

en.tldr: Proved the existence of global weak solutions for a diffuse-interface model of quasi-incompressible two-phase flows with unmatched densities and singular potential.
en.motivation: No existence result existed for the Navier-Stokes/Cahn-Hilliard system with unmatched densities and mass-averaged velocity without spatial regularization.
en.method: Reduced the system to a Korteweg-type fluid model, combined a two-layer approximation with Bresch-Desjardins entropy estimates, exploited capillary damping on density evolution, and derived tail estimates to exclude singular potential concentration.
en.result: First existence result for global weak solutions on the 3D torus without spatial regularization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for numerical simulations and theoretical analysis of two-phase flows, especially with density contrast and singular potentials.

idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing a complex system into tractable subproblems (Korteweg model + two-layer approximation) can inspire existence proofs for other multiphysics coupling problems.

papers.title: Exact formula for the 2-marginal second moment function of the multidimensional symmetric Markov random flight
papers.summary: We consider the symmetric Markov random flight $\bold X(t), \; t>0,$ in the Euclidean space $\Bbb R^m, \; m\ge 3$, performed by a particle that moves in $\Bbb R^m$ with constant finite speed and changes its directions at Poisson-distributed random time instants by choosing the initial and each new direction at random according to the uniform distribution on the unit $(m-1)$-dimensional sphere. The 2-marginal second moment function $μ_{(2,2,0,\dots,0)}(t), \; t>0,$ of $\bold X(t)$, corresponding to the multi-index $(2,2,0,\dots,0)$, is examined. An explicit formula for function $μ_{(2,2,0,\dots,0)}(t)$ is obtained. This formula is also valid for all other 2-marginal second moment functions corresponding to any multi-indices of the form $(0,\dots,0,2,0,\dots,0,2,0,\dots,0)$. It is also shown that this moment function, under the standard Kac scaling condition, turns into the product of the variances of two coordinates of the $m$-dimensional homogeneous Brownian motion.

ai.tldr: 给出了多维对称马尔可夫随机飞行在欧几里得空间中的2-边缘二阶矩函数的显式公式，并证明在Kac标度下该矩函数退化为布朗运动坐标方差的乘积。
ai.motivation: 推导随机飞行过程的高阶矩函数，以理解其统计特性及与布朗运动的联系。
ai.method: 利用多指标(2,2,0,...,0)对应的2-边缘二阶矩函数，通过解析推导得到显式表达式。
ai.result: 获得了该矩函数的精确公式，并证明在Kac标度条件下它等于m维均匀布朗运动两个坐标方差的乘积。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机飞行过程的矩分析提供精确数学工具，有助于相关物理和概率模型的理论研究。

idea_spark.idea: 探索随机飞行过程在非均匀方向分布或变速度情况下的矩函数行为。
idea_spark.risk: 显式公式可能仅适用于特定对称性和均匀分布假设，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: Kac标度下退化为布朗运动的结果启发我们研究其他随机过程在标度极限下的布朗运动近似。

en.tldr: An explicit formula for the 2-marginal second moment function of the symmetric Markov random flight in Euclidean space is derived, and under Kac scaling it reduces to the product of variances of two coordinates of Brownian motion.
en.motivation: To derive higher-order moment functions of the random flight process for understanding its statistical properties and connection to Brownian motion.
en.method: Analytical derivation of the 2-marginal second moment function corresponding to the multi-index (2,2,0,...,0).
en.result: An exact formula for the moment function is obtained, and under Kac scaling it equals the product of variances of two coordinates of m-dimensional homogeneous Brownian motion.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise mathematical tools for moment analysis of random flight processes, aiding theoretical studies in physics and probability.

idea_spark.idea: Explore moment functions of random flight under non-uniform direction distributions or variable speed.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit formulas may rely on specific symmetry and uniform distribution assumptions; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: The reduction to Brownian motion under Kac scaling inspires studying Brownian approximations of other stochastic processes in scaling limits.

papers.title: Adaptive and Fine-grained Module-wise Expert Pruning for Efficient LoRA-MoE Fine-Tuning
papers.summary: LoRA-MoE has emerged as an effective paradigm for parameter-efficient fine-tuning, combining the low training cost of LoRA with the increased adaptation capacity of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE). However, existing LoRA-MoE frameworks typically adopt a fixed and uniform expert configuration across heterogeneous Transformer modules (\eg, attention query/key projections and MLP gating networks), ignoring their distinct functional roles and capacity requirements. This design leads to localized over-provisioning, redundant trainable parameters, and unnecessary optimizer-state overhead. Moreover, prior methods enforce load balancing among experts throughout training. Although beneficial in the early stage, this constraint becomes restrictive once routing patterns stabilize, limiting expert specialization on downstream tasks. In this paper, we propose DMEP, a novel LoRA-MoE fine-tuning framework based on Dynamic Module-wise Expert Pruning. DMEP tracks expert utilization during training and physically removes low-utility experts on a per-module basis, yielding a more compact expert structure tailored to different modules. The pruned model then continues training without the load-balancing constraint, freeing the remaining experts to focus entirely on the downstream task and develop specialized expertise. By jointly adapting module-wise expert capacity and eliminating unnecessary balancing, DMEP improves both parameter efficiency and training efficiency. Extensive experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks show that DMEP reduces trainable parameters by 35\%--43\% and improves training throughput by about 10\%, while maintaining or surpassing the downstream reasoning accuracy of uniform LoRA-MoE baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出DMEP框架，通过动态模块级专家剪枝和移除负载均衡约束，提升LoRA-MoE微调的参数与训练效率。
ai.motivation: 现有LoRA-MoE对所有Transformer模块采用固定专家配置，忽略模块功能差异，导致参数冗余和负载均衡约束限制专家专业化。
ai.method: 训练中追踪专家利用率，按模块物理移除低效用专家，之后移除负载均衡约束，使剩余专家专注下游任务。
ai.result: 在多个推理基准上可减少35%-43%可训练参数，提升约10%训练吞吐量，同时保持或超越原有精度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过动态剪枝和去约束来优化LoRA-MoE微调，减少资源消耗而不损失性能。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练后期移除负载均衡约束，让专家自由专业化，可能适用于多任务或持续学习场景。
idea_spark.risk: 过早或过度剪枝可能丢失有用专家，需要合理设置利用率阈值。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们思考：是否可以在不同训练阶段动态调整约束强度，而非简单移除。

idea_spark.idea: 在训练后期移除负载均衡约束，让专家自由专业化，可能适用于多任务或持续学习场景。

en.tldr: Proposes DMEP, a dynamic module-wise expert pruning framework that removes low-utility experts and later drops load-balancing constraints, improving parameter and training efficiency for LoRA-MoE fine-tuning.
en.motivation: Existing LoRA-MoE uses fixed expert configurations across all Transformer modules, ignoring their distinct roles, causing parameter redundancy and load-balancing constraints that limit expert specialization.
en.method: Tracks expert utilization during training, physically prunes low-utility experts per module, then removes load-balancing constraints to let remaining experts focus on downstream tasks.
en.result: On multiple reasoning benchmarks, reduces trainable parameters by 35%–43% and improves training throughput by about 10%, while maintaining or surpassing baseline accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how dynamic pruning and constraint removal can optimize LoRA-MoE fine-tuning, reducing resource usage without performance loss.

idea_spark.idea: Removing load-balancing constraints in later training stages to allow expert specialization may benefit multi-task or continual learning scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Overly aggressive or premature pruning may discard useful experts; careful threshold tuning is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires thinking about dynamically adjusting constraint strength across training phases rather than simply removing it.

papers.title: Fixed-Time and Arbitrarily Fast Exponential Stabilization of Discrete-Time Switched Linear Systems
papers.summary: In this paper we first study the fixed-time stabilizability of discrete-time switched linear control systems. Using a geometric approach, we derive conditions under which such systems can be stabilized within a prescribed number of steps, independently of the switching sequence. We address both the mode-dependent case, where the controller has access to the active mode, and the mode-independent case, where a common feedback law must be employed. For each setting, we present constructive procedures to compute the stabilizing state-feedback gains. Building on these results, we then introduce a structural decomposition of switched systems, which serves to simplify stabilizability analysis and controller design. This allows us to establish the equivalence between fixed-time stabilizability and arbitrarily fast exponential stabilizability. The effectiveness of the proposed methods is illustrated through a numerical example.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了离散时间切换线性系统的固定时间镇定问题，并建立了与任意快指数镇定的等价性。
ai.motivation: 现有切换系统镇定结果多关注渐近或指数镇定，缺乏对固定时间内镇定（与切换序列无关）的系统性研究。
ai.method: 采用几何方法推导可镇定条件，针对模式依赖和模式独立两种情况设计状态反馈增益，并通过结构分解简化分析与设计。
ai.result: 给出了固定时间镇定的充要条件，并证明了固定时间镇定与任意快指数镇定的等价性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解离散切换系统在有限步内镇定的条件与控制器设计方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将固定时间镇定条件转化为线性矩阵不等式（LMI）求解，便于工程实现。
idea_spark.risk: 几何方法在高维或复杂切换模式下计算复杂度可能较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将固定时间镇定与鲁棒控制或自适应控制结合，处理参数不确定性。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了离散时间切换线性系统的固定时间镇定问题，并建立了与任意快指数镇定的等价性。
zh.motivation: 现有切换系统镇定结果多关注渐近或指数镇定，缺乏对固定时间内镇定（与切换序列无关）的系统性研究。
zh.method: 采用几何方法推导可镇定条件，针对模式依赖和模式独立两种情况设计状态反馈增益，并通过结构分解简化分析与设计。
zh.result: 给出了固定时间镇定的充要条件，并证明了固定时间镇定与任意快指数镇定的等价性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解离散切换系统在有限步内镇定的条件与控制器设计方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将固定时间镇定条件转化为线性矩阵不等式（LMI）求解，便于工程实现。
idea_spark.risk: 几何方法在高维或复杂切换模式下计算复杂度可能较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将固定时间镇定与鲁棒控制或自适应控制结合，处理参数不确定性。

en.tldr: This paper studies fixed-time stabilization of discrete-time switched linear systems and establishes equivalence with arbitrarily fast exponential stabilization.
en.motivation: Existing results on switched systems focus on asymptotic or exponential stabilization, lacking systematic study of fixed-time stabilization independent of switching sequences.
en.method: A geometric approach derives stabilizability conditions; constructive procedures compute state-feedback gains for both mode-dependent and mode-independent cases; a structural decomposition simplifies analysis and design.
en.result: Necessary and sufficient conditions for fixed-time stabilization are given, and equivalence with arbitrarily fast exponential stabilization is proved.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand conditions and controller design for stabilizing discrete switched systems within a prescribed number of steps.

idea_spark.idea: Formulate fixed-time stabilization conditions as linear matrix inequalities (LMIs) for easier engineering implementation.
idea_spark.risk: Geometric methods may become computationally expensive for high-dimensional or complex switching patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine fixed-time stabilization with robust or adaptive control to handle parameter uncertainties.

papers.title: Exploring the Potential of Probabilistic Transformer for Time Series Modeling: A Report on the ST-PT Framework
papers.summary: The Probabilistic Transformer (PT) establishes that the Transformer's self-attention plus its feed-forward block is mathematically equivalent to Mean-Field Variational Inference (MFVI) on a Conditional Random Field (CRF). Under this equivalence the Transformer ceases to be a black-box neural network and becomes a programmable factor graph: graph topology, factor potentials, and the message-passing schedule are all explicit and inspectable primitives that can be engineered. PT was originally developed for natural language and in this report we investigate its potential for time series. We first lift PT into the Spatial-Temporal Probabilistic Transformer (ST-PT) to repair PT's missing channel axis and weak per-step semantics, and adopt ST-PT as a shared cornerstone backbone. We then identify three distinct properties that PT/ST-PT offers as a factor-graph model and derive three Research Questions, one per property, that probe how each property can be exploited in time series: RQ1. The graph topology and potentials are direct programmable primitives. Can this be used to inject symbolic time-series priors into ST-PT through structural graph modifications, especially under data scarcity and noise? RQ2. The CRF's factor matrices are the operator's potentials. Can an external condition program these factor matrices on a per-sample basis, so that conditional generation becomes structural rather than feature-level modulation of a fixed one? RQ3. Each MFVI iteration is a Bayesian posterior update on the factor graph. Can this turn the latent transition of latent-space AutoRegressive (AR) forecasting from an opaque MLP into a principled posterior update, and can a CRF teacher distill its latents into the AR student to counter cumulative error? We give one empirical study per question. Together, these three studies position ST-PT as a programmable framework for time-series modeling.

ai.tldr: 本文探索了概率Transformer（PT）在时间序列建模中的潜力，提出了时空概率Transformer（ST-PT）框架，并基于其因子图等价性提出了三个研究问题，分别涉及符号先验注入、条件生成和潜在状态更新。
ai.motivation: PT将Transformer解释为条件随机场上的平均场变分推断，使其成为可编程因子图，但原始PT缺乏通道轴和弱逐步语义，且其时间序列潜力尚未被探索。
ai.method: 通过引入通道轴和增强逐步语义，将PT扩展为ST-PT；基于因子图拓扑、势函数和消息传递的可编程性，提出三个研究问题并分别进行实证研究。
ai.result: 三个实证研究分别展示了：通过结构修改注入符号先验（尤其在数据稀缺和噪声下）、外部条件编程因子矩阵实现结构级条件生成、以及利用CRF教师蒸馏潜在状态减少自回归预测的累积误差。
ai.help_to_user: 该框架为时间序列建模提供了可解释、可编程的替代方案，用户可基于因子图显式设计模型结构、注入领域知识，并实现条件生成和误差校正。

idea_spark.idea: 利用ST-PT的因子图可编程性，设计一个动态图结构自适应模块，根据输入数据自动调整拓扑和势函数，以应对非平稳时间序列。
idea_spark.risk: 因子图显式设计可能增加模型复杂度，且自动拓扑调整可能引入过拟合或计算开销；条件生成的结构级调制在复杂场景下可能不如特征级调制灵活。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受CRF教师蒸馏启发，可探索将因子图推断与强化学习结合，用于序列决策任务中的长期信用分配。

en.tldr: This report explores the potential of Probabilistic Transformer (PT) for time series modeling, proposes the Spatial-Temporal Probabilistic Transformer (ST-PT) framework, and derives three research questions based on its factor-graph equivalence, covering symbolic prior injection, conditional generation, and latent state update.
en.motivation: PT interprets Transformer as mean-field variational inference on a CRF, making it a programmable factor graph, but the original PT lacks a channel axis and has weak per-step semantics, and its potential for time series remains unexplored.
en.method: PT is extended to ST-PT by adding a channel axis and enhancing per-step semantics; three research questions are derived from the programmability of graph topology, potentials, and message passing, each studied empirically.
en.result: Three empirical studies demonstrate: injecting symbolic priors via structural modifications (especially under data scarcity and noise), external conditioning of factor matrices for structural-level conditional generation, and using CRF teacher distillation to reduce cumulative error in autoregressive forecasting.
en.help_to_user: The framework offers an interpretable and programmable alternative for time series modeling, allowing users to explicitly design model structure, inject domain knowledge, and enable conditional generation and error correction.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage ST-PT's factor-graph programmability to design a dynamic graph structure adaptation module that automatically adjusts topology and potentials based on input data to handle non-stationary time series.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit factor-graph design may increase model complexity, and automatic topology adaptation could introduce overfitting or computational overhead; structural-level modulation for conditional generation may be less flexible than feature-level modulation in complex scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by CRF teacher distillation, explore combining factor-graph inference with reinforcement learning for long-term credit assignment in sequential decision-making tasks.

papers.title: Stochastic Ordering of Dependent Systems under Transformation Models and Archimedean Copulas
papers.summary: We study stochastic ordering of system lifetimes with dependent and heterogeneous components whose marginal distributions are obtained through transformations of a common baseline. The dependence structure is modeled via Archimedean copulas, allowing for a unified treatment of several transformation-based models, including proportional hazard, proportional reversed hazard rate and proportional odds families. For parallel, series and $(n-k)$-out-of-$n$ systems, we derive conditions for stochastic dominance based on monotonicity of the transformation and structural properties of the copula generators, formulated through super-additivity and Schur-type arguments.   The results provide tractable criteria that extend existing comparisons beyond independence and illustrate the combined effect of dependence and parameter heterogeneity on system reliability.

ai.tldr: 研究在变换模型和Archimedean copula下，具有依赖性和异质性组件的系统寿命的随机排序。
ai.motivation: 现有系统可靠性比较通常假设组件独立，而实际中组件往往存在依赖性和异质性，需要更一般的随机排序准则。
ai.method: 利用Archimedean copula建模依赖结构，结合变换模型的单调性和copula生成元的超可加性及Schur型性质，推导并联、串联和k-out-of-n系统的随机占优条件。
ai.result: 得到了基于变换单调性和copula生成元结构性质的易处理准则，扩展了现有独立情形下的比较结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解依赖性和参数异质性对系统可靠性的联合影响，提供实用的随机排序判据。

idea_spark.idea: 将变换模型与copula结合，研究系统寿命的随机排序，为可靠性工程提供理论工具。
idea_spark.risk: 结果依赖于Archimedean copula的特定性质，可能不适用于非Archimedean依赖结构。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可进一步探索动态系统或退化过程中的随机排序问题。

en.tldr: Studies stochastic ordering of system lifetimes with dependent and heterogeneous components under transformation models and Archimedean copulas.
en.motivation: Existing reliability comparisons often assume component independence, but real systems exhibit dependence and heterogeneity, requiring more general ordering criteria.
en.method: Models dependence via Archimedean copulas and derives stochastic dominance conditions for parallel, series, and k-out-of-n systems using monotonicity of transformations and super-additivity/Schur-type properties of copula generators.
en.result: Provides tractable criteria extending existing comparisons beyond independence, illustrating the joint effect of dependence and parameter heterogeneity on system reliability.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the combined impact of dependence and heterogeneity on system reliability, offering practical stochastic ordering criteria.

idea_spark.idea: Combines transformation models with copulas to study stochastic ordering of system lifetimes, providing theoretical tools for reliability engineering.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on specific properties of Archimedean copulas and may not hold for non-Archimedean dependence structures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Could explore stochastic ordering in dynamic systems or degradation processes.

papers.title: $C^1$-Regularity of the Free Boundary for Hele-Shaw Flow with Source and Drift
papers.summary: This paper is a continuation of the work in \cite{kimzhang2024} concerning Hele-Shaw flow with both drift and source terms. We prove that, in a local neighborhood, if the free boundary is Lipschitz continuous with a sufficiently small Lipschitz constant, then the free boundary is $C^{1}$. As a corollary, we also consider the 2D vertical Hele-Shaw (or one-phase Muskat) problem with an advection term. We show that, provided the initial data and the advection term are small and the propagation speed is large, the free boundary becomes uniformly $C^1$ after a finite time.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在源项和漂移项作用下，Hele-Shaw流的自由边界若局部Lipschitz连续且常数足够小，则自由边界是C1光滑的。作为推论，对于二维垂直Hele-Shaw（单相Muskat）问题，若初始数据和平流项小且传播速度大，自由边界在有限时间后一致C1。
ai.motivation: 延续先前工作，进一步研究含源和漂移的Hele-Shaw流自由边界的正则性，特别是从Lipschitz到C1的提升。
ai.method: 利用局部邻域分析，假设自由边界Lipschitz连续且常数足够小，通过估计和正则性论证证明C1性。
ai.result: 自由边界在局部邻域内从Lipschitz提升为C1；对二维垂直Hele-Shaw问题，在初始数据和平流项小、传播速度大的条件下，自由边界有限时间后一致C1。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解含源和漂移的Hele-Shaw流自由边界的正则性条件，以及二维垂直Hele-Shaw问题的光滑化机制。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将Lipschitz到C1的论证应用于更一般的非牛顿流体或多相流自由边界问题。
idea_spark.risk: 假设Lipschitz常数足够小可能限制适用性，实际物理中常数可能较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合小初始数据和大传播速度的条件，启发设计控制自由边界光滑性的实验或数值方案。

en.tldr: This paper proves that for Hele-Shaw flow with source and drift, if the free boundary is locally Lipschitz with a sufficiently small constant, then it is C1. As a corollary, for the 2D vertical Hele-Shaw (one-phase Muskat) problem with advection, under small initial data and advection and large propagation speed, the free boundary becomes uniformly C1 after finite time.
en.motivation: Continuation of previous work to further study the regularity of the free boundary for Hele-Shaw flow with source and drift, specifically the improvement from Lipschitz to C1.
en.method: Local neighborhood analysis assuming the free boundary is Lipschitz with a sufficiently small constant, using estimates and regularity arguments to prove C1 regularity.
en.result: The free boundary is locally C1 if Lipschitz with small constant; for the 2D vertical Hele-Shaw problem, under small initial data and advection and large propagation speed, the free boundary becomes uniformly C1 after finite time.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the regularity conditions for the free boundary in Hele-Shaw flow with source and drift, and the smoothing mechanism for the 2D vertical Hele-Shaw problem.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying the Lipschitz-to-C1 argument to free boundary problems for non-Newtonian fluids or multiphase flows.
idea_spark.risk: The assumption of a sufficiently small Lipschitz constant may limit applicability; in physical scenarios the constant may be larger.
idea_spark.inspiration: The conditions of small initial data and large propagation speed inspire designing experiments or numerical schemes to control free boundary smoothness.

papers.title: Spectral Boundary Observer for Counter-Flow Heat Exchangers
papers.summary: We consider a system of two coupled first-order linear hyperbolic partial differential equations modeling heat transport in a counter-flow heat exchanger: one equation describes the transport of a hot fluid, and the other the transport of a cold fluid in the opposite direction. For this system, we design a boundary observer that uses only the temperature of the cold fluid measured at one boundary. Our approach is spectral: by assigning the spectrum of the operator governing the observation error dynamics to a prescribed region within the open left-half complex plane, we can freely tune the convergence rate of the observation error to zero in the $L^2$ norm. The main technical contribution is the proof that spectral stability, that is, the location of the spectrum in the open left-half plane, is equivalent to $L^2$ exponential stability of the origin for the observation error dynamics. This equivalence is established by showing that the operator governing the observation error dynamics satisfies the so-called spectral mapping property.

ai.tldr: 针对逆流换热器中的双曲PDE系统，设计了一种仅利用冷流体单侧边界温度测量的谱边界观测器，并证明了谱稳定性与L2指数稳定性的等价性。
ai.motivation: 逆流换热器广泛用于工业热交换过程，但内部温度难以直接测量，需要设计基于有限边界测量的观测器来估计系统状态。
ai.method: 采用谱方法，通过将观测误差动态算子的谱配置到左半开复平面的指定区域，自由调节误差收敛速率；并利用谱映射性质证明谱稳定性等价于L2指数稳定性。
ai.result: 成功设计出边界观测器，实现了观测误差在L2范数下以可调速率指数收敛到零。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于谱方法的边界观测器设计框架，可用于逆流换热器的状态估计和故障诊断。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将谱配置方法扩展到非线性或时变参数的双曲PDE系统。
idea_spark.risk: 谱映射性质在更复杂系统中可能不成立，需重新验证稳定性等价关系。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用谱方法简化观测器设计，避免复杂的Lyapunov函数构造。

zh.tldr: 针对逆流换热器中的双曲PDE系统，设计了一种仅利用冷流体单侧边界温度测量的谱边界观测器，并证明了谱稳定性与L2指数稳定性的等价性。

zh.result: 成功设计出边界观测器，实现了观测误差在L2范数下以可调速率指数收敛到零。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于谱方法的边界观测器设计框架，可用于逆流换热器的状态估计和故障诊断。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将谱配置方法扩展到非线性或时变参数的双曲PDE系统。
idea_spark.risk: 谱映射性质在更复杂系统中可能不成立，需重新验证稳定性等价关系。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用谱方法简化观测器设计，避免复杂的Lyapunov函数构造。

en.tldr: For a counter-flow heat exchanger modeled by coupled hyperbolic PDEs, a spectral boundary observer is designed using only cold fluid temperature at one boundary, with proven equivalence between spectral stability and L2 exponential stability.
en.motivation: Counter-flow heat exchangers are widely used in industrial heat transfer, but internal temperatures are difficult to measure directly, necessitating observer design based on limited boundary measurements.
en.method: A spectral approach is employed: the spectrum of the observation error dynamics operator is assigned to a prescribed region in the open left-half complex plane, enabling tunable convergence rate; the spectral mapping property is used to prove equivalence between spectral stability and L2 exponential stability.
en.result: A boundary observer is successfully designed, achieving exponential convergence of the observation error to zero in the L2 norm with a tunable rate.
en.help_to_user: Provides a spectral-based boundary observer design framework for state estimation and fault diagnosis in counter-flow heat exchangers.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to extend the spectral assignment method to nonlinear or time-varying parameter hyperbolic PDE systems.
idea_spark.risk: The spectral mapping property may fail in more complex systems, requiring re-validation of the stability equivalence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging spectral methods simplifies observer design, avoiding complex Lyapunov function construction.

papers.title: Unsupervised Graph Modeling for Anomaly Detection in Accounting Subject Relationships
papers.summary: This paper addresses the problem of anomaly detection in accounting subject association structures, proposing a structured modeling and unsupervised discriminant framework based on graph neural networks. This framework is used to mine stable correspondences between subjects and identify structural deviations from general ledger details and voucher entries. The method first abstracts accounting subjects as graph nodes, and the co-occurrence and debit/credit correspondence of subjects in the same business record are abstracted as weighted edges. The edge weights are characterized by statistical measures such as co-occurrence frequency or amount aggregation, thus forming a period-level accounting subject association graph. In the representation learning stage, a message passing mechanism is used to fuse the node's own attributes and neighborhood context to obtain node embeddings containing structural information. In the anomaly detection stage, the rationality of subject pair connections is estimated through a relation reconstruction decoder, and edge-level anomaly scores are defined based on the degree of deviation in reconstruction probabilities. These scores are then aggregated to obtain node-level risk ranking and local anomaly localization. This framework can simultaneously capture local substructure anomalies and cross-community anomaly connections without relying on anomaly labeling, outputting traceable subject pair risk clues. Comparative experiments demonstrate more stable comprehensive discriminant capabilities and higher top-ranking accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出基于图神经网络的非监督框架，用于会计科目关联结构中的异常检测，无需异常标签即可输出可追溯的风险线索。
ai.motivation: 会计科目关联结构中的异常检测缺乏标签数据，现有方法难以同时捕捉局部子结构异常和跨社区异常连接。

ai.result: 对比实验表明该框架具有更稳定的综合判别能力和更高的顶部准确率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动识别会计科目关联中的异常模式，提供可解释的风险线索，辅助审计和财务监控。

en.tldr: Proposes an unsupervised graph neural network framework for anomaly detection in accounting subject association structures, outputting traceable risk clues without anomaly labels.
en.motivation: Anomaly detection in accounting subject relationships lacks labeled data, and existing methods struggle to capture both local substructure anomalies and cross-community connections.
en.method: Abstracts accounting subjects as graph nodes and co-occurrence/debit-credit relationships as weighted edges; learns node embeddings via message passing; estimates edge plausibility with a relation reconstruction decoder, defines anomaly scores based on reconstruction deviation, and aggregates to node-level risk ranking.
en.result: Comparative experiments demonstrate more stable comprehensive discriminative ability and higher top-ranking accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically identify anomalous patterns in accounting subject relationships, providing interpretable risk clues for auditing and financial monitoring.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate temporal dynamics into the accounting subject graph to build a temporal graph neural network for capturing cross-period anomaly patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Graph construction relies on statistical weights, which may be sensitive to sparse or noisy data; unsupervised methods may yield high false positive rates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage accounting domain knowledge such as the double-entry rule as prior constraints to enhance model interpretability and regularization.

papers.title: Pinching Antenna-Aided Spatial Multiplexing: Transceiver Design and Performance Analysis
papers.summary: In this paper, a novel pinching antenna-aided spatial multiplexing (PASM) architecture is conceived, which intrinsically amalgamates the benefits of flexible radiating element placement with radio-frequency (RF) chain transmission. Specifically, we leverage the deterministic phase variation along dielectric waveguides as a zero-power phase-control mechanism, where each waveguide fed by a single RF chain drives multiple pinching antennas (PAs) acquiring position-dependent phase shifts. Then, the PASM propagation environment is characterized by a realistic channel model encompassing Rician small-scale fading, correlated shadowing, and large-scale path loss. Based on this, a low-complexity vector approximate message passing (VAMP) detector is conceived, which exploits a waveguide-structured prior for jointly processing the signals associated with all PAs. Moreover, we derive an analytical upper bound on the bit error rate (BER) for the maximum likelihood (ML) detector to quantify the achievable performance limits. Finally, our simulation results demonstrate that the proposed PASM architecture achieves substantial signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) gain over the conventional phase-shifter-aided spatial multiplexing (PSSM), while the VAMP detector strikes an attractive trade-off between the system performance and computational complexity.

ai.tldr: 提出一种捏合天线辅助的空间复用架构，利用介质波导的确定性相位变化实现零功耗相位控制，并设计了低复杂度VAMP检测器。
ai.motivation: 传统相控阵空间复用功耗高、复杂度大，需要探索低功耗、低复杂度的替代方案。
ai.method: 采用单射频链驱动多个捏合天线，利用波导结构先验设计VAMP检测器，并推导ML检测的BER上界。
ai.result: 所提架构相比传统相移辅助空间复用获得显著SNR增益，VAMP检测器在性能和复杂度之间取得良好折中。
ai.help_to_user: 为低功耗无线通信系统提供一种新的天线架构和检测算法参考。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将捏合天线与可重构智能表面结合，实现更灵活的电磁环境调控。
idea_spark.risk: 实际波导的相位误差和天线耦合可能影响性能，需进一步实验验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用传输线固有物理特性替代有源移相器，启发无源/低功耗射频前端设计。

en.tldr: A pinching antenna-aided spatial multiplexing architecture is proposed, leveraging deterministic phase variation along dielectric waveguides for zero-power phase control, along with a low-complexity VAMP detector.
en.motivation: Conventional phase-shifter-based spatial multiplexing suffers from high power consumption and complexity, motivating a low-power, low-complexity alternative.
en.method: A single RF chain feeds multiple pinching antennas via a dielectric waveguide; a VAMP detector with waveguide-structured prior is designed, and an analytical BER upper bound for the ML detector is derived.
en.result: The proposed architecture achieves significant SNR gain over conventional phase-shifter-aided spatial multiplexing, and the VAMP detector offers an attractive performance-complexity trade-off.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel antenna architecture and detection algorithm reference for low-power wireless communication systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining pinching antennas with reconfigurable intelligent surfaces for more flexible electromagnetic environment control.
idea_spark.risk: Practical waveguide phase errors and antenna coupling may degrade performance, requiring further experimental validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using inherent transmission line physics to replace active phase shifters inspires passive/low-power RF front-end designs.

papers.title: Accelerated Backward Forward Method for Convex Optimization
papers.summary: We analyze the convergence rate of an accelerated backward forward method for solving convex composite optimization problems. The method was developed by Taylor, Hendrickx and Glineur, and is different from the FISTA algorithm in its placement of the proximal operator. When the smooth part of the objective function is convex, we establish a fast convergence rate of $\mathcal{O}\left( \frac{1}{k^2} \right)$ for the function values, and prove the weak convergence of the iterates. When the smooth part is strongly convex, we propose a variant of the method, and establish an accelerated linear convergence rate for the function values.

ai.tldr: 分析了加速后向-前向方法在凸复合优化中的收敛速率，并提出了强凸情形下的变体。
ai.motivation: 现有加速方法（如FISTA）在近端算子放置上不同，需要分析该变体的收敛性质。
ai.method: 对Taylor等人提出的加速后向-前向方法进行收敛率分析，并在强凸情形下提出变体。
ai.result: 光滑凸部分达到O(1/k²)函数值收敛率，迭代弱收敛；强凸部分达到加速线性收敛率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解不同加速近端算法的收敛行为，指导算法选择。

idea_spark.idea: 将强凸情形的变体应用于机器学习中的正则化问题。
idea_spark.risk: 理论收敛率可能依赖于强凸参数，实际性能需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 近端算子放置顺序影响加速效果，可探索其他变体。

en.tldr: Analyzes the convergence rate of an accelerated backward forward method for convex composite optimization, and proposes a variant for strongly convex cases.
en.motivation: Existing accelerated methods like FISTA differ in proximal operator placement, requiring convergence analysis of this variant.
en.method: Convergence rate analysis of the accelerated backward forward method by Taylor et al., with a variant for strongly convex objectives.
en.result: O(1/k²) function value convergence and weak iterate convergence for convex smooth part; accelerated linear convergence for strongly convex part.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand convergence behavior of different accelerated proximal algorithms for algorithm selection.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the strongly convex variant to regularized problems in machine learning.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical rates may depend on strong convexity parameters; empirical validation needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Placement of the proximal operator affects acceleration; other variants could be explored.

papers.title: Optimal-Control Suggestion for Congestion on Freeways using Data Assimilation of Distributed Fiber-Optic Sensing
papers.summary: This paper presents the optimal-control suggestion for congestion on freeways using data assimilation (DA) of distributed fiber-optic sensing (DFOS). To simultaneously maximize throughput and avoid/mitigate congestion, it is necessary to execute optimal control for the current traffic state as active transportation and demand management (ATDM) according to multi-objective optimization with real-time monitoring data. However, optimal control cannot be estimated due to intermittent observed data obtained from conventional sensors. To solve the issue, this paper proposes the ATDM optimal control estimation with DA of DFOS, which can monitor traffic flow in real time without dead zones. Our real-time DA method enables us to estimate the effectiveness of control scenarios by simulation. This paper also provides a method to uniquely determine the optimal-control solution among the Pareto solutions for multi-objective optimization. Throughput and mean speed across the entire road are considered as the objective functions. Variable speed limit (VSL) and inflow control are taken as ATDM examples. Validation results on a Japanese freeway show that (i) the optimal control scenario varies depending on the traffic state, especially congestion level; (ii) optimal control considering VSL alone improves throughput by 5-14% while the improvement rate for mean speed is 0-8%; (iii) throughput and mean speed are improved by 10-15% and 20-30%, respectively when VSL and inflow control are considered. This paper also implies the importance of balance management for the lane occupancy and proactive optimal control before congestion occurs.

ai.tldr: 提出利用分布式光纤传感的数据同化方法，实时估计高速公路拥堵的最优控制方案，并验证了可变限速和入口控制的效果。
ai.motivation: 传统传感器数据间断，无法实时估计最优控制方案，导致拥堵管理效果受限。
ai.method: 采用分布式光纤传感实时监测无盲区交通流，结合数据同化与多目标优化，从帕累托解中唯一确定最优控制方案。
ai.result: 在日本高速公路上验证：仅可变限速可提升通行量5-14%，平均速度0-8%；联合入口控制后通行量提升10-15%，平均速度提升20-30%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助交通管理者理解如何利用新型传感与数据同化技术，实时制定并评估拥堵控制策略。

idea_spark.idea: 将帕累托最优解的唯一定位方法推广到其他多目标实时控制问题（如能源调度、机器人路径规划）。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量实时传感数据，传感器故障或通信延迟可能导致控制失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 车道占用率平衡管理的思想可启发其他资源分配问题中的预防性控制策略。

en.tldr: Proposes optimal control suggestion for freeway congestion using data assimilation of distributed fiber-optic sensing, validated with variable speed limit and inflow control on a Japanese freeway.
en.motivation: Conventional sensors provide intermittent data, hindering real-time estimation of optimal control for congestion management.
en.method: Uses distributed fiber-optic sensing for dead-zone-free real-time traffic monitoring, combined with data assimilation and multi-objective optimization to uniquely determine the optimal control from Pareto solutions.
en.result: On a Japanese freeway: VSL alone improves throughput by 5-14% and mean speed by 0-8%; adding inflow control improves throughput by 10-15% and mean speed by 20-30%.
en.help_to_user: Helps traffic managers understand how to leverage novel sensing and data assimilation for real-time congestion control strategy estimation and evaluation.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the method for uniquely determining Pareto optimal solutions to other multi-objective real-time control problems (e.g., energy dispatch, robot path planning).
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality real-time sensor data; sensor failure or communication delay may cause control failure.
idea_spark.inspiration: The concept of lane occupancy balance management may inspire preventive control strategies in other resource allocation problems.

papers.title: Are Data Augmentation and Segmentation Always Necessary? Insights from COVID-19 X-Rays and a Methodology Thereof
papers.summary: Purpose: Rapid and reliable diagnostic tools are crucial for managing respiratory diseases like COVID-19, where chest X-ray analysis coupled with artificial intelligence techniques has proven invaluable. However, most existing works on X-ray images have not considered lung segmentation, raising concerns about their reliability. Additionally, some have employed disproportionate and impractical augmentation techniques, making models less generalized and prone to overfitting. This study presents a critical analysis of both issues and proposes a methodology (SDL-COVID) for more reliable classification of chest X-rays for COVID-19 detection. Methods: We use class activation mapping to obtain a visual understanding of the predictions made by Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), validating the necessity of lung segmentation. To analyze the effect of data augmentation, deep learning models are implemented on two levels: one for an augmented dataset and another for a non-augmented dataset. Results: Careful analysis of X-ray images and their corresponding heat maps under expert medical supervision reveals that lung segmentation is necessary for accurate COVID-19 prediction. Regarding data augmentation, test accuracy significantly drops beyond a certain threshold with additional augmented images, indicating model overfitting. Conclusion: Our proposed methodology, SDL-COVID, achieves a precision of 95.21% and a lower false negative rate, ensuring its reliability for COVID-19 detection using chest X-rays.

ai.tldr: 提出SDL-COVID方法，通过分析数据增强和肺部分割的必要性，实现可靠的COVID-19胸部X光分类。
ai.motivation: 现有工作忽视肺部分割或使用不切实际的数据增强，导致模型泛化差、易过拟合。
ai.method: 使用类激活映射可视化CNN预测，验证分割必要性；在增强与非增强数据集上对比深度学习模型性能。
ai.result: 肺部分割对准确预测必要；数据增强超过阈值后测试精度显著下降；SDL-COVID达到95.21%精度和更低假阴性率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解数据增强和分割在医学影像分类中的实际影响，避免常见陷阱。

idea_spark.idea: 探索自适应数据增强策略，根据模型过拟合程度动态调整增强强度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖专家监督的类激活映射分析可能引入主观偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合注意力机制与分割网络，实现端到端的可解释性分类。

en.tldr: Proposes SDL-COVID, analyzing the necessity of data augmentation and lung segmentation for reliable COVID-19 chest X-ray classification.
en.motivation: Existing works ignore lung segmentation or use impractical augmentation, leading to poor generalization and overfitting.
en.method: Uses class activation mapping to visualize CNN predictions and validate segmentation necessity; compares deep learning models on augmented vs. non-augmented datasets.
en.result: Lung segmentation is necessary; test accuracy drops significantly beyond a threshold of augmentation; SDL-COVID achieves 95.21% precision and lower false negative rate.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the practical impact of data augmentation and segmentation in medical image classification, avoiding common pitfalls.

idea_spark.idea: Explore adaptive data augmentation strategies that dynamically adjust augmentation intensity based on model overfitting.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on expert-supervised class activation mapping may introduce subjective bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine attention mechanisms with segmentation networks for end-to-end explainable classification.

papers.title: Turing patterns on non-fluctuating surfaces under mechanical stresses
papers.summary: This paper presents a numerical investigation of Turing patterns (TPs) utilizing the reaction-diffusion equation for the activator $u$ and the inhibitor $v$ on two- and three-dimensional lattices, discarding vertex fluctuations. The absence of vertex fluctuations means the absence of positional movement of $u$ and $v$. Consequently, $u$ and $v$ have values at spatially discrete points, such as the pigment cells in zebrafish and sea shells. Furthermore, the mechanical property is implemented through the Finsler geometry modeling technique. This technique incorporates the internal degree of freedom $\vecτ$, corresponding to the direction of mechanical stress. Additionally, a stress formula based on Gaussian bond potential is shown to be well-defined on the non-fluctuating lattices, and therefore, it enables the calculation of entropy for capturing the stress relaxation phenomenon in a manner analogous to that on fluctuating surfaces. The results of the study indicate that these biological patterns also exhibit responses to external mechanical forces similar to TPs on fluctuating membranes.

ai.tldr: 本文数值研究了在无涨落表面上机械应力对图灵斑图的影响，使用反应扩散方程和芬斯勒几何建模。
ai.motivation: 探索生物斑图（如斑马鱼色素细胞）在无表面涨落时如何响应机械应力。
ai.method: 在二维和三维无涨落格点上求解反应扩散方程，通过芬斯勒几何引入应力方向，并基于高斯键势定义应力公式以计算熵。
ai.result: 无涨落表面上的生物斑图对机械应力的响应与涨落膜上的图灵斑图类似。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解机械力如何调控生物斑图形成，为材料科学和发育生物学提供建模思路。

zh.method: 在二维和三维无涨落格点上求解反应扩散方程，通过芬斯勒几何引入应力方向，并基于高斯键势定义应力公式以计算熵。

en.tldr: This paper numerically investigates Turing patterns on non-fluctuating surfaces under mechanical stress using reaction-diffusion equations and Finsler geometry modeling.
en.motivation: To explore how biological patterns (e.g., zebrafish pigment cells) respond to mechanical stress in the absence of surface fluctuations.
en.method: Reaction-diffusion equations are solved on 2D and 3D non-fluctuating lattices; stress direction is introduced via Finsler geometry, and a stress formula based on Gaussian bond potential enables entropy calculation.
en.result: Biological patterns on non-fluctuating surfaces respond to mechanical stress similarly to Turing patterns on fluctuating membranes.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into how mechanical forces regulate biological pattern formation, aiding modeling in materials science and developmental biology.

idea_spark.idea: The entropy calculation via Gaussian bond potential could be extended to study stress relaxation in other non-equilibrium systems.
idea_spark.risk: Ignoring vertex fluctuations may limit the model's accuracy for real biological membrane dynamics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by zebrafish and shell patterns, further exploration of mechanical stress effects on developmental pattern stability is promising.

papers.title: Language Diffusion Models are Associative Memories Capable of Retrieving Unseen Data
papers.summary: When do language diffusion models memorize their training data, and how to quantitatively assess their true generative regime? We address these questions by showing that Uniform-based Discrete Diffusion Models (UDDMs) fundamentally behave as Associative Memories (AMs) $\textit{with emergent creative capabilities}$. The core idea of an AM is to reliably recover stored data points as $\textit{memories}$ by establishing distinct basins of attraction around them. Historically, models like Hopfield networks use an explicit energy function to guarantee these stable attractors. We broaden this perspective by leveraging the observation that energy is not strictly necessary, as basins of attraction can also be formed via conditional likelihood maximization. By evaluating token recovery of $\textit{training}$ and $\textit{test}$ examples, we identify in UDDMs a sharp memorization-to-generalization transition governed by the size of the training dataset: as it increases, basins around training examples shrink and basins around unseen test examples expand, until both later converge to the same level. Crucially, we can detect this transition using only the conditional entropy of predicted token sequences: memorization is characterized by vanishing conditional entropy, while in the generalization regime the conditional entropy of most tokens remains finite. Thus, conditional entropy offers a practical probe for the memorization-to-generalization transition in deployed models.

ai.tldr: 语言扩散模型本质上是一种关联记忆，能够通过条件熵检测从记忆到泛化的转变。
ai.motivation: 探究语言扩散模型何时记忆训练数据，以及如何定量评估其生成模式。
ai.method: 将均匀离散扩散模型视为关联记忆，通过令牌恢复和条件熵分析记忆与泛化边界。
ai.result: 训练数据集大小决定记忆到泛化的转变，条件熵可作为实用探针。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解扩散模型的记忆机制，并提供检测模型是否泛化的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用条件熵作为训练数据泄露的检测指标。
idea_spark.risk: 条件熵阈值可能依赖模型架构，需跨模型验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将统计物理中的相变概念引入深度学习记忆分析。

en.tldr: Language diffusion models behave as associative memories, with a sharp memorization-to-generalization transition detectable via conditional entropy.
en.motivation: To determine when language diffusion models memorize training data and how to assess their generative regime.
en.method: Model uniform discrete diffusion models as associative memories, using token recovery and conditional entropy to analyze the transition.
en.result: Dataset size governs the transition; conditional entropy serves as a practical probe.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the memory mechanism of diffusion models and detect whether the model is generalizing.

idea_spark.idea: Use conditional entropy as a detection metric for training data leakage.
idea_spark.risk: The conditional entropy threshold may depend on model architecture and requires cross-model validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introduce concepts from statistical physics (phase transitions) into deep learning memory analysis.

papers.title: Unified 4D World Action Modeling from Video Priors with Asynchronous Denoising
papers.summary: We propose X-WAM, a Unified 4D World Model that unifies real-time robotic action execution and high-fidelity 4D world synthesis (video + 3D reconstruction) in a single framework, addressing the critical limitations of prior unified world models (e.g., UWM) that only model 2D pixel-space and fail to balance action efficiency and world modeling quality. To leverage the strong visual priors of pretrained video diffusion models, X-WAM imagines the future world by predicting multi-view RGB-D videos, and obtains spatial information efficiently through a lightweight structural adaptation: replicating the final few blocks of the pretrained Diffusion Transformer into a dedicated depth prediction branch for the reconstruction of future spatial information. Moreover, we propose Asynchronous Noise Sampling (ANS) to jointly optimize generation quality and action decoding efficiency. ANS applies a specialized asynchronous denoising schedule during inference, which rapidly decodes actions with fewer steps to enable efficient real-time execution, while dedicating the full sequence of steps to generate high-fidelity video. Rather than entirely decoupling the timesteps during training, ANS samples from their joint distribution to align with the inference distribution. Pretrained on over 5,800 hours of robotic data, X-WAM achieves 79.2% and 90.7% average success rate on RoboCasa and RoboTwin 2.0 benchmarks, while producing high-fidelity 4D reconstruction and generation surpassing existing methods in both visual and geometric metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出X-WAM统一4D世界模型，结合异步去噪采样，在单一框架中实现实时机器人动作执行与高保真4D世界合成。
ai.motivation: 现有统一世界模型（如UWM）仅建模2D像素空间，无法平衡动作效率与世界建模质量。
ai.method: 利用预训练视频扩散模型的多视图RGB-D预测，通过轻量结构适配（复制DiT最后几块为深度分支）获取空间信息，并设计异步噪声采样（ANS）联合优化生成质量与动作解码效率。
ai.result: 在RoboCasa和RoboTwin 2.0基准上分别达到79.2%和90.7%平均成功率，4D重建与生成在视觉和几何指标上超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为机器人操作提供实时、高保真的4D世界建模与动作执行统一框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将深度预测分支与视频扩散模型结合，实现轻量级空间信息获取。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练视频扩散模型的视觉先验，可能限制在未见过的环境中的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从视频扩散模型中获得灵感，将未来世界预测转化为多视图RGB-D视频生成问题。

en.tldr: Proposes X-WAM, a unified 4D world model with asynchronous denoising sampling, enabling real-time robotic action execution and high-fidelity 4D world synthesis in a single framework.
en.motivation: Existing unified world models (e.g., UWM) only model 2D pixel space and fail to balance action efficiency and world modeling quality.
en.method: Leverages pretrained video diffusion models for multi-view RGB-D prediction, obtains spatial information via a lightweight structural adaptation (replicating final DiT blocks into a depth branch), and designs Asynchronous Noise Sampling (ANS) to jointly optimize generation quality and action decoding efficiency.
en.result: Achieves 79.2% and 90.7% average success rates on RoboCasa and RoboTwin 2.0 benchmarks, surpassing existing methods in visual and geometric metrics for 4D reconstruction and generation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified framework for real-time, high-fidelity 4D world modeling and action execution in robotics.

idea_spark.idea: Combining a depth prediction branch with video diffusion models for lightweight spatial information acquisition.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on visual priors from pretrained video diffusion models may limit generalization to unseen environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by video diffusion models, framing future world prediction as multi-view RGB-D video generation.

papers.title: Limiting spectral distributions of large consistent rank correlation matrices
papers.summary: We study random matrices whose entries are obtained by applying consistent rank correlations, such as Hoeffding's $D$, pairwise to a high-dimensional random vector with mutually independent components. Prior work has shown that, in the proportional high-dimensional regime, the empirical spectral distributions of large Kendall's tau and Spearman's rho matrices converge weakly almost surely to the Marchenko--Pastur law. By contrast, we prove that for consistent rank correlations such as Hoeffding's $D$, the limiting spectral distribution is given by the semicircle law. Our result thus generalizes a recent work of Dong, Han, and Yao (2025), who considered the special case of Chatterjee's rank correlation and established the first semicircle law for a large correlation matrix in the proportional regime.

ai.tldr: 研究了一致秩相关矩阵（如Hoeffding D）在比例高维极限下的谱分布，证明其收敛于半圆律。
ai.motivation: 此前仅对Kendall tau和Spearman rho矩阵得到Marchenko-Pastur律，而一致秩相关矩阵的极限谱分布未知。
ai.method: 利用随机矩阵理论和一致秩相关的性质，推导经验谱分布的几乎必然弱收敛。
ai.result: 对于Hoeffding D等一致秩相关矩阵，极限谱分布为半圆律，推广了Dong、Han和Yao（2025）关于Chatterjee秩相关的结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维一致秩相关矩阵的谱行为，为相关统计推断提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 探索非独立成分或非线性变换下一致秩相关矩阵的谱分布。
idea_spark.risk: 实际数据中独立成分假设可能不成立，影响结论适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将半圆律结果应用于高维秩相关检验或降维方法中。

en.tldr: We study the limiting spectral distribution of large consistent rank correlation matrices (e.g., Hoeffding's D) and prove it converges to the semicircle law in the proportional high-dimensional regime.
en.motivation: Previous work only established the Marchenko-Pastur law for Kendall's tau and Spearman's rho matrices; the limit for consistent rank correlations was unknown.
en.method: Using random matrix theory and properties of consistent rank correlations, we prove almost sure weak convergence of the empirical spectral distribution.
en.result: For consistent rank correlations such as Hoeffding's D, the limiting spectral distribution is the semicircle law, generalizing a recent result by Dong, Han, and Yao (2025) for Chatterjee's rank correlation.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insight into the spectral behavior of high-dimensional consistent rank correlation matrices, aiding related statistical inference.

idea_spark.idea: Explore spectral distributions under non-independent components or nonlinear transformations.
idea_spark.risk: The independence assumption may not hold in real data, limiting applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply the semicircle law result to high-dimensional rank-based tests or dimensionality reduction methods.

papers.title: A note on four dimensional Shrinking Gradient Ricci Solitons with Constant Scalar Curvature
papers.summary: Let $(M^4, g, f)$ be a four-dimensional complete noncompact gradient shrinking Ricci soliton with the equation $Ric+\nabla^2f= \frac{1}{2}g$. If its scalar curvature is $1$, Cheng-Zhou \cite{Cheng-Zhou} proved that it is a finite quotient of $\mathbb{R}^2\times \mathbb{S}^2$. In this note we present an alternative proof by analyzing the asymptotic geometry at infinity.

ai.tldr: 本文给出了四维完备非紧梯度收缩Ricci孤立子在常数量曲率条件下必为R^2×S^2有限商的一个新证明，通过分析无穷远处的渐近几何实现。
ai.motivation: Cheng-Zhou已证明该结论，本文旨在提供一种基于渐近几何分析的替代证明，以简化或深化理解。
ai.method: 通过分析流形在无穷远处的渐近几何行为，结合梯度收缩Ricci孤立子的方程，推导出结构限制。
ai.result: 证明了若四维梯度收缩Ricci孤立子的数量曲率为1，则它同构于R^2×S^2的有限商。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解四维Ricci孤立子的分类，特别是常数量曲率情形下的几何结构。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将渐近几何分析与局部曲率估计结合，用于研究非紧流形的刚性定理。
idea_spark.risk: 渐近几何分析依赖于精确的衰减估计，可能在高维或非对称情形下失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从无穷远处几何行为反推整体结构，类似方法可用于研究黑洞时空或引力孤立子。

en.tldr: This note provides an alternative proof that any four-dimensional complete noncompact gradient shrinking Ricci soliton with constant scalar curvature 1 must be a finite quotient of R^2 × S^2, using asymptotic geometry at infinity.
en.motivation: Cheng-Zhou already proved this result; the authors aim to offer a simpler proof based on asymptotic geometric analysis.
en.method: Analyzing the asymptotic geometry at infinity of the soliton, combined with the gradient shrinking Ricci soliton equation, to deduce the topological restriction.
en.result: Proves that a four-dimensional gradient shrinking Ricci soliton with scalar curvature 1 is a finite quotient of R^2 × S^2.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the classification of four-dimensional Ricci solitons under constant scalar curvature.

idea_spark.idea: Combine asymptotic geometry with local curvature estimates to study rigidity theorems for noncompact manifolds.
idea_spark.risk: Asymptotic analysis relies on precise decay estimates, which may fail in higher dimensions or asymmetric settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inferring global structure from asymptotic geometry is reminiscent of methods used in black hole spacetimes or gravitational solitons.

papers.title: Existence and uniqueness results of a stochastic nonlinear heat equation with a constraint of codimension one
papers.summary: In this work, we investigate the well-posedness of a stochastic heat equation with an arbitrary (but polynomial) nonlinearity in any dimension $d\geq 1$ perturbed by a multiplicative white noise in the Stratonovich form, subject to an $L^2-$norm constraint on the solution. In bounded smooth domains, we establish the existence of a martingale solution taking values in $H_0^1 \cap L^p$ for arbitrary $2 \le p < \infty$, using a modified Faedo-Galerkin scheme. By utilizing a sequence of self-adjoint operators which are bounded in $L^p$ for any $2 \le p < \infty$, we provide a novel proof of an Itô formula for the $L^p-$norm of the solution. Together with pathwise uniqueness of the martingale solution, the Yamada-Watanabe result then yields the existence of a strong solution and uniqueness in law.

ai.tldr: 研究了一类带有多项式非线性和L2范数约束的随机热方程的适定性问题。
ai.motivation: 在任意维数下，对带有L2范数约束的随机非线性热方程建立解的存在唯一性理论。
ai.method: 采用修正的Faedo-Galerkin方案构造鞅解，并利用Lp有界自伴算子序列证明Itô公式，再结合Yamada-Watanabe定理得到强解。
ai.result: 证明了鞅解的存在性、路径唯一性以及强解的存在性和唯一性。
ai.help_to_user: 为带约束的随机偏微分方程提供了严格的适定性分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将L2范数约束与Stratonovich噪声结合，可能用于模拟能量守恒的随机系统。
idea_spark.risk: 约束条件可能限制解的时空正则性，需额外验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受约束的随机热方程可启发研究带守恒律的随机流体动力学模型。

zh.motivation: 在任意维数下，对带有L2范数约束的随机非线性热方程建立解的存在唯一性理论。

en.tldr: We study the well-posedness of a stochastic heat equation with polynomial nonlinearity and an L2-norm constraint.
en.motivation: To establish existence and uniqueness of solutions for a stochastic nonlinear heat equation with a codimension-one constraint in any dimension.
en.method: A modified Faedo-Galerkin scheme constructs martingale solutions; a novel Itô formula for the Lp-norm is proved using a sequence of Lp-bounded self-adjoint operators; pathwise uniqueness and the Yamada-Watanabe theorem yield strong solutions.
en.result: Existence of martingale solutions, pathwise uniqueness, and existence/uniqueness of strong solutions are obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous well-posedness framework for constrained stochastic PDEs.

idea_spark.idea: Combining L2-norm constraint with Stratonovich noise may model energy-conserving stochastic systems.
idea_spark.risk: The constraint may restrict spatiotemporal regularity of solutions, requiring additional verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Constrained stochastic heat equations can inspire studies of stochastic fluid dynamics with conservation laws.

papers.title: Hearing the Room Through the Shape of the Drum: Modal-Guided Sound Recovery from Multi-Point Surface Vibrations
papers.summary: Optical vibration sensing enables recovering the scene sound directly from the surface vibration of nearby objects, turning everyday objects into ``visual microphones''. However, most prior methods had focused on capturing the vibrations of specific objects with highly favorable vibration responses. These include objects where the surface vibrations are generated by the object itself (e.g., speaker membrane or guitar body) or objects consisting of a thin membrane which is highly reactive to sound (e.g., a chip bag or the leaf of a plant). In this paper, we tackle sound recovery for a more challenging class of solid objects whose vibration responses are poor or highly resonant. We simultaneously capture vibrations for multiple surface points on the object using a speckle-based vibrometry imaging system. Then, we derive a novel physics-guided vibration formation model that relates the scene sound source to the captured multi-point multi-axis vibrations via the object's vibrational modes. The model is then used to reverse the resonant transfer function of the vibrating object, fusing multiple vibration signals to estimate the original sound source in the scene. We evaluate our approach by recovering sound from a variety of everyday objects, demonstrating that it significantly outperforms traditional single-point speckle vibrometry in challenging scenarios and other signal-processing-based methods for multi-signal fusing.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于多点表面振动和模态引导的声音恢复方法，适用于振动响应差的固体物体。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉麦克风方法主要针对振动响应好的物体（如薄膜），对固体物体效果差。
ai.method: 使用散斑振动成像系统同时捕捉物体多点表面振动，建立物理引导的振动形成模型，通过物体振动模态反转共振传递函数，融合多路振动信号估计原始声源。
ai.result: 在多种日常物体上显著优于传统单点散斑振动测量和其他多信号融合方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从固体物体表面振动中恢复声音，扩展视觉麦克风的适用范围。

idea_spark.idea: 利用物体固有振动模态作为先验，通过多点测量解耦共振效应，实现更鲁棒的声音恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 需要精确的物体模态模型，对复杂或未知物体可能建模困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从鼓的形状决定声音的物理原理出发，将模态分析引入视觉声学恢复。
