en.tldr: A modal-guided sound recovery method from multi-point surface vibrations, effective for solid objects with poor vibration responses.
en.motivation: Existing visual microphones work well for thin membranes but fail for solid objects with resonant or poor vibration responses.
en.method: Simultaneously capture multi-point surface vibrations using speckle-based vibrometry, derive a physics-guided vibration formation model via object vibrational modes, invert the resonant transfer function, and fuse multiple signals to estimate the sound source.
en.result: Significantly outperforms traditional single-point speckle vibrometry and other multi-signal fusion methods on various everyday objects.
en.help_to_user: Enables sound recovery from solid object vibrations, expanding the applicability of visual microphones.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage object vibrational modes as priors to decouple resonance effects via multi-point measurements for robust sound recovery.
idea_spark.risk: Requires accurate modal models, which may be difficult to obtain for complex or unknown objects.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the principle that the shape of a drum determines its sound, introducing modal analysis into visual acoustic recovery.

papers.title: Improved Penalty Function Approaches for Optimization Problems with General Orthogonality
papers.summary: In this paper, we consider a class of generalized orthogonal optimization constraint problems (GOOCP) over $\mathbb{R}^{n \times p}$, where the variable $X$ is restricted within the intersection of a certain subspace $\mathcal{F}$ and satisfies the quadratic constraint $\{X \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times p}: X^{\top} φ(X) = I_p\}$. Such constraints generalize a wide range of structured matrix manifolds, such as the Stiefel manifold, the symplectic Stiefel manifold, the indefinite Stiefel manifold, the third-order tensor Stiefel manifold, etc. We show that the feasible region of GOOCP is a closed embedded submanifold of $\mathbb{R}^{n \times p}$ and characterize the necessary geometric materials for the existing Riemannian optimization frameworks. Based on the constraint dissolving approach for Riemannian optimization problems, we propose the constraint dissolving penalty function (GOCDF) for the constrained optimization problem GOOCP with easy-to-compute formulations. We further establish the equivalence between GOCDF and GOOCP in the aspects of first-order and second-order stationary points. We also analyze the computational complexity of applying first-order methods to minimize GOOCP, which could be significantly lower than those of first-order Riemannian optimization methods. Numerical experiments demonstrate that solving GOOCP through applying unconstrained optimization methods to minimize constraint dissolving function demonstrates superior efficiency to existing Riemannian optimization methods.

ai.tldr: 本文针对一类广义正交约束优化问题（GOOCP），提出了一种约束消解罚函数方法，并证明了其与原始问题在一阶和二阶稳定点上的等价性。
ai.motivation: 现有黎曼优化方法在处理广义正交约束时计算复杂度高，需要更高效的替代方案。
ai.method: 通过约束消解技术构造易于计算的罚函数，将约束问题转化为无约束优化问题。
ai.result: 新方法在计算复杂度上显著低于一阶黎曼优化方法，数值实验表明其效率更高。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效求解涉及广义正交约束的优化问题，如Stiefel流形上的优化。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束消解与罚函数结合，降低黎曼优化对几何计算的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 罚函数可能引入病态条件，影响数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受约束消解方法启发，探索更通用的无约束化技术。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a constraint dissolving penalty function for generalized orthogonal optimization constraint problems (GOOCP) and establishes its equivalence to the original problem in first- and second-order stationary points.
en.motivation: Existing Riemannian optimization methods suffer from high computational complexity for generalized orthogonal constraints, motivating the need for more efficient alternatives.
en.method: A constraint dissolving penalty function is constructed to transform the constrained problem into an unconstrained one with easy-to-compute formulations.
en.result: The proposed method achieves significantly lower computational complexity than first-order Riemannian methods, with numerical experiments demonstrating superior efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently solve optimization problems with generalized orthogonality constraints, such as those on Stiefel manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Combine constraint dissolving with penalty methods to reduce reliance on Riemannian geometric computations.
idea_spark.risk: Penalty functions may introduce ill-conditioning, affecting numerical stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by constraint dissolving approaches to explore more general unconstrained reformulations.

papers.title: Full band denoising of room impulse response in the wavelet domain with dictionary learning
papers.summary: Conventional wavelet-domain methods for room impulse response denoising rely on thresholding detail coefficients, which is unsuited for low frequencies. In this work, we introduce a wavelet-based post-processing algorithm that extends denoising to approximation coefficients by means of sparse dictionary learning with a time-varying error tolerance. The proposed method leverages an exponential decay envelope model to adapt reconstruction accuracy according to the local signal-to-noise ratio. This approach significantly improves low-frequency denoising of synthetic and measured room impulse responses compared to the baseline method, leading to more accurate estimation of acoustic parameters such as decay time.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于小波域和字典学习的房间脉冲响应全频带去噪算法，通过时变误差容限和指数衰减包络模型，显著改善低频去噪效果。
ai.motivation: 传统小波域方法仅对细节系数进行阈值处理，不适用于低频去噪，导致低频段噪声残留。
ai.method: 在小波域中，利用稀疏字典学习对近似系数进行去噪，并引入时变误差容限，结合指数衰减包络模型根据局部信噪比自适应调整重建精度。
ai.result: 在合成和实测房间脉冲响应上，低频去噪效果显著优于基线方法，声学参数（如衰减时间）估计更准确。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种改进的房间脉冲响应去噪技术，可用于声学测量、音频处理和房间声学建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将字典学习与自适应误差容限结合，实现信号不同频段或区域的差异化去噪。
idea_spark.risk: 字典学习计算复杂度较高，可能不适用于实时或大规模数据处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用信号先验模型（如指数衰减）指导稀疏表示，提升去噪的针对性和鲁棒性。

en.tldr: A wavelet-domain post-processing algorithm using dictionary learning with time-varying error tolerance and an exponential decay envelope model to denoise room impulse responses across all frequency bands, especially improving low-frequency denoising.
en.motivation: Conventional wavelet methods only threshold detail coefficients, failing at low frequencies where noise persists.
en.method: Extends denoising to approximation coefficients via sparse dictionary learning with a time-varying error tolerance, adapting reconstruction accuracy based on local signal-to-noise ratio using an exponential decay envelope model.
en.result: Significantly improves low-frequency denoising on synthetic and measured room impulse responses, leading to more accurate acoustic parameter estimation (e.g., decay time).
en.help_to_user: Provides an enhanced denoising technique for room impulse responses, useful in acoustic measurements, audio processing, and room acoustics modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Combine dictionary learning with adaptive error tolerance for differentiated denoising across frequency bands or signal regions.
idea_spark.risk: Dictionary learning may have high computational cost, limiting real-time or large-scale applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage signal prior models (e.g., exponential decay) to guide sparse representation, enhancing denoising specificity and robustness.

papers.title: Two-Valued Groups, Chazy Equation, Dubrovin-Frobenius Structures, and QYBE
papers.summary: We show that the associativity condition of the universal symmetric 2-algebraic 2-valued group defined by the Buchstaber polynomial admits several mutually equivalent interpretations from the viewpoints of the Chazy equation, Gauss-Manin connections, Dubrovin-Frobenius structures, and the quantum Yang-Baxter equation. These results place the universal 2-valued law in a unified framework linking geometry, algebraic topology, group theory, and mathematical physics.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了由Buchstaber多项式定义的泛对称2-代数2-值群的结合条件，在Chazy方程、Gauss-Manin联络、Dubrovin-Frobenius结构和量子Yang-Baxter方程等视角下具有多种等价解释，从而将泛2-值律置于一个统一框架中。
ai.motivation: 将泛2-值群与多个数学物理分支（如可积系统、量子群、Frobenius流形）建立深层联系，揭示其内在统一性。
ai.method: 通过分析Buchstaber多项式定义的泛对称2-代数2-值群的结合条件，分别从Chazy方程、Gauss-Manin联络、Dubrovin-Frobenius结构和量子Yang-Baxter方程的角度给出等价刻画。
ai.result: 建立了泛2-值律与Chazy方程、Gauss-Manin联络、Dubrovin-Frobenius结构及量子Yang-Baxter方程之间的等价关系，实现了几何、代数拓扑、群论和数学物理的统一框架。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解2-值群在可积系统、量子群和Frobenius流形等领域的核心作用，为跨学科研究提供新视角。

idea_spark.idea: 探索2-值群与超对称量子力学或拓扑量子场论中的非交换几何的潜在联系。
idea_spark.risk: 2-值群的非结合性可能导致计算复杂，且与标准群论工具不兼容。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Chazy方程与可积系统关联的启发，可尝试将2-值群用于构造新的可积微分方程或离散系统。

en.tldr: We show that the associativity condition of the universal symmetric 2-algebraic 2-valued group defined by the Buchstaber polynomial admits several mutually equivalent interpretations from the viewpoints of the Chazy equation, Gauss-Manin connections, Dubrovin-Frobenius structures, and the quantum Yang-Baxter equation, placing the universal 2-valued law in a unified framework linking geometry, algebraic topology, group theory, and mathematical physics.
en.motivation: To establish deep connections between the universal 2-valued group and multiple branches of mathematical physics (e.g., integrable systems, quantum groups, Frobenius manifolds) and reveal their inherent unity.
en.method: By analyzing the associativity condition of the universal symmetric 2-algebraic 2-valued group defined by the Buchstaber polynomial, we provide equivalent characterizations from the perspectives of the Chazy equation, Gauss-Manin connections, Dubrovin-Frobenius structures, and the quantum Yang-Baxter equation.
en.result: We establish equivalences between the universal 2-valued law and the Chazy equation, Gauss-Manin connections, Dubrovin-Frobenius structures, and the quantum Yang-Baxter equation, achieving a unified framework across geometry, algebraic topology, group theory, and mathematical physics.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the central role of 2-valued groups in integrable systems, quantum groups, and Frobenius manifolds, offering new cross-disciplinary perspectives.

idea_spark.idea: Explore potential connections between 2-valued groups and supersymmetric quantum mechanics or noncommutative geometry in topological quantum field theory.
idea_spark.risk: Non-associativity of 2-valued groups may lead to computational complexity and incompatibility with standard group-theoretic tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the link between the Chazy equation and integrable systems, one could attempt to use 2-valued groups to construct new integrable differential equations or discrete systems.

papers.title: A Semantic Quantum Circuit Cache for Scalable and Distributed Quantum-Classical Workflows
papers.summary: Hybrid quantum--classical workflows often execute large ensembles of circuits that differ syntactically but implement identical operations, leading to substantial redundant computation. To address this, we introduce the Quantum Circuit Cache, a content-addressable system that detects semantic equivalence and reuses previously computed results across executions, backends, and workflow stages.   Our approach combines ZX-calculus reduction with isomorphism-invariant Weisfeiler--Leman graph hashing to generate deterministic circuit identifiers, enabling constant-time lookup in distributed caches supporting both lightweight LMDB and scalable Redis deployments. The system integrates transparently into hybrid HPC workflows and remains backend-agnostic across CPU, GPU, and QPU environments.   We evaluate the system on MareNostrum 5 with two representative workloads: distributed wire cutting and Differential Evolution-based QAOA optimization. For wire cutting, caching eliminates up to 91.98% of redundant subcircuit simulations, yielding speedups up to 7.0 times on a single node and maintaining advantages at scale, with Redis-based caching achieving up to 1.6 times speedups under high parallelism. Validation on a 35-qubit superconducting QPU confirms these benefits, achieving an 11.2 times speedup on real hardware. In distributed QAOA optimization, equivalence-aware caching avoids up to 27.6% of circuit evaluations and consistently reduces execution cost without altering the optimization algorithm. In both cases, reuse grows with concurrency and circuit structure, highlighting redundancy as a major systems bottleneck and demonstrating the effectiveness of our Quantum Circuit Cache.

ai.tldr: 提出一种语义量子电路缓存系统，通过检测电路语义等价性来消除混合量子-经典工作流中的冗余计算。
ai.motivation: 混合量子-经典工作流中大量电路语法不同但语义相同，导致重复计算，成为系统瓶颈。
ai.method: 结合ZX-演算约简和Weisfeiler-Lehman图哈希生成确定性电路标识符，支持LMDB和Redis分布式缓存，后端无关集成。
ai.result: 在MareNostrum 5上，线切割工作负载消除91.98%冗余子电路模拟，单节点加速7.0倍；35量子比特超导QPU上加速11.2倍；QAOA优化中避免27.6%电路评估。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户减少混合量子-经典工作流中的重复计算，提升执行效率，尤其适用于大规模分布式场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将电路缓存与动态调度结合，根据缓存命中率自适应调整任务分配策略。
idea_spark.risk: 缓存一致性维护和分布式同步开销可能在高并发下成为新瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受内容可寻址存储和ZX-演算在量子电路简化中的应用启发，将两者结合用于缓存标识生成。

en.tldr: A semantic quantum circuit cache system that eliminates redundant computation in hybrid quantum-classical workflows by detecting circuit semantic equivalence.
en.motivation: Large ensembles of circuits that differ syntactically but implement identical operations cause substantial redundant computation, becoming a major systems bottleneck.
en.method: Combines ZX-calculus reduction with Weisfeiler-Lehman graph hashing to generate deterministic circuit identifiers, supporting LMDB and Redis distributed caches with backend-agnostic integration.
en.result: On MareNostrum 5, wire cutting eliminates 91.98% redundant subcircuit simulations with up to 7.0x speedup on a single node; 11.2x speedup on a 35-qubit superconducting QPU; QAOA optimization avoids 27.6% circuit evaluations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users reduce redundant computation in hybrid quantum-classical workflows, improving execution efficiency, especially in large-scale distributed settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine circuit caching with dynamic scheduling to adaptively assign tasks based on cache hit rates.
idea_spark.risk: Cache consistency maintenance and distributed synchronization overhead may become new bottlenecks under high concurrency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by content-addressable storage and ZX-calculus for quantum circuit simplification, combining them for cache identifier generation.

papers.title: Counterexamples to an Extremal Conjecture for Random Cycle-Factors
papers.summary: Christoph, Draganić, Girão, Hurley, Michel, and Müyesser conjectured that, when $d\mid n$, the expected number of cycles in a uniformly random cycle-factor of a directed $d$-regular graph on $n$ vertices is uniquely maximised by the disjoint union of $n/d$ copies of the complete looped digraph $K_d^\circ$, with value $(n/d)H_d$ [FOCS 2025]. We disprove this conjecture in the strongest possible range. For every $d\ge 3$ and every multiple $n=kd$ with $k\ge 2$, we construct a directed $d$-regular graph on $n$ vertices whose uniformly random cycle-factor has expected cycle count strictly larger than $kH_d$. We also show that the conjectured extremal picture is correct in degree $d=2$, giving a sharp dichotomy between degree two and all higher degrees.

ai.tldr: 本文构造了反例，否定了关于有向d-正则图中随机循环因子期望循环数的极值猜想，并证明该猜想在d=2时成立。
ai.motivation: 验证Christoph等人提出的极值猜想是否成立，该猜想认为有向d-正则图中随机循环因子的期望循环数在完全环有向图的并集上取最大值。
ai.method: 对于每个d≥3和n=kd（k≥2），构造特定的有向d-正则图，并计算其随机循环因子的期望循环数，与猜想值进行比较。
ai.result: 对于d≥3，构造的图具有严格大于猜想值的期望循环数，从而否定了猜想；对于d=2，猜想成立，形成二分性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解有向正则图中随机循环因子的极值行为，以及度数为2与更高度数之间的本质差异。

idea_spark.idea: 利用图的结构不对称性来增加随机循环因子中循环的期望数量。
idea_spark.risk: 构造可能依赖于特定参数范围，未必适用于所有正则图。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑图的不同连通分量或特殊子图结构对随机过程期望的影响。

en.tldr: This paper constructs counterexamples disproving an extremal conjecture about the expected number of cycles in random cycle-factors of directed d-regular graphs, while confirming the conjecture for d=2.
en.motivation: To test the extremal conjecture by Christoph et al. that the expected number of cycles in a random cycle-factor of a directed d-regular graph is maximized by the disjoint union of complete looped digraphs.
en.method: For each d≥3 and n=kd (k≥2), construct specific directed d-regular graphs and compute the expected cycle count of their random cycle-factors, comparing with the conjectured value.
en.result: For d≥3, the constructed graphs yield strictly larger expected cycle counts than the conjecture, disproving it; for d=2, the conjecture holds, establishing a sharp dichotomy.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the extremal behavior of random cycle-factors in directed regular graphs and the fundamental difference between degree two and higher degrees.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit structural asymmetry in the graph to increase the expected number of cycles in random cycle-factors.
idea_spark.risk: The construction may rely on specific parameter ranges and may not generalize to all regular graphs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider how different connected components or special subgraph structures affect expectations in random processes.

keywords_raw: disjoint union of complete looped digraphs

papers.title: Algebraic quantum kinematics and SR-selection
papers.summary: We develop, as the first of a six-paper series, an operator-algebraic framework relating non-relativistic quantum mechanics and special relativity. Three structural facts organize the framework. (i)~The photon sector of free QED is a transparent realization: classical Fourier--Maxwell theory supplies a complex Hilbert-space scaffold (inner product, symplectic form, Schrödinger-form mode equation, polarization $\mathbb{C}^2$) with no quantum input, and a single canonical commutator with scale $\hbar$ on the mode amplitudes promotes it to single-photon QED, with photon indivisibility, the Planck relation $E=\hbarω$, and the spin spectrum $\pm\hbar$ as theorems. (ii)~The constants $c$ and $\hbar$ play non-interchangeable roles: $c$ is intrinsic to each Fourier-conjugate space, while $\hbar$ acts \emph{between} them, converting kinematic phase rates into dynamical observables. (iii)~Lifting the framework to a Haag--Kastler net with sharper-than-equal-time microcausality and positive-energy spectrum is structurally obstructed in the Galilean case; we state this as the SR-selection conjecture and identify three strands of evidence (Hegerfeldt spreading; absence of a known Galilean multi-particle resolution; Reeh--Schlieder failure on Galilean Haag--Kastler nets), the third established as a precise no-go theorem in the second paper of the series. The framework's modular content (Tomita--Takesaki, Bisognano--Wichmann, Unruh as KMS, type-$\mathrm{III}_1$ universality) is collected as the algebraic substrate on which the curved-background, dynamical-metric, and crossed-product extensions of the third through sixth papers operate.

ai.tldr: 本文作为六篇系列论文的第一篇，发展了一个算子代数框架，将非相对论量子力学与狭义相对论联系起来，并提出了SR-选择猜想。
ai.motivation: 建立量子力学与狭义相对论之间更严格的算子代数联系，并解释c和ħ的不同作用。
ai.method: 通过自由QED的光子扇区作为透明实现，利用傅里叶-麦克斯韦理论提供希尔伯特空间支架，并引入单个规范对易子。
ai.result: 证明了光子不可分性、普朗克关系E=ħω和自旋谱±ħ；在伽利略情形下，提升到Haag-Kastler网存在结构障碍，并给出SR-选择猜想的三个证据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子力学与狭义相对论在算子代数框架下的统一基础，以及光子的量子性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用傅里叶-麦克斯韦理论的经典结构作为量子化的起点，可能为其他场论提供类似方法。
idea_spark.risk: SR-选择猜想尚未完全证明，伽利略情形下的障碍可能限制框架的普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典电磁理论直接导出光子量子性质，启发其他量子化方案。

en.tldr: This paper, the first of a six-part series, develops an operator-algebraic framework linking non-relativistic quantum mechanics and special relativity, and proposes the SR-selection conjecture.
en.motivation: To establish a rigorous operator-algebraic connection between quantum mechanics and special relativity, and to clarify the distinct roles of c and ħ.
en.method: Using the photon sector of free QED as a transparent realization, the classical Fourier-Maxwell theory provides a complex Hilbert-space scaffold, and a single canonical commutator promotes it to single-photon QED.
en.result: Photon indivisibility, the Planck relation E=ħω, and the spin spectrum ±ħ are derived as theorems; lifting to a Haag-Kastler net is structurally obstructed in the Galilean case, with three strands of evidence for the SR-selection conjecture.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the unified foundation of quantum mechanics and special relativity within an operator-algebraic framework, and the quantum properties of photons.

idea_spark.idea: Using the classical structure of Fourier-Maxwell theory as a starting point for quantization may inspire similar approaches for other field theories.
idea_spark.risk: The SR-selection conjecture is not yet fully proven; the obstruction in the Galilean case may limit the framework's universality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Deriving quantum photon properties directly from classical electromagnetism suggests alternative quantization schemes.

papers.title: FruitProM-V2: Robust Probabilistic Maturity Estimation and Detection of Fruits and Vegetables
papers.summary: Accurate fruit maturity identification is essential for determining harvest timing, as incorrect assessment directly affects yield and post-harvest quality. Although ripening is a continuous biological process, vision-based maturity estimation is typically formulated as a multi-class classification task, which imposes sharp boundaries between visually similar stages. To examine this limitation, we perform an annotation reliability study with two independent annotators on a held-out tomato dataset and observe disagreement concentrated near adjacent maturity stages. Motivated by this observation, we model maturity as a latent continuous variable and predict it probabilistically using a distributional detection head, converting the distribution into class probabilities through the cumulative distribution function (CDF). The proposed formulation maintains comparable performance to a standard detector under clean labels while better representing uncertainty. Furthermore, when controlled label noise is introduced during training, the probabilistic model demonstrates improved robustness relative to the baseline, indicating that explicitly modeling maturity uncertainty leads to more reliable visual maturity estimation.

ai.tldr: 提出FruitProM-V2，将果实成熟度建模为连续潜变量，通过分布检测头预测概率分布，利用累积分布函数转化为类别概率，在番茄数据集上验证了其对标签噪声的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 传统多分类方法对连续成熟过程施加硬边界，导致相邻阶段易混淆；人工标注研究显示标注者分歧集中在相邻阶段，表明需要不确定性建模。
ai.method: 将成熟度视为连续潜变量，使用分布检测头预测其概率分布，并通过累积分布函数（CDF）将分布映射为类别概率。
ai.result: 在干净标签下性能与标准检测器相当，在引入控制标签噪声时表现出更好的鲁棒性，表明显式建模成熟度不确定性可提升视觉估计可靠性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种更鲁棒的果实成熟度估计方法，尤其适用于标注质量不稳定的实际农业场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将分布检测头与CDF结合，实现从连续潜变量到离散类别的软映射，替代硬分类边界。
idea_spark.risk: 需要验证模型在更多种类和更大规模数据集上的泛化能力，以及分布假设（如高斯）的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用标注者分歧作为监督信号，引导模型学习不确定性，可推广至其他主观标注任务。

en.tldr: FruitProM-V2 models fruit maturity as a latent continuous variable, predicts its probability distribution via a distributional detection head, and converts it to class probabilities using the CDF, showing improved robustness to label noise on a tomato dataset.
en.motivation: Traditional multi-class classification imposes hard boundaries on a continuous ripening process, causing confusion between adjacent stages; an annotation study reveals annotator disagreement near adjacent stages, motivating uncertainty modeling.
en.method: Treats maturity as a latent continuous variable, uses a distributional detection head to predict its probability distribution, and maps the distribution to class probabilities via the cumulative distribution function (CDF).
en.result: Achieves comparable performance to a standard detector under clean labels and demonstrates better robustness when controlled label noise is introduced, indicating that explicit uncertainty modeling yields more reliable visual maturity estimation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more robust maturity estimation method, especially useful in real-world agricultural settings with imperfect annotation quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combine a distributional detection head with the CDF to achieve a soft mapping from a latent continuous variable to discrete classes, replacing hard classification boundaries.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization to more fruit/vegetable types and larger datasets needs validation; the distributional assumption (e.g., Gaussian) may not always hold.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging annotator disagreement as a supervisory signal to guide uncertainty learning can be extended to other subjective annotation tasks.

papers.title: GaitKD: A Universal Decoupled Distillation Framework for Efficient Gait Recognition
papers.summary: Gait recognition is an attractive biometric modality for long-range and contact-free identification, but high-performing gait models often rely on deep and computationally expensive architectures that are difficult to deploy in practice. Knowledge distillation (KD) offers a natural way to transfer knowledge from a powerful teacher to an efficient student; however, standard KD is often less effective for part-structured gait models, where supervision is formed from both part-wise classification logits and part-wise retrieval embeddings. In this paper, we propose GaitKD, a distillation framework that decouples gait knowledge transfer into two complementary components: decision-level distillation and boundary-level distillation. Specifically, GaitKD aligns the teacher and student through part-calibrated logit distillation to transfer inter-class decision relations, while preserving the teacher-induced partitioning of the embedding space through an activation-boundary objective instead of direct feature regression. With a simple aligned part-wise design, GaitKD supports heterogeneous teacher-student gait models without introducing additional inference cost. Experimental results across multiple gait recognition benchmarks and teacher-student configurations show consistent improvements over strong gait baselines. Our study demonstrates that the two transfer components are complementary, and boundary-preserving distillation provides more stable performance than direct feature regression. Source code is available at https://github.com/liyiersan/GaitKD/

ai.tldr: 提出GaitKD框架，通过解耦决策级和边界级蒸馏，高效提升步态识别学生模型的性能。
ai.motivation: 高性能步态模型计算量大，难以部署；标准知识蒸馏对部件结构模型效果不佳。
ai.method: 将知识蒸馏解耦为决策级（部件校准logit蒸馏）和边界级（激活边界目标）两个互补部分。
ai.result: 在多个基准和师生配置上一致优于强基线，边界蒸馏比直接特征回归更稳定。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需额外推理成本的步态模型压缩方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将边界级蒸馏与对比学习结合，进一步强化嵌入空间的结构。
idea_spark.risk: 边界目标可能对噪声敏感，需设计鲁棒的激活边界估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从部件结构模型的特点出发，将蒸馏分解为互补任务，避免直接特征回归的过拟合。

en.tldr: Proposes GaitKD, a decoupled distillation framework with decision-level and boundary-level components for efficient gait recognition. It consistently improves student models without extra inference cost.
en.motivation: High-performance gait models are computationally expensive; standard KD is ineffective for part-structured models.
en.method: Decouples KD into part-calibrated logit distillation (decision-level) and activation-boundary objective (boundary-level).
en.result: Outperforms strong baselines across multiple benchmarks; boundary distillation is more stable than direct feature regression.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical model compression method for gait recognition without additional inference overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Combine boundary-level distillation with contrastive learning to further structure the embedding space.
idea_spark.risk: Boundary objectives may be sensitive to noise; robust activation boundary estimation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging the part-structured nature of the model to decompose distillation into complementary tasks avoids overfitting from direct feature regression.

papers.title: Exact Dynamic Programming for Solow--Polasky Diversity Subset Selection on Lines and Staircases
papers.summary: We study exact fixed-cardinality Solow--Polasky diversity subset selection on ordered finite $\ell_1$ sets, with monotone biobjective Pareto fronts and their higher-dimensional staircase analogues as central applications. Solow--Polasky diversity was introduced in biodiversity conservation, whereas the same inverse-matrix expression appears in metric geometry as magnitude: for a finite metric space $(X,d)$ with exponential similarity matrix $Z_{ij}=e^{-q d(x_i,x_j)}$, the quantity $\1^\top Z^{-1}\1$ is the magnitude of the scaled finite metric space $(X,qd)$ whenever the weighting is defined by the inverse matrix. Thus, in this finite exponential-kernel setting, Solow--Polasky diversity and magnitude are mathematically the same object viewed through different motivations. Building on the linear-chain magnitude formula of Leinster and Willerton, we provide a detailed proof of the scaled consecutive-gap identity $ \SP(X)=1+\sum_r \tanh(qg_r/2), $ where the $g_r$ are the gaps between consecutive selected points. We then prove an exact Bellman-recursion theorem for maximizing this value over all subsets of a prescribed cardinality, yielding an $O(kn^2)$ dynamic program for an ordered $n$-point candidate set and subset size $k$. Finally, we prove ordered $\ell_1$ reductions showing that the same algorithm applies to monotone biobjective Pareto-front approximations and, more generally, to finite coordinatewise monotone $\ell_1$ staircases in $\R^d$. These are precisely the ordered $\ell_1$ chains for which the Manhattan metric becomes a line metric along the chosen order, so the one-dimensional dynamic program applies without modification.   Keywords: Dynamic Programming, Solow--Polasky Diversity, Complexity Theory, Multiobjective Optimization, Pareto front, Magnitude

ai.tldr: 本文研究有序有限ℓ₁集合上固定基数的Solow-Polasky多样性子集选择问题，证明了缩放连续间隙恒等式和精确的Bellman递归定理，并给出了O(kn²)的动态规划算法，适用于单调双目标Pareto前沿和更高维的阶梯结构。
ai.motivation: Solow-Polasky多样性在生物多样性保护中引入，与度量几何中的magnitude概念等价，但缺乏针对有序集合的精确子集选择算法。
ai.method: 基于Leinster和Willerton的线性链magnitude公式，证明缩放连续间隙恒等式，进而推导Bellman递归定理，并利用有序ℓ₁约化将算法扩展到单调双目标Pareto前沿和阶梯结构。
ai.result: 得到O(kn²)的动态规划算法，适用于有序n点候选集和子集大小k，且同一算法可直接应用于单调双目标Pareto前沿和有限坐标单调ℓ₁阶梯。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种精确且高效的方法，用于在有序集合中选择最大化Solow-Polasky多样性的子集，可应用于生物多样性评估、多目标优化和度量几何中的magnitude计算。

idea_spark.idea: 将Solow-Polasky多样性与magnitude的等价性用于设计新的多样性指标，或利用Bellman递归优化其他单调子模函数。
idea_spark.risk: 算法复杂度O(kn²)在n很大时可能成为瓶颈，且仅适用于有序ℓ₁结构，对一般度量空间不直接适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生物多样性保护中的多样性度量出发，结合度量几何的magnitude概念，启发跨学科方法解决组合优化问题。

zh.tldr: 本文研究有序有限ℓ₁集合上固定基数的Solow-Polasky多样性子集选择问题，证明了缩放连续间隙恒等式和精确的Bellman递归定理，并给出了O(kn²)的动态规划算法，适用于单调双目标Pareto前沿和更高维的阶梯结构。
zh.motivation: Solow-Polasky多样性在生物多样性保护中引入，与度量几何中的magnitude概念等价，但缺乏针对有序集合的精确子集选择算法。
zh.method: 基于Leinster和Willerton的线性链magnitude公式，证明缩放连续间隙恒等式，进而推导Bellman递归定理，并利用有序ℓ₁约化将算法扩展到单调双目标Pareto前沿和阶梯结构。
zh.result: 得到O(kn²)的动态规划算法，适用于有序n点候选集和子集大小k，且同一算法可直接应用于单调双目标Pareto前沿和有限坐标单调ℓ₁阶梯。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种精确且高效的方法，用于在有序集合中选择最大化Solow-Polasky多样性的子集，可应用于生物多样性评估、多目标优化和度量几何中的magnitude计算。

idea_spark.idea: 将Solow-Polasky多样性与magnitude的等价性用于设计新的多样性指标，或利用Bellman递归优化其他单调子模函数。
idea_spark.risk: 算法复杂度O(kn²)在n很大时可能成为瓶颈，且仅适用于有序ℓ₁结构，对一般度量空间不直接适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生物多样性保护中的多样性度量出发，结合度量几何的magnitude概念，启发跨学科方法解决组合优化问题。

en.tldr: This paper studies exact fixed-cardinality Solow-Polasky diversity subset selection on ordered finite ℓ₁ sets, proves a scaled consecutive-gap identity and an exact Bellman recursion theorem, and gives an O(kn²) dynamic program applicable to monotone biobjective Pareto fronts and higher-dimensional staircases.
en.motivation: Solow-Polasky diversity, introduced in biodiversity conservation, is mathematically equivalent to magnitude in metric geometry, but lacks exact subset selection algorithms for ordered sets.
en.method: Building on the linear-chain magnitude formula, the scaled consecutive-gap identity is proved, leading to a Bellman recursion theorem. Ordered ℓ₁ reductions extend the algorithm to monotone biobjective Pareto fronts and staircases.
en.result: An O(kn²) dynamic program is obtained for ordered n-point candidate sets and subset size k, directly applicable to monotone biobjective Pareto fronts and finite coordinatewise monotone ℓ₁ staircases.
en.help_to_user: Provides an exact and efficient method for selecting subsets maximizing Solow-Polasky diversity on ordered sets, useful in biodiversity assessment, multiobjective optimization, and magnitude computation in metric geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the equivalence between Solow-Polasky diversity and magnitude to design new diversity indices, or use Bellman recursion to optimize other monotone submodular functions.
idea_spark.risk: The O(kn²) complexity may become a bottleneck for large n, and the method is limited to ordered ℓ₁ structures, not directly applicable to general metric spaces.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from a diversity measure in biodiversity conservation and connecting it to magnitude in metric geometry inspires cross-disciplinary approaches to combinatorial optimization.

papers.title: On the monotonicity of affine quermassintegrals
papers.summary: Lutwak's affine quermassintegral theory is a foundational component of modern affine Brunn--Minkowski theory. Developed in the 1980s, it provides affine analogues of the classical quermassintegrals and has led to a rich family of sharp affine isoperimetric inequalities. A central question in this program, going back to Lutwak's 1988 work, is an Alexandrov--Fenchel-type monotonicity principle for the normalized $L^{-n}$-moment quermassintegrals $I_{k,-n}$. In one form, this principle predicts that \[   I_{m,-n}(K)^{1/m}\ge I_{k,-n}(K)^{1/k},   \qquad 1\le m<k\le n . \] The question was recorded in Gardner's 2006 book Geometric Tomography in its problem list, and it was later placed by Milman and Yehudayoff in their 2023 JAMS paper within a broader $L^p$-moment framework. Their sharp affine quermassintegral theorem verifies the conjectured comparison in a substantial range; in particular, at the affine-invariant endpoint $p=-n$, it includes the comparison with the top dimension.   We show that the proposed monotonicity does not persist in the full range. More precisely, for every triple of integers $m,k,n$ satisfying $1\leq m<k\leq n-1$ and $n>(m+2)(k+2)-2$, there exists an origin-symmetric $C^2_+$ convex body $K\subset\mathbb R^n$ such that \[   I_{m,-n}(K)^{1/m} < I_{k,-n}(K)^{1/k}. \] The example is obtained from the Euclidean ball by an arbitrarily small degree-four spherical harmonic perturbation. The proof is based on a second-variation formula for negative projection-volume moments, together with an explicit Grassmannian average for the fourth zonal harmonic in arbitrary projection dimension.

ai.tldr: 证明了Lutwak提出的仿射拟质量积分单调性猜想在完整范围内不成立，并构造了反例。
ai.motivation: 验证Lutwak（1988）提出的关于归一化L^{-n}矩拟质量积分单调性的猜想是否普遍成立。
ai.method: 利用负投影体积矩的二阶变分公式，结合任意投影维度下第四阶球谐函数的格拉斯曼平均，通过欧几里得球的四阶球谐扰动构造反例。
ai.result: 对于满足1≤m<k≤n-1且n>(m+2)(k+2)-2的整数三元组，存在原点对称的C^2_+凸体使得单调性反向。
ai.help_to_user: 澄清了仿射Brunn-Minkowski理论中一个长期未决的猜想，为后续研究提供了边界条件。

idea_spark.idea: 利用高阶球谐扰动构造反例，可能用于检验其他凸几何猜想的紧性。
idea_spark.risk: 反例仅适用于特定维度范围，一般情况仍需进一步分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典拟质量积分的单调性研究拓展到L^p框架，启发新的仿射等周不等式。

zh.motivation: 验证Lutwak（1988）提出的关于归一化L^{-n}矩拟质量积分单调性的猜想是否普遍成立。

en.tldr: We disprove Lutwak's conjectured monotonicity for affine quermassintegrals in the full range by constructing counterexamples via spherical harmonic perturbations.
en.motivation: To test whether the Alexandrov-Fenchel-type monotonicity for normalized L^{-n}-moment quermassintegrals holds universally.
en.method: Using a second-variation formula for negative projection-volume moments and an explicit Grassmannian average of the fourth zonal harmonic, we perturb the Euclidean ball by a degree-four spherical harmonic.
en.result: For integers 1≤m<k≤n-1 with n>(m+2)(k+2)-2, there exists an origin-symmetric C^2_+ convex body violating the monotonicity.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies a long-standing open problem in affine Brunn-Minkowski theory and provides boundary conditions for future research.

idea_spark.idea: Higher-order spherical harmonic perturbations may serve as counterexamples for other convex geometric conjectures.
idea_spark.risk: Counterexamples are limited to specific dimension ranges; general cases remain open.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending classical quermassintegral monotonicity to L^p frameworks may inspire new affine isoperimetric inequalities.

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning for Public Safety Power Shutoffs Under Decision-Dependent Uncertainty and Nonlinear Wildfire Ignition Models
papers.summary: Power grid infrastructure is an increasingly significant source of wildfire ignitions and poses severe risks to communities in fire-prone regions. Public Safety Power Shutoffs (PSPS) have emerged as a critical operational tool for utilities to mitigate this risk by proactively de-energizing portions of the grid under high-threat conditions. These shutoffs, however, impose costs on affected communities, and it is therefore essential that PSPS decisions be informed by realistic models of wildfire ignition risk. Current Mixed Integer Programming based methods require restrictive structural assumptions about the probability models for line failures caused by power line ignitions. While these simplifications yield tractable solutions, the resulting models may differ significantly from the true underlying dynamics. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning framework based on Proximal Policy Optimization that learns to adjust the topology of a distribution system by interacting directly with a simulator that accommodates any line failure probability model without imposing such restrictions. We test our methodology on 54-bus and 138-bus distribution systems and demonstrate its ability to lower operational costs compared to existing methods while allowing only marginally increased compute times as network size grows.

ai.tldr: 提出基于近端策略优化的强化学习框架，用于在决策依赖不确定性和非线性野火点火模型下优化公共安全停电决策。
ai.motivation: 现有混合整数规划方法对线路故障概率模型施加严格结构假设，导致模型与真实动态偏差大，影响停电决策的经济性和安全性。
ai.method: 采用近端策略优化算法，通过与模拟器交互学习调整配电网拓扑结构，无需对线路故障概率模型做限制性假设。
ai.result: 在54节点和138节点系统上测试，相比现有方法降低了运营成本，且计算时间随网络规模增长仅小幅增加。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用强化学习在复杂不确定性下做出更优的电网停电决策，平衡火灾风险与社区成本。

idea_spark.idea: 结合图神经网络与强化学习，进一步提升对大规模电网拓扑变化的泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟器与真实电网的差异可能导致策略迁移效果下降，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将决策依赖不确定性建模与强化学习结合，为其他基础设施风险管理提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a reinforcement learning framework based on Proximal Policy Optimization to optimize public safety power shutoff decisions under decision-dependent uncertainty and nonlinear wildfire ignition models.
en.motivation: Existing mixed integer programming methods impose restrictive structural assumptions on line failure probability models, causing significant deviations from true dynamics and compromising the economy and safety of shutoff decisions.
en.method: Uses Proximal Policy Optimization to learn distribution system topology adjustments by interacting directly with a simulator, without restrictive assumptions on line failure probability models.
en.result: Tested on 54-bus and 138-bus systems, the method reduces operational costs compared to existing approaches, with only marginal increases in computation time as network size grows.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how reinforcement learning can make better grid shutoff decisions under complex uncertainty, balancing wildfire risk and community costs.

idea_spark.idea: Combine graph neural networks with reinforcement learning to further improve generalization across large-scale grid topology changes.
idea_spark.risk: Discrepancies between the simulator and real grid may degrade policy transfer performance, requiring careful validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating decision-dependent uncertainty modeling with reinforcement learning offers new insights for risk management in other infrastructure systems.

papers.title: When to Vote, When to Rewrite: Disagreement-Guided Strategy Routing for Test-Time Scaling
papers.summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) achieve strong performance on mathematical reasoning tasks but remain unreliable on challenging instances. Existing test-time scaling methods, such as repeated sampling, self-correction, and tree search, improve performance at the cost of increased computation, yet often exhibit diminishing returns on hard problems. We observe that output disagreement is strongly correlated with instance difficulty and prediction correctness, providing a useful signal for guiding instance-level strategy selection at test time. Based on this insight, we propose a training-free framework that formulates test-time scaling as an instance-level routing problem, rather than allocating more computation within a single strategy, dynamically selecting among different scaling strategies based on output disagreement. The framework applies lightweight resolution for consistent cases, majority voting for moderate disagreement, and rewriting-based reformulation for highly ambiguous instances. Experiments on seven mathematical benchmarks and three models show that our method improves accuracy by 3% - 7% while reducing sampling cost compared to existing approaches.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于输出分歧的训练无关框架，将测试时扩展建模为实例级路由问题，动态选择投票或重写策略，在数学推理任务上提升准确率3%-7%并降低采样成本。
ai.motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法（如重复采样、自纠正、树搜索）在困难问题上收益递减，且缺乏针对实例难度的自适应策略选择。
ai.method: 利用输出分歧与实例难度和预测正确性的强相关性，设计分歧引导的策略路由：一致时轻量解析、中等分歧时多数投票、高度歧义时重写改写。
ai.result: 在7个数学基准和3个模型上，准确率提升3%-7%，同时降低采样成本。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外训练即可自适应分配计算资源的测试时扩展方法，适用于需要平衡精度与效率的推理场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将输出分歧作为元特征，训练一个轻量级路由器来预测最优策略，可能进一步提升路由准确性。
idea_spark.risk: 分歧阈值设定可能依赖具体任务，跨领域泛化时需重新校准；重写策略可能引入新错误。
idea_spark.inspiration: 分歧信号可扩展为多维度（如置信度、熵）融合，或与主动学习结合，动态收集高分歧样本进行人工标注。

en.tldr: Proposes a training-free framework that formulates test-time scaling as instance-level routing, dynamically selecting between voting and rewriting strategies based on output disagreement, improving accuracy by 3%-7% on mathematical reasoning tasks while reducing sampling cost.
en.motivation: Existing test-time scaling methods (e.g., repeated sampling, self-correction, tree search) show diminishing returns on hard problems and lack adaptive strategy selection per instance difficulty.
en.method: Leverages the strong correlation between output disagreement and instance difficulty/correctness to design disagreement-guided routing: lightweight resolution for consistent cases, majority voting for moderate disagreement, and rewriting-based reformulation for highly ambiguous instances.
en.result: Improves accuracy by 3%-7% across 7 mathematical benchmarks and 3 models, while reducing sampling cost compared to existing approaches.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free method to adaptively allocate computation at test time, suitable for reasoning tasks requiring a balance between accuracy and efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Use output disagreement as a meta-feature to train a lightweight router that predicts the optimal strategy, potentially improving routing accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Disagreement thresholds may be task-specific and require recalibration for cross-domain generalization; rewriting strategies may introduce new errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Disagreement signals can be extended to multi-dimensional fusion (e.g., confidence, entropy) or combined with active learning to dynamically collect high-disagreement samples for human annotation.

papers.title: Constitutive Modelling of Korteweg Fluids Using Liu's Method
papers.summary: The paper studies constitutive modelling of Korteweg fluids. Thermodynamic consistency, i.e. compatibility with entropy balance law, is achieved using Liu's method of multipliers. Appropriate constitutive assumptions facilitated inclusion of the capillary effects in the specific entropy. Korteweg stresses are derived from the equilibrium conditions -- vanishing of the entropy production and its minimization in equilibrium. Material parameter in Korteweg stresses is allowed to depend on temperature, which turns out to be consistent with kinetic-theory results and leads to cross-coupling of mechanical and thermal effects. The generalized Gibbs' relation, which inherits the capillary effects, is derived as consequence, which is a peculiar feature of the Liu's method.

ai.tldr: 利用Liu乘子法建立了Korteweg流体的本构模型，保证了热力学一致性，并推导出包含毛细效应的广义吉布斯关系。
ai.motivation: 为Korteweg流体建立热力学一致的本构模型，并纳入毛细效应。
ai.method: 采用Liu乘子法，通过熵平衡律和适当的本构假设推导本构关系。
ai.result: 得到了Korteweg应力表达式，允许材料参数依赖温度，并导出了包含毛细效应的广义吉布斯关系。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了Korteweg流体热力学一致建模的严格方法，有助于理解毛细效应与热力学的耦合。

idea_spark.idea: 将温度依赖的材料参数引入Korteweg应力，实现力-热交叉耦合。
idea_spark.risk: 模型参数依赖温度可能增加实验标定难度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从平衡熵产生最小化条件出发推导应力，可启发其他非平衡系统的本构关系构建。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从平衡熵产生最小化条件出发推导应力，可启发其他非平衡系统的本构关系构建。

en.tldr: A thermodynamically consistent constitutive model for Korteweg fluids is developed using Liu's method of multipliers, yielding a generalized Gibbs relation that incorporates capillary effects.
en.motivation: To establish a thermodynamically consistent constitutive model for Korteweg fluids that includes capillary effects.
en.method: Liu's method of multipliers is applied, enforcing the entropy balance law with appropriate constitutive assumptions.
en.result: Korteweg stresses are derived, allowing temperature-dependent material parameters, and a generalized Gibbs relation with capillary effects is obtained.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous framework for thermodynamically consistent modeling of Korteweg fluids, clarifying the coupling between capillary and thermal effects.

idea_spark.idea: Introducing temperature-dependent material parameters in Korteweg stresses enables mechanical-thermal cross-coupling.
idea_spark.risk: Temperature-dependent parameters may increase experimental calibration complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Deriving stresses from entropy production minimization can inspire constitutive relations for other non-equilibrium systems.

papers.title: Large Language Models as Explainable Cyberattack Detectors for Energy Industrial Control Systems
papers.summary: In modern energy systems, industrial control systems (ICS) and power-system SCADA require intrusion detection that is not only accurate but also auditable by operators. The ICS intrusion-detection landscape is currently dominated by established supervised detectors. In this paper, we study whether an off-the-shelf large language model (LLM) can serve as a complementary, human-in-the-loop layer for Modbus traffic. We cast this as a binary network-side normal/critical decision task on two public ICS Modbus datasets, collapsing attack periods and other safety-critical behaviors into a single critical class. Each Modbus communication instance is converted into a compact token string derived from discretized protocol fields, and a prompt-configured LLM produces a normal/critical alert together with a concise, token-grounded incident record for analyst review. Under matched event information and shared evaluation splits, the resulting LLM-based triage pipeline achieves high predictive performance on both benchmarks and is broadly comparable to strong supervised baselines, while requiring no task-specific weight updates. To assess the audit record, we apply intervention-based diagnostics, including sufficiency- and necessity-style tests, which provide evidence that the cited tokens are often decision-relevant to the model's own prediction. These records are intended as audit signals rather than full human-grounded explanations.

ai.tldr: 研究使用现成的大型语言模型作为能源工业控制系统中Modbus流量的可解释入侵检测器，无需任务特定权重更新即可达到与强监督基线相当的性能。
ai.motivation: 现有ICS入侵检测方法虽然准确，但缺乏可审计性，需要一种可解释的、人机协同的检测层。
ai.method: 将Modbus通信实例转换为紧凑的令牌字符串，通过提示配置的LLM生成正常/关键警报，并附带基于令牌的事件记录。
ai.result: 在两个公共ICS Modbus数据集上，LLM管道实现了高预测性能，与强监督基线相当，且诊断测试表明引用的令牌与模型决策相关。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM在工业控制系统入侵检测中的潜力，特别是其可解释性和无需重新训练的优势。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM的零样本能力，结合领域知识提示，实现跨协议的可解释入侵检测。
idea_spark.risk: LLM可能对罕见攻击模式误判，且令牌解释的忠实性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将LLM作为审计信号而非完全解释，启发设计人机协同的安全分析工具。

en.tldr: Investigates using off-the-shelf large language models as explainable intrusion detectors for Modbus traffic in energy industrial control systems, achieving performance comparable to strong supervised baselines without task-specific weight updates.
en.motivation: Existing ICS intrusion detection methods are accurate but lack auditability, necessitating an explainable, human-in-the-loop detection layer.
en.method: Converts Modbus communication instances into compact token strings and uses a prompt-configured LLM to produce normal/critical alerts with token-grounded incident records.
en.result: On two public ICS Modbus datasets, the LLM pipeline achieves high predictive performance comparable to strong supervised baselines, and diagnostic tests show cited tokens are often decision-relevant.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the potential of LLMs for explainable intrusion detection in industrial control systems, especially their zero-shot capability and auditability.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage LLM zero-shot ability with domain-specific prompts for cross-protocol explainable intrusion detection.
idea_spark.risk: LLMs may misclassify rare attack patterns, and token-level explanation fidelity needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using LLM outputs as audit signals rather than full explanations inspires design of human-in-the-loop security analysis tools.

papers.title: Largest eigenvalue and top eigenvector statistics of large Euclidean random matrices
papers.summary: Euclidean random matrices arise in a wide range of physical systems where interactions are determined by spatial configurations, including disordered media and cooperative phenomena in atomic ensembles. Unlike classical random matrix ensembles, their entries are strongly correlated through the geometry of the underlying random points, making their analytical treatment challenging. While global spectral properties such as the spectral density are relatively well understood, much less is known about extremal eigenvalues and the associated eigenvectors, despite their central role in applications. Here we address the problem of characterising the largest eigenvalue and the corresponding top eigenvector of large Euclidean random matrices with a quadratic kernel. For vectors in any dimension $d \geq 1$ drawn independently from a common distribution, we show that both quantities can be computed within a unified replica-based framework, leading to a set of self-consistent equations involving a small number of parameters. This approach yields an explicit expression for the average largest eigenvalue, fully determined by low-order moments of the underlying distribution, and an analytical characterisation of the distribution of top eigenvector's components in the large-$N$ limit. We find that the top eigenvector exhibits a non-trivial geometric structure, with components concentrating on a hypersurface determined by the same parameters controlling the largest eigenvalue. We further perform extensive numerical simulations that confirm these predictions. More broadly, our work provides a general framework to access extremal spectral properties of Euclidean random matrices.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于副本方法的统一框架，用于计算大欧几里得随机矩阵的最大特征值和对应的主特征向量，并给出解析表达式和数值验证。
ai.motivation: 欧几里得随机矩阵在无序介质和原子系综等物理系统中广泛出现，但其极端特征值及特征向量的统计特性尚未被充分理解，而它们在应用中至关重要。
ai.method: 采用副本方法，针对具有二次核的欧几里得随机矩阵，推导出一组自洽方程，仅需底层分布的低阶矩即可确定平均最大特征值，并解析刻画大N极限下主特征向量分量的分布。
ai.result: 平均最大特征值由底层分布的低阶矩完全决定；主特征向量呈现非平凡几何结构，其分量集中在由相同参数控制的超曲面上；数值模拟验证了理论预测。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解欧几里得随机矩阵的极端谱行为，为相关物理系统的建模和分析提供解析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用低阶矩信息预测复杂随机系统的极端特征值，可能简化高维数据分析中的谱方法。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖于二次核假设，对于更一般的核函数可能需要额外修正；副本方法在非自平均情形下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将几何约束与随机矩阵理论结合，启发设计具有可控极端谱特性的新型随机网络或材料。

en.tldr: A unified replica-based framework is proposed to compute the largest eigenvalue and top eigenvector of large Euclidean random matrices, yielding explicit expressions and numerical validation.
en.motivation: Euclidean random matrices appear widely in physical systems such as disordered media and atomic ensembles, but their extremal eigenvalue and eigenvector statistics remain poorly understood despite their central role in applications.
en.method: Using the replica method for Euclidean random matrices with a quadratic kernel, a set of self-consistent equations is derived, requiring only low-order moments of the underlying distribution to determine the average largest eigenvalue, and analytically characterizing the distribution of top eigenvector components in the large-N limit.
en.result: The average largest eigenvalue is fully determined by low-order moments of the underlying distribution; the top eigenvector exhibits a non-trivial geometric structure with components concentrated on a hypersurface controlled by the same parameters; extensive numerical simulations confirm the predictions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the extremal spectral behavior of Euclidean random matrices, providing analytical tools for modeling and analysis in related physical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using low-order moments to predict extremal eigenvalues of complex random systems may simplify spectral methods in high-dimensional data analysis.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on the quadratic kernel assumption; extensions to more general kernels may require additional corrections; the replica method may fail in non-self-averaging scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining geometric constraints with random matrix theory inspires the design of novel random networks or materials with controllable extremal spectral properties.

papers.title: Robust Design of Multi-Energy Systems Accounting for Mixed-Integer Operational Problems
papers.summary: Identifying robust designs for multi-energy systems is computationally challenging. As rigorous approaches are often computationally intractable, heuristics are employed to generate candidate designs. One example is the feasibility time-step heuristic by Teichgraeber et al. [Appl. Energy, 275, 115223, 2020]. We theoretically investigate how 3 common nonconvexities, i.e., piecewise-linear energy inflow-outflow relationships, minimal part-loads, and storage complementarity, affect the robustness of designs identified by this heuristic. We find that, if surplus energy cannot be curtailed, any of these nonconvexities may cause the heuristic to fail. If curtailment is allowed, storage complementarity does not compromise robustness, and convex piecewise-linear inflow-outflow relationships can be reformulated linearly. However, minimal part loads may lead to failure of the heuristic. Furthermore, if the objective function of the operational problem is not jointly convex in the uncertain variables and the operational variables, the heuristic may fail. We consider an illustrative multi-energy system, where minimal part-loads and nonconvex dependence of the objective function on heat-pump efficiency are identified as possible failure modes. We propose a hybrid method that discretizes integer variables and embeds the dual of the lower-level problem into a single-level formulation to verify whether a design identified by the heuristic is robust. The results show that the feasibility time-step heuristic may identify robust designs despite the presence of nonconvexities, but the success is case-dependent. Hence, the heuristic can serve as a first step in identifying robust designs; however, when robustness guarantees are required, rigorous methods are necessary.

ai.tldr: 研究了多能源系统鲁棒设计中启发式方法在非凸性条件下的表现，发现某些非凸性会导致启发式失败，提出混合验证方法。
ai.motivation: 多能源系统鲁棒设计计算困难，启发式方法虽常用但缺乏理论保证，需系统分析非凸性对鲁棒性的影响。
ai.method: 理论分析三种常见非凸性（分段线性能量流、最小部分负荷、储能互补性）对可行性时间步启发式的影响，并提出混合方法（离散整数变量+嵌入对偶问题）验证设计鲁棒性。
ai.result: 允许弃能时储能互补性不破坏鲁棒性，但最小部分负荷仍可能导致失败；启发式成功与否依赖具体案例，无法提供严格保证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解多能源系统鲁棒设计中非凸性的影响，指导何时可信任启发式结果，何时需采用严格方法。

idea_spark.idea: 结合启发式快速筛选与严格验证的混合策略，可平衡计算效率与鲁棒性保证。
idea_spark.risk: 混合方法可能仍面临计算负担，且对复杂非凸性（如多变量耦合）的扩展性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发式与严格方法的结合思路可启发其他领域（如电力系统、供应链）的鲁棒优化研究。

en.tldr: Investigates how nonconvexities affect the feasibility time-step heuristic for robust design of multi-energy systems, and proposes a hybrid verification method.
en.motivation: Robust design of multi-energy systems is computationally challenging; heuristics lack theoretical guarantees, necessitating systematic analysis of nonconvexity impacts.
en.method: Theoretically analyzes three common nonconvexities (piecewise-linear energy flows, minimal part-loads, storage complementarity) on the heuristic, and proposes a hybrid method discretizing integer variables and embedding dual of lower-level problem.
en.result: With curtailment allowed, storage complementarity does not compromise robustness, but minimal part-loads can still cause failure; heuristic success is case-dependent, requiring rigorous methods for guarantees.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into when heuristic robust design can be trusted and when rigorous verification is needed for multi-energy systems.

idea_spark.idea: A hybrid strategy combining heuristic screening with rigorous verification balances computational efficiency and robustness guarantees.
idea_spark.risk: The hybrid method may still face computational burden, and scalability to complex nonconvexities (e.g., multivariate coupling) needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of heuristic and rigorous methods can inspire robust optimization research in other domains like power systems and supply chains.

papers.title: The dynamical algebra of the generic superintegrable model on the two-sphere
papers.summary: The rank two Jacobi algebra $\mathfrak{J}_2$ is identified as the dynamical algebra of the generic quadratic superintegrable model on the two-sphere. The physical representation of this algebra is obtained from its embedding in $\mathfrak{su}(1,1)^{\otimes 3}$. The exact solution of the model is derived algebraically from this representation. The wavefunctions are found to be expressed in terms of two-variable Jacobi polynomials whose characterization is a by-product of the algebraic treatment of the model.

ai.tldr: 将秩二雅可比代数识别为二维球面上通用二次超可积模型的动力学代数，并通过嵌入su(1,1)⊗3得到物理表示，代数地导出精确解，波函数用双变量雅可比多项式表示。
ai.motivation: 为二维球面上的超可积模型建立统一的代数框架，并利用代数方法获得精确解。
ai.method: 识别动力学代数为秩二雅可比代数，将其嵌入su(1,1)⊗3以获得物理表示，然后从该表示代数地推导模型解。
ai.result: 波函数表达为双变量雅可比多项式，模型的精确解通过代数方法得到。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解超可积系统的代数结构及其精确求解方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用嵌入su(1,1)⊗3的方法，可尝试构造其他超可积模型的代数表示。
idea_spark.risk: 代数结构可能过于特殊，难以直接推广到非超可积或低对称性系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: 双变量雅可比多项式的出现提示可探索更多多变量正交多项式在物理模型中的应用。

en.tldr: The rank two Jacobi algebra is identified as the dynamical algebra of the generic quadratic superintegrable model on the two-sphere, and its physical representation is obtained via embedding in su(1,1)⊗3, leading to an algebraic exact solution with wavefunctions expressed in two-variable Jacobi polynomials.
en.motivation: To establish a unified algebraic framework for superintegrable models on the two-sphere and derive exact solutions algebraically.
en.method: Identify the dynamical algebra as the rank two Jacobi algebra, obtain its physical representation by embedding in su(1,1)⊗3, and derive the model solution algebraically from this representation.
en.result: Wavefunctions are expressed in terms of two-variable Jacobi polynomials, and the exact solution is obtained algebraically.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the algebraic structure and exact solution methods for superintegrable systems.

idea_spark.idea: The embedding in su(1,1)⊗3 method could be used to construct algebraic representations for other superintegrable models.
idea_spark.risk: The algebraic structure may be too specific to generalize to non-superintegrable or low-symmetry systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: The appearance of two-variable Jacobi polynomials suggests exploring more multivariate orthogonal polynomials in physical models.

papers.title: Seamless Indoor-Outdoor Mapping for INGENIOUS First Responders
papers.summary: In several applications it is desired to have 3D models not only from the outdoor spaces but also from inside the building. In the context of First Responder enhancement in large scale natural and man-made disasters, a method is presented to achieve this goal with a high degree of automation. Therefore an autonomously flying aerial mapping system is combined with a person-carried indoor positioning system. Automatically recognized markers (AprilTags) are geo-referenced by the aerial system and their coordinates are sent to the ground-based system. By looking at the AprilTags before entering the building, the ground-based system is registered to world coordinates. Without the further need of any global positioning, it creates a point cloud from the indoor spaces that fits with the point could from the aerial view. This allows a co-visualization of both point-clouds as a seamless indoor-outdoor 3D model in real time.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合无人机航拍与人员携带室内定位系统的自动化方法，通过AprilTag实现室内外点云的无缝拼接与实时三维建模，用于增强应急救援能力。
ai.motivation: 在大型自然灾害或人为灾难中，救援人员需要同时了解建筑物内外部的三维结构，但现有方法难以快速、自动化地生成无缝的室内外一体化模型。
ai.method: 利用自主飞行的航拍系统对地面AprilTag进行地理参考定位，并将坐标发送给人员携带的室内定位系统；室内系统在进入建筑前通过识别AprilTag完成世界坐标注册，随后无需全球定位即可生成室内点云，并与航拍点云实时融合。
ai.result: 实现了室内外点云的无缝拼接与实时共视化三维模型，无需额外全局定位支持。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助救援人员快速获取建筑内外完整的三维环境信息，提升态势感知与决策效率。

idea_spark.idea: 可进一步利用深度学习自动检测与识别更复杂的自然或人工地标，减少对预设标签的依赖，提高在未知环境中的适用性。
idea_spark.risk: AprilTag在恶劣天气或遮挡条件下可能无法被可靠识别，影响系统鲁棒性；室内外光照变化大也可能降低标签检测精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于视觉SLAM中的闭环检测思想，将环境中的固定特征（如窗户、门牌）作为天然地标，实现无需预设标记的室内外自动对齐。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于视觉SLAM中的闭环检测思想，将环境中的固定特征（如窗户、门牌）作为天然地标，实现无需预设标记的室内外自动对齐。

en.tldr: A method combining autonomous aerial mapping with a person-carried indoor positioning system uses AprilTags to seamlessly register and fuse indoor and outdoor point clouds into a real-time 3D model for first responders.
en.motivation: First responders need comprehensive 3D models of both outdoor and indoor spaces during large-scale disasters, but existing approaches lack automation for seamless indoor-outdoor integration.
en.method: An autonomously flying aerial system geo-references AprilTags and sends coordinates to a ground-based indoor positioning system. The ground system registers to world coordinates by observing the tags before entering the building, then generates indoor point clouds without further global positioning, merging them with aerial point clouds in real time.
en.result: Seamless co-visualization of indoor and outdoor point clouds as a unified 3D model in real time, without requiring additional global positioning indoors.
en.help_to_user: Provides first responders with an immediate, integrated 3D view of both building exteriors and interiors, enhancing situational awareness and operational planning.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage deep learning to automatically detect and recognize natural or artificial landmarks (e.g., windows, signs) to reduce reliance on pre-deployed tags, improving adaptability in unknown environments.
idea_spark.risk: AprilTag detection may fail under adverse weather or occlusion; large indoor-outdoor lighting variations can also degrade recognition accuracy, affecting system robustness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by loop closure in visual SLAM, using fixed environmental features (e.g., door frames, signs) as natural landmarks could enable automatic indoor-outdoor alignment without pre-installed markers.

papers.title: Distill-Belief: Closed-Loop Inverse Source Localization and Characterization in Physical Fields
papers.summary: {Closed-loop inverse source localization and characterization (ISLC) requires a mobile agent to select measurements that localize sources and infer latent field parameters under strict time constraints.} {The core challenge lies in the belief-space objective: valid uncertainty estimation requires expensive Bayesian inference, whereas using fast learned belief model leads to reward hacking, in which the policy exploits approximation errors rather than actually reducing uncertainty.} {We propose \textbf{Distill-Belief}, a teacher--student framework that decouples correctness from efficiency. A Bayes-correct particle-filter teacher maintains the posterior and supplies a dense information-gain signal, while a compact student distills the posterior into belief statistics for control and an uncertainty certificate for stopping. At deployment, only the student is used, yielding constant per-step cost.} {Experiments on seven field modalities and two stress tests show that Distill-Belief consistently reduces sensing cost and improves success, posterior contraction, and estimation accuracy over baselines, while mitigating reward hacking.}

ai.tldr: 提出Distill-Belief框架，通过教师-学生模型解耦贝叶斯推理的准确性与计算效率，实现闭环逆源定位与表征。
ai.motivation: 闭环逆源定位中，精确不确定性估计需要昂贵的贝叶斯推理，而快速学习模型易导致奖励黑客问题。
ai.method: 教师模型使用粒子滤波器维护精确后验并提供信息增益信号，学生模型蒸馏后验用于控制和停止决策，部署时仅用学生模型。
ai.result: 在七种场模态和两项压力测试中，Distill-Belief持续降低感知成本，提升成功率、后验收缩和估计精度，并缓解奖励黑客。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲准确性的前提下，高效实现闭环感知中的不确定性驱动决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将粒子滤波器的后验分布蒸馏为紧凑的信念统计量，同时提供不确定性证书用于自适应停止。
idea_spark.risk: 学生模型可能无法完全捕捉教师后验的复杂多模态分布，导致极端情况下的决策偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从强化学习中的奖励黑客问题出发，设计解耦正确性与效率的框架，启发其他领域中的近似推理与决策权衡。

zh.motivation: 闭环逆源定位中，精确不确定性估计需要昂贵的贝叶斯推理，而快速学习模型易导致奖励黑客问题。

en.tldr: Proposes Distill-Belief, a teacher-student framework that decouples Bayesian correctness from computational efficiency for closed-loop inverse source localization and characterization.
en.motivation: Accurate uncertainty estimation in closed-loop inverse source localization requires expensive Bayesian inference, while fast learned belief models suffer from reward hacking.
en.method: A teacher particle filter maintains the exact posterior and provides dense information-gain signals; a compact student distills the posterior into belief statistics for control and an uncertainty certificate for stopping. Only the student is used at deployment.
en.result: Across seven field modalities and two stress tests, Distill-Belief consistently reduces sensing cost and improves success rate, posterior contraction, and estimation accuracy while mitigating reward hacking.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve efficient uncertainty-driven decision-making in closed-loop sensing without sacrificing accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Distill the posterior of a particle filter into compact belief statistics and provide an uncertainty certificate for adaptive stopping.
idea_spark.risk: The student model may fail to capture complex multimodal posteriors, leading to decision biases in edge cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by reward hacking in reinforcement learning, the framework decouples correctness from efficiency, offering insights for approximate inference and decision trade-offs in other domains.

papers.title: Lattice Topological Defects in Non-Unitary Conformal Field Theories
papers.summary: Topological defects play a fundamental role in the investigation of symmetries in quantum field theories. For conformal field theories in two space-time dimensions, it is possible to construct these defects using lattice models allowing ab-initio analytical and numerical computations of their characteristics. In this work, topological defects are investigated in non-unitary conformal field theories using appropriate variations of the restricted solid-on-solid models. The relevant impurity models and the corresponding defect operators are constructed for the lattice system. Numerical computations are performed for the energy spectrum, eigenvalues of the defect operators as well as thermodynamic characteristics and compared with analytical predictions. Finally, renormalization group flows between the different fixed points are analyzed using numerical methods.

ai.tldr: 本文利用受限固-固模型在非幺正共形场论中研究拓扑缺陷，构建了杂质模型和缺陷算子，并通过数值计算与解析预测对比，分析了重整化群流。
ai.motivation: 探索非幺正共形场论中拓扑缺陷的性质，扩展对量子场论对称性的理解。
ai.method: 采用受限固-固模型的变体构建晶格系统，数值计算能谱、缺陷算子本征值和热力学量，并与解析预测比较。
ai.result: 数值结果与解析预测吻合，揭示了不同不动点之间的重整化群流。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解非幺正共形场论中拓扑缺陷的晶格实现和数值分析方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用类似晶格模型研究非幺正系统中的边界态或纠缠熵。
idea_spark.risk: 非幺正性可能导致数值稳定性问题或解析解的复杂性增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将缺陷算子与量子模拟平台结合，实验验证理论预测。

en.tldr: This work investigates topological defects in non-unitary conformal field theories using restricted solid-on-solid models, constructs impurity models and defect operators, and compares numerical results with analytical predictions, analyzing renormalization group flows.
en.motivation: To explore the properties of topological defects in non-unitary conformal field theories and extend the understanding of symmetries in quantum field theories.
en.method: Variants of restricted solid-on-solid models are used to construct lattice systems; numerical computations of energy spectra, defect operator eigenvalues, and thermodynamic quantities are compared with analytical predictions.
en.result: Numerical results agree with analytical predictions, revealing renormalization group flows between different fixed points.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand lattice implementations and numerical analysis methods for topological defects in non-unitary conformal field theories.

idea_spark.idea: Use similar lattice models to study boundary states or entanglement entropy in non-unitary systems.
idea_spark.risk: Non-unitarity may cause numerical stability issues or increased complexity in analytical solutions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine defect operators with quantum simulation platforms to experimentally test theoretical predictions.

papers.title: Circular Phase Representation and Geometry-Aware Optimization for Ptychographic Image Reconstruction
papers.summary: Traditional iterative reconstruction methods are accurate but computationally expensive, limiting their use in high-throughput and real-time ptychography. Recent deep learning approaches improve speed, but often predict phase as a Euclidean scalar despite its $2π$ periodicity, which can introduce wrapping artifacts, discontinuities at $\pmπ$, and a mismatch between the loss and the underlying signal geometry. We present a deep learning framework for ptychographic reconstruction that models phase on the unit circle using cosine and sine components. Phase error is optimized with a differentiable geodesic loss, which avoids branch-cut discontinuities and provides bounded gradients. The network further incorporates saturation-aware dual-gain input scaling, parallel encoder branches, and three decoders for amplitude, cosine, and sine prediction, together with a composite loss that promotes circular consistency and structural fidelity. Experiments on synthetic and experimental datasets show consistent improvements in both amplitude and phase reconstruction over existing deep learning methods. Frequency-domain analysis further shows better preservation of mid- and high-frequency phase content. The proposed method also provides substantial speedup over iterative solvers while maintaining physically consistent reconstructions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于圆相位表示和测地线损失的深度学习框架，用于叠层衍射成像重建，避免相位包裹伪影并提升重建质量。
ai.motivation: 传统迭代方法精度高但计算慢，深度学习方法虽快但将相位视为欧几里得标量，忽略其2π周期性，导致包裹伪影和损失函数与信号几何不匹配。
ai.method: 用余弦和正弦分量在单位圆上建模相位，采用可微测地线损失优化相位误差；网络包含饱和感知双增益输入缩放、并行编码器分支和三个解码器（振幅、余弦、正弦），以及复合损失促进圆一致性和结构保真度。
ai.result: 在合成和实验数据集上，振幅和相位重建均优于现有深度学习方法；频域分析显示中高频相位内容保留更好；相比迭代求解器速度大幅提升。
ai.help_to_user: 该框架可直接用于高吞吐量和实时叠层衍射成像，提供物理一致且快速的重建结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将圆相位表示与自注意力机制结合，以更好地捕捉全局相位结构。
idea_spark.risk: 测地线损失在相位接近0或π时梯度可能不稳定，需仔细初始化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信号处理的周期性约束出发，设计几何感知的损失函数，启发其他周期性物理量的深度学习建模。

en.tldr: A deep learning framework using circular phase representation and geodesic loss for ptychographic reconstruction, avoiding phase wrapping artifacts and improving reconstruction quality.
en.motivation: Traditional iterative methods are accurate but slow; deep learning methods treat phase as a Euclidean scalar, ignoring its 2π periodicity, causing wrapping artifacts and loss-signal geometry mismatch.
en.method: Models phase on the unit circle via cosine and sine components, optimizes phase error with a differentiable geodesic loss; network includes saturation-aware dual-gain input scaling, parallel encoder branches, three decoders (amplitude, cosine, sine), and a composite loss for circular consistency and structural fidelity.
en.result: Consistent improvements in amplitude and phase reconstruction over existing deep learning methods on synthetic and experimental datasets; frequency-domain analysis shows better preservation of mid- and high-frequency phase content; substantial speedup over iterative solvers.
en.help_to_user: This framework enables high-throughput and real-time ptychography with physically consistent and fast reconstructions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine circular phase representation with self-attention to better capture global phase structures.
idea_spark.risk: Geodesic loss may have unstable gradients near phase 0 or π, requiring careful initialization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging periodic constraints from signal processing to design geometry-aware loss functions inspires deep learning modeling of other periodic physical quantities.

papers.title: Integrable Deformations of the Breitenlohner-Maison Model from 4d Chern-Simons Theory
papers.summary: We derive integrable deformations of the 2d Breitenlohner-Maison (BM) sigma model that describes the stationary, axisymmetric sector of 4d general relativity, as well as higher-rank generalisations thereof, using the framework of 4d Chern-Simons theory. In particular, we consider deformations of the boundary conditions and action of the 4d Cole-Weck model, which lead to deformations of the BM model associated with solutions to the homogeneous and inhomogeneous classical Yang-Baxter equations respectively.

ai.tldr: 利用四维Chern-Simons理论框架，推导了二维Breitenlohner-Maison sigma模型的可积变形，该模型描述四维广义相对论的稳态轴对称扇区。
ai.motivation: 将四维Chern-Simons理论应用于广义相对论中的可积系统，探索BM模型的变形。
ai.method: 通过修改四维Cole-Weck模型的边界条件和作用量，分别得到与齐次和非齐次经典Yang-Baxter方程对应的变形。
ai.result: 获得了BM模型的两类可积变形，分别关联齐次和非齐次经典Yang-Baxter方程的解。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了从高维规范理论构造二维可积sigma模型变形的系统方法。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将四维Chern-Simons理论框架应用于其他物理背景下的可积变形。
idea_spark.risk: 变形后的模型可能失去原有的几何或物理解释。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从高维规范理论出发，为二维可积模型提供新的构造途径。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从高维规范理论出发，为二维可积模型提供新的构造途径。

en.tldr: We derive integrable deformations of the 2d Breitenlohner-Maison sigma model, which describes the stationary axisymmetric sector of 4d general relativity, using the framework of 4d Chern-Simons theory.
en.motivation: To apply 4d Chern-Simons theory to integrable systems in general relativity and explore deformations of the BM model.
en.method: By modifying the boundary conditions and action of the 4d Cole-Weck model, we obtain deformations associated with solutions to the homogeneous and inhomogeneous classical Yang-Baxter equations respectively.
en.result: Two classes of integrable deformations of the BM model are obtained, linked to homogeneous and inhomogeneous classical Yang-Baxter equation solutions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic method for constructing deformations of 2d integrable sigma models from higher-dimensional gauge theories.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying the 4d Chern-Simons framework to integrable deformations in other physical contexts.
idea_spark.risk: Deformed models may lose their original geometric or physical interpretation.
idea_spark.inspiration: High-dimensional gauge theories offer new construction routes for 2d integrable models.

papers.title: On the geometry of circumcentric directions of cones
papers.summary:
Behling, Bello-Cruz, Lara-Urdaneta, Oviedo, and Santos showed that the circumcentric direction $d$ of a finitely generated polyhedral cone $\KK\subset\RR^n$ admits an inscribed Euclidean ball of radius $
orm{d}^2$ inside the polar cone $\Kpolar$. We sharpen this result in several ways. The exact set of admissible perturbations is a polyhedron, strictly larger than the inscribed ball off the generators and unbounded along $\Kpolar$. From it we read off a closed form for $
orm{d}^2$ in terms of the inverse Gram matrix of the conic base, with two-sided spectral bounds, and an aperture identity $
orm{d}=\cosθ$ relating the generators to the axis $-d/
orm{d}$. The inscribed-ball estimate extends to closed convex pointed cones under one geometric condition: the normalized extremal section $E_\KK$ has affine hull avoiding the origin. The admissible set is then the intersection of half-spaces indexed by $E_\KK$, and the inscribed ball touches its boundary along $
orm{d}^2\,\closu E_\KK$. A Jordan-frame argument verifies the hypothesis for every simple symmetric cone and gives $
orm{d}^2=1/r$ for the Jordan rank $r$; the same value $1/n$ shows up for the doubly nonnegative cone, the direct-product case obeys the parallel-resistance rule $1/
orm{d}^2=\sum_\ell 1/
orm{d_\ell}^2$, and the $p$-cones with $p
e 2$ provide a clean obstruction. We close with a sharp formula for the largest step from $d$ along a prescribed direction, worked out for $L_\infty$-ball constrained least squares and second-order cone programming; a piecewise smooth version where the inner Slater condition is exactly Mangasarian--Fromovitz; and a Bregman analogue covering a Mahalanobis instance and a mirror-descent step.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了有限生成多面体锥的环心方向，改进了内切球半径的估计，并推广到闭凸尖锥和对称锥。
ai.motivation: 精确刻画锥的环心方向及其内切球性质，为锥优化算法提供几何基础。
ai.method: 利用极锥、Gram矩阵、Jordan框架和截面几何分析，推导封闭表达式和谱界。
ai.result: 得到了环心方向范数的封闭形式、孔径恒等式、对称锥的1/r公式以及平行电阻法则。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解锥几何中环心方向的结构，可用于优化算法步长设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用截面几何条件替代有限生成假设，扩大适用范围。
idea_spark.risk: 非对称锥或非光滑情形下条件可能不满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Gram矩阵和Jordan代数获得简洁的解析表达式，启发类似几何量的闭式推导。
