en.tldr: This paper studies the circumcentric direction of finitely generated polyhedral cones, sharpens the inscribed ball radius estimate, and extends to closed convex pointed cones and symmetric cones.
en.motivation: To precisely characterize the circumcentric direction and its inscribed ball properties, providing geometric foundations for conic optimization algorithms.
en.method: Using polar cones, Gram matrices, Jordan frames, and sectional geometry to derive closed forms and spectral bounds.
en.result: Closed form for the norm of the circumcentric direction, an aperture identity, a 1/r formula for symmetric cones, and a parallel-resistance rule.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the structure of circumcentric directions in cone geometry, useful for step-size design in optimization algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Use sectional geometry conditions to replace finite generation, broadening applicability.
idea_spark.risk: Conditions may fail for non-symmetric or non-smooth cones.
idea_spark.inspiration: Closed-form expressions from Gram matrices and Jordan algebras inspire similar derivations for other geometric quantities.

papers.title: Meta-Learning and Targeted Differential Privacy to Improve the Accuracy-Privacy Trade-off in Recommendations
papers.summary: Balancing differential privacy (DP) with recommendation accuracy is a key challenge in privacy-preserving recommender systems, since DP-noise degrades accuracy. We address this trade-off at both the data and model levels. At the data level, we apply DP only to the most stereotypical user data likely to reveal sensitive attributes, such as gender or age, to reduce unnecessary perturbation; we refer to this as targeted DP. At the model level, we use meta-learning to improve robustness to remaining DP-noise. This achieves a better trade-off between accuracy and privacy than standard approaches: Meta-learning improves accuracy and targeted DP leads to lower empirical privacy risk compared to uniformly applied DP and full DP baselines. Overall, our findings show that selectively applying DP at the data level together with meta-learning at the model level can effectively balance recommendation accuracy and user privacy.

ai.tldr: 提出在数据层应用目标差分隐私（仅对最刻板的用户数据加噪）并在模型层使用元学习来提升对剩余噪声的鲁棒性，从而在推荐系统中更好地平衡准确性与隐私。
ai.motivation: 差分隐私噪声会降低推荐准确率，现有方法难以同时保证高准确率和强隐私保护。
ai.method: 数据层：仅对可能泄露敏感属性的典型用户数据施加差分隐私（目标DP）；模型层：用元学习增强模型对残留DP噪声的鲁棒性。
ai.result: 相比均匀DP和完全DP基线，元学习提升了准确率，目标DP降低了经验隐私风险，实现了更优的准确率-隐私权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在推荐系统中通过选择性加噪和元学习来减少隐私保护对推荐质量的负面影响。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将目标DP与更先进的元学习架构（如MAML变体）结合，或引入自适应噪声分配策略。
idea_spark.risk: 目标DP依赖对“刻板”用户数据的准确识别，可能引入偏差或误分类；元学习需要额外训练开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“只保护最敏感部分”的启发，可推广到其他隐私保护技术（如联邦学习中的局部差分隐私）。

en.tldr: Proposes targeted differential privacy (applying DP only to stereotypical user data) at the data level and meta-learning at the model level to improve robustness to remaining DP noise, achieving a better accuracy-privacy trade-off in recommendations.
en.motivation: DP noise degrades recommendation accuracy; existing methods struggle to simultaneously achieve high accuracy and strong privacy.
en.method: Data level: apply DP only to stereotypical user data likely to reveal sensitive attributes (targeted DP). Model level: use meta-learning to enhance robustness to residual DP noise.
en.result: Compared to uniform DP and full DP baselines, meta-learning improves accuracy and targeted DP reduces empirical privacy risk, yielding a better accuracy-privacy trade-off.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how selective DP application and meta-learning can mitigate the negative impact of privacy protection on recommendation quality.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining targeted DP with more advanced meta-learning architectures (e.g., MAML variants) or introducing adaptive noise allocation strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Targeted DP relies on accurate identification of stereotypical user data, which may introduce bias or misclassification; meta-learning incurs additional training overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the principle of protecting only the most sensitive parts, this approach could be extended to other privacy-preserving techniques (e.g., local differential privacy in federated learning).

papers.title: Median-of-Means for Nash Equilibrium Seeking in Heavy-Tailed Games
papers.summary: This paper studies the Nash equilibrium seeking problem for stochastic games under heavy-tailed noise. The gradient noise is considered to have a finite $δ$-th moment ($1<δ\le 2$), which generalizes the Gaussian noise and covers cases with infinite variance. In this work, we employ the classic method Median-of-Means (MoM) in robust estimation. MoM works by dividing samples into blocks, taking the average of each block, and then taking the median of these block averages, achieving a breakdown point of up to $1/2$. This makes the final estimate reliable even when some samples are very noisy or wrong, and thus is effective to handle the heavy-tailed noise. The method also naturally defends against malicious gradient attacks. Compared with gradient clipping, which is the most popular method to deal with the heavy-tailed noise, MoM requires no preset clipping threshold and is insensitive to the tail behavior of the noise. Under standard assumptions, we prove the almost sure convergence of the algorithm and derive its almost sure convergence rate. To address the systematic bias caused by asymmetric noise, we further design an online bias correction strategy. Simulation results show the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed algorithms.

ai.tldr: 针对重尾噪声下的随机博弈，采用中位数均值法求解纳什均衡，并设计在线偏差校正策略。
ai.motivation: 现有方法（如梯度裁剪）对重尾噪声敏感且需预设阈值，而中位数均值法无需预设阈值且对噪声尾部行为不敏感，同时能抵御恶意梯度攻击。
ai.method: 将样本分块，计算每块均值后取中位数，实现高达1/2的崩溃点；针对非对称噪声引入在线偏差校正。
ai.result: 在标准假设下证明了算法的几乎必然收敛性及其收敛速率，仿真验证了有效性和效率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种鲁棒且无需调参的纳什均衡求解方法，适用于存在重尾噪声或梯度攻击的分布式博弈场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将中位数均值法与自适应偏差校正结合，可能进一步推广到非平稳或时变噪声环境。
idea_spark.risk: 中位数操作可能引入额外方差，尤其在块数较少时；偏差校正策略需在线估计噪声分布，可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴稳健统计中的分块中位数思想，为博弈论中的噪声鲁棒算法设计提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper employs Median-of-Means for Nash equilibrium seeking in stochastic games with heavy-tailed noise, and designs an online bias correction strategy.
en.motivation: Existing methods like gradient clipping require preset thresholds and are sensitive to tail behavior, while MoM is threshold-free and robust to heavy tails and gradient attacks.
en.method: Samples are divided into blocks, block averages are computed, and the median of these averages is taken, achieving a breakdown point up to 1/2; an online bias correction handles asymmetric noise.
en.result: Almost sure convergence and convergence rate are proved under standard assumptions; simulations demonstrate effectiveness and efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust, parameter-free Nash equilibrium seeking method suitable for distributed games with heavy-tailed noise or gradient attacks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining MoM with adaptive bias correction may extend to non-stationary or time-varying noise environments.
idea_spark.risk: Median operation may introduce extra variance, especially with few blocks; bias correction requires online estimation of noise distribution, increasing computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging block-median ideas from robust statistics offers a new perspective for designing noise-robust algorithms in game theory.

papers.title: Color-Encoded Illumination for High-Speed Volumetric Scene Reconstruction
papers.summary: The task of capturing and rendering 3D dynamic scenes from 2D images has become increasingly popular in recent years. However, most conventional cameras are bandwidth-limited to 30-60 FPS, restricting these methods to static or slowly evolving scenes. While overcoming bandwidth limitations is difficult for general scenes, recent years have seen a flurry of computational imaging methods that yield high-speed videos using conventional cameras for specific applications (e.g., motion capture and particle image velocimetry). However, most of these methods require modifications to a camera's optics or the addition of mechanically moving components, limiting them to a single-view high-speed capture. Consequently, these methods cannot be readily used to capture a 3D representation of rapid scene motion. In this paper, we propose a novel method to capture and reconstruct a volumetric representation of a high-speed scene using only unaugmented low-speed cameras. Instead of modifying the hardware or optics of each individual camera, we encode high-speed scene dynamics by illuminating the scene with a rapid, sequential color-coded sequence. This results in simultaneous multi-view capture of the scene, where high-speed temporal information is encoded in the spatial intensity and color variations of the captured images. To construct a high-speed volumetric representation of the dynamic scene, we develop a novel dynamic Gaussian Splatting-based approach that decodes the temporal information from the images. We evaluate our approach on simulated scenes and real-world experiments using a multi-camera imaging setup, showing first-of-a-kind high-speed volumetric scene reconstructions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种利用彩色编码照明和低速相机实现高速三维动态场景重建的方法。
ai.motivation: 传统相机帧率低（30-60 FPS），难以捕捉高速动态场景的三维表示；现有高速成像方法通常需要修改相机硬件或增加运动部件，且局限于单视角。
ai.method: 用快速顺序的彩色编码序列照明场景，在低速相机拍摄的多视角图像中，将高速时间信息编码为空间强度和颜色变化；然后基于动态高斯泼溅（Gaussian Splatting）解码时间信息，重建高速三维体积表示。
ai.result: 在模拟和真实多相机实验中，首次实现了高速三维体积场景重建。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不升级相机硬件的情况下，利用彩色编码照明和计算成像技术从低速多视角图像中恢复高速三维动态。

idea_spark.idea: 将高速时间信息编码到颜色通道，再通过可微渲染（如3D高斯泼溅）解码，实现低速相机下的高速三维重建。
idea_spark.risk: 彩色编码可能受场景颜色影响；照明序列需精确同步；对复杂光照变化场景鲁棒性待验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受计算摄影中时间编码（如运动捕捉中的LED标记）启发，将时间维度映射到颜色空间，结合神经渲染实现多视角高速重建。

en.tldr: A method that uses color-encoded illumination and low-speed cameras to reconstruct high-speed 3D dynamic scenes.
en.motivation: Conventional cameras are bandwidth-limited (30-60 FPS), making it difficult to capture 3D representations of fast motion; existing high-speed imaging methods often require hardware modifications or moving parts and are limited to single-view.
en.method: Illuminate the scene with a rapid sequential color-coded pattern; high-speed temporal information is encoded into spatial intensity and color variations in multi-view images captured by low-speed cameras. Then a dynamic Gaussian Splatting approach decodes the temporal information to reconstruct a high-speed volumetric representation.
en.result: First-of-a-kind high-speed volumetric scene reconstructions demonstrated on simulated and real multi-camera setups.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to recover high-speed 3D dynamics from low-speed multi-view images using color-encoded illumination and computational imaging without hardware upgrades.

idea_spark.idea: Encode high-speed temporal information into color channels, then decode via differentiable rendering (e.g., 3D Gaussian Splatting) to achieve high-speed 3D reconstruction with low-speed cameras.
idea_spark.risk: Color encoding may be affected by scene colors; precise synchronization of illumination sequence is required; robustness under complex lighting conditions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by temporal encoding in computational photography (e.g., LED markers in motion capture), mapping time to color space and combining with neural rendering for multi-view high-speed reconstruction.

papers.title: Stability and existence of relativistic plasma--vacuum interfaces
papers.summary: We consider the free boundary problem for relativistic plasma--vacuum interfaces in two and three spatial dimensions. The plasma flow is governed by the equations of ideal relativistic magnetohydrodynamics, while the vacuum magnetic and electric fields satisfy Maxwell's equations. The plasma and vacuum magnetic fields are tangential to the interface, which moves with the plasma flow. This yields a nonlinear, multidimensional hyperbolic problem with a free boundary that is characteristic of variable multiplicity. We identify a quantitative stability condition and establish the linear stability of three-dimensional relativistic plasma--vacuum interfaces in the sense that the variable-coefficient linearized problem satisfies energy estimates in anisotropic Sobolev spaces. In estimating tangential derivatives, we exploit an intrinsic cancellation effect to convert the boundary term into an instant integral. We then separate the estimate involving spatial derivatives from that involving time derivatives, so that the instant integral can be mainly absorbed by the instant energy under the stability condition. Moreover, we prove the local-in-time existence and uniqueness of solutions to the nonlinear problem in two-dimensional space, provided that the plasma and vacuum magnetic fields do not vanish simultaneously at any point of the initial interface. The proof combines the solvability and tame estimate of the linearized problem with a suitable modified Nash--Moser iteration. In particular, to establish its solvability, the two-dimensional linearized problem is reduced to a transport equation for the interface function and a hyperbolic boundary problem with maximally nonnegative boundary conditions.

ai.tldr: 研究相对论性等离子体-真空界面的自由边界问题，在二维和三维空间中建立了线性稳定性条件，并证明了二维非线性问题的局部存在唯一性。
ai.motivation: 理解相对论性等离子体与真空界面的动力学行为，为天体物理和聚变装置中的磁约束提供理论基础。
ai.method: 将线性化问题约化为界面函数的输运方程和具有最大非负边界条件的双曲边界问题，利用Nash-Moser迭代和能量估计。
ai.result: 识别出定量稳定性条件，在三维中建立线性稳定性；在二维中证明非线性问题的局部存在唯一性，要求初始界面处等离子体和真空磁场不同时为零。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究相对论性磁流体动力学中的自由边界问题提供严格的数学框架和稳定性判据。

idea_spark.idea: 将界面函数输运方程与双曲边界问题解耦的策略，可用于简化其他多维自由边界问题的数值模拟。
idea_spark.risk: 稳定性条件依赖于磁场非同时为零，实际应用中可能遇到退化情形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用内在抵消效应将边界项转化为瞬时积分，这一技巧可启发其他特征边界问题的能量估计设计。

en.tldr: Studies the free boundary problem for relativistic plasma-vacuum interfaces, establishing linear stability in 3D and local existence/uniqueness for the nonlinear problem in 2D.
en.motivation: To understand the dynamics of relativistic plasma-vacuum interfaces, providing theoretical foundations for magnetic confinement in astrophysics and fusion devices.
en.method: Reduces the linearized problem to a transport equation for the interface function and a hyperbolic boundary problem with maximally nonnegative boundary conditions, using Nash-Moser iteration and energy estimates.
en.result: Identifies a quantitative stability condition, establishes linear stability in 3D; proves local-in-time existence and uniqueness for the nonlinear problem in 2D, requiring non-vanishing plasma and vacuum magnetic fields on the initial interface.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and stability criteria for free boundary problems in relativistic magnetohydrodynamics.

idea_spark.idea: The decoupling strategy of interface transport equation and hyperbolic boundary problem could simplify numerical simulations of other multidimensional free boundary problems.
idea_spark.risk: The stability condition relies on non-vanishing magnetic fields, which may degenerate in practical scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The technique of converting boundary terms into instant integrals via intrinsic cancellation can inspire energy estimate designs for other characteristic boundary problems.

papers.title: Decoupling Knowledge and Task Subspaces for Composable Parametric Retrieval Augmented Generation
papers.summary: Parametric Retrieval-Augmented Generation (PRAG) encodes external documents into lightweight parameter modules that can be retrieved and merged at inference time, offering a promising alternative to in-context retrieval augmentation. Despite its potential, many PRAG implementations train document adapters with task-supervised objectives, which may cause each adapter to encode both document-specific facts and reusable task-solving behavior. This entanglement may make adapter composition less reliable: when multiple adapters are merged at inference time, their overlapping task behaviors can accumulate together with document-specific updates, potentially making the merged adapter less stable and less focused on the intended document knowledge. To examine this issue, we explore Orthogonal Subspace Decomposition (OSD), an adapter-training setup that separates reusable task behavior from document-specific knowledge adapters. Concretely, we first train a Task LoRA to capture reusable task behavior, and then train document LoRAs to encode document-specific knowledge in a orthogonal subspace. This setup provides a controlled way to examine how orthogonalizing task and document LoRA updates affects adapter composition in multi-document PRAG. Experiments across multiple knowledge-intensive tasks and model scales suggest that this orthogonalization strategy can improve compositional robustness in parametric RAG, especially when multiple document adapters are merged.

ai.tldr: 提出正交子空间分解方法，将任务行为与文档知识解耦，提升参数化检索增强生成中多适配器组合的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有PRAG方法中，文档适配器同时编码事实知识和任务行为，导致多适配器合并时任务行为累积，降低稳定性和聚焦性。
ai.method: 先训练任务LoRA捕获可复用任务行为，再在正交子空间中训练文档LoRA编码文档知识，实现解耦。
ai.result: 实验表明正交化策略能改善多文档PRAG中的组合鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过子空间正交化提升参数化RAG中多知识源融合的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将任务LoRA与文档LoRA置于正交子空间，避免合并时行为干扰。
idea_spark.risk: 正交约束可能限制文档适配器表达力，需平衡解耦与知识容量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受子空间学习启发，将知识存储与任务执行分离，类似人脑记忆与技能分离机制。

zh.tldr: 提出正交子空间分解方法，将任务行为与文档知识解耦，提升参数化检索增强生成中多适配器组合的鲁棒性。
zh.motivation: 现有PRAG方法中，文档适配器同时编码事实知识和任务行为，导致多适配器合并时任务行为累积，降低稳定性和聚焦性。
zh.method: 先训练任务LoRA捕获可复用任务行为，再在正交子空间中训练文档LoRA编码文档知识，实现解耦。
zh.result: 实验表明正交化策略能改善多文档PRAG中的组合鲁棒性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过子空间正交化提升参数化RAG中多知识源融合的可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将任务LoRA与文档LoRA置于正交子空间，避免合并时行为干扰。
idea_spark.risk: 正交约束可能限制文档适配器表达力，需平衡解耦与知识容量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受子空间学习启发，将知识存储与任务执行分离，类似人脑记忆与技能分离机制。

en.tldr: Proposes Orthogonal Subspace Decomposition to decouple task behavior from document knowledge, improving compositional robustness in parametric RAG.
en.motivation: Existing PRAG methods entangle document facts and task behavior in adapters, causing instability when merging multiple adapters due to accumulated task updates.
en.method: First train a Task LoRA for reusable task behavior, then train document LoRAs in an orthogonal subspace to encode document-specific knowledge.
en.result: Experiments show orthogonalization enhances compositional robustness in multi-document PRAG.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into improving reliability of multi-source knowledge fusion in parametric RAG via subspace orthogonalization.

idea_spark.idea: Place Task LoRA and document LoRAs in orthogonal subspaces to avoid interference during merging.
idea_spark.risk: Orthogonality constraints may limit expressiveness of document adapters; trade-off between decoupling and knowledge capacity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by subspace learning, separating knowledge storage from task execution, analogous to human memory and skill separation.

papers.title: MedSynapse-V: Bridging Visual Perception and Clinical Intuition via Latent Memory Evolution
papers.summary: High-precision medical diagnosis relies not only on static imaging features but also on the implicit diagnostic memory experts instantly invoke during image interpretation. We pinpoint a fundamental cognitive misalignment in medical VLMs caused by discrete tokenization, leading to quantization loss, long-range information dissipation, and missing case-adaptive expertise. To bridge this gap, we propose ours, a framework for latent diagnostic memory evolution that simulates the experiential invocation of clinicians by dynamically synthesizing implicit diagnostic memories within the model's hidden stream. Specifically, it begins with a Meta Query for Prior Memorization mechanism, where learnable probes retrieve structured priors from an anatomical prior encoder to generate condensed implicit memories. To ensure clinical fidelity, we introduce Causal Counterfactual Refinement (CCR), which leverages reinforcement learning and counterfactual rewards derived from region-level feature masking to quantify the causal contribution of each memory, thereby pruning redundancies and aligning latent representations with diagnostic logic. This evolutionary process culminates in Intrinsic Memory Transition (IMT), a privileged-autonomous dual-branch paradigm that internalizes teacher-branch diagnostic patterns into the student-branch via full-vocabulary divergence alignment. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across multiple datasets demonstrate that ours, by transferring external expertise into endogenous parameters, significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly chain-of-thought paradigms, in diagnostic accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出MedSynapse-V框架，通过隐式诊断记忆演化模拟临床专家经验调用，提升医学VLM诊断精度。
ai.motivation: 现有医学VLM因离散分词导致量化损失、长程信息消散和缺乏病例自适应专家知识，与临床直觉存在认知错位。
ai.method: 包含Meta Query先验记忆化、因果反事实精炼（CCR）和内在记忆转换（IMT）三阶段，在隐藏流中动态合成隐式诊断记忆。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法，尤其是思维链范式，诊断准确率大幅提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助医学影像诊断系统更准确地模拟专家经验，提升诊断可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将因果反事实奖励与强化学习结合，用于模型内部记忆的自动筛选和优化。
idea_spark.risk: 反事实掩码可能引入偏差，需确保区域级特征掩码的临床合理性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从临床医生调用隐性经验的过程获得启发，设计模型内部记忆演化路径。

idea_spark.idea: 将因果反事实奖励与强化学习结合，用于模型内部记忆的自动筛选和优化。
idea_spark.risk: 反事实掩码可能引入偏差，需确保区域级特征掩码的临床合理性。

en.tldr: Proposes MedSynapse-V, a framework that simulates clinicians' experiential invocation via latent diagnostic memory evolution, improving medical VLM diagnostic accuracy.
en.motivation: Existing medical VLMs suffer from quantization loss, long-range information dissipation, and lack of case-adaptive expertise due to discrete tokenization, causing cognitive misalignment with clinical intuition.
en.method: Consists of Meta Query for Prior Memorization, Causal Counterfactual Refinement (CCR), and Intrinsic Memory Transition (IMT), dynamically synthesizing implicit diagnostic memories in the hidden stream.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially chain-of-thought paradigms, across multiple datasets with significantly higher diagnostic accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Enhances medical image diagnosis systems by better simulating expert experience, improving diagnostic reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine causal counterfactual rewards with reinforcement learning for automatic memory selection and optimization within models.
idea_spark.risk: Counterfactual masking may introduce bias; clinical plausibility of region-level feature masking must be ensured.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how clinicians invoke implicit experience, designing an internal memory evolution path for models.

papers.title: Quantum scattering of droplets by wells and barriers in one-dimensional Bose-Bose mixtures
papers.summary: We investigate, both analytically and numerically, the scattering of quasi-one-dimensional quantum droplets from Pöschl-Teller potential wells and barriers. For attractive wells, we find a sharp transition between complete reflection and transmission at a critical incident velocity for both small and large flat-top droplets. The scattering interactions differ: small, soliton-like droplets form a spatially symmetric trapped mode at the critical velocity, showing their compressibility and coherence characteristics, while large droplets develop a spatially asymmetric trapped state, revealing incompressibility and internal structure. The critical velocity depends non-monotonically on atom number: it rises in the small, compressible-droplet regime, falls in the incompressible, flat-top regime, and turns at the crossover point. We also show that the reflectionless well generates a $π$-phase shift, strongly altering droplet-droplet collisions relative to free space. The persistence of a confined mode after collisions between trapped and incident droplets depends sensitively on their relative phase. For the repulsive barrier, we identify regimes of complete reflection, partial return, and full transmission, depending on incident velocity, barrier height, and particle number. Our predictions match direct numerical simulations in all cases.

ai.tldr: 研究了一维玻色-玻色混合物中量子液滴在Pöschl-Teller势阱和势垒上的散射行为，发现了临界速度下的反射-透射转变以及液滴内部结构的影响。
ai.motivation: 理解量子液滴在外部势中的散射机制，特别是液滴大小和内部结构对散射行为的影响。
ai.method: 解析分析与数值模拟相结合，研究准一维量子液滴与Pöschl-Teller势阱和势垒的散射。
ai.result: 发现了临界速度下的完全反射-透射转变；小液滴形成对称束缚态，大液滴形成不对称束缚态；临界速度随原子数非单调变化；反射势阱产生π相移；势垒散射存在完全反射、部分返回和完全透射三种区域。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子液滴在外部势中的动力学行为，为实验设计提供理论指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用π相移调控液滴-液滴碰撞，可能实现量子信息处理中的相位门。
idea_spark.risk: 一维近似可能忽略横向自由度的影响，实际实验需考虑三维效应。
idea_spark.inspiration: 液滴的压缩性与不可压缩性在散射中的不同表现，启发设计基于液滴的量子开关。

en.tldr: We study the scattering of quasi-one-dimensional quantum droplets by Pöschl-Teller wells and barriers, revealing a sharp transition between reflection and transmission at a critical velocity, influenced by droplet size and internal structure.
en.motivation: To understand the scattering mechanisms of quantum droplets in external potentials, especially the role of droplet size and internal structure.
en.method: Analytical and numerical analysis of quasi-one-dimensional quantum droplet scattering from Pöschl-Teller wells and barriers.
en.result: A sharp transition from complete reflection to transmission at a critical velocity; small droplets form symmetric trapped modes, large droplets asymmetric ones; critical velocity depends non-monotonically on atom number; reflectionless well induces a π-phase shift; barrier scattering shows regimes of complete reflection, partial return, and full transmission.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights into the dynamics of quantum droplets in external potentials, guiding experimental design.

idea_spark.idea: Utilize the π-phase shift to control droplet-droplet collisions, potentially enabling quantum phase gates for information processing.
idea_spark.risk: The one-dimensional approximation may neglect transverse degrees of freedom; experiments must account for three-dimensional effects.
idea_spark.inspiration: The contrasting compressibility and incompressibility in scattering suggests designing quantum switches based on droplet states.

papers.title: Flashback: A Reversible Bilateral Run-Peeling Decomposition of Strings
papers.summary: We introduce Flashback, a reversible string decomposition that repeatedly peels the maximal leading and trailing character runs from a sentinel-wrapped input, recording each pair as one bilateral token. Decomposition and reconstruction both run in O(n) time and space. Our central result is a run-pairing theorem: Flashback is equivalent to pairing the first run of the string with the last, the second with the second-to-last, and so on. This gives an exact token count of 1+[r/2] for a string with r maximal runs, and matches a lower bound that holds for any admissible bilateral run-peeling scheme. From the run-pairing theorem the main structural properties follow as corollaries: the irreducible peeling kernel uses at most two symbols; palindromes are precisely the strings whose run-length encoding is symmetric with an odd number of runs; the image of the decomposition admits an explicit finite-state characterisation; and changing one run length rewrites exactly one content token.

ai.tldr: 提出一种可逆的双向游程剥离分解方法Flashback，将字符串的头部和尾部最大游程配对为双边标记，并证明其与首尾游程配对等价。
ai.motivation: 设计一种可逆的字符串分解，能够高效地提取结构信息，并揭示游程之间的对称关系。
ai.method: 从带哨兵的输入字符串中反复剥离最大前导和尾随字符游程，每对记录为一个双边标记；分解和重构均在O(n)时间和空间内完成。
ai.result: 游程配对定理表明Flashback等价于将第一个游程与最后一个、第二个与倒数第二个等配对；精确令牌数为1+⌈r/2⌉（r为最大游程数）；不可约剥离核最多使用两个符号；回文串的游程编码对称且游程数为奇数；改变一个游程长度仅重写一个内容令牌。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解字符串的游程结构对称性，可用于字符串压缩、模式匹配和回文检测。

idea_spark.idea: 利用双向游程剥离实现可逆分解，并建立游程配对与字符串结构之间的精确对应关系。
idea_spark.risk: 分解依赖于哨兵和游程定义，可能不适用于无明确游程边界的序列。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从字符串的对称性出发，设计一种简单而严格的配对机制，启发其他序列的对称分解方法。

en.tldr: Flashback is a reversible string decomposition that repeatedly peels maximal leading and trailing character runs, pairing them as bilateral tokens, and is equivalent to pairing runs from ends inward.
en.motivation: To design a reversible decomposition that efficiently extracts structural information and reveals symmetry relationships among runs.
en.method: Repeatedly peel the maximal leading and trailing character runs from a sentinel-wrapped input, recording each pair as one bilateral token; both decomposition and reconstruction run in O(n) time and space.
en.result: The run-pairing theorem shows Flashback is equivalent to pairing the first run with the last, second with second-to-last, etc.; exact token count is 1+⌈r/2⌉ for r maximal runs; irreducible kernel uses at most two symbols; palindromes have symmetric run-length encoding with odd run count; changing one run length rewrites exactly one content token.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand symmetric run structure of strings, useful for compression, pattern matching, and palindrome detection.

idea_spark.idea: Use bilateral run-peeling to achieve reversible decomposition and establish precise correspondence between run pairing and string structure.
idea_spark.risk: Decomposition relies on sentinel and run definition, may not apply to sequences without clear run boundaries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by string symmetry to design a simple yet rigorous pairing mechanism, suggesting similar symmetric decomposition methods for other sequences.

papers.title: On enumeration of $b$-angulations of surfaces from an integrability perspective
papers.summary: In this paper, we study generating series enumerating polygonal angulations of closed oriented surfaces of fixed genus, focusing on $b$-angulations with $b = 3$ or $b = 2ν$, $ν\geq 2$. Based on Toda integrability, we establish new structural results in the cases $b = 3$ and $b = 4$. Furthermore, via the Hodge--GUE correspondence, we derive a fine structure in the $b = 2ν$ case, which implies a conjectural statement of Gharakhloo--Latimer.

ai.tldr: 本文利用Toda可积性和Hodge-GUE对应，研究了闭定向曲面上b-角剖分的计数生成级数，在b=3和b=4情形得到新结构结果，并在b=2ν情形推导出精细结构，证实了Gharakhloo-Latimer的猜想。
ai.motivation: 系统研究闭定向曲面上多边形剖分的计数问题，特别是b-角剖分，并验证相关猜想。
ai.method: 基于Toda可积性理论，结合Hodge-GUE对应，分析生成级数的结构。
ai.result: 在b=3和b=4情形建立了新的结构结果；在b=2ν情形推导出精细结构，证实了Gharakhloo-Latimer的猜想。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种利用可积性和随机矩阵理论枚举曲面剖分的新视角，有助于理解曲面组合与物理模型的联系。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法应用于带边界曲面或更高亏格曲面的剖分枚举。
idea_spark.risk: 可积性结构可能仅对特定b值成立，推广需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从可积系统角度重新审视组合枚举问题，可能发现新的对称性或闭式公式。

en.tldr: This paper studies generating series for polygonal angulations of closed oriented surfaces of fixed genus, focusing on b-angulations. Using Toda integrability and the Hodge-GUE correspondence, new structural results are obtained for b=3 and b=4, and a fine structure is derived for b=2ν, confirming a conjecture of Gharakhloo-Latimer.
en.motivation: To systematically investigate the enumeration of polygonal angulations on closed oriented surfaces, particularly b-angulations, and to verify related conjectures.
en.method: Based on Toda integrability theory and the Hodge-GUE correspondence, the structure of generating series is analyzed.
en.result: New structural results for b=3 and b=4; a fine structure for b=2ν, confirming the Gharakhloo-Latimer conjecture.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new perspective on enumerating surface angulations using integrability and random matrix theory, linking combinatorial geometry with physical models.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying similar methods to angulations of surfaces with boundaries or higher genus.
idea_spark.risk: The integrability structure may only hold for specific b values; generalization requires careful verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting combinatorial enumeration problems from an integrable systems viewpoint may reveal new symmetries or closed-form formulas.

papers.title: A Multimodal Pre-trained Network for Integrated EEG-Video Seizure Detection
papers.summary: Reliable seizure detection in mouse models is essential for preclinical epilepsy research, yet manual review of synchronized video-EEG recordings is labor-intensive and single-modality systems fail for complementary reasons: video-based methods are easily confounded by benign behaviors, whereas EEG-based methods are vulnerable to ictal motion artifacts. We present EEGVFusion, a multimodal framework that combines self-supervised EEG representation learning, spatio-temporal video encoding, optimal-transport alignment, and bidirectional cross-attention to integrate neural and behavioral evidence. We also curate an expert-annotated dataset of synchronized EEG and video recordings comprising 93 sessions from 15 mice for training and evaluation. In the random-session split, EEGVFusion achieved a Balanced Accuracy of 0.9957 with perfect event sensitivity and an Event FAR of 0.6250 FP/h, indicating strong seizure detection performance with a low false-alarm burden. In a single held-out-subject evaluation with Subject 110 reserved for testing, EEGVFusion achieved a Balanced Accuracy of 0.9718 and reduced Event FAR from 2.7250 FP/h for the EEG-only counterpart to 0.4833 FP/h while preserving perfect event sensitivity. Targeted ablations further showed that EEG pre-training and OT alignment help reduce false alarms while preserving event sensitivity.

ai.tldr: 提出EEGVFusion多模态框架，融合自监督EEG表示学习、时空视频编码、最优传输对齐和双向交叉注意力，实现小鼠癫痫发作的可靠检测。
ai.motivation: 人工审查同步视频-EEG记录耗时费力，单模态方法各有缺陷：视频易被良性行为混淆，EEG易受发作期运动伪影干扰。
ai.method: EEGVFusion结合自监督EEG表示学习、时空视频编码、最优传输对齐和双向交叉注意力，整合神经与行为证据。
ai.result: 在随机会话划分中平衡准确率0.9957，事件灵敏度完美，事件误报率0.6250 FP/h；在留一受试者评估中平衡准确率0.9718，事件误报率从EEG-only的2.7250降至0.4833 FP/h。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高灵敏度、低误报的多模态癫痫检测方法，可减轻人工审查负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将最优传输对齐与双向交叉注意力用于跨模态特征对齐，可推广至脑电图与行为视频的联合分析。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量同步数据，跨物种或临床转化时需重新标注和训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用自监督预训练减少标注需求，结合最优传输对齐提升跨模态鲁棒性，为弱监督多模态学习提供思路。

zh.tldr: 提出EEGVFusion多模态框架，融合自监督EEG表示学习、时空视频编码、最优传输对齐和双向交叉注意力，实现小鼠癫痫发作的可靠检测。
zh.motivation: 人工审查同步视频-EEG记录耗时费力，单模态方法各有缺陷：视频易被良性行为混淆，EEG易受发作期运动伪影干扰。
zh.method: EEGVFusion结合自监督EEG表示学习、时空视频编码、最优传输对齐和双向交叉注意力，整合神经与行为证据。
zh.result: 在随机会话划分中平衡准确率0.9957，事件灵敏度完美，事件误报率0.6250 FP/h；在留一受试者评估中平衡准确率0.9718，事件误报率从EEG-only的2.7250降至0.4833 FP/h。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高灵敏度、低误报的多模态癫痫检测方法，可减轻人工审查负担。

idea_spark.idea: 将最优传输对齐与双向交叉注意力用于跨模态特征对齐，可推广至脑电图与行为视频的联合分析。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量同步数据，跨物种或临床转化时需重新标注和训练。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用自监督预训练减少标注需求，结合最优传输对齐提升跨模态鲁棒性，为弱监督多模态学习提供思路。

en.tldr: Proposes EEGVFusion, a multimodal framework integrating self-supervised EEG representation learning, spatio-temporal video encoding, optimal-transport alignment, and bidirectional cross-attention for reliable seizure detection in mice.
en.motivation: Manual review of synchronized video-EEG recordings is labor-intensive, and single-modality systems fail due to benign behavioral confounds (video) or ictal motion artifacts (EEG).
en.method: EEGVFusion combines self-supervised EEG representation learning, spatio-temporal video encoding, optimal-transport alignment, and bidirectional cross-attention to integrate neural and behavioral evidence.
en.result: Achieves Balanced Accuracy 0.9957 with perfect event sensitivity and Event FAR 0.6250 FP/h in random-session split; in held-out-subject evaluation, Balanced Accuracy 0.9718 and Event FAR reduced from 2.7250 (EEG-only) to 0.4833 FP/h.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-sensitivity, low-false-alarm multimodal seizure detection method that reduces manual review burden.

idea_spark.idea: Using optimal-transport alignment and bidirectional cross-attention for cross-modal feature alignment can be generalized to joint analysis of EEG and behavioral video.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality synchronized data; cross-species or clinical translation requires re-annotation and retraining.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging self-supervised pretraining to reduce annotation needs and optimal-transport alignment to enhance cross-modal robustness provides insights for weakly-supervised multimodal learning.

papers.title: The Unseen Adversaries: Robust and Generalized Defense Against Adversarial Patches
papers.summary: The vulnerabilities of deep neural networks against singularities have raised serious concerns regarding their deployment in the physical world. One of the most prominent and impactful physical-world adversarial perturbations is the attachment of patches to clean images, known as an adversarial patch attack. Similarly, natural noises such as Gaussian and Salt\&Pepper are highly prevalent in the real world. The current research need arises from the above vulnerabilities and the lack of efforts to tackle these two singularities independently and, especially, in combination. In this research, we have, for the first time, combined these two prominent singularities and proposed a novel dataset. Using this dataset, we have conducted a benchmark study of singularity data-point detection using features from several convolutional neural networks. For classification, rather than the popular neural network-based parameter tuning, we have used traditional yet effective machine learning classifiers. The extensive experiments across various in- and out-of-distribution (OOD) singularities reveal several interesting findings about the effectiveness of classifiers and show that it is hard to defend against adversaries when they are treated independently, and inefficient classifiers are selected.

ai.tldr: 首次将对抗性补丁攻击与自然噪声（高斯、椒盐）结合，构建新数据集，使用传统机器学习分类器进行奇异点检测，发现独立处理对抗样本难以防御。
ai.motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗性补丁和自然噪声攻击，现有研究缺乏同时处理这两种奇异性的工作。
ai.method: 构建包含对抗性补丁和自然噪声的联合数据集，提取多种CNN特征，使用传统机器学习分类器（非神经网络调参）进行奇异点检测与基准测试。
ai.result: 实验表明，独立处理对抗样本时防御困难，且分类器选择不当会降低效果；传统分类器在联合奇异点检测中表现有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解对抗性补丁与自然噪声的联合威胁，并提供基于传统分类器的检测思路。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将对抗性补丁与多种自然噪声组合，训练更鲁棒的检测器。
idea_spark.risk: 传统分类器可能在高维特征下泛化不足，需验证大规模数据集效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“独立处理难以防御”的发现出发，启发设计联合防御策略。

zh.tldr: 首次将对抗性补丁攻击与自然噪声（高斯、椒盐）结合，构建新数据集，使用传统机器学习分类器进行奇异点检测，发现独立处理对抗样本难以防御。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解对抗性补丁与自然噪声的联合威胁，并提供基于传统分类器的检测思路。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将对抗性补丁与多种自然噪声组合，训练更鲁棒的检测器。
idea_spark.risk: 传统分类器可能在高维特征下泛化不足，需验证大规模数据集效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“独立处理难以防御”的发现出发，启发设计联合防御策略。

en.tldr: First to combine adversarial patch attacks with natural noises (Gaussian, Salt&Pepper), create a novel dataset, and use traditional ML classifiers for singularity detection, revealing that defending against adversaries independently is hard.
en.motivation: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial patches and natural noises, yet existing work rarely addresses both singularities together.
en.method: Construct a combined dataset of adversarial patches and natural noises, extract features from multiple CNNs, and benchmark singularity detection using traditional ML classifiers (instead of neural network fine-tuning).
en.result: Extensive experiments show that defending against adversaries independently is difficult and classifier choice matters; traditional classifiers are effective for joint singularity detection.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into the combined threat of adversarial patches and natural noises, and offers a detection approach using traditional classifiers.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining adversarial patches with various natural noises to train more robust detectors.
idea_spark.risk: Traditional classifiers may underperform on high-dimensional features; scalability to large datasets needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The finding that independent defense is hard inspires the design of joint defense strategies.

papers.title: SynSur: An end-to-end generative pipeline for synthetic industrial surface defect generation and detection
papers.summary: The bottleneck in learning-based industrial defect detection is often limited not by model capacity, but by the scarcity of labeled defect data: defects are rare, annotations are expensive, and collecting balanced training sets is slow. We present an end-to-end pipeline for synthetic defect generation and annotation, combining Vision-Language-Model-based prompts, LoRA-adapted diffusion, mask-guided inpainting, and sample filtering with automatic label derivation, and demonstrates the potential of real data with realistic synthetic samples to overcome data scarcity. The evaluation is conducted on, a challenging dataset of pitting defects on ball screw drives, and then on a subset of the Mobile phone screen surface defect segmentation dataset (MSD) dataset to test cross-domain transfer. Beyond downstream detector performance, we analyze key stages of the pipeline, including prompt construction, LoRA selection, and sample filtering with DreamSim and CLIPScore, to understand which synthetic samples are both realistic and useful. Experiments with YOLOv26, YOLOX, and LW-DETR show that synthetic-only training does not replace real data. When combined with real data, synthetic defects can preserve performance and yield modest gains in selected BSData training regimes. The MSD transfer study shows that the overall pipeline structure carries over to a second industrial inspection domain, while also highlighting the importance of domain-specific adaptation and annotation-quality control. Overall, the paper provides an end-to-end assessment of diffusion-based industrial defect synthesis and shows that its strongest value lies in strengthening scarce real datasets rather than substituting for them.

ai.tldr: 提出一个端到端合成缺陷生成与检测管线，利用VLM提示、LoRA扩散、掩码修复和自动标注，缓解工业缺陷数据稀缺问题。
ai.motivation: 工业缺陷检测中标注数据稀缺，模型容量并非瓶颈，而数据不足限制了性能。
ai.method: 结合VLM提示、LoRA适配扩散模型、掩码引导修复、DreamSim/CLIPScore过滤和自动标签推导的端到端管线。
ai.result: 合成数据单独训练无法替代真实数据，但与真实数据结合可在部分场景保持或小幅提升性能；跨域迁移需领域适配。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种利用扩散模型生成工业缺陷合成数据并辅助检测的完整实践方案。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将合成缺陷生成与主动学习结合，优先生成模型难以判别的缺陷样本。
idea_spark.risk: 合成样本的真实性和标注质量可能影响下游检测器性能，需严格过滤。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用VLM自动生成提示词，减少人工设计，提高合成多样性。

en.tldr: An end-to-end pipeline for synthetic defect generation and detection using VLM prompts, LoRA diffusion, mask-guided inpainting, and automatic labeling to address data scarcity in industrial inspection.
en.motivation: Labeled defect data is scarce and expensive, limiting learning-based defect detection despite sufficient model capacity.
en.method: End-to-end pipeline combining VLM-based prompts, LoRA-adapted diffusion, mask-guided inpainting, DreamSim/CLIPScore filtering, and automatic label derivation.
en.result: Synthetic-only training cannot replace real data, but combining synthetic with real data preserves or slightly improves performance in some regimes; cross-domain transfer requires domain-specific adaptation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical framework for generating and using synthetic industrial defect data with diffusion models to augment scarce real datasets.

idea_spark.idea: Combine synthetic defect generation with active learning to focus on hard-to-classify defect types.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic sample realism and annotation quality may degrade detector performance if not carefully filtered.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use VLM to automatically generate diverse prompts, reducing manual effort and increasing synthetic variety.

papers.title: QYOLO: Lightweight Object Detection via Quantum Inspired Shared Channel Mixing
papers.summary: The rapid advancement of object detection architectures has positioned single stage detectors as the dominant solution for real-time visual perception. A primary source of computational overhead in these models lies in the deep backbone stages, where C2f bottleneck modules at high stride levels accumulate a disproportionate share of parameters due to quadratic scaling with channel width. This work introduces QYOLO, a quantum-inspired channel mixing framework that achieves genuine architectural compression by replacing the two deepest backbone C2f modules at P4/16 (512 channels) and P5/32 (1024 channels) with a compact QMixBlock. The proposed block performs global channel recalibration through a sinusoidal mixing mechanism with shared learnable parameters across both backbone stages, enforcing consistent channel importance without requiring independent per-stage parameter sets. The neck and detection head remain fully classical and unchanged. Evaluation on the VisDrone2019 benchmark demonstrates that QYOLOv8n achieves a 20.2% reduction in parameter count (3.01M to 2.40M) and 12.3% GFLOPs reduction with only 0.4 pp mAP@50 degradation. QYOLOv8s achieves 21.8% reduction with 0.1 pp degradation. When combined with knowledge distillation, full accuracy parity is recovered at no cost to compression. An expanded backbone plus neck variant achieved 38 to 41% reduction at the cost of greater accuracy degradation, motivating the backbone-only final design.

ai.tldr: 提出QYOLO，用量子启发的共享通道混合模块替换深层C2f瓶颈，实现轻量化目标检测，在VisDrone2019上参数量减少20%以上，精度几乎无损。
ai.motivation: 单阶段检测器深层C2f模块参数随通道数二次增长，造成大量冗余。
ai.method: 在P4/16和P5/32层用共享可学习参数的QMixBlock替代C2f，通过正弦混合机制实现全局通道重校准。
ai.result: QYOLOv8n参数量减少20.2%，GFLOPs降低12.3%，mAP@50仅下降0.4个百分点；结合知识蒸馏可恢复全部精度。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量化检测器设计思路，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将QMixBlock与神经架构搜索结合，自动确定共享参数的最佳层位置和数量。
idea_spark.risk: 正弦混合机制在极低通道数下可能丧失表达能力，需验证在更小模型上的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 量子计算中的纠缠与叠加概念启发全局通道交互，可进一步探索其他量子门（如CNOT）的经典模拟变体。

en.tldr: QYOLO replaces deep C2f bottlenecks with a quantum-inspired shared channel mixing block, achieving >20% parameter reduction on VisDrone2019 with minimal accuracy loss.
en.motivation: Deep C2f modules in single-stage detectors suffer from quadratic parameter growth with channel width, causing redundancy.
en.method: Replace the two deepest C2f modules (P4/16 and P5/32) with a compact QMixBlock that performs global channel recalibration via sinusoidal mixing with shared learnable parameters.
en.result: QYOLOv8n reduces parameters by 20.2% and GFLOPs by 12.3% with only 0.4 pp mAP@50 drop; knowledge distillation recovers full accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight detector design suitable for resource-constrained scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combine QMixBlock with neural architecture search to automatically determine optimal layer positions and number of shared parameters.
idea_spark.risk: The sinusoidal mixing may lose expressiveness at very low channel counts; applicability to smaller models needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Quantum entanglement and superposition inspire global channel interaction; further explore classical analogs of other quantum gates (e.g., CNOT).

papers.title: Causal Edge Rees Algebras for Spatiotemporal Graphs
papers.summary: Understanding the evolution of connectivity in spatiotemporal systems requires mathematical frameworks capable of encoding not only instantaneous interactions but also their cumulative causal structure. In this work, we introduce the \emph{Causal Edge Rees Algebra} (CERA), a new algebraic construction associated with causal spatiotemporal graphs. Given a temporal filtration induced by causal constraints, we associate a sequence of edge ideals whose Rees algebra encodes the full history of connectivity evolution in a single graded object. This construction establishes a bridge between dynamic graph topology and commutative algebra. In particular, we show that successive quotients of the filtration capture the emergence of new structural connections, allowing the identification of critical edges responsible for the fusion of previously disconnected components. This leads to the definition of temporal bridge modules and to a bridge detection theorem, which relates the dimension of these modules to the reduction in the number of connected components over time. Unlike existing algebraic approaches in topological data analysis, which are primarily based on geometric filtrations, the proposed framework is driven by intrinsic causal constraints. As a result, the CERA captures not only topological features but also their temporal organization and mechanisms of coalescence. The theory provides a new algebraic perspective on causal network dynamics, connecting edge ideals, Rees algebras, and temporal graphs. Beyond its theoretical significance, the framework opens new directions for the analysis of spatiotemporal systems, including epidemic networks, transport systems, and information propagation processes.

ai.tldr: 提出因果边里斯代数（CERA），将时空图的连接演化编码为单个分次代数对象，建立动态图拓扑与交换代数之间的桥梁。
ai.motivation: 现有代数拓扑方法主要基于几何过滤，缺乏对内在因果约束和连接累积结构的刻画。
ai.method: 利用因果约束诱导的时间过滤，关联边理想序列，通过里斯代数统一编码连接演化历史，并定义时间桥模块。
ai.result: 证明了桥检测定理，将模块维数与连通分量减少联系起来，能够识别导致组件融合的关键边。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种新的代数视角来分析因果网络动力学，适用于流行病网络、交通系统和信息传播等时空系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用里斯代数中的分次结构，可以设计算法自动检测网络中的关键融合时刻和桥接边。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中，因果约束的精确获取可能困难，且高维图的计算复杂度较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将交换代数工具引入因果图分析，启发我们探索更多代数结构（如局部上同调）在动态网络中的应用。

zh.tldr: 提出因果边里斯代数（CERA），将时空图的连接演化编码为单个分次代数对象，建立动态图拓扑与交换代数之间的桥梁。
zh.motivation: 现有代数拓扑方法主要基于几何过滤，缺乏对内在因果约束和连接累积结构的刻画。
zh.method: 利用因果约束诱导的时间过滤，关联边理想序列，通过里斯代数统一编码连接演化历史，并定义时间桥模块。
zh.result: 证明了桥检测定理，将模块维数与连通分量减少联系起来，能够识别导致组件融合的关键边。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种新的代数视角来分析因果网络动力学，适用于流行病网络、交通系统和信息传播等时空系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用里斯代数中的分次结构，可以设计算法自动检测网络中的关键融合时刻和桥接边。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中，因果约束的精确获取可能困难，且高维图的计算复杂度较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将交换代数工具引入因果图分析，启发我们探索更多代数结构（如局部上同调）在动态网络中的应用。

en.tldr: Proposes Causal Edge Rees Algebra (CERA) to encode the evolution of connectivity in spatiotemporal graphs as a single graded algebraic object, bridging dynamic graph topology and commutative algebra.
en.motivation: Existing algebraic topology methods rely on geometric filtrations and fail to capture intrinsic causal constraints and cumulative connectivity structure.
en.method: Uses a temporal filtration induced by causal constraints, associates a sequence of edge ideals, and encodes the full history via Rees algebra, defining temporal bridge modules.
en.result: Proves a bridge detection theorem relating module dimension to reduction in connected components, identifying critical edges responsible for component fusion.
en.help_to_user: Offers a new algebraic perspective for analyzing causal network dynamics, applicable to epidemic networks, transport systems, and information propagation.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the graded structure of Rees algebras to design algorithms that automatically detect critical fusion moments and bridging edges.
idea_spark.risk: Obtaining precise causal constraints in practice may be challenging, and computational complexity for high-dimensional graphs could be high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing commutative algebra tools into causal graph analysis inspires exploration of other algebraic structures (e.g., local cohomology) in dynamic networks.

papers.title: Swap distance minimization shapes the order of subject, object and verb in languages of the world
papers.summary: Languages of the world vary concerning the order of subject, object and verb. The most frequent dominant orders are SOV and SVO, and researchers have tailored models to this fact. However, there are still languages whose dominant order does not conform to these expectations or even lack a dominant order. Here we show that across linguistic families and macroareas, word order variation within languages is shaped by the principle of swap distance minimization even when the dominant order is not SOV/SVO and even when a dominant order is lacking.

ai.tldr: 研究表明，即使语言的主导语序不是SOV或SVO，甚至缺乏主导语序，交换距离最小化原则仍然塑造了世界语言中主语、宾语和动词的顺序变化。
ai.motivation: 解释为什么有些语言的主导语序不符合SOV/SVO预期，或缺乏主导语序。
ai.method: 跨语言家族和宏观区域分析，检验交换距离最小化原则对语序变化的影响。
ai.result: 交换距离最小化原则普遍适用于各种语序类型，包括非SOV/SVO和缺乏主导语序的语言。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解语言语序变化的普遍约束机制。

zh.motivation: 解释为什么有些语言的主导语序不符合SOV/SVO预期，或缺乏主导语序。
zh.method: 跨语言家族和宏观区域分析，检验交换距离最小化原则对语序变化的影响。
zh.result: 交换距离最小化原则普遍适用于各种语序类型，包括非SOV/SVO和缺乏主导语序的语言。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解语言语序变化的普遍约束机制。

en.tldr: The study shows that swap distance minimization shapes word order variation across linguistic families and macroareas, even when the dominant order is not SOV/SVO or absent.
en.motivation: To explain why some languages deviate from expected SOV/SVO dominant orders or lack a dominant order.
en.method: Cross-linguistic analysis across families and macroareas, testing the principle of swap distance minimization on word order variation.
en.result: Swap distance minimization universally applies to various word order types, including non-SOV/SVO and languages without a dominant order.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into universal constraints on word order variation in languages.

idea_spark.idea: Apply swap distance minimization to word order generation in NLP or reordering in machine translation.
idea_spark.risk: Oversimplifying linguistic complexity by ignoring cultural and historical factors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore distance minimization principles in other human behaviors or biological systems, inspired by language word order optimization.

papers.title: Locality for Codes over the Integers
papers.summary: In this work, we study the codes over the integers with locality constraints. We introduce a weighted notion of locality over $\mathbb{Z}/q_1\mathbb{Z} \times \cdots \times \mathbb{Z}/q_n\mathbb{Z}$ and derive a Singleton-like bound for locally recoverable codes. We also propose some code constructions with locality, including integer analogs of Tamo--Barg codes.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了整数环上具有局部性约束的码，引入了加权局部性概念，推导了Singleton型界，并提出了包括Tamo-Barg码整数模拟在内的若干构造。
ai.motivation: 现有局部恢复码多基于有限域，而整数环上的局部性理论尚不完善，需要建立相应的界和构造方法。
ai.method: 定义加权局部性度量，利用代数结构推导Singleton型上界，并通过整数环上的多项式构造实现局部恢复码。
ai.result: 得到了整数环上局部恢复码的Singleton型界，并给出了达到该界的显式构造（如整数Tamo-Barg码）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解整数环上局部恢复码的理论界限和构造方法，为设计更通用的容错存储系统提供数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用中国剩余定理将整数环上的局部性约束分解到多个有限域上，从而复用有限域局部恢复码的成熟技术。
idea_spark.risk: 整数环的非域性质可能导致解码复杂度增加，且加权局部性的实际存储开销需进一步评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将有限域上的局部恢复码构造（如Tamo-Barg）提升到整数环，启发我们探索更一般代数结构上的编码理论。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了整数环上具有局部性约束的码，引入了加权局部性概念，推导了Singleton型界，并提出了包括Tamo-Barg码整数模拟在内的若干构造。
zh.motivation: 现有局部恢复码多基于有限域，而整数环上的局部性理论尚不完善，需要建立相应的界和构造方法。
zh.method: 定义加权局部性度量，利用代数结构推导Singleton型上界，并通过整数环上的多项式构造实现局部恢复码。
zh.result: 得到了整数环上局部恢复码的Singleton型界，并给出了达到该界的显式构造（如整数Tamo-Barg码）。

en.tldr: This work studies codes over the integers with locality constraints, introduces a weighted notion of locality, derives a Singleton-like bound, and proposes constructions including integer analogs of Tamo-Barg codes.
en.motivation: Existing locally recoverable codes are mostly over finite fields; the theory over integer rings is incomplete, requiring bounds and constructions.
en.method: Define weighted locality measure, derive Singleton-type upper bound using algebraic structure, and construct locally recoverable codes via polynomials over integer rings.
en.result: Singleton-like bound for locally recoverable codes over integer rings is obtained, and explicit constructions (e.g., integer Tamo-Barg codes) achieving the bound are given.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand theoretical limits and constructions of locally recoverable codes over integer rings, providing mathematical foundations for designing more general fault-tolerant storage systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use the Chinese remainder theorem to decompose locality constraints over integer rings into several finite fields, reusing mature techniques from finite-field locally recoverable codes.
idea_spark.risk: The non-field nature of integer rings may increase decoding complexity, and the storage overhead of weighted locality needs further evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Lifting finite-field LRC constructions (e.g., Tamo-Barg) to integer rings inspires exploration of coding theory over more general algebraic structures.

papers.title: Evergreen: Efficient Claim Verification for Semantic Aggregates
papers.summary: With recent semantic query processing engines, semantic aggregation has become a primitive operator, enabling the reduction of a relation into a natural language aggregate using an LLM. However, the resulting semantic aggregate may contain claims that are not grounded in the underlying relation. Verifying such claims is challenging: they often involve quantifiers, groupings, and comparisons over relations that far exceed LLM context windows and require a costly combination of semantic and symbolic processing.   We present Evergreen, a system that recasts claim verification as a semantic query processing task with tailored optimizations and provenance capture. Evergreen compiles each claim into a declarative semantic verification query and executes it on the same engine that produced the aggregate. To reduce cost and latency, Evergreen avoids unnecessary LLM calls through verification-aware optimizations (early stopping, relevance sorting, and estimation with confidence sequences) and general-purpose optimizations for semantic queries (operator fusion, similarity filtering, and prompt caching). Each verdict is accompanied by citations that identify a minimal set of tuples justifying the result, with semantics based on semiring provenance for first-order logic.   On a benchmark of real-world restaurant review datasets reflecting production-inspired workloads, Evergreen achieves excellent verification quality (F1 = 1.00) with a strong LLM while reducing cost by 3.2x and latency by 4.0x compared to unoptimized verification. Even with a significantly weaker LLM, Evergreen outperforms a strong LLM-as-a-judge baseline in F1 at 48x lower cost and 2.3x lower latency. Relative to a retrieval-augmented agent, Evergreen compares favorably in F1 and latency with similar cost when both use a strong LLM; yet, with a much weaker LLM, it achieves the same F1 at 63x lower cost and 4.2x lower latency.

ai.tldr: Evergreen 将语义聚合中的声明验证转化为语义查询处理任务，通过优化和溯源实现高效验证。
ai.motivation: 语义聚合可能产生不基于底层关系的声明，验证这些声明因涉及量化、分组和比较而超出 LLM 上下文窗口，且需要昂贵的语义与符号处理组合。
ai.method: 将每个声明编译为声明式语义验证查询，在同一引擎上执行；采用验证感知优化（早停、相关性排序、置信序列估计）和通用优化（算子融合、相似性过滤、提示缓存）；基于半环溯源为每个判定提供最小元组集引用。
ai.result: 在真实餐厅评论基准上，使用强 LLM 时 F1=1.00，成本降低 3.2 倍，延迟降低 4.0 倍；使用弱 LLM 时仍优于强 LLM 基线，成本低 48 倍，延迟低 2.3 倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效验证语义聚合结果中的声明，降低 LLM 调用成本和延迟，同时提供可解释的溯源证据。

idea_spark.idea: 结合半环溯源与验证感知优化，为每个判定提供最小证据集，可启发可解释 AI 和可信 LLM 应用的设计。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖底层语义查询引擎的优化能力，若引擎不支持特定算子或溯源，则方法可能受限；弱 LLM 下的性能优势可能随任务复杂度增加而减弱。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将验证问题重新定义为查询处理问题，并利用数据库优化技术（如早停、算子融合）来降低 LLM 开销，这种跨领域思路值得借鉴。

zh.tldr: Evergreen 将语义聚合中的声明验证转化为语义查询处理任务，通过优化和溯源实现高效验证。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将验证问题重新定义为查询处理问题，并利用数据库优化技术（如早停、算子融合）来降低 LLM 开销，这种跨领域思路值得借鉴。

en.tldr: Evergreen recasts claim verification for semantic aggregates as a semantic query processing task, achieving efficient verification with optimizations and provenance.
en.motivation: Semantic aggregates may contain claims ungrounded in the underlying relation; verifying them is challenging due to quantifiers, groupings, and comparisons exceeding LLM context windows, requiring costly semantic and symbolic processing.
en.method: Compiles each claim into a declarative semantic verification query executed on the same engine; employs verification-aware optimizations (early stopping, relevance sorting, confidence sequence estimation) and general-purpose optimizations (operator fusion, similarity filtering, prompt caching); provides citations with minimal tuple sets based on semiring provenance for first-order logic.
en.result: On real-world restaurant review benchmarks, achieves F1=1.00 with a strong LLM while reducing cost by 3.2x and latency by 4.0x; with a weak LLM, outperforms a strong LLM baseline with 48x lower cost and 2.3x lower latency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently verify claims in semantic aggregates, reducing LLM cost and latency while providing interpretable provenance evidence.

idea_spark.idea: Combining semiring provenance with verification-aware optimizations to provide minimal evidence sets for each verdict can inspire designs for explainable AI and trustworthy LLM applications.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the optimization capabilities of the underlying semantic query engine; limitations may arise if the engine lacks support for specific operators or provenance; performance gains with weak LLMs may diminish with task complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reframing verification as a query processing problem and leveraging database optimization techniques (e.g., early stopping, operator fusion) to reduce LLM overhead offers a cross-domain insight worth exploring.

papers.title: Spectrum of Random Matrices with Exploding Moments
papers.summary: We study the central limit theorem (CLT) for linear eigenvalue statistics of several types of matrix models, whose entries are having exploding moments, i.e., moments of the entries are increasing with the size of the matrix. In particular, we study elliptic, centrosymmetric, circulant, and inter-correlated block matrices. The CLTs are established using asymptotic Wick formula.

ai.tldr: 研究了几类具有爆炸矩的随机矩阵的线性特征值统计量的中心极限定理。
ai.motivation: 探索当矩阵元素矩随矩阵大小增长时，特征值统计量的极限行为。
ai.method: 利用渐近Wick公式推导中心极限定理。
ai.result: 对椭圆、中心对称、循环和互相关块矩阵建立了中心极限定理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维随机矩阵在非标准矩条件下的统计性质。

idea_spark.idea: 将爆炸矩概念应用于图神经网络中的随机权重矩阵分析。
idea_spark.risk: 实际数据矩可能不严格满足爆炸条件，导致理论偏离。
idea_spark.inspiration: 爆炸矩模型可能模拟高维数据中极端值的影响。

zh.tldr: 研究了几类具有爆炸矩的随机矩阵的线性特征值统计量的中心极限定理。
zh.motivation: 探索当矩阵元素矩随矩阵大小增长时，特征值统计量的极限行为。
zh.method: 利用渐近Wick公式推导中心极限定理。

en.tldr: We study the central limit theorem for linear eigenvalue statistics of random matrices with exploding moments.
en.motivation: To understand eigenvalue statistics when entry moments grow with matrix size.
en.method: Asymptotic Wick formula is used to derive CLTs.
en.result: CLTs are established for elliptic, centrosymmetric, circulant, and inter-correlated block matrices.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into high-dimensional random matrix behavior under non-standard moment conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Apply exploding moment concept to analyze random weight matrices in graph neural networks.
idea_spark.risk: Real data moments may not strictly satisfy exploding conditions, causing theory-practice gap.
idea_spark.inspiration: Exploding moment models may mimic extreme value effects in high-dimensional data.

papers.title: Smallest distances between zeros of Gaussian analytic functions
papers.summary: In this article, we study the smallest distances between the zeros of Gaussian analytic functions over compact Riemann surfaces. Our main result is that, after appropriate rescaling, the point process of the smallest distances converge to a Poisson point process with a universal rate. Furthermore, the locations where these smallest distances occur tend to follow a uniform measure with respect to the volume form. As a consequence, the limiting density of the $k$-th rescaled smallest distance is proportional to $x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}$ for any $k\geq 1$. Analogous results hold for the classical Gaussian Entire Functions.

ai.tldr: 研究了紧黎曼曲面上高斯解析函数零点间最小距离的极限分布，证明其经适当缩放后收敛到泊松点过程，且最小距离的密度函数为 x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}。
ai.motivation: 理解随机解析函数零点间最小距离的统计行为，揭示其普适性规律。
ai.method: 利用点过程理论和缩放极限方法，分析紧黎曼曲面上高斯解析函数零点最小距离的收敛性。
ai.result: 最小距离点过程收敛到具有普适速率的泊松点过程，位置服从体积形式的均匀测度，且第k个缩放最小距离的极限密度为 x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机几何和点过程理论提供新的极限结果，有助于理解随机零点结构的极端统计特性。

idea_spark.idea: 将最小距离的极限分布与随机矩阵理论中特征值间距的普适性联系起来，探索更广泛的随机几何模型。
idea_spark.risk: 推广到非高斯或非解析随机场时，普适性可能不成立，需验证具体条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机矩阵中最小间距分布的启发，将类似思想应用于随机解析函数零点结构。

zh.tldr: 研究了紧黎曼曲面上高斯解析函数零点间最小距离的极限分布，证明其经适当缩放后收敛到泊松点过程，且最小距离的密度函数为 x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}。

zh.result: 最小距离点过程收敛到具有普适速率的泊松点过程，位置服从体积形式的均匀测度，且第k个缩放最小距离的极限密度为 x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}。
zh.help_to_user: 为随机几何和点过程理论提供新的极限结果，有助于理解随机零点结构的极端统计特性。

idea_spark.risk: 推广到非高斯或非解析随机场时，普适性可能不成立，需验证具体条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机矩阵中最小间距分布的启发，将类似思想应用于随机解析函数零点结构。

en.tldr: We study the smallest distances between zeros of Gaussian analytic functions on compact Riemann surfaces, proving that after rescaling the point process converges to a Poisson point process with universal rate, and the limiting density of the k-th rescaled smallest distance is proportional to x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}.
en.motivation: To understand the statistical behavior of the smallest distances between zeros of random analytic functions and reveal universal patterns.
en.method: Using point process theory and scaling limit methods to analyze the convergence of smallest distances for Gaussian analytic functions on compact Riemann surfaces.
en.result: The point process of smallest distances converges to a Poisson point process with universal rate; locations follow the uniform measure with respect to the volume form; the limiting density of the k-th rescaled smallest distance is x^{4k-1}e^{-x^4}.
en.help_to_user: Provides new limit results for stochastic geometry and point process theory, aiding in understanding extreme statistical properties of random zero structures.

idea_spark.idea: Connect the limiting distribution of smallest distances with universality in random matrix eigenvalue spacings, exploring broader random geometric models.
idea_spark.risk: Universality may fail for non-Gaussian or non-analytic random fields; specific conditions need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the distribution of smallest spacings in random matrix theory, applying similar ideas to zero structures of random analytic functions.

papers.title: Function-free Optimization via Comparison Oracles
papers.summary: In this work, we study optimization specified only through a comparison oracle: given two points, it reports which one is preferred. We call it function-free optimization because we do not assume access to, nor the existence of, a canonical application-given objective function. The goal is to find the most preferred feasible point, which we call the optimal solution. This model arises in preference- and ranking-based settings where objective values and derivatives are unavailable or meaningless. Even when a representative function exists, it may be nonsmooth, nonconvex, or discontinuous. We develop an analytical and algorithmic framework based on the geometry of preference level sets, which remains well-defined from comparisons alone. We introduce the level-set optimality gap, the distance from a preference level set to the optimal solutions, and the regularity radius, a stationarity certificate. Under regularity of the preference relation in a $d$-dimensional Euclidean space, we estimate normal directions to accuracy $ε$ using $O(d\log(d/ε))$ comparisons, nearly matching a lower bound of $Ω(d\log(1/ε))$. Under convexity, regularity, and a local growth condition on the regularity radius, the resulting normal direction descent method reaches an $ε$ level-set optimality gap using at most $\widetilde O(dD^2/ε^2)$ comparisons over $O(D^2/ε^2)$ normal direction estimation steps, where $D$ is the distance from the initial point to the optimal solutions. This number of steps matches the lower bound of $Ω(D^2/ε^2)$ for normal direction span-based methods. Since prior knowledge in practical applications is usually limited, we also develop adaptive schemes for estimating the normal direction and solving the optimization problem. They match the fixed-parameter complexity bounds up to logarithmic factors.

ai.tldr: 本文研究仅通过比较偏好来优化问题，无需显式目标函数，并提出了基于偏好水平集几何的分析与算法框架。
ai.motivation: 许多实际场景中无法获得目标函数值或梯度，只能通过两两比较得到偏好，因此需要一种无需函数的优化方法。
ai.method: 定义了水平集最优间隙和正则半径，并设计了法方向下降法，在凸性和正则性条件下达到最优解。
ai.result: 在d维欧氏空间中，法方向估计达到精度ε仅需O(d log(d/ε))次比较，接近下界；法方向下降法达到ε最优间隙需Õ(d D²/ε²)次比较，匹配下界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何仅通过偏好比较进行优化，并提供理论保证和自适应算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用水平集几何和正则半径，将比较信息转化为梯度下降的替代方向。
idea_spark.risk: 对偏好关系的正则性假设可能在实际中难以验证，影响算法鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从偏好比较中提取几何结构，启发其他无梯度优化问题的解法。

zh.tldr: 本文研究仅通过比较偏好来优化问题，无需显式目标函数，并提出了基于偏好水平集几何的分析与算法框架。
zh.motivation: 许多实际场景中无法获得目标函数值或梯度，只能通过两两比较得到偏好，因此需要一种无需函数的优化方法。
zh.method: 定义了水平集最优间隙和正则半径，并设计了法方向下降法，在凸性和正则性条件下达到最优解。
zh.result: 在d维欧氏空间中，法方向估计达到精度ε仅需O(d log(d/ε))次比较，接近下界；法方向下降法达到ε最优间隙需Õ(d D²/ε²)次比较，匹配下界。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何仅通过偏好比较进行优化，并提供理论保证和自适应算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用水平集几何和正则半径，将比较信息转化为梯度下降的替代方向。
idea_spark.risk: 对偏好关系的正则性假设可能在实际中难以验证，影响算法鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从偏好比较中提取几何结构，启发其他无梯度优化问题的解法。

en.tldr: This paper studies optimization using only a comparison oracle that reports which of two points is preferred, without access to an explicit objective function, and develops a geometric framework based on preference level sets.
en.motivation: Many real-world settings lack objective values or gradients, only pairwise comparisons are available, motivating a function-free optimization approach.
en.method: Defines the level-set optimality gap and regularity radius, and proposes a normal direction descent method that achieves optimality under convexity and regularity conditions.
en.result: In d-dimensional Euclidean space, normal direction estimation to accuracy ε requires O(d log(d/ε)) comparisons, nearly matching the lower bound; the descent method reaches ε optimality gap in Õ(d D²/ε²) comparisons, matching the lower bound for normal direction span-based methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to optimize using only preference comparisons, with theoretical guarantees and adaptive algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage level-set geometry and regularity radius to convert comparison information into a surrogate for gradient descent direction.
idea_spark.risk: Regularity assumptions on the preference relation may be hard to verify in practice, affecting algorithm robustness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extracting geometric structure from preference comparisons inspires solutions for other gradient-free optimization problems.

papers.title: ViBE: Visual-to-M/EEG Brain Encoding via Spatio-Temporal VAE and Distribution-Aligned Projection
papers.summary: Brain encoding models not only serve to decipher how visual stimuli are transformed into neural responses, but also represent a critical step toward visual prostheses that restore vision for patients with severe vision disorders. Brain encoding involves two fundamental steps: achieving faithful reconstruction of neural responses and establishing cross-modal alignment between visual stimuli and neural responses. To this end, we propose ViBE, a novel brain encoding framework for generating magnetoencephalography (MEG) and electroencephalography (EEG) signals from visual stimuli. Specifically, we first design a spatio-temporal convolutional variational autoencoder (TSC-VAE) that captures the spatio-temporal characteristics of M/EEG signals for effective neural response reconstruction. To bridge the modality gap between visual features and neural representations, we employ Q-Former to map CLIP image embeddings to the TSC-VAE latent space, producing neural proxy embeddings. For comprehensive cross-modal alignment, we combine mean squared error (MSE) loss for point-wise feature matching with sliced Wasserstein distance (SWD) for probability distribution alignment between the neural proxy embeddings and TSC-VAE latent embeddings. We conduct extensive experiments on the THINGS-EEG2 and THINGS-MEG datasets, demonstrating the effectiveness of our approach in generating high-quality M/EEG signals from visual stimuli.

ai.tldr: 提出ViBE框架，通过时空卷积VAE和分布对齐投影，从视觉刺激生成高质量的M/EEG信号。
ai.motivation: 现有脑编码模型在神经响应重建和跨模态对齐方面存在不足，难以支撑视觉假体等应用。
ai.method: 设计时空卷积VAE（TSC-VAE）捕捉M/EEG时空特征；用Q-Former将CLIP图像嵌入映射到TSC-VAE潜空间得到神经代理嵌入；结合MSE损失和切片Wasserstein距离进行逐点特征匹配与概率分布对齐。
ai.result: 在THINGS-EEG2和THINGS-MEG数据集上验证了生成高质量M/EEG信号的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用视觉刺激生成脑电/脑磁信号，为脑机接口和视觉假体研究提供方法参考。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Q-Former替换为更轻量的跨模态映射模块，或引入对抗训练增强生成信号的逼真度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖CLIP预训练特征，可能限制对特定视觉刺激的泛化能力；分布对齐计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受跨模态对齐和生成式VAE启发，将视觉特征与神经潜空间对齐的思路可推广至多模态学习。

zh.tldr: 提出ViBE框架，通过时空卷积VAE和分布对齐投影，从视觉刺激生成高质量的M/EEG信号。
zh.motivation: 现有脑编码模型在神经响应重建和跨模态对齐方面存在不足，难以支撑视觉假体等应用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Q-Former替换为更轻量的跨模态映射模块，或引入对抗训练增强生成信号的逼真度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖CLIP预训练特征，可能限制对特定视觉刺激的泛化能力；分布对齐计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受跨模态对齐和生成式VAE启发，将视觉特征与神经潜空间对齐的思路可推广至多模态学习。

en.tldr: Proposes ViBE, a framework that generates high-quality M/EEG signals from visual stimuli using spatio-temporal VAE and distribution-aligned projection.
en.motivation: Existing brain encoding models struggle with faithful neural response reconstruction and cross-modal alignment, limiting applications like visual prostheses.
en.method: Designs a spatio-temporal convolutional VAE (TSC-VAE) to capture M/EEG spatio-temporal features; uses Q-Former to map CLIP image embeddings to the TSC-VAE latent space, producing neural proxy embeddings; combines MSE loss for point-wise matching and sliced Wasserstein distance for distribution alignment.
en.result: Demonstrates effectiveness on THINGS-EEG2 and THINGS-MEG datasets in generating high-quality M/EEG signals.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method for generating EEG/MEG signals from visual stimuli, aiding brain-computer interfaces and visual prosthesis research.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing Q-Former with a lighter cross-modal mapping module, or incorporate adversarial training to enhance signal fidelity.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on CLIP pre-trained features may limit generalization to specific visual stimuli; distribution alignment incurs computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by cross-modal alignment and generative VAEs, aligning visual features with neural latent spaces can be extended to multimodal learning.

papers.title: FASH-iCNN: Making Editorial Fashion Identity Inspectable Through Multimodal CNN Probing
papers.summary: Fashion AI systems routinely encode the aesthetic logic of specific houses, editors, and historical moments without disclosing it. We present FASH-iCNN, a multimodal system trained on 87,547 Vogue runway images across 15 fashion houses spanning 1991-2024 that makes this cultural logic inspectable. Given a photograph of a garment, the system recovers which house produced it, which era it belongs to, and which color tradition it reflects. A clothing-only model identifies the fashion house at 78.2% top-1 across 14 houses, the decade at 88.6% top-1, and the specific year at 58.3% top-1 across 34 years with a mean error of just 2.2 years. Probing which visual channels carry this signal reveals a sharp dissociation: removing color costs only 10.6pp of house identity accuracy, while removing texture costs 37.6pp, establishing texture and luminance as the primary carriers of editorial identity. FASH-iCNN treats editorial culture as the signal rather than background noise, identifying which houses, eras, and color traditions shaped each output so that users can see not just what the system predicts but which houses, editors, and historical moments are encoded in that prediction.

ai.tldr: 提出FASH-iCNN系统，基于8.7万张Vogue runway图像，可识别服装的时尚品牌、年代和色彩传统，并揭示纹理比颜色更承载品牌身份。
ai.motivation: 现有时尚AI系统隐含编码特定品牌和编辑的美学逻辑，但缺乏可解释性。
ai.method: 训练多模态CNN，对服装图像进行品牌（14个品牌78.2% top-1）、年代（34年58.3% top-1）和色彩传统分类，并通过消融实验分析视觉通道贡献。
ai.result: 纹理和亮度是品牌身份的主要载体（移除纹理损失37.6pp，移除颜色仅损失10.6pp）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解时尚AI预测背后的文化逻辑，而非仅得到黑箱结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将纹理-颜色分离策略用于其他视觉文化分类任务，如识别不同电影导演的视觉风格。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定数据集（Vogue runway），可能无法泛化至街头时尚或非西方时尚体系。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过消融实验揭示视觉特征的文化权重，启发文化计算中的可解释性设计。

zh.motivation: 现有时尚AI系统隐含编码特定品牌和编辑的美学逻辑，但缺乏可解释性。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解时尚AI预测背后的文化逻辑，而非仅得到黑箱结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将纹理-颜色分离策略用于其他视觉文化分类任务，如识别不同电影导演的视觉风格。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖特定数据集（Vogue runway），可能无法泛化至街头时尚或非西方时尚体系。
idea_spark.inspiration: 通过消融实验揭示视觉特征的文化权重，启发文化计算中的可解释性设计。

en.tldr: FASH-iCNN uses 87,547 Vogue runway images to identify fashion house, era, and color tradition, revealing texture as the primary carrier of editorial identity over color.
en.motivation: Fashion AI systems encode aesthetic logic of specific houses and editors without transparency.
en.method: Multimodal CNN trained on 15 fashion houses (1991-2024) for house (78.2% top-1), decade (88.6% top-1), and year (58.3% top-1) classification, with ablation probing visual channels.
en.result: Texture removal drops house accuracy by 37.6pp vs. 10.6pp for color, establishing texture and luminance as key identity carriers.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to inspect which cultural signals (house, era, color tradition) drive fashion AI predictions.

idea_spark.idea: Apply texture-color dissociation to classify visual styles of film directors or music video aesthetics.
idea_spark.risk: Dataset bias toward Western high fashion may limit generalization to non-Western or street fashion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Ablation studies reveal cultural weight of visual features, inspiring interpretability in cultural computing.

papers.title: Event-based Liveness Detection using Temporal Ocular Dynamics: An Exploratory Approach
papers.summary: Face liveness detection has been extensively studied using RGB cameras, achieving strong performance under controlled conditions but often failing to generalize across sensors and attack scenarios. In this work, we explore event cameras as an alternative sensing modality for liveness detection based on temporal ocular dynamics. Event cameras capture sparse, asynchronous changes in brightness with microsecond resolution, enabling precise analysis of fast eye movements such as saccades. Replay attacks cannot faithfully reproduce these dynamics due to temporal resampling and display artifacts, leading to distinctive spatio-temporal patterns in the event domain. We design a data collection protocol to extend RGBE-Gaze with replay-attack recordings, yielding an event-based fake counterpart for liveness detection. We analyze event-driven temporal features from eye regions and evaluate their effectiveness for ocular motion segmentation and liveness classification. Our results show that event-based representations enable reliable discrimination between genuine and replayed sequences, achieving up to 95.37% top-1 accuracy with a spiking convolutional neural network. These preliminary findings highlight the potential of event-based sensing for robust and low-latency liveness detection.

ai.tldr: 探索事件相机基于时间眼部动态进行活体检测，利用微秒级分辨率捕捉眼动，区分真实与重放攻击。
ai.motivation: 传统RGB活体检测在跨传感器和攻击场景下泛化能力不足，事件相机的高时间分辨率可捕捉重放攻击无法复现的眼动细节。
ai.method: 设计数据采集协议扩展RGBE-Gaze数据集，包含重放攻击记录；提取眼部区域事件驱动的时间特征，使用脉冲卷积神经网络进行活体分类。
ai.result: 事件表示能可靠区分真实与重放序列，脉冲CNN达到95.37%的top-1准确率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种基于事件相机的高鲁棒、低延迟活体检测方案，适用于安全敏感场景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合事件相机与脉冲神经网络，实现端到端的实时活体检测系统。
idea_spark.risk: 事件相机硬件成本较高，且数据集规模有限，可能影响模型泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用事件流中微秒级眼动模式作为生物特征，启发其他基于时间动态的防伪方法。

zh.tldr: 探索事件相机基于时间眼部动态进行活体检测，利用微秒级分辨率捕捉眼动，区分真实与重放攻击。
