idea_spark.risk: 事件相机硬件成本较高，且数据集规模有限，可能影响模型泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用事件流中微秒级眼动模式作为生物特征，启发其他基于时间动态的防伪方法。

en.tldr: Explores event cameras for liveness detection via temporal ocular dynamics, leveraging microsecond-resolution eye movements to distinguish genuine from replay attacks.
en.motivation: RGB-based liveness detection struggles with cross-sensor and attack generalization; event cameras' high temporal resolution captures eye dynamics that replay attacks cannot replicate.
en.method: Designed a data collection protocol extending RGBE-Gaze with replay-attack recordings; extracted event-driven temporal features from eye regions and used a spiking CNN for liveness classification.
en.result: Event representations reliably discriminate genuine and replayed sequences, achieving 95.37% top-1 accuracy with a spiking CNN.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust, low-latency liveness detection solution using event cameras, suitable for security-sensitive applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine event cameras with spiking neural networks for an end-to-end real-time liveness detection system.
idea_spark.risk: Event camera hardware cost is high, and limited dataset size may affect model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using microsecond-level eye movement patterns in event streams as biometrics inspires other anti-spoofing methods based on temporal dynamics.

papers.title: Camera-RFID Fusion for Robust Asset Tracking in Forested Environments
papers.summary: Passive RFID tags offer a cost-effective and scalable solution for tracking numerous deployed assets. However, in forested environments, signal attenuation and multipath effects generally limit RFID spatial accuracy to the meter level. Conversely, while cameras employing stereo vision can achieve centimeter-level precision, relying solely on computer vision fails to resolve issues arising from spatial association ambiguity and partial occlusions in dense settings. Fusing these modalities allows systems to harness the high-accuracy benefits of vision while retaining the robust, non-line-of-sight identification advantages of RFID. Yet, a primary challenge in achieving this, which is the central focus of this paper, lies in accurately associating the disparate trajectories generated by these two sensors. To overcome this limitation, we introduce a novel camera--RFID fusion framework that integrates depth and object information with advanced trajectory-matching algorithms. By successfully bridging the meter-to-centimeter accuracy gap, the proposed approach helps achieve reliable tag localization even when assets temporarily leave the camera's field of view. To the best of our knowledge, this represents the first application of camera--RFID fusion for asset tracking in natural forested environments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种相机与RFID融合的框架，在森林环境中实现鲁棒的资产跟踪，弥合米级与厘米级精度差距。
ai.motivation: 被动RFID标签在森林中精度仅米级，而纯视觉方法在密集场景下存在空间关联模糊和部分遮挡问题。
ai.method: 融合深度与物体信息，结合高级轨迹匹配算法，关联两种传感器的不同轨迹。
ai.result: 即使资产暂时离开相机视野，也能实现可靠的标签定位，首次在自然森林环境中应用相机-RFID融合。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多传感器融合在复杂户外环境中的优势与实现方式。

idea_spark.idea: 利用深度信息辅助轨迹关联，可进一步结合时序预测模型提升遮挡期间的定位连续性。
idea_spark.risk: 森林环境光照和遮挡变化剧烈，深度估计可能不稳定，影响匹配精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在农业、搜救等户外场景中采用类似融合策略，平衡成本与精度。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解多传感器融合在复杂户外环境中的优势与实现方式。

idea_spark.idea: 利用深度信息辅助轨迹关联，可进一步结合时序预测模型提升遮挡期间的定位连续性。
idea_spark.risk: 森林环境光照和遮挡变化剧烈，深度估计可能不稳定，影响匹配精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在农业、搜救等户外场景中采用类似融合策略，平衡成本与精度。

en.tldr: Proposes a camera-RFID fusion framework for robust asset tracking in forested environments, bridging the meter-to-centimeter accuracy gap.
en.motivation: Passive RFID tags have meter-level accuracy in forests, while pure vision suffers from spatial ambiguity and partial occlusions in dense settings.
en.method: Integrates depth and object information with advanced trajectory-matching algorithms to associate disparate sensor trajectories.
en.result: Achieves reliable tag localization even when assets temporarily leave the camera's field of view, first application of camera-RFID fusion in natural forests.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the advantages and implementation of multi-sensor fusion in complex outdoor environments.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging depth for trajectory association can be further combined with temporal prediction models to maintain localization continuity during occlusions.
idea_spark.risk: Depth estimation may be unstable under varying forest lighting and heavy occlusion, affecting matching accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires similar fusion strategies in outdoor applications like agriculture and search-and-rescue to balance cost and accuracy.

papers.title: DMRlib: Easy-coding and Efficient Resource Management for Job Malleability
papers.summary: Process malleability has proved to have a highly positive impact on the resource utilization and global productivity in data centers compared with the conventional static resource allocation policy. However, the non-negligible additional development effort this solution imposes has constrained its adoption by the scientific programming community. In this work, we present DMRlib, a library designed to offer the global advantages of process malleability while providing a minimalist MPI-like syntax. The library includes a series of predefined communication patterns that greatly ease the development of malleable applications. In addition, we deploy several scenarios to demonstrate the positive impact of process malleability featuring different scalability patterns. Concretely, we study two job submission modes (rigid and moldable) in order to identify the best-case scenarios for malleability using metrics such as resource allocation rate, completed jobs per second, and energy consumption. The experiments prove that our elastic approach may improve global throughput by a factor higher than 3x compared to the traditional workloads of non-malleable jobs.

ai.tldr: 提出DMRlib库，通过MPI风格接口实现进程可塑性，提升数据中心资源利用率和吞吐量。
ai.motivation: 传统静态资源分配策略导致资源利用率低，而进程可塑性虽能改善但开发成本高，阻碍科学编程社区采用。
ai.method: 设计DMRlib库，提供最小化MPI风格语法和预定义通信模式，简化可塑性应用开发；通过刚性和可塑两种作业提交模式实验评估性能。
ai.result: 弹性方法相比传统非可塑作业，全局吞吐量提升超过3倍，资源分配率、每秒完成作业数和能耗均有改善。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速实现可塑性作业调度，降低开发门槛，提升数据中心整体效率。

zh.method: 设计DMRlib库，提供最小化MPI风格语法和预定义通信模式，简化可塑性应用开发；通过刚性和可塑两种作业提交模式实验评估性能。

en.tldr: Proposes DMRlib, a library with MPI-like syntax for process malleability, improving resource utilization and throughput in data centers.
en.motivation: Static resource allocation leads to low utilization; malleability improves it but requires high development effort, hindering adoption.
en.method: Designs DMRlib with minimalist MPI-like syntax and predefined communication patterns to ease malleable application development; evaluates via rigid and moldable job submission modes.
en.result: Elastic approach improves global throughput by over 3x compared to non-malleable workloads, with better resource allocation rate, jobs completed per second, and energy consumption.
en.help_to_user: Helps users implement malleable job scheduling with low development effort, enhancing data center efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combine DMRlib's communication patterns with machine learning prediction for adaptive resource scaling.
idea_spark.risk: Predefined patterns may not cover all application needs; pattern library expansion is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage MPI ecosystem's ease of use to drive widespread adoption of malleability in HPC.

papers.title: Semantic Foam: Unifying Spatial and Semantic Scene Decomposition
papers.summary: Modern scene reconstruction methods, such as 3D Gaussian Splatting, enable photo-realistic novel view synthesis at real-time speeds. However, their adoption in interactive graphics applications remains limited due to the difficulty of interacting with these representations compared to traditional, human-authored 3D assets. While prior work has attempted to impose semantic decomposition on these models, significant challenges remain in segmentation quality and cross-view consistency.To address these limitations, we introduce Semantic Foam, which extends the recently proposed Radiant Foam representation to semantic decomposition tasks. Our approach leverages the inherent spatial structure of Radiant Foam's volumetric Voronoi mesh and augments it with an explicit semantic feature field defined at the cell level. This design enables direct spatial regularization, improving consistency across views and mitigating artifacts caused by occlusion and inconsistent supervision, which are common issues in point-based representations.Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves superior object-level segmentation performance compared to state-of-the-art approaches such as Gaussian Grouping and SAGA.Project page: http://semanticfoam.github.io/

ai.tldr: 提出Semantic Foam，在Radiant Foam的Voronoi网格上增加语义特征场，实现空间与语义统一分解，提升分割质量和跨视角一致性。
ai.motivation: 现有3D场景表示（如3D高斯泼溅）虽能实时渲染，但难以交互编辑；先前语义分解方法在分割质量和跨视角一致性上存在不足。
ai.method: 基于Radiant Foam的体素Voronoi网格结构，在单元级别定义显式语义特征场，利用空间正则化增强跨视角一致性并减少遮挡伪影。
ai.result: 在物体级分割任务上优于Gaussian Grouping和SAGA等现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将语义信息直接嵌入3D场景表示的方法，便于后续交互式编辑和图形应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Voronoi网格的几何结构作为语义特征的天然载体，避免点云表示中的不一致问题。
idea_spark.risk: Voronoi网格的构建和语义特征场的训练可能增加计算开销；对复杂场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Radiant Foam的空间结构出发，将语义视为与几何平行的场，启发更紧密的表示融合设计。

zh.tldr: 提出Semantic Foam，在Radiant Foam的Voronoi网格上增加语义特征场，实现空间与语义统一分解，提升分割质量和跨视角一致性。
zh.motivation: 现有3D场景表示（如3D高斯泼溅）虽能实时渲染，但难以交互编辑；先前语义分解方法在分割质量和跨视角一致性上存在不足。
zh.method: 基于Radiant Foam的体素Voronoi网格结构，在单元级别定义显式语义特征场，利用空间正则化增强跨视角一致性并减少遮挡伪影。
zh.result: 在物体级分割任务上优于Gaussian Grouping和SAGA等现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种将语义信息直接嵌入3D场景表示的方法，便于后续交互式编辑和图形应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Voronoi网格的几何结构作为语义特征的天然载体，避免点云表示中的不一致问题。
idea_spark.risk: Voronoi网格的构建和语义特征场的训练可能增加计算开销；对复杂场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Radiant Foam的空间结构出发，将语义视为与几何平行的场，启发更紧密的表示融合设计。

en.tldr: Semantic Foam extends Radiant Foam with an explicit semantic feature field on Voronoi cells, unifying spatial and semantic decomposition for improved segmentation consistency.
en.motivation: Modern 3D scene representations enable real-time rendering but lack editability; prior semantic decomposition methods suffer from poor segmentation quality and cross-view inconsistency.
en.method: Augments Radiant Foam's volumetric Voronoi mesh with a cell-level semantic feature field, using spatial regularization to enhance cross-view consistency and reduce occlusion artifacts.
en.result: Outperforms Gaussian Grouping and SAGA on object-level segmentation tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to embed semantic information directly into 3D scene representations, facilitating interactive editing and graphics applications.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the geometric structure of Voronoi cells as natural carriers for semantic features, avoiding inconsistencies in point-based representations.
idea_spark.risk: Constructing Voronoi meshes and training semantic fields may increase computational cost; generalization to complex scenes needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Radiant Foam's spatial structure, treating semantics as a field parallel to geometry suggests tighter representation fusion designs.

papers.title: A mathematical study of an elastic-viscous-plastic sea-ice model with the Kelvin-Voigt rheology
papers.summary: Motivated by the elastic-viscous-plastic (EVP) sea-ice model [E. C. Hunke and J. K. Dukowicz, J. Phys. Oceanogr., 27, 9 (1997), 1849--1867], which is used in large-scale numerical climate simulations, we proposed in [D. W. Boutros, X. Liu, M. Thomas and E. S. Titi, arXiv:2505.03080 (2025)] the use of the inviscid Voigt regularisation for the constitutive (stress-tensor) relation and proved the global well-posedness of the resulting model. The EVP model treats sea ice as a non-Newtonian fluid. In turn, elastic-viscous-plastic solids often involve a Kelvin-Voigt viscosity in terms of the strain rate. Therefore, in the present work we formulate an elastic-viscous-plastic sea-ice model with a Kelvin-Voigt regularisation in terms of the strain rate. In other words, we introduce the Voigt regularisation in the momentum balance rather than in the constitutive relation (for the stress tensor). We then prove the local well-posedness for the Kelvin-Voigt EVP model with the advection term, in the momentum balance, and the global well-posedness in the absence of the advection term (following a very standard approximation in the latter case). A crucial component of the proof of these results, is a new $L^\infty$-estimate for the stress tensor which relies on the damping structure. Note that, both with and without the advection term, we are able to handle the case of viscosity coefficients without a cutoff from above, which remains a major open problem for the closely related Hibler sea-ice model. We are also able to prove the existence of solutions for much less regular initial data compared to our previous paper on the Voigt-EVP model.

ai.tldr: 本文针对采用Kelvin-Voigt流变学的弹-粘-塑海冰模型，证明了含平流项时的局部适定性和无平流项时的全局适定性，并获得了应力张量的新L∞估计。
ai.motivation: 现有EVP海冰模型在气候模拟中广泛应用，但其数学适定性问题尚未完全解决，特别是粘度系数无上界情形。
ai.method: 在动量平衡中引入Kelvin-Voigt正则化（而非本构关系），利用阻尼结构推导应力张量的L∞估计，并分别处理含/不含平流项的情形。
ai.result: 证明了含平流项模型的局部适定性和无平流项模型的全局适定性；允许粘度系数无上界；初始数据正则性要求低于先前工作。
ai.help_to_user: 为海冰模型的数值模拟提供了严格的数学基础，特别是对无上界粘度系数的处理。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将阻尼结构L∞估计技术应用于Hibler模型或其他耦合海冰-海洋系统。
idea_spark.risk: 含平流项时仅得到局部适定性，全局适定性仍需进一步研究。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从EVP模型的Voigt正则化（本构关系）转向动量平衡中的Kelvin-Voigt正则化，展示了不同正则化位置对适定性结果的影响。

zh.tldr: 本文针对采用Kelvin-Voigt流变学的弹-粘-塑海冰模型，证明了含平流项时的局部适定性和无平流项时的全局适定性，并获得了应力张量的新L∞估计。
zh.motivation: 现有EVP海冰模型在气候模拟中广泛应用，但其数学适定性问题尚未完全解决，特别是粘度系数无上界情形。
zh.method: 在动量平衡中引入Kelvin-Voigt正则化（而非本构关系），利用阻尼结构推导应力张量的L∞估计，并分别处理含/不含平流项的情形。
zh.result: 证明了含平流项模型的局部适定性和无平流项模型的全局适定性；允许粘度系数无上界；初始数据正则性要求低于先前工作。
zh.help_to_user: 为海冰模型的数值模拟提供了严格的数学基础，特别是对无上界粘度系数的处理。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将阻尼结构L∞估计技术应用于Hibler模型或其他耦合海冰-海洋系统。
idea_spark.risk: 含平流项时仅得到局部适定性，全局适定性仍需进一步研究。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从EVP模型的Voigt正则化（本构关系）转向动量平衡中的Kelvin-Voigt正则化，展示了不同正则化位置对适定性结果的影响。

en.tldr: This paper proves local well-posedness with advection and global well-posedness without advection for an elastic-viscous-plastic sea-ice model with Kelvin-Voigt rheology, using a new L∞ estimate for the stress tensor.
en.motivation: The EVP sea-ice model is widely used in climate simulations, but its mathematical well-posedness, especially for unbounded viscosity coefficients, remains an open problem.
en.method: Introduce Kelvin-Voigt regularization in the momentum balance (instead of the constitutive relation), derive an L∞ estimate for the stress tensor via damping structure, and treat cases with/without advection separately.
en.result: Local well-posedness with advection and global well-posedness without advection; viscosity coefficients can be unbounded; initial data can be less regular than in previous work.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical foundation for numerical sea-ice models, particularly handling unbounded viscosity coefficients.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying the damping-structure L∞ estimate technique to the Hibler model or coupled sea-ice-ocean systems.
idea_spark.risk: Only local well-posedness is obtained with advection; global well-posedness in that case remains open.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shifting Voigt regularization from the constitutive relation to the momentum balance yields different well-posedness results, highlighting the impact of regularization placement.

papers.title: HOI-aware Adaptive Network for Weakly-supervised Action Segmentation
papers.summary: In this paper, we propose an HOI-aware adaptive network named AdaAct for weakly-supervised action segmentation. Most existing methods learn a fixed network to predict the action of each frame with the neighboring frames. However, this would result in ambiguity when estimating similar actions, such as pouring juice and pouring coffee. To address this, we aim to exploit temporally global but spatially local human-object interactions (HOI) as video-level prior knowledge for action segmentation. The long-term HOI sequence provides crucial contextual information to distinguish ambiguous actions, where our network dynamically adapts to the given HOI sequence at test time. More specifically, we first design a video HOI encoder that extracts, selects, and integrates the most representative HOI throughout the video. Then, we propose a two-branch HyperNetwork to learn an adaptive temporal encoder, which automatically adjusts the parameters based on the HOI information of various videos on the fly. Extensive experiments on two widely-used datasets including Breakfast and 50Salads demonstrate the effectiveness of our method under different evaluation metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于人-物交互（HOI）的自适应网络AdaAct，用于弱监督动作分割，通过视频级HOI先验区分相似动作。
ai.motivation: 现有方法使用固定网络预测帧动作，在相似动作（如倒果汁与倒咖啡）上存在歧义，需要利用全局HOI信息来区分。
ai.method: 设计视频HOI编码器提取代表性交互，并采用双分支超网络根据HOI动态调整时序编码器参数。
ai.result: 在Breakfast和50Salads数据集上，该方法在多种评估指标下均优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用人-物交互先验提升弱监督动作分割的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将HOI先验与图神经网络结合，建模交互间的时空关系。
idea_spark.risk: HOI提取可能受视频质量影响，且超网络增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用视频级先验动态调整网络参数，启发其他弱监督任务中的自适应机制设计。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于人-物交互（HOI）的自适应网络AdaAct，用于弱监督动作分割，通过视频级HOI先验区分相似动作。
zh.motivation: 现有方法使用固定网络预测帧动作，在相似动作（如倒果汁与倒咖啡）上存在歧义，需要利用全局HOI信息来区分。
zh.method: 设计视频HOI编码器提取代表性交互，并采用双分支超网络根据HOI动态调整时序编码器参数。
zh.result: 在Breakfast和50Salads数据集上，该方法在多种评估指标下均优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用人-物交互先验提升弱监督动作分割的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将HOI先验与图神经网络结合，建模交互间的时空关系。
idea_spark.risk: HOI提取可能受视频质量影响，且超网络增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用视频级先验动态调整网络参数，启发其他弱监督任务中的自适应机制设计。

en.tldr: Proposes an HOI-aware adaptive network (AdaAct) for weakly-supervised action segmentation, leveraging video-level human-object interactions to disambiguate similar actions.
en.motivation: Existing fixed networks struggle with ambiguous actions like pouring juice vs. coffee; global HOI context is needed.
en.method: A video HOI encoder extracts representative interactions, and a two-branch HyperNetwork adapts the temporal encoder parameters on the fly.
en.result: Outperforms prior methods on Breakfast and 50Salads datasets under multiple metrics.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage human-object interaction priors to improve weakly-supervised action segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining HOI priors with graph neural networks to model spatiotemporal relationships among interactions.
idea_spark.risk: HOI extraction may be sensitive to video quality, and HyperNet adds computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using video-level priors to dynamically adjust network parameters inspires adaptive mechanisms in other weakly-supervised tasks.

papers.title: SnapPose3D: Diffusion-Based Single-Frame 2D-to-3D Lifting of Human Poses
papers.summary: Depth ambiguity and joint uncertainty are the two main obstacles in obtaining accurate human pose predictions by 2D-to-3D lifting methods proposed in the literature. In particular, these issues are caused by 2D joint locations that can be mapped to multiple 3D positions, inducing multiple possible final poses. Following these considerations, we propose leveraging diffusion-based models generation capability to predict multiple hypotheses and aggregate them in a final accurate pose. Therefore, we introduce SnapPose3D, a pose-lifting framework trained deterministically to denoise 3D poses conditioned on both visual context and 2D pose features. SnapPose3D adopts a probabilistic approach during inference, generating multiple hypotheses through random sampling from a unit Gaussian distribution. Unlike most previous methods that address pose ambiguity by processing temporal sequences, SnapPose3D uses single frames as input, avoiding tracking and limiting computational cost, data acquisition complexity, and the need for online, real-time applications. We extensively evaluate SnapPose3D on well-known benchmarks for the 3D human pose estimation task showing its ability to generate and aggregate accurate hypotheses that lead to state-of-the-art results.

ai.tldr: 提出SnapPose3D，基于扩散模型的单帧2D到3D人体姿态提升方法，通过生成多个假设并聚合得到准确3D姿态。
ai.motivation: 现有2D到3D姿态提升方法受深度模糊和关节不确定性影响，单帧输入下尤其严重。
ai.method: 采用扩散模型，训练时确定性去噪，推理时从高斯分布采样生成多个假设并聚合。
ai.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进水平，证明生成和聚合假设的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需时序信息、低计算成本的单帧3D姿态估计方案，适合实时应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散模型用于2D到3D姿态提升，通过随机采样生成多个候选并聚合，解决深度模糊。
idea_spark.risk: 多假设聚合可能引入额外计算开销，且对采样数量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受扩散模型在图像生成中处理多模态分布的启发，将其应用于姿态估计中的不确定性建模。

zh.tldr: 提出SnapPose3D，基于扩散模型的单帧2D到3D人体姿态提升方法，通过生成多个假设并聚合得到准确3D姿态。
zh.motivation: 现有2D到3D姿态提升方法受深度模糊和关节不确定性影响，单帧输入下尤其严重。
zh.method: 采用扩散模型，训练时确定性去噪，推理时从高斯分布采样生成多个假设并聚合。
zh.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进水平，证明生成和聚合假设的有效性。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需时序信息、低计算成本的单帧3D姿态估计方案，适合实时应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散模型用于2D到3D姿态提升，通过随机采样生成多个候选并聚合，解决深度模糊。
idea_spark.risk: 多假设聚合可能引入额外计算开销，且对采样数量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受扩散模型在图像生成中处理多模态分布的启发，将其应用于姿态估计中的不确定性建模。

en.tldr: Proposes SnapPose3D, a diffusion-based single-frame 2D-to-3D pose lifting method that generates and aggregates multiple hypotheses for accurate 3D pose estimation.
en.motivation: Existing 2D-to-3D lifting methods suffer from depth ambiguity and joint uncertainty, especially with single-frame input.
en.method: Uses a diffusion model trained deterministically to denoise 3D poses conditioned on visual and 2D features; during inference, samples multiple hypotheses from a Gaussian and aggregates them.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness of hypothesis generation and aggregation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-cost, real-time capable single-frame 3D pose estimation solution without temporal tracking.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage diffusion models for 2D-to-3D pose lifting by generating multiple candidates via random sampling and aggregating them to resolve depth ambiguity.
idea_spark.risk: Aggregating multiple hypotheses may introduce extra computation and is sensitive to the number of samples.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by diffusion models' ability to handle multimodal distributions in image generation, applied to uncertainty modeling in pose estimation.

papers.title: Benchmarking Complex Multimodal Document Processing Pipelines: A Unified Evaluation Framework for Enterprise AI
papers.summary: Most enterprise document AI today is a pipeline. Parse, index, retrieve, generate. Each of those stages has been studied to death on its own -- what's still hard is evaluating the system as a whole.   We built EnterpriseDocBench to take a swing at it: parsing fidelity, indexing efficiency, retrieval relevance, and generation groundedness, all on the same corpus. The corpus is built from public, permissively licensed documents across six enterprise domains (five represented in the current pilot). We ran three pipelines through it -- BM25, dense embedding, and a hybrid -- all with the same GPT-5 generator.   The headline numbers: hybrid retrieval narrowly beats BM25 (nDCG@5 of 0.92 vs. 0.91), and both beat dense embedding (0.83). Hallucination doesn't grow monotonically with document length -- short documents and very long ones both hallucinate more than medium ones (28.1% and 23.8% vs. 9.2%). Cross-stage correlations are very weak: parsing->retrieval r=0.14, parsing->generation r=0.17, retrieval->generation 0.02. If quality were cascading the way most of us assume, those numbers would be much higher; they aren't. Design caveats are real (parsing fixed, generator shared, automated proxy metrics) and we don't oversell the result.   One result that genuinely surprised us: factual accuracy on stated claims is 85.5%, but answer completeness averages 0.40. The system is right when it answers -- it just leaves things out. That gap matters more for real deployments than the headline accuracy number does.   We also describe three reference architectures (ColPali, ColQwen2, agentic complexity-based routing) which are not yet integrated end-to-end. Framework, metrics, baselines, and collection scripts will be released open-source on acceptance.

ai.tldr: 提出企业文档AI全流水线评估基准EnterpriseDocBench，发现各阶段质量相关性弱，且答案完整性远低于事实准确性。
ai.motivation: 现有研究孤立评估文档AI的解析、索引、检索、生成各阶段，缺乏端到端系统级评估方法。
ai.method: 构建包含6个企业领域文档的语料库，设计解析保真度、索引效率、检索相关性、生成忠实度四类指标，在BM25、稠密嵌入、混合检索三种流水线上统一评估。
ai.result: 混合检索略优于BM25（nDCG@5 0.92 vs 0.91），两者均优于稠密嵌入（0.83）；幻觉率在中等长度文档最低（9.2%）；跨阶段相关性极弱（r<0.2）；事实准确性85.5%但答案完整性仅0.40。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解企业文档AI流水线评估的复杂性，指出常见假设（如质量级联）可能不成立，并强调答案完整性比准确性更关键。

idea_spark.idea: 设计动态路由机制，根据文档长度和阶段质量预测，在流水线中自适应选择检索策略或生成参数。
idea_spark.risk: 动态路由可能引入额外延迟和复杂度，且跨阶段相关性弱意味着路由决策依据需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 答案完整性与准确性之间的巨大差距提示：未来可探索分步生成或迭代细化策略，先确保覆盖再优化精确度。

en.tldr: Proposes EnterpriseDocBench for end-to-end evaluation of enterprise document AI pipelines, revealing weak cross-stage correlations and a large gap between factual accuracy (85.5%) and answer completeness (0.40).
en.motivation: Existing research evaluates parsing, indexing, retrieval, and generation stages in isolation, lacking a holistic system-level evaluation method.
en.method: Constructs a corpus of permissively licensed documents across six enterprise domains, defines four metrics (parsing fidelity, indexing efficiency, retrieval relevance, generation groundedness), and evaluates three pipelines (BM25, dense embedding, hybrid) with a shared GPT-5 generator.
en.result: Hybrid retrieval slightly outperforms BM25 (nDCG@5 0.92 vs 0.91), both beat dense embedding (0.83); hallucination is lowest for medium-length documents (9.2%); cross-stage correlations are very weak (r<0.2); factual accuracy is 85.5% but answer completeness averages 0.40.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the complexity of evaluating enterprise document AI pipelines, challenges common assumptions like quality cascading, and highlights answer completeness as a more critical metric than accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Design a dynamic routing mechanism that adaptively selects retrieval strategies or generation parameters based on document length and stage quality predictions.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic routing may introduce additional latency and complexity, and the weak cross-stage correlations mean routing decisions need careful validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The large gap between answer completeness and accuracy suggests exploring stepwise generation or iterative refinement strategies to ensure coverage before optimizing precision.

papers.title: Evaluation Revisited: A Taxonomy of Evaluation Concerns in Natural Language Processing
papers.summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have prompted a growing body of work that questions the methodology of prevailing evaluation practices. However, many such critiques have already been extensively debated in natural language processing (NLP): a field with a long history of methodological reflection on evaluation. We conduct a scoping review of research on evaluation concerns in NLP and develop a taxonomy, synthesizing recurring positions and trade-offs within each area. We also discuss practical implications of the taxonomy, including a structured checklist to support more deliberate evaluation design and interpretation. By situating contemporary debates within their historical context, this work provides a consolidated reference for reasoning about evaluation practices.

ai.tldr: 本文对自然语言处理中的评估问题进行范围综述，构建了一个分类体系，并提供了结构化清单以支持更审慎的评估设计与解读。
ai.motivation: 大型语言模型的进展引发了对当前评估实践的质疑，但许多批评在NLP领域已有长期讨论，需要系统梳理。
ai.method: 采用范围综述方法，收集并分析NLP中关于评估问题的研究，归纳出分类体系，并讨论其实际应用。
ai.result: 提出了一个涵盖评估关注点的分类体系，以及用于指导评估设计与解读的结构化清单。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者理解NLP评估中的常见争议与权衡，并提供实用工具以改进评估实践。

idea_spark.idea: 基于该分类体系，开发一个交互式评估设计工具，引导用户逐步选择评估维度并生成定制化清单。
idea_spark.risk: 分类体系可能过于抽象，难以覆盖所有新兴评估场景；结构化清单可能被机械套用而忽略领域特殊性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴社会科学中的系统评价方法，将评估问题视为研究设计的一部分，而非事后检验。

en.tldr: This paper conducts a scoping review of evaluation concerns in NLP, develops a taxonomy, and provides a structured checklist to support more deliberate evaluation design and interpretation.
en.motivation: Advances in large language models have prompted critiques of current evaluation practices, but many of these critiques have been long debated in NLP, necessitating a systematic synthesis.
en.method: A scoping review of research on evaluation concerns in NLP is conducted, synthesizing recurring positions and trade-offs into a taxonomy, with discussion of practical implications.
en.result: A taxonomy of evaluation concerns and a structured checklist for guiding evaluation design and interpretation are presented.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers understand common debates and trade-offs in NLP evaluation, and provides a practical tool to improve evaluation practices.

idea_spark.idea: Develop an interactive evaluation design tool based on the taxonomy that guides users through selecting evaluation dimensions and generates customized checklists.
idea_spark.risk: The taxonomy may be too abstract to cover all emerging evaluation scenarios; the checklist might be applied mechanically without considering domain-specific nuances.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from systematic review methods in social sciences to treat evaluation as an integral part of research design rather than a post-hoc check.

papers.title: GateMOT: Q-Gated Attention for Dense Object Tracking
papers.summary: While large models demonstrate the strong representational power of vanilla attention, this core mechanism cannot be directly applied to Dense Object Tracking: its quadratic all-to-all interactions are computationally prohibitive for dense motion estimation on high-resolution features. This mismatch prevents Dense Object Tracking from fully leveraging attention-based modeling in crowded and occlusion-heavy scenes. To address this challenge, we introduce GateMOT, an online tracking framework centered on Q-Gated Attention (Q-Attention), an efficient and spatially aware attention variant. Our key idea is to repurpose the Query from a similarity-conditioning term into a learnable gating unit. This Gating-Query (Gating-Q) produces a probabilistic gate that modulates Key features in an element-wise manner, enabling explicit relevance selection instead of costly global aggregation. Built on this mechanism, parallel Q-Attention heads transform one shared feature map into task-specific yet consistent representations for detection, motion, and re-identification, yielding a tightly coupled multi-task decoder with linear-complexity gating operations. GateMOT achieves state-of-the-art HOTA of 48.4, MOTA of 67.8, and IDF1 of 64.5 on BEE24, and demonstrates strong performance on additional Dense Object Tracking benchmarks. These results show that Q-Attention is a simple, effective, and transferable building block for attention-based tracking in dense tracking scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出GateMOT框架，通过Q-Gated Attention实现高效密集目标跟踪，在BEE24等基准上达到最优。
ai.motivation: 标准注意力机制在密集目标跟踪中计算成本过高，无法直接用于高分辨率特征上的密集运动估计。
ai.method: 将Query重设计为可学习的门控单元（Gating-Q），以线性复杂度的逐元素门控替代全局聚合，并构建并行Q-Attention多头解码器。
ai.result: 在BEE24上HOTA 48.4、MOTA 67.8、IDF1 64.5，并在多个密集跟踪基准上表现优异。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效且可迁移的注意力变体，适用于拥挤和遮挡场景下的在线多目标跟踪。

idea_spark.idea: 将门控机制与多头注意力结合，实现任务特定且一致的表示学习，同时保持线性复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 门控机制可能在某些场景下丢失全局上下文信息，需验证其泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从相似性条件化转向门控选择，启发其他注意力变体的设计思路。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从相似性条件化转向门控选择，启发其他注意力变体的设计思路。

en.tldr: Proposes GateMOT with Q-Gated Attention for efficient dense object tracking, achieving state-of-the-art on BEE24 and other benchmarks.
en.motivation: Standard attention is computationally prohibitive for dense motion estimation on high-resolution features in crowded scenes.
en.method: Redesigns Query as a learnable gating unit (Gating-Q) with element-wise modulation, replacing costly global aggregation, and builds parallel Q-Attention heads for a multi-task decoder.
en.result: Achieves HOTA 48.4, MOTA 67.8, IDF1 64.5 on BEE24, with strong performance on additional dense tracking benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Offers an efficient and transferable attention variant for online multi-object tracking in crowded and occlusion-heavy scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combines gating with multi-head attention for task-specific yet consistent representations with linear complexity.
idea_spark.risk: Gating may lose global context in some scenarios; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shifting from similarity conditioning to gating selection inspires new attention design paradigms.

papers.title: EnerGS: Energy-Based Gaussian Splatting with Partial Geometric Priors
papers.summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has been widely adopted for scene reconstruction, where training inherently constitutes a highly coupled and non-convex optimization problem. Recent works commonly incorporate geometric priors, such as LiDAR measurements, either for initialization or as training constraints, with the goal of improving photometric reconstruction quality. However, in large-scale outdoor scenarios, such geometric supervision is often spatially incomplete and uneven, which limits its effectiveness as a reliable prior and can even be detrimental to the final reconstruction. To address this challenge, we model partially observable geometry as a continuous energy field induced by geometric evidence and propose EnerGS. Rather than enforcing geometry as a hard constraint, EnerGS provides a soft geometric guidance for the optimization of Gaussian primitives, allowing geometric information to steer the optimization process without directly restricting the solution space. Extensive experiments on large-scale outdoor scenes demonstrate that, under both sparse multi-view and monocular settings, EnerGS consistently improves photometric quality and geometric stability, while effectively mitigating overfitting during 3DGS training.

ai.tldr: 提出EnerGS，利用能量场建模部分几何先验，软引导3D高斯溅射优化，提升大场景重建质量。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖完整几何先验（如LiDAR），但在大场景中先验常稀疏不均，硬约束反而有害。
ai.method: 将部分观测几何建模为连续能量场，作为软引导而非硬约束，指导高斯原语优化。
ai.result: 在稀疏多视角和单目设置下，均提升光度质量和几何稳定性，缓解过拟合。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种处理不完整几何先验的通用框架，适用于大场景3D重建。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何先验的不确定性显式编码为能量场，实现自适应引导。
idea_spark.risk: 能量场设计依赖先验质量，极端稀疏时可能引导不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受能量基模型启发，将几何约束从硬约束转为概率软约束。

zh.tldr: 提出EnerGS，利用能量场建模部分几何先验，软引导3D高斯溅射优化，提升大场景重建质量。

en.tldr: Proposes EnerGS, which models partial geometric priors as a continuous energy field to softly guide 3D Gaussian Splatting optimization, improving reconstruction quality in large-scale outdoor scenes.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on complete geometric priors (e.g., LiDAR), but in large scenes priors are often sparse and uneven, making hard constraints detrimental.
en.method: Models partially observed geometry as a continuous energy field, providing soft guidance instead of hard constraints for Gaussian primitive optimization.
en.result: Under both sparse multi-view and monocular settings, consistently improves photometric quality and geometric stability, mitigating overfitting.
en.help_to_user: Offers a general framework for handling incomplete geometric priors in large-scale 3D reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly encode uncertainty of geometric priors into an energy field for adaptive guidance.
idea_spark.risk: Energy field design depends on prior quality; extremely sparse priors may lead to insufficient guidance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by energy-based models, shifting geometric constraints from hard to probabilistic soft constraints.

papers.title: SpecTr-GBV: Multi-Draft Block Verification Accelerating Speculative Decoding
papers.summary: Autoregressive language models suffer from high inference latency due to their sequential decoding nature. Speculative decoding (SD) mitigates this by employing a lightweight draft model to propose candidate tokens, which are selectively verified by a larger target model. While existing methods either adopt multi-draft strategies to increase acceptance rates or block verification techniques to jointly verify multiple tokens, they remain limited by treating these improvements in isolation. In this work, we propose SpecTr-GBV, a novel SD method that unifies multi-draft and greedy block verification (GBV) into a single framework. By formulating the verification step as an optimal transport problem over draft and target token blocks, SpecTr-GBV improves both theoretical efficiency and empirical performance. We theoretically prove that SpecTr-GBV achieves the optimal expected acceptance length physically attainable within the framework of i.i.d. draft generation, and this bound improves as the number of drafts increases. Empirically, we evaluate SpecTr-GBV across five datasets and four baselines. Our method achieves superior speedup and significantly higher block efficiency while preserving output quality. In addition, we perform comprehensive ablation studies to evaluate the impact of various hyperparameters in the model.

ai.tldr: 提出SpecTr-GBV，将多草稿与贪婪块验证统一为最优传输问题，加速自回归语言模型推理。
ai.motivation: 现有推测解码方法将多草稿策略与块验证技术孤立处理，未能充分发挥两者协同潜力。
ai.method: 将验证步骤建模为草稿与目标令牌块间的最优传输问题，实现多草稿贪婪块验证的统一框架。
ai.result: 在五个数据集上相比四种基线获得更优加速比和块效率，且保持输出质量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过统一多草稿与块验证来提升推测解码的推理速度。

idea_spark.idea: 将验证步骤形式化为最优传输问题，理论上达到独立同分布草稿生成下的最优期望接受长度。
idea_spark.risk: 多草稿生成可能增加计算开销，需平衡草稿数量与加速收益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优传输理论中获得灵感，将验证视为匹配问题，突破传统逐令牌或孤立块验证的局限。

idea_spark.risk: 多草稿生成可能增加计算开销，需平衡草稿数量与加速收益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从最优传输理论中获得灵感，将验证视为匹配问题，突破传统逐令牌或孤立块验证的局限。

en.tldr: SpecTr-GBV unifies multi-draft and greedy block verification via optimal transport to accelerate autoregressive language model inference.
en.motivation: Existing speculative decoding methods treat multi-draft strategies and block verification in isolation, missing their synergistic potential.
en.method: Formulates the verification step as an optimal transport problem between draft and target token blocks, enabling a unified multi-draft greedy block verification framework.
en.result: Achieves superior speedup and block efficiency over four baselines on five datasets while preserving output quality.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how unifying multi-draft and block verification can boost speculative decoding inference speed.

idea_spark.idea: Formalizes verification as an optimal transport problem, theoretically achieving the optimal expected acceptance length under i.i.d. draft generation.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-draft generation may increase computational overhead; trade-off between draft count and speedup must be managed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by optimal transport theory to treat verification as a matching problem, overcoming limitations of token-by-token or isolated block verification.

papers.title: State Beyond Appearance: Diagnosing and Improving State Consistency in Dial-Based Measurement Reading
papers.summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive progress on general multimodal tasks, yet they remain brittle on dial-based measurement reading. In this paper, we study this problem through controlled benchmarks and feature-space probing, and show that current MLLMs not only achieve unsatisfactory accuracy on dial-based readout, but also suffer sharp performance drops under viewpoint and illumination changes even when the underlying dial state remains fixed. Our probing analysis further reveals that same-state samples under appearance variation are not consistently clustered, while neighboring states fail to preserve the local structure implied by continuous dial values. These findings suggest that existing MLLMs largely ignore the intrinsic state geometry of dial measurement tasks and instead rely on superficial appearance cues. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose TriSCA, a tri-level state-consistent alignment framework for dial-based measurement reading. Specifically, TriSCA consists of state-distance-aware representation alignment, metadata-grounded observation-to-state supervision, and state-aware objective alignment. Extensive ablation studies and evaluation experiments on controlled clock and gauge benchmarks, together with evaluation on an external real-world benchmark, demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.

ai.tldr: 本文诊断了多模态大模型在表盘读数任务中依赖外观线索而忽略状态几何的问题，并提出三层次状态一致性对齐框架TriSCA。
ai.motivation: 现有MLLM在表盘读数上准确率低，且对视角和光照变化敏感，同一状态样本在特征空间中不聚类，相邻状态不保持连续值结构。
ai.method: 提出TriSCA，包含状态距离感知表示对齐、元数据引导的观测到状态监督、状态感知目标对齐三个层次。
ai.result: 在受控时钟和仪表基准以及外部真实基准上，消融和评估实验验证了方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解表盘读数任务中MLLM的脆弱性根源，并提供一种提升状态一致性的对齐方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用元数据（如真实状态值）作为监督信号，强制模型学习状态几何而非外观特征。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖元数据标注，在无标注场景下可能难以直接应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受特征空间探测中状态聚类失败启发，设计显式状态距离约束来保持局部结构。

en.tldr: This paper diagnoses that MLLMs rely on superficial appearance cues rather than intrinsic state geometry in dial-based measurement reading, and proposes TriSCA, a tri-level state-consistent alignment framework.
en.motivation: Current MLLMs achieve low accuracy on dial reading and suffer sharp performance drops under viewpoint and illumination changes; same-state samples are not clustered and neighboring states fail to preserve continuous value structure in feature space.
en.method: TriSCA consists of state-distance-aware representation alignment, metadata-grounded observation-to-state supervision, and state-aware objective alignment.
en.result: Extensive ablation and evaluation on controlled clock/gauge benchmarks and an external real-world benchmark demonstrate effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the root cause of MLLM brittleness in dial reading and provides an alignment method to improve state consistency.

idea_spark.idea: Use metadata (e.g., ground-truth state values) as supervision to force the model to learn state geometry rather than appearance features.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on metadata annotations, which may be unavailable in unlabeled scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the observation that same-state samples fail to cluster in feature space, explicit state-distance constraints are designed to preserve local structure.

papers.title: Structural Generalization on SLOG without Hand-Written Rules
papers.summary: Structural generalization in semantic parsing requires systems to apply learned compositional rules to novel structural combinations. Existing approaches either rely on hand-written algebraic rules (AM-Parser) or fail to generalize structurally (Transformer-based models). We present an alternative requiring no hand-written compositional rules, based on a neural cellular automaton (NCA) with a discrete bottleneck: all compositional rules are learned from data through local iteration. On the SLOG benchmark, the system achieves 100% type-exact match on 11 of 17 structural generalization categories, including three where AM-Parser scores 0 to 74%, with an overall standard deviation of 0.2 across 10 seeds (vs. AM-Parser's 4.3). Analysis reveals that all 5,539 failure instances reduce to exactly two mechanisms: novel combinations of wh-extraction context with reduced verb types, and modifiers appearing on the subject side of verbs.When we decompose results by CCG structural features, each sub-pattern either succeeds on all instances or fails on all. Intermediate scores (e.g., 41.4%) are mixtures of structurally distinct CCG patterns, not partial generalization.All failures correspond to directed operations absent from training; all successes correspond to operations already covered.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需手工编写规则的神经细胞自动机模型，在SLOG基准上实现结构泛化，11/17类别达到100%精确匹配。
ai.motivation: 现有语义解析方法要么依赖手工编写的代数规则（如AM-Parser），要么无法实现结构泛化（如Transformer），需要一种无需手工规则的替代方案。
ai.method: 采用带有离散瓶颈的神经细胞自动机（NCA），所有组合规则从数据中通过局部迭代学习。
ai.result: 在SLOG基准上，17个结构泛化类别中有11个达到100%类型精确匹配，包括AM-Parser得分为0-74%的三个类别；10次种子运行的标准差为0.2（AM-Parser为4.3）。所有失败实例归结为两种机制：wh-提取语境与简化动词类型的新组合，以及动词主语侧的修饰语。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何在不依赖手工规则的情况下实现结构泛化，为语义解析和组合学习提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将NCA与离散表示结合，通过局部规则迭代实现全局结构泛化，避免手工规则。
idea_spark.risk: 当前模型在特定未见操作（如wh-提取与简化动词组合）上失败，可能限制其泛化边界。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从CCG结构特征分解结果中，观察到成功/失败完全由训练中是否覆盖对应操作决定，提示可设计更系统的训练数据覆盖策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a neural cellular automaton with discrete bottleneck that achieves structural generalization on SLOG without hand-written rules, reaching 100% exact match on 11/17 categories.
en.motivation: Existing semantic parsing methods either rely on hand-written algebraic rules (e.g., AM-Parser) or fail at structural generalization (e.g., Transformers), necessitating an alternative without manual rules.
en.method: Uses a neural cellular automaton (NCA) with a discrete bottleneck, where all compositional rules are learned from data through local iteration.
en.result: On the SLOG benchmark, achieves 100% type-exact match on 11 of 17 structural generalization categories, including three where AM-Parser scores 0-74%; standard deviation of 0.2 across 10 seeds (vs. AM-Parser's 4.3). All 5,539 failures reduce to two mechanisms: novel combinations of wh-extraction context with reduced verb types, and modifiers on the subject side of verbs.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to achieve structural generalization without hand-written rules, offering insights for semantic parsing and compositional learning.

idea_spark.idea: Combine NCA with discrete representations to achieve global structural generalization via local rule iteration, avoiding hand-crafted rules.
idea_spark.risk: The model fails on specific unseen operations (e.g., wh-extraction with reduced verbs), potentially limiting its generalization boundary.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing results by CCG structural features reveals that success/failure is entirely determined by whether the corresponding operation was covered in training, suggesting systematic training data coverage strategies.

papers.title: Operating-Layer Controls for Onchain Language-Model Agents Under Real Capital
papers.summary: We study reliability in autonomous language-model agents that translate user mandates into validated tool actions under real capital. The setting is DX Terminal Pro, a 21-day deployment in which 3,505 user-funded agents traded real ETH in a bounded onchain market. Users configured vaults through structured controls and natural-language strategies, but only agents could choose normal buy/sell trades. The system produced 7.5M agent invocations, roughly 300K onchain actions, about $20M in volume, more than 5,000 ETH deployed, roughly 70B inference tokens, and 99.9% settlement success for policy-valid submitted transactions. Long-running agents accumulated thousands of sequential decisions, including 6,000+ prompt-state-action cycles for continuously active agents, yielding a large-scale trace from user mandate to rendered prompt, reasoning, validation, portfolio state, and settlement. Reliability did not come from the base model alone; it emerged from the operating layer around the model: prompt compilation, typed controls, policy validation, execution guards, memory design, and trace-level observability. Pre-launch testing exposed failures that text-only benchmarks rarely measure, including fabricated trading rules, fee paralysis, numeric anchoring, cadence trading, and misread tokenomics. Targeted harness changes reduced fabricated sell rules from 57% to 3%, reduced fee-led observations from 32.5% to below 10%, and increased capital deployment from 42.9% to 78.0% in an affected test population. We show that capital-managing agents should be evaluated across the full path from user mandate to prompt, validated action, and settlement.

ai.tldr: 研究了在真实资本下自主语言模型代理的操作层控制，通过21天部署验证了系统可靠性。
ai.motivation: 确保语言模型代理在管理真实资本时能够可靠执行用户指令，避免因模型幻觉导致的经济损失。
ai.method: 构建操作层（提示编译、类型控制、策略验证、执行守卫、内存设计、追踪可观测性），并在DX Terminal Pro上进行21天部署测试。
ai.result: 系统处理了750万次代理调用、约30万次链上操作、2000万美元交易量，结算成功率99.9%；通过针对性调整将虚构卖出规则从57%降至3%，资本部署率从42.9%提升至78.0%。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了如何通过操作层控制提升语言模型代理在金融场景中的可靠性，为构建安全自主交易系统提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个通用操作层模板，包含策略验证、执行守卫和可观测性模块，供不同领域的语言模型代理复用。
idea_spark.risk: 操作层可能过度约束代理灵活性，导致在复杂动态环境中性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从金融交易中的风控机制获得启发，将类似的多层防护思想应用于AI代理的可靠性保障。

en.tldr: We study operating-layer controls for autonomous language-model agents managing real capital, validated through a 21-day deployment with high reliability.
en.motivation: To ensure language-model agents reliably execute user mandates under real capital, preventing economic losses from model hallucinations.
en.method: We built an operating layer (prompt compilation, typed controls, policy validation, execution guards, memory design, trace-level observability) and deployed it on DX Terminal Pro for 21 days.
en.result: The system handled 7.5M agent invocations, ~300K onchain actions, $20M volume, with 99.9% settlement success; targeted changes reduced fabricated sell rules from 57% to 3% and increased capital deployment from 42.9% to 78.0%.
en.help_to_user: This demonstrates how operating-layer controls enhance reliability of language-model agents in financial settings, offering a blueprint for safe autonomous trading systems.

idea_spark.idea: Design a generic operating-layer template with policy validation, execution guards, and observability modules for reuse across different language-model agent applications.
idea_spark.risk: The operating layer may overly constrain agent flexibility, leading to performance degradation in complex dynamic environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by risk management mechanisms in financial trading, we apply similar multi-layered safeguards to ensure AI agent reliability.

papers.title: Reachability-Based Design Optimization for Aircraft Maneuverability
papers.summary: This paper presents a method for incorporating control analysis into design optimization for highly-maneuverable aircraft. By studying reachable sets for aircraft dynamics, we ensure that the optimizer will take the aircraft's controlled capabilities into account. We compute reachable sets of linear dynamics for computational efficiency, and account for aircraft trim points to factor in asymmetric magnitude bounds on the input signals. We demonstrate the proposed method in design optimization of a blended-wing-body aircraft. Considering its wing half-span and center half-span as design variables, we optimize the aircraft based on its longitudinal dynamics' reachable sets to yield improvements in its controlled performance. When designing a reference tracking controller, we find up to 30\% less tracking error for angle of attack of the optimized model's nonlinear dynamics.

ai.tldr: 提出一种将控制分析纳入高机动飞机设计优化的方法，通过可达集评估受控能力，并在线性动力学和不对称输入约束下优化翼展等参数，使攻角跟踪误差降低30%。
ai.motivation: 传统飞机设计优化常忽略控制能力，导致优化结果在实际控制中性能不佳。
ai.method: 计算线性动力学的可达集，考虑配平点的不对称输入幅值约束，将可达集作为优化目标融入设计流程。
ai.result: 在混合翼身飞机优化中，优化后的模型在非线性动力学下攻角跟踪误差最多降低30%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将控制可达性分析融入飞机设计优化，提升机动性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将可达集作为约束或目标，与多目标优化（如能耗、稳定性）结合，探索更全面的设计空间。
idea_spark.risk: 线性可达集近似可能忽略非线性效应，导致实际性能与优化预期有偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用可达集指导控制器设计，实现设计与控制的一体化协同优化。

en.tldr: A method incorporating control analysis into design optimization for highly-maneuverable aircraft using reachable sets, achieving up to 30% reduction in angle-of-attack tracking error.
en.motivation: Traditional aircraft design optimization often neglects control capabilities, leading to suboptimal controlled performance.
en.method: Compute reachable sets of linear dynamics, account for asymmetric input bounds via trim points, and use reachable sets as optimization objectives.
en.result: Optimized blended-wing-body aircraft shows up to 30% less tracking error in angle of attack under nonlinear dynamics.
en.help_to_user: Illustrates how to integrate reachability analysis into design optimization for improved maneuverability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reachable sets with multi-objective optimization (e.g., energy, stability) for a broader design space exploration.
idea_spark.risk: Linear reachable set approximations may miss nonlinear effects, causing discrepancies between optimization and actual performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use reachable sets to guide controller design, enabling co-optimization of design and control.

papers.title: Joint Transceiver Orientation Optimization for Rotatable-Antenna MIMO Capacity Maximization
papers.summary: Conventional multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) systems mainly rely on fixed antenna arrays, which limits their capability to adapt the effective channel matrix to the propagation environment. Rotatable antennas (RAs), which enable mechanical or electronic adjustment of antenna boresight directions, introduce a new orientation-domain degree of freedom for channel reconfiguration. In this paper, we investigate an RA-aided MIMO communication system for channel capacity enhancement. We first establish an orientation-dependent MIMO channel model. Then, we formulate a capacity maximization problem by jointly optimizing the transmit covariance matrix and the transmit/receive RA orientations under practical spherical-cap constraints. To solve this non-convex problem, we develop an alternating optimization algorithm, where the transmit covariance matrix is updated via eigenmode transmission and water-filling, while each RA orientation is optimized through a Riemannian Frank-Wolfe method. We further investigate the low-SNR regime and derive simplified designs for multiple-input single-output (MISO) and single-input multiple-output (SIMO) special cases. Numerical results show that the proposed RA-aided MIMO design significantly improves the channel capacity compared with the fixed-orientation benchmark, demonstrating the benefits of orientation-domain channel reconfiguration.

ai.tldr: 提出可旋转天线辅助MIMO系统，通过联合优化发射协方差矩阵和天线朝向最大化信道容量。
ai.motivation: 传统固定天线阵列无法自适应调整信道矩阵，限制了MIMO系统容量。
ai.method: 建立朝向相关信道模型，采用交替优化：发射协方差矩阵用注水法更新，天线朝向用黎曼Frank-Wolfe方法优化。
ai.result: 相比固定朝向基准，所提方案显著提升信道容量，低信噪比下MISO/SIMO特例也有简化设计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可旋转天线MIMO容量优化的理论框架和算法，可用于无线通信系统设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将天线朝向与波束赋形联合优化，或引入机器学习预测最优朝向。
idea_spark.risk: 机械旋转天线可能引入时延和功耗，实际部署需权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用可重构天线增加自由度，启发其他无线资源（如频率、时间）的联合优化。

zh.tldr: 提出可旋转天线辅助MIMO系统，通过联合优化发射协方差矩阵和天线朝向最大化信道容量。
zh.motivation: 传统固定天线阵列无法自适应调整信道矩阵，限制了MIMO系统容量。

zh.help_to_user: 提供可旋转天线MIMO容量优化的理论框架和算法，可用于无线通信系统设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将天线朝向与波束赋形联合优化，或引入机器学习预测最优朝向。
idea_spark.risk: 机械旋转天线可能引入时延和功耗，实际部署需权衡。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用可重构天线增加自由度，启发其他无线资源（如频率、时间）的联合优化。

en.tldr: Proposes a rotatable-antenna aided MIMO system that maximizes channel capacity by jointly optimizing the transmit covariance matrix and antenna orientations.
en.motivation: Fixed antenna arrays cannot adapt the effective channel matrix to the propagation environment, limiting MIMO capacity.
en.method: Establishes an orientation-dependent channel model and uses alternating optimization: water-filling for the covariance matrix and Riemannian Frank-Wolfe for antenna orientations under spherical-cap constraints.
en.result: Significantly improves channel capacity over fixed-orientation benchmarks, with simplified designs for low-SNR MISO/SIMO cases.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and algorithm for capacity optimization in rotatable-antenna MIMO systems, useful for wireless communication design.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly optimize antenna orientation with beamforming, or use machine learning to predict optimal orientations.
idea_spark.risk: Mechanical rotation may introduce latency and power consumption, requiring practical trade-offs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging reconfigurable antennas to add degrees of freedom inspires joint optimization of other wireless resources like frequency and time.

papers.title: TimeMM: Time-as-Operator Spectral Filtering for Dynamic Multimodal Recommendation
papers.summary: Multimodal recommendation improves user modeling by integrating collaborative signals with heterogeneous item content. In real applications, user interests evolve over time and exhibit nonstationary dynamics, where different preference factors change at different rates. This challenge is amplified in multimodal settings because visual and textual cues can dominate decisions under different temporal regimes. Despite strong progress, most multimodal recommenders still rely on static interaction graphs or coarse temporal heuristics, which limits their ability to model continuous preference evolution with fine-grained temporal adaptation. To address these limitations, we propose TimeMM, a time-conditioned spectral filtering framework for dynamic multimodal recommendation. TimeMM instantiates Time-as-Operator by mapping interaction recency to a family of parametric temporal kernels that reweight edges on the user--item graph, producing component-specific representations without explicit eigendecomposition. To capture non-stationary interests, we introduce Adaptive Spectral Filtering that mixes the operator bank according to temporal context, yielding prediction-specific effective spectral responses. To account for modality-specific temporal sensitivity, we further propose Spectral-Aware Modality Routing that calibrates visual and textual contributions conditioned on the same temporal context. Finally, a ranking-space Spectral Diversity Regularization encourages complementary expert behaviors and prevents filter-bank collapse. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that TimeMM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multimodal recommenders while maintaining linear-time scalability.

ai.motivation: 现有多模态推荐系统依赖静态交互图或粗略时间启发式，无法建模用户兴趣的连续演化与模态特异的时间敏感性。

papers.title: High-Dimensional Noise to Low-Dimensional Manifolds: A Manifold-Space Diffusion Framework for Degraded Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.summary: Recently, Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification has attracted increasing attention in remote sensing. However, HSI data are inherently high-dimensional but low-rank, with discriminative information concentrated on a low-dimensional latent manifold. In real-world remote sensing scenarios, the superposition of multiple degradation factors disrupts this intrinsic manifold structure, driving samples away from their original low-dimensional distribution and introducing substantial redundant and non-discriminative variations. To better handle this challenge, this paper proposes a manifold-space diffusion framework (MSDiff) for robust hyperspectral classification under complex degradation conditions. Specifically, the proposed method first maps high-dimensional, degradation-affected HSI data into a compact low-dimensional manifold through a discriminative spectral-spatial reconstruction task, preserving class semantics and reducing redundant variations. A diffusion-based generative model is then applied to regularize the spectral-spatial distribution within the manifold, enabling progressive refinement and stabilization of latent features against residual degradations. The key advantage of the proposed framework lies in performing diffusion-based distribution modeling directly on the low-dimensional manifold, effectively decoupling degradation-induced disturbances from intrinsic discriminative structures and enhancing representation stability under complex degradations. Experimental results on multiple hyperspectral benchmarks demonstrate consistent performance improvements over state-of-the-art methods under diverse composite degradation settings. The code will be available at https://github.com/yangboxiang1207/MSDiff

ai.tldr: 提出一种流形空间扩散框架（MSDiff），用于在复杂退化条件下对高光谱图像进行鲁棒分类。
ai.motivation: 高光谱数据高维低秩，真实场景中多种退化因素破坏其低维流形结构，导致分类困难。
ai.method: 先通过判别性光谱-空间重建将退化数据映射到紧凑低维流形，再在流形上应用扩散生成模型正则化分布，逐步细化稳定潜在特征。
ai.result: 在多个高光谱基准数据集上，复合退化设置下性能一致优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种处理高光谱图像退化问题的有效框架，代码已开源。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散模型从原始数据空间迁移到低维流形上，可更高效地分离退化干扰与判别结构。
idea_spark.risk: 流形估计的准确性直接影响后续扩散效果，若流形学习不充分可能引入额外偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受流形假设与扩散模型去噪能力的启发，将两者结合以增强对复杂退化的鲁棒性。

en.motivation: Hyperspectral data is high-dimensional but low-rank; real-world degradations disrupt its low-dimensional manifold structure, making classification challenging.
en.method: First maps degraded HSI data into a compact low-dimensional manifold via discriminative spectral-spatial reconstruction, then applies a diffusion generative model on the manifold to regularize distribution and progressively refine latent features.

idea_spark.risk: The accuracy of manifold estimation directly affects subsequent diffusion; insufficient manifold learning may introduce additional bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the manifold hypothesis and the denoising capability of diffusion models, combining them enhances robustness against complex degradations.

papers.title: The Fock-Darwin-Darboux system: eigenstates, information entropies and dispersion-like measures
papers.summary: The Fock-Darwin (FD) quantum system describes the motion on the plane of a charged particle under the action of an isotropic oscillator potential together with a perpendicular constant magnetic field. When the isotropic oscillator is suppressed, the FD system leads to the Landau Hamiltonian with infinitely degenerate Landau levels. The Fock-Darwin-Darboux (FDD) system is the generalisation of the FD system to a particle moving on the Darboux III space, which is a conformally flat surface with non-constant negative curvature. We present a systematic study of some information-theoretic entropy and dispersion-like measures for these quantum systems. Since both systems are exactly solvable, analytical expressions for Shannon, Rényi and Tsallis entropies, among others, can be obtained. We show that for the FD system, its information-theoretic measures are formally the same as the ones for the harmonic oscillator, provided a modified effective frequency depending on the magnetic field is introduced. In the FDD case, the nonlinear nature of the underlying manifold precludes the existence of a simple closed form for the wave-function on momentum space, which is numerically analysed. We compare the numerical behaviour of the different entropy measures and we analyse the interplay arising in the FDD system between the curvature parameter and the magnetic field. In particular, it is shown that the Landau system on the Darboux III space has no infinitely degenerate Landau levels.

ai.tldr: 研究了Fock-Darwin-Darboux量子系统的信息熵和色散度量，该系统描述粒子在Darboux III曲面上的运动，具有非恒定负曲率。
ai.motivation: 探索曲率参数和磁场对量子系统信息熵的影响，并比较不同熵度量的行为。
ai.method: 利用精确可解性推导Fock-Darwin系统的解析熵表达式，对Fock-Darwin-Darboux系统采用数值分析动量空间波函数。
ai.result: Fock-Darwin系统的信息度量与谐振子形式相同，但有效频率依赖于磁场；Fock-Darwin-Darboux系统中曲率阻止了动量空间波函数的简单闭式，且Landau系统在Darboux III空间中没有无限简并的朗道能级。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了曲率与磁场耦合下量子信息熵的解析和数值结果，有助于理解弯曲空间中的量子信息理论。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Darboux III空间的非恒定负曲率设计模拟引力效应的量子信息实验。
idea_spark.risk: 数值分析可能对参数敏感，需要高精度计算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 曲率消除朗道能级简并的机制可能启发拓扑量子计算中的退简并方案。

en.tldr: A study of information entropies and dispersion-like measures for the Fock-Darwin-Darboux quantum system, describing a particle on the Darboux III surface with non-constant negative curvature.
en.motivation: To explore the interplay between curvature parameter and magnetic field on quantum information entropies, and to compare different entropy measures.
en.method: Analytical entropy expressions derived for the exactly solvable Fock-Darwin system; numerical analysis of momentum-space wavefunctions for the Fock-Darwin-Darboux system.
en.result: Fock-Darwin system's information measures are formally identical to those of the harmonic oscillator with an effective frequency modified by the magnetic field; in the Fock-Darwin-Darboux case, curvature prevents a closed-form momentum-space wavefunction, and the Landau system on Darboux III lacks infinitely degenerate Landau levels.
en.help_to_user: Provides analytical and numerical results on quantum information entropies under curvature-magnetic field coupling, aiding understanding of quantum information theory in curved spaces.

idea_spark.idea: Use the non-constant negative curvature of Darboux III to design quantum information experiments simulating gravitational effects.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical analysis may be sensitive to parameters, requiring high precision.
idea_spark.inspiration: The mechanism by which curvature removes Landau level degeneracy may inspire degeneracy-breaking schemes in topological quantum computing.

papers.title: Cross-Domain Transfer of Hyperspectral Foundation Models
papers.summary: Hyperspectral imaging (HSI) semantic segmentation typically relies on in-domain training, but limited data availability often restricts model performance in real-world applications. Current approaches to leverage foundation models in proximal sensing use cross-modality techniques, bridging RGB and HSI to exploit vision foundation models. However, these methods either discard spectral information or introduce architectural complexity. We propose cross-domain transfer as an alternative, reusing HSI foundation models - originally trained in remote sensing - for proximal sensing applications. By eliminating the need to bridge modality gaps, our approach preserves spectral information while maintaining a simple architecture. Using the HS3-Bench benchmark, we systematically evaluate and compare conventional in-domain, in-modality training, cross-modality transfer and cross-domain transfer strategies. Our results demonstrate that cross-domain transfer achieves large performance improvements over in-domain, in-modality training, reduces the performance gap to cross-modality approaches and maintains strong performance in limited data settings. Thus, this work advances more effective HSI semantic segmentation in diverse applications.

ai.tldr: 提出跨域迁移方法，将遥感高光谱基础模型直接用于近感高光谱语义分割，避免跨模态转换，在有限数据下表现优异。
ai.motivation: 高光谱语义分割常受限于域内数据不足，现有跨模态方法要么丢失光谱信息要么增加架构复杂度。
ai.method: 直接重用遥感高光谱基础模型进行近感应用，无需桥接模态差异，保持简单架构。在HS3-Bench基准上系统比较域内、跨模态和跨域迁移策略。
ai.result: 跨域迁移大幅优于域内训练，缩小了与跨模态方法的差距，在数据有限时仍保持强性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种简单有效的高光谱语义分割迁移学习方案，尤其适合数据稀缺场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将多个遥感高光谱基础模型集成或微调，进一步提升近感任务性能。
idea_spark.risk: 跨域迁移可能受传感器光谱分辨率差异影响，需验证模型对光谱偏移的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉基础模型跨域迁移成功启发，但直接复用同模态基础模型更简洁高效。

en.tldr: Proposes cross-domain transfer of hyperspectral foundation models from remote sensing to proximal sensing, avoiding cross-modality bridging and achieving strong performance under limited data.
en.motivation: HSI semantic segmentation suffers from limited in-domain data; existing cross-modality methods either discard spectral information or add architectural complexity.
en.method: Directly reuse HSI foundation models trained on remote sensing for proximal sensing tasks, eliminating modality gaps. Systematically compare in-domain, cross-modality, and cross-domain transfer on HS3-Bench.
en.result: Cross-domain transfer significantly outperforms in-domain training, narrows the gap to cross-modality approaches, and maintains strong performance with limited data.
en.help_to_user: Offers a simple and effective transfer learning strategy for HSI semantic segmentation, especially beneficial in data-scarce scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explore ensemble or fine-tuning of multiple remote sensing HSI foundation models to further boost proximal sensing performance.
idea_spark.risk: Cross-domain transfer may be sensitive to spectral resolution differences between sensors; robustness to spectral shift needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by successful cross-domain transfer of vision foundation models, but reusing same-modality models is simpler and more efficient.

papers.title: Multi-Server Secure Aggregation with Arbitrary Collusion and Heterogeneous Security Constraints
papers.summary: We study the fundamental limits of multi-server secure aggregation over a two-hop network where multiple servers, each connected to a disjoint subset of users, jointly compute the sum of all users' inputs. The goal is to ensure that no server can infer any information about prescribed subsets of inputs beyond the desired aggregate, even when colluding with an arbitrary subset of users.   Existing works largely focus on homogeneous security requirements, where all inputs are protected against colluding sets up to a given size. Such formulations are insufficient to capture more general scenarios in which different subsets of inputs may require protection against different collusion patterns.   In this paper, we consider a general model with heterogeneous security requirements and arbitrary user collusion. We characterize the communication rates for all parameter regimes, and determine the minimum key rate required for secure aggregation in most regimes. In particular, we establish tight information-theoretic lower bounds and matching achievable schemes in a broad class of regimes. For the remaining regime, we derive a general lower bound together with an achievable scheme that attains it within a bounded gap. Our results reveal how the interplay between network topology and heterogeneous security constraints fundamentally determines the communication and key generation requirements, and generalize existing results on secure aggregation.

ai.tldr: 研究两跳网络中多服务器安全聚合的基本极限，考虑异构安全约束和任意用户共谋，刻画了通信速率和密钥速率。
ai.motivation: 现有工作大多假设同质安全需求，无法处理不同输入子集需要不同共谋保护的实际场景。
ai.method: 建立信息论下界，并设计匹配的可达方案，覆盖大多数参数区域；对剩余区域给出有界差距的通用方案。
ai.result: 在所有参数区域刻画了通信速率，并在大部分区域确定了最小密钥速率；揭示了网络拓扑与异构安全约束的相互作用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解异构安全需求下安全聚合的通信与密钥开销，指导系统设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用网络拓扑的层次结构，将异构安全约束分解为局部约束，降低整体密钥开销。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署中用户共谋模式可能动态变化，理论假设需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受网络编码中分层安全思想启发，将全局安全需求转化为局部安全条件。

en.tldr: Studies the fundamental limits of multi-server secure aggregation over a two-hop network with heterogeneous security constraints and arbitrary user collusion, characterizing communication rates and key rates.
en.motivation: Existing works assume homogeneous security requirements, which are insufficient for scenarios where different input subsets require protection against different collusion patterns.
en.method: Establishes information-theoretic lower bounds and matching achievable schemes for most parameter regimes; for the remaining regime, provides a general scheme with bounded gap.
en.result: Characterizes communication rates for all parameter regimes and determines the minimum key rate for most regimes; reveals the interplay between network topology and heterogeneous security constraints.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand communication and key overhead under heterogeneous security constraints, guiding system design.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage hierarchical network topology to decompose heterogeneous security constraints into local constraints, reducing overall key overhead.
idea_spark.risk: User collusion patterns may change dynamically in practice, requiring further validation of theoretical assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by layered security in network coding, transforming global security requirements into local security conditions.

papers.title: Newton-Cartan limit of Klein-Gordon AQFT and the collapse of Galilean modular structure
papers.summary: We extend the established Galilean/relativistic structural divider in algebraic quantum field theory, namely, the absence of Reeh-Schlieder and of Tomita-Takesaki modular flow on local algebras of any Galilean Haag-Kastler net satisfying a natural axiom set augmented by the Bargmann-charge hypotheses (G7$^*$)(a) and (G7$^*$)(d) to curved backgrounds via the Newton-Cartan ($c\to\infty$) limit. We show, for the free Klein-Gordon field on Minkowski and on static globally hyperbolic spacetimes admitting a Post-Newtonian expansion, that a position-independent rest-energy rescaling produces in the limit a Galilean Haag-Kastler net satisfying the axioms of Ref. [1] in flat-space form (Minkowski) or in a curved-space modification (Killing-flow invariance and uniqueness of the vacuum replacing full translation invariance) appropriate to the static case. The Bargmann central charge equals the Klein--Gordon mass~$m$; the gravitational potential $V(x)$ enters the limiting Schrödinger Hamiltonian but not the algebraic structure obstructed by the Galilean Reeh-Schlieder no-go theorem. The strengthened obstruction theorem of Ref. [1] extends to the modified curved-space setting on Fock representations, and the limiting net carries no modular flow on local algebras. Schwarzschild is treated as a worked example: the Killing horizon shrinks to a point, the Hartle-Hawking thermal state has no $c\to\infty$ limit, and the Boulware vacuum limits to the gravitational hydrogenic ground state. The Reissner-Nordström metric is included as a sanity check confirming that leading Post-Newtonian misses the electromagnetic content of the background. We discuss how Newton's constant~$G$ enters the present (background-metric) framework only at the level of the limiting Hamiltonian, and indicate where dynamical-metric extensions would require $G$ to play a structural role.

ai.tldr: 将代数量子场论中的伽利略/相对论结构分界线扩展到弯曲时空，通过牛顿-卡特极限证明自由克莱因-戈登场在极限下满足伽利略哈格-卡斯特勒网公理，并展示伽利略Reeh-Schlieder定理的障碍在弯曲时空依然成立。
ai.motivation: 在弯曲时空背景下统一伽利略与相对论代数量子场论的结构，并验证伽利略模块流缺失的普遍性。
ai.method: 采用牛顿-卡特（c→∞）极限，对闵可夫斯基和静态全局双曲时空上的自由克莱因-戈登场进行位置无关的静止能量重标度，构造伽利略哈格-卡斯特勒网，并分析其公理满足性。
ai.result: 极限下的伽利略网满足修正后的公理集，Bargmann中心电荷等于质量m，引力势仅出现在哈密顿量中而不影响代数结构；Reeh-Schlieder障碍定理扩展到弯曲时空Fock表示，局部代数上无模块流；史瓦西时空的Killing视界收缩为点，Hartle-Hawking热态无极限，Boulware真空极限为引力氢原子基态。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解代数量子场论中伽利略极限在弯曲时空下的结构性质，以及模块流缺失的物理含义。

en.tldr: Extends the Galilean/relativistic structural divide in algebraic QFT to curved backgrounds via the Newton-Cartan limit, showing that the free Klein-Gordon field yields a Galilean Haag-Kastler net satisfying modified axioms, and that the Galilean Reeh-Schlieder obstruction persists in curved spacetime.

en.method: Applies the Newton-Cartan (c→∞) limit to the free Klein-Gordon field on Minkowski and static globally hyperbolic spacetimes with a position-independent rest-energy rescaling, constructing a Galilean Haag-Kastler net and analyzing its axioms.

en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the structural properties of the Galilean limit of algebraic QFT on curved spacetimes and the physical implications of the absence of modular flow.

idea_spark.risk: Dynamical-metric extensions may break the current axiomatic framework, requiring redefinition of vacuum states and local algebras.
idea_spark.inspiration: The Schwarzschild limit suggests that black hole thermodynamics may reduce to non-relativistic quantum mechanics in the Galilean limit.

papers.title: Enforcing Benign Trajectories: A Behavioral Firewall for Structured-Workflow AI Agents
papers.summary: Structured-workflow agents driven by large language models execute tool calls against sensitive external environments. We propose \codename, a telemetry-driven behavioral anomaly detection firewall. Drawing on sequence-based intrusion detection, \codename\ compiles verified benign tool-call telemetry into a parameterized deterministic finite automaton (pDFA). The model defines permitted tool sequences, sequential contexts, and parameter bounds. At runtime, a lightweight gateway enforces these boundaries via an $O(1)$ state-transition structural lookup, shifting computationally expensive analysis entirely offline. Evaluated on the Agent Security Bench (ASB), \codename\ achieves a 5.6\% macro-averaged attack success rate (ASR) across five scenarios. Within three structured workflows, ASR drops to 2.2\%, outperforming Aegis, a state-of-the-art stateless scanner, at 12.8\%. \codename\ achieves 0\% ASR on multi-step and context-sequential attacks in structured settings. Furthermore, against 1,000 algorithmically spliced exfiltration payloads, only 1.4\% matched valid structural paths, all of which failed end-to-end string parameter guards (0 successes out of 14 surviving paths, 95\% CI [0\%, 23.2\%]). \codename\ introduces just 2.2~ms of per-call latency (a 3.7$\times$ speedup over \textsc{Aegis}) while maintaining a 2.0\% benign task failure rate (BTFR) on benign workloads. Modeling the behavioral trajectory effectively collapses the available attack surface, but unmaintained continuous parameter bounds remain vulnerable to synonym-substitution attacks (18\% evasion rate). Thus, exact-match whitelisting of sensitive parameters ultimately bears the final defensive load against execution.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于参数化确定有限自动机的行为防火墙，通过离线编译良性工具调用轨迹并在运行时进行O(1)状态检查，有效防御结构化工作流AI代理的攻击。
ai.motivation: 结构化工作流AI代理在执行工具调用时面临安全威胁，现有方法（如无状态扫描器）在检测多步和上下文序列攻击时效果不佳。
ai.method: 利用良性工具调用遥测数据构建参数化确定有限自动机（pDFA），定义允许的工具序列、上下文和参数边界；运行时通过轻量级网关进行O(1)状态转换结构查找。
ai.result: 在Agent Security Bench上，宏平均攻击成功率5.6%，结构化工作流中降至2.2%，多步和上下文序列攻击成功率为0%；对1000个拼接外泄载荷仅1.4%匹配有效路径且全部被参数守卫拦截；每调用延迟2.2毫秒，良性任务失败率2.0%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过行为轨迹建模和离线分析来增强AI代理的安全性，同时保持低延迟和低误报。

idea_spark.idea: 结合连续参数边界维护与同义词替换攻击的防御，例如引入动态参数白名单或语义相似度检查。
idea_spark.risk: 未维护的连续参数边界易受同义词替换攻击（18%绕过率），需依赖精确匹配白名单作为最终防线。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从序列入侵检测中借鉴参数化自动机思想，将计算开销转移到离线阶段，实现运行时高效防御。

en.tldr: Proposes a behavioral firewall using a parameterized deterministic finite automaton (pDFA) that compiles benign tool-call telemetry offline and enforces boundaries via O(1) runtime checks, effectively defending structured-workflow AI agents.
en.motivation: Structured-workflow AI agents face security threats during tool calls; existing stateless scanners like Aegis perform poorly against multi-step and context-sequential attacks.

papers.title: The Super Virasoro Minimal String from 3d Supergravity
papers.summary: The super Virasoro minimal string is defined by coupling spacelike and timelike super Liouville theories on the worldsheet. There are four different theories 0A$^\pm$ and 0B$^\pm$ depending on discrete choices on the worldsheet. We show that these theories arise naturally from quantization of 3d supergravity, and the amplitudes compute the dimension ($+$) or superdimension ($-$) of the space of $\mathcal{N}=1$ superconformal blocks modulo crossing symmetry. Both 0A$^+$ and 0B$^+$ are perturbatively dual to the same matrix integral as the bosonic Virasoro minimal string, while 0B$^-$ is dual to a matrix integral with an inverse square root singularity. We show that all non-trivial perturbative amplitudes of the 0A$^-$ theory vanish.

ai.tldr: 本文通过耦合类空和类时超Liouville理论定义超Virasoro最小弦，并证明该理论自然来自三维超引力量子化，其振幅计算了模交叉对称性的N=1超共形块空间的维数或超维数。
ai.motivation: 探索超Virasoro最小弦与三维超引力之间的深层联系，并理解不同世界sheet离散选择对应的四种理论（0A±和0B±）的物理意义。
ai.method: 将超Virasoro最小弦定义为类空和类时超Liouville理论的耦合，通过三维超引力量子化推导其振幅，并分析不同理论对应的矩阵积分对偶。
ai.result: 0A⁺和0B⁺与玻色Virasoro最小弦的矩阵积分对偶；0B⁻对偶于具有平方根倒数奇点的矩阵积分；0A⁻的所有非平凡微扰振幅为零。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解超弦理论中最小弦模型与超引力之间的对偶关系，以及不同世界sheet选择如何影响理论性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用三维超引力量子化构造超Virasoro最小弦，并发现其振幅与超共形块空间维数的关系。
idea_spark.risk: 部分理论（如0A⁻）振幅为零，可能限制其物理应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法用于研究其他超对称弦理论中的矩阵模型对偶。
