en.tldr: The super Virasoro minimal string is defined by coupling spacelike and timelike super Liouville theories on the worldsheet, and is shown to arise naturally from quantization of 3d supergravity, with amplitudes computing the dimension or superdimension of N=1 superconformal blocks modulo crossing symmetry.
en.motivation: To explore the deep connection between the super Virasoro minimal string and 3d supergravity, and to understand the physical meaning of the four theories (0A± and 0B±) corresponding to different discrete choices on the worldsheet.
en.method: The super Virasoro minimal string is defined by coupling spacelike and timelike super Liouville theories, derived from 3d supergravity quantization, and its amplitudes are analyzed along with the dual matrix integrals for each theory.
en.result: 0A⁺ and 0B⁺ are dual to the same matrix integral as the bosonic Virasoro minimal string; 0B⁻ is dual to a matrix integral with an inverse square root singularity; all nontrivial perturbative amplitudes of 0A⁻ vanish.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the duality between minimal string models in superstring theory and supergravity, and how different worldsheet choices affect the theory's properties.

idea_spark.idea: Construct the super Virasoro minimal string via 3d supergravity quantization and relate its amplitudes to the dimension of superconformal block spaces.
idea_spark.risk: Some theories (e.g., 0A⁻) have vanishing amplitudes, which may limit their physical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to study matrix model dualities in other supersymmetric string theories.

papers.title: Generalized Disguise Makeup Presentation Attack Detection Using an Attention-Guided Patch-Based Framework
papers.summary: Despite significant advances in facial recognition systems, they remain vulnerable to face presentation attacks. Among them, disguise makeup attacks are particularly challenging, as they use advanced cosmetics, prosthetic components, and artificial materials to realistically alter facial appearance, often making detection difficult even for humans. Despite their importance, this problem remains underexplored, and publicly available datasets are limited. To address this, we propose a generalized disguise makeup presentation attack detection framework. The method adopts a two-phase design in which a style-invariant full-face model, trained with metric learning and enhanced by a whitening transformation, extracts region attention scores via Grad-CAM. These scores guide a patch-based phase that performs localized analysis using region-specific subnetworks trained with metric learning for fine-grained discrimination. We also construct a new, diverse dataset of live and disguise makeup faces collected under real-world conditions, covering variations in subjects, environments, and disguise materials. Experimental results demonstrate strong generalization across both the collected dataset and SIW-Mv2, achieving 8.97% ACER and 9.76% EER on the collected dataset, and 0% ACER on Obfuscation and Impersonation and 1.34% on Cosmetics attacks of SIW-Mv2. The proposed method consistently outperforms prior works while maintaining robust performance across other spoof types.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力引导的补丁框架，用于广义伪装化妆呈现攻击检测，在自建数据集和SIW-Mv2上取得优异性能。
ai.motivation: 伪装化妆攻击难以检测，现有研究不足且公开数据集有限。
ai.method: 两阶段设计：先通过度量学习和白化变换训练风格不变的全脸模型，用Grad-CAM提取区域注意力分数；再引导补丁阶段进行局部细粒度分析。
ai.result: 自建数据集上ACER 8.97%、EER 9.76%；SIW-Mv2上混淆和模仿攻击ACER 0%，化妆品攻击1.34%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用注意力机制和局部补丁分析提升伪装化妆攻击检测的泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合风格不变特征和局部注意力，提升对未知攻击类型的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖Grad-CAM的注意力质量，可能受模型解释性限制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将全局与局部特征结合，利用注意力引导细粒度分析，可启发其他对抗性伪装检测研究。

en.tldr: Proposes an attention-guided patch-based framework for generalized disguise makeup presentation attack detection, achieving strong performance on a collected dataset and SIW-Mv2.
en.motivation: Disguise makeup attacks are challenging to detect, with limited research and public datasets.
en.method: Two-phase design: a style-invariant full-face model trained with metric learning and whitening transformation extracts region attention scores via Grad-CAM, guiding a patch-based phase for localized fine-grained analysis.
en.result: 8.97% ACER and 9.76% EER on collected dataset; 0% ACER on Obfuscation and Impersonation, 1.34% on Cosmetics attacks of SIW-Mv2.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how attention mechanisms and local patch analysis improve generalization in disguise makeup attack detection.

idea_spark.idea: Combine style-invariant features with local attention to enhance robustness against unknown attack types.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on Grad-CAM attention quality, potentially limited by model interpretability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating global and local features with attention-guided fine-grained analysis can inspire research on other adversarial disguise detection.

papers.title: Dirac monopole potentials with high charges underlying nonlinear waves
papers.summary: We investigate topological vector potentials underlying the phases of nonlinear waves by performing Dirac's magnetic monopole theory in an extended complex plane, taking into account self-steepening effects while ignoring the usual cubic nonlinearities. We uncover that the simple poles and third-order poles of the density function constitute virtual monopole fields with higher charges $\pm3/2$ and $\pm5/2$, respectively. These results are in sharp contrast to the previous findings, where the simple zeros of the density function yield charges $\pm1/2$. We choose scalar and vector rogue waves as well as bright solitons to demonstrate the Dirac monopole potentials. These results confirm a series of quantized magnetic charges for virtual monopoles underlying nonlinear waves, and reveal new relations between poles of density functions and topological charges.

ai.tldr: 通过狄拉克磁单极理论在扩展复平面上的应用，发现非线性波密度函数的简单极点和三阶极点分别产生电荷±3/2和±5/2的虚拟单极场，与之前零点产生±1/2电荷的结果不同。
ai.motivation: 探索非线性波相位背后的拓扑矢量势，揭示密度函数极点与拓扑电荷的新关系。
ai.method: 在扩展复平面上应用狄拉克磁单极理论，考虑自陡峭效应，忽略通常的三次非线性，分析密度函数的极点阶数对应的磁荷。
ai.result: 简单极点对应电荷±3/2，三阶极点对应电荷±5/2，并通过标量和矢量怪波以及亮孤子进行了验证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非线性波中拓扑电荷的量化机制，为相关物理系统提供理论工具。

idea_spark.risk: 实验验证高电荷虚拟单极子可能存在困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从极点而非零点出发，可能发现更多非线性波中的拓扑现象。

en.tldr: By applying Dirac's magnetic monopole theory on an extended complex plane, we find that simple and third-order poles of the density function in nonlinear waves yield virtual monopole fields with charges ±3/2 and ±5/2, respectively, contrasting with previous results from zeros.
en.motivation: To explore topological vector potentials underlying the phases of nonlinear waves and reveal new relations between density function poles and topological charges.
en.method: Dirac's magnetic monopole theory is applied on an extended complex plane, incorporating self-steepening effects while ignoring cubic nonlinearities, and analyzing the pole orders of the density function.
en.result: Simple poles correspond to charges ±3/2, third-order poles to charges ±5/2, demonstrated with scalar and vector rogue waves and bright solitons.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for understanding quantized topological charges in nonlinear waves.

idea_spark.idea: Use the pole-charge correspondence to design artificial electromagnetic materials with specific magnetic charges.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental verification of high-charge virtual monopoles may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Focusing on poles rather than zeros may uncover additional topological phenomena in nonlinear waves.

papers.title: Seeking Consensus: Geometric-Semantic On-the-Fly Recalibration for Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) in remote sensing images is a promising task that employs textual descriptions for identifying undefined land cover categories. Despite notable advances, existing methods typically employ a static inference paradigm, overlooking the distinct distribution of each scene, resulting in semantic ambiguity in diverse land covers and incomplete foreground activation. Motivated by this, we propose Seeking Consensus, termed SeeCo, a plug-and-play framework to boost the performance of training-free OVSS models in remote sensing images, which recalibrates arbitrary OVSS models on-the-fly by seeking dual consensus: geometric consensus learning (GCL) through multi-view consistent observations and semantic consensus learning (SCL) via textual description adaptive calibration, which assists collaborative recalibration of visual and textual semantics. The two consensus are injected via an online consensus injector (OCI), effectively alleviating the under-activation and semantic bias. SeeCo requires no specific training process, yet recalibrates semantic-geometric alignment for each unique scene during inference. Extensive experiments on eight remote sensing OVSS benchmarks show consistent gains, proving its effectiveness and universality.

ai.tldr: 提出SeeCo，一种即插即用框架，通过几何与语义共识在线校准，提升遥感图像开放词汇语义分割性能。
ai.motivation: 现有方法采用静态推理，忽略场景分布差异，导致语义模糊和前景激活不完整。
ai.method: 通过几何共识学习（多视角一致观测）和语义共识学习（文本描述自适应校准），利用在线共识注入器协同校准视觉和文本语义。
ai.result: 在八个遥感OVSS基准上取得一致提升，证明有效性和通用性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户无需训练即可提升开放词汇语义分割模型在遥感场景中的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何与语义共识在线校准应用于视频或3D点云场景理解。
idea_spark.risk: 多视角观测可能增加计算开销，实时性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用场景自适应校准解决分布偏移，启发动态推理范式设计。

en.tldr: Proposes SeeCo, a plug-and-play framework that recalibrates open-vocabulary semantic segmentation models on-the-fly via geometric and semantic consensus for remote sensing images.
en.motivation: Existing methods use static inference, ignoring scene-specific distributions, leading to semantic ambiguity and incomplete foreground activation.
en.method: Employs geometric consensus learning (multi-view consistent observations) and semantic consensus learning (textual description adaptive calibration), integrated via an online consensus injector for collaborative visual-textual recalibration.
en.result: Consistent gains on eight remote sensing OVSS benchmarks, demonstrating effectiveness and universality.
en.help_to_user: Helps users improve open-vocabulary semantic segmentation models in remote sensing without training.

idea_spark.idea: Apply geometric-semantic on-the-fly recalibration to video or 3D point cloud scene understanding.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-view observations may increase computational cost; real-time performance needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Scene-adaptive recalibration addresses distribution shift, inspiring dynamic inference paradigm design.

papers.title: ATLAS: An Annotation Tool for Long-horizon Robotic Action Segmentation
papers.summary: Annotating long-horizon robotic demonstrations with precise temporal action boundaries is crucial for training and evaluating action segmentation and manipulation policy learning methods. Existing annotation tools, however, are often limited: they are designed primarily for vision-only data, do not natively support synchronized visualization of robot-specific time-series signals (e.g., gripper state or force/torque), or require substantial effort to adapt to different dataset formats. In this paper, we introduce ATLAS, an annotation tool tailored for long-horizon robotic action segmentation. ATLAS provides time-synchronized visualization of multi-modal robotic data, including multi-view video and proprioceptive signals, and supports annotation of action boundaries, action labels, and task outcomes. The tool natively handles widely used robotics dataset formats such as ROS bags and the Reinforcement Learning Dataset (RLDS) format, and provides direct support for specific datasets such as REASSEMBLE. ATLAS can be easily extended to new formats via a modular dataset abstraction layer. Its keyboard-centric interface minimizes annotation effort and improves efficiency. In experiments on a contact-rich assembly task, ATLAS reduced the average per-action annotation time by at least 6% compared to ELAN, while the inclusion of time-series data improved temporal alignment with expert annotations by more than 2.8% and decreased boundary error fivefold compared to vision-only annotation tools.

ai.tldr: 提出ATLAS，一种专为长时间跨度机器人动作分割设计的标注工具，支持多模态数据同步可视化与多种数据集格式。
ai.motivation: 现有标注工具主要针对纯视觉数据，不支持机器人特有的时间序列信号（如夹爪状态、力/力矩），且难以适应不同数据集格式。
ai.method: ATLAS提供时间同步的多模态可视化（多视角视频+本体感知信号），支持动作边界、标签和任务结果标注；通过模块化数据抽象层原生支持ROS bags、RLDS等格式，并采用键盘中心化界面减少标注工作量。
ai.result: 在接触密集型装配任务中，ATLAS比ELAN平均每动作标注时间减少至少6%；加入时间序列数据后，时间对齐精度提升超过2.8%，边界误差降低至纯视觉工具的1/5。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员高效、精确地标注长时间机器人演示中的动作边界，尤其适用于多模态数据和复杂任务场景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习或半自动标注策略，利用预训练动作分割模型生成初始边界建议，再由人工修正，可进一步降低标注成本。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖键盘快捷键可能增加新用户的学习曲线；对非标准数据集格式的扩展需要额外开发工作。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将机器人本体感知信号（如力/力矩）与视觉数据融合用于动作分割，启发我们探索其他模态（如触觉、音频）在细粒度动作理解中的价值。

en.tldr: Introduces ATLAS, an annotation tool for long-horizon robotic action segmentation with synchronized multi-modal visualization and support for multiple dataset formats.
en.motivation: Existing tools are designed primarily for vision-only data, lack native support for robot-specific time-series signals (e.g., gripper state, force/torque), and require significant effort to adapt to different dataset formats.
en.method: ATLAS provides time-synchronized visualization of multi-modal data (multi-view video + proprioceptive signals), supports annotation of action boundaries, labels, and task outcomes; natively handles ROS bags and RLDS formats via a modular dataset abstraction layer, and uses a keyboard-centric interface to reduce annotation effort.

en.help_to_user: Enables efficient and precise annotation of action boundaries in long-horizon robotic demonstrations, especially for multi-modal data and complex tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate active learning or semi-automatic annotation by using a pre-trained action segmentation model to propose initial boundaries, then refine manually, further reducing annotation cost.
idea_spark.risk: Heavy reliance on keyboard shortcuts may increase the learning curve for new users; extending to non-standard dataset formats requires additional development effort.
idea_spark.inspiration: Fusing robot proprioceptive signals (e.g., force/torque) with visual data for action segmentation inspires exploring other modalities (e.g., tactile, audio) for fine-grained action understanding.

papers.title: Brane quantization and SYZ mirror symmetry
papers.summary: Coisotropic A-branes were introduced by Kapustin--Orlov to enlarge the Fukaya category of a symplectic manifold in a way that aligns with predictions from homological mirror symmetry. From a mathematical perspective, however, the categorical framework governing such branes remains largely undeveloped. On the other hand, Gukov--Witten's brane quantization suggests that a holomorphic deformation quantization of a holomorphic symplectic manifold $X$ arises from the endomorphism algebra $Hom_A(B_{cc},B_{cc})$ of a canonical coisotropic A-brane $B_{cc}$, which naturally acts on the morphism space $Hom_A(B,B_{cc})$ with a Lagrangian A-brane $B$ that in turn gives precisely the geometric quantization of $B$.   In this paper, we consider a holomorphic symplectic manifold $X$ which admits an SYZ fibration and apply SYZ mirror symmetry to study its brane quantization. Given any semi-affine, space-filling coisotropic A-brane $B_{cc}$ on $X$, we construct the mirror B-brane $\check{B}_{cc}$ on the mirror manifold $\check{X}$ by an SYZ transform. We then present a mathematical definition of the endomorphism algebra $Hom_A(B_{cc},B_{cc})$ by constructing a distinguished non-formal holomorphic deformation quantization of $X$. Using a twisted family Toeplitz construction, we transform $Hom_A(B_{cc},B_{cc})$ to the mirror B-side and prove that this induces an isomorphism $Hom_A(B_{cc},B_{cc})\cong Hom_B(\check{B}_{cc},\check{B}_{cc})$ between the endomorphism algebras. Furthermore, taking any torus fiber of $X$ as the Lagrangian A-brane $B$, we fully realize Gukov--Witten's proposal, namely, there is a natural action of $Hom_A(B_{cc},B_{cc})$ on $Hom_A(B,B_{cc})$ which is precisely mirror to the natural action on the mirror B-side. This provides a mathematical framework which is compatible with Gukov--Witten's brane quantization proposal, SYZ mirror symmetry as well as family Floer theory.

ai.tldr: 本文利用SYZ镜像对称性，为Gukov-Witten的膜量子化方案建立了严格的数学框架，通过构造非形式全纯形变量子化并证明端态代数之间的镜像同构。
ai.motivation: Kapustin-Orlov引入的共各向同性A-膜在范畴层面缺乏数学发展，而Gukov-Witten的膜量子化方案需要严格的数学基础。
ai.method: 对具有SYZ纤维化的全纯辛流形，通过SYZ变换构造镜像B-膜，利用扭曲族Toeplitz构造将端态代数转换到镜像B侧并证明同构。
ai.result: 建立了共各向同性A-膜端态代数与镜像B-膜端态代数之间的同构，并完全实现了Gukov-Witten的膜量子化方案。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解膜量子化与镜像对称性的联系提供了严格的数学工具，有助于进一步研究辛几何与全纯几何中的量子化问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将SYZ镜像对称性作为桥梁，将A-侧复杂的代数结构映射到B-侧更易处理的代数结构。
idea_spark.risk: 构造依赖于SYZ纤维化的存在性，对于一般辛流形可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用镜像对称性简化复杂代数结构，类似方法可应用于其他量子化或范畴化问题。

zh.result: 建立了共各向同性A-膜端态代数与镜像B-膜端态代数之间的同构，并完全实现了Gukov-Witten的膜量子化方案。

en.tldr: This paper establishes a rigorous mathematical framework for Gukov-Witten's brane quantization using SYZ mirror symmetry, constructing a non-formal holomorphic deformation quantization and proving an isomorphism between endomorphism algebras.
en.motivation: Coisotropic A-branes introduced by Kapustin-Orlov lack a categorical mathematical framework, and Gukov-Witten's brane quantization proposal requires a solid foundation.
en.method: For a holomorphic symplectic manifold with an SYZ fibration, the mirror B-brane is constructed via SYZ transform; a twisted family Toeplitz construction transforms the endomorphism algebra to the mirror B-side and proves an isomorphism.
en.result: An isomorphism between endomorphism algebras of coisotropic A-branes and mirror B-branes is established, fully realizing Gukov-Witten's brane quantization proposal.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical tools for understanding the connection between brane quantization and mirror symmetry, aiding further research in quantization problems in symplectic and holomorphic geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Use SYZ mirror symmetry as a bridge to map complex algebraic structures on the A-side to more tractable ones on the B-side.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on the existence of an SYZ fibration, which may not hold for general symplectic manifolds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging mirror symmetry to simplify complex algebraic structures; similar approaches could be applied to other quantization or categorification problems.

papers.title: Sparsity as a Key: Unlocking New Insights from Latent Structures for Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.summary: Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) have demonstrated significant success in interpreting Large Language Models (LLMs) by decomposing dense representations into sparse, semantic components. However, their potential for analyzing Vision Transformers (ViTs) remains largely under-explored. In this work, we present the first application of SAEs to the ViT [CLS] token for out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, addressing the limitation of existing methods that rely on entangled feature representations. We propose a novel framework utilizing a Top-k SAE to disentangle the dense [CLS] features into a structured latent space. Through this analysis, we reveal that in-distribution (ID) data exhibits consistent, class-specific activation patterns, which we formalize as Class Activation Profiles (CAPs). Our study uncovers a key structural invariant: while ID samples preserve a stable pattern within CAPs, OOD samples systematically disrupt this structure. Leveraging this insight, we introduce a scoring function based on the divergence of core energy profiles to quantify the deviation from ideal activation profiles. Our method achieves strong results on the FPR95 metric, critical for safety-sensitive applications across multiple benchmarks, while also achieving competitive AUROC. Overall, our findings demonstrate that the sparse, disentangled features revealed by SAEs can serve as a powerful, interpretable tool for robust OOD detection in vision models.

ai.tldr: 首次将稀疏自编码器应用于ViT的[CLS]令牌，通过解耦特征实现分布外检测，并发现类激活轮廓的结构不变性。
ai.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法依赖纠缠的特征表示，限制了检测性能。
ai.method: 使用Top-k稀疏自编码器解耦ViT的[CLS]特征，构建类激活轮廓，并基于核心能量轮廓的散度设计评分函数。
ai.result: 在FPR95指标上表现优异，AUROC也具竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可解释的、基于稀疏结构的分布外检测新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 利用稀疏自编码器解耦特征，发现类激活轮廓的结构不变性，并以此设计检测评分。
idea_spark.risk: Top-k稀疏自编码器的超参数选择可能影响泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 稀疏自编码器在LLM解释中的成功可启发视觉模型的可解释性研究。

en.tldr: First application of Sparse Autoencoders to ViT [CLS] token for OOD detection, revealing structural invariance in Class Activation Profiles.
en.motivation: Existing OOD detection methods rely on entangled feature representations, limiting performance.
en.method: Uses Top-k SAE to disentangle ViT [CLS] features, constructs Class Activation Profiles, and designs a scoring function based on divergence of core energy profiles.
en.result: Achieves strong FPR95 and competitive AUROC across benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable, sparse-structure-based approach for robust OOD detection.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage SAE to disentangle features, discover structural invariance in CAPs, and design detection scores.
idea_spark.risk: Hyperparameter selection of Top-k SAE may affect generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Success of SAEs in LLM interpretability inspires explainability in vision models.

papers.title: OmniTrend: Content-Context Modeling for Scalable Social Popularity Prediction
papers.summary: Predicting social media popularity requires understanding both the intrinsic appeal of content and the external context that determines how it is exposed to users. Existing methods focus on content signals but do not separate them from exposure-related patterns, which causes the learned representations to absorb platform-specific visibility effects and weakens both interpretability and cross-platform transfer. This paper introduces OmniTrend, a unified framework that models popularity as the joint outcome of content attractiveness and contextual exposure. The content module learns cross-modal representations from visual, audio, and textual cues to quantify intrinsic appeal, while the context module estimates exposure from exogenous signals such as posting time, author activity, topical trends, and retrieval-based neighborhood statistics. OmniTrend learns separate predictors for content attractiveness and contextual exposure and integrates them in the final popularity estimate, which makes the role of each factor explicit and supports robust transfer across image and video platforms.

ai.tldr: 提出OmniTrend框架，将社交媒体流行度分解为内容吸引力与上下文曝光两个独立因素，提升可解释性与跨平台迁移能力。
ai.motivation: 现有方法未分离内容信号与曝光模式，导致表示吸收平台特定可见性效应，削弱可解释性和跨平台迁移。
ai.method: 内容模块从视觉、音频、文本中学习跨模态表示量化内在吸引力；上下文模块利用发布时间、作者活动、话题趋势及检索邻域统计估计曝光。两个独立预测器集成得到最终流行度。
ai.result: 在图像和视频平台上验证了框架的有效性与鲁棒迁移能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解社交媒体流行度的双重驱动因素，并支持跨平台预测。

idea_spark.idea: 利用检索邻域统计作为上下文信号，可能比传统时序特征更鲁棒。
idea_spark.risk: 上下文模块依赖外部信号质量，若数据噪声大可能影响估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 分离内容与上下文的思想可启发推荐系统中的用户兴趣与平台曝光建模。

en.tldr: Proposes OmniTrend, a framework that decomposes social media popularity into content attractiveness and contextual exposure, improving interpretability and cross-platform transfer.
en.motivation: Existing methods fail to separate content signals from exposure patterns, causing learned representations to absorb platform-specific visibility effects and weakening interpretability and transfer.
en.method: A content module learns cross-modal representations from visual, audio, and textual cues to quantify intrinsic appeal; a context module estimates exposure using posting time, author activity, topical trends, and retrieval-based neighborhood statistics. Two separate predictors are integrated for final popularity.
en.result: Validated on image and video platforms, demonstrating effectiveness and robust transfer.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the dual drivers of social media popularity and supports cross-platform prediction.

idea_spark.idea: Using retrieval-based neighborhood statistics as contextual signals may be more robust than traditional temporal features.
idea_spark.risk: The context module relies on external signal quality; noisy data may degrade estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Separating content and context can inspire user interest and platform exposure modeling in recommendation systems.

papers.title: A Data-Centric Framework for Intraoperative Fluorescence Lifetime Imaging for Glioma Surgical Guidance
papers.summary: Accurate intraoperative assessment of glioma infiltration is essential for maximizing tumor resection while preserving functional brain tissue. Fluorescence lifetime imaging (FLIm) offers real-time, label-free biochemical contrast, but its clinical utility is challenged by biological heterogeneity, class imbalance, and variability in histopathological labeling. We present a data-centric AI (DC-AI) framework that integrates confident learning (CL), class refinement, and targeted label evaluation to develop a robust multi-class FLIm classifier for glioblastoma (GBM) resection margins. FLIm data were collected from 192 tissue margins across 31 newly diagnosed IDH-wildtype GBM patients and initially labeled into seven tumor cellularity classes by an expert neuropathologist. CL was applied to quantify FLIm point-level confidence, identify label inconsistencies, and guide iterative class merging into a three-class scheme ("low", "moderate", "high"). The resulting high-fidelity dataset enabled training a model that achieved 96% accuracy in the three-class task. SHAP analysis revealed class-specific FLIm feature importance, highlighting distinct optical signatures across the infiltration spectrum. Targeted FLIm analysis further identified biological (e.g., gray matter composition) and acquisition-related (e.g., blood contamination) contributors to low-confidence predictions. Blinded re-evaluation of margins flagged by CL demonstrated intra-pathologist variability, underscoring the value of selective relabeling rather than exhaustive review. Together, these findings demonstrate that a DC-AI framework can systematically improve data reliability, enhance model robustness, and refine biological interpretation of FLIm signals, supporting the development of clinically actionable optical tools for real-time glioma margin assessment.

ai.tldr: 提出一个以数据为中心的AI框架，通过置信学习、类别细化和标签评估，提高术中荧光寿命成像对胶质瘤浸润评估的准确性和鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 术中准确评估胶质瘤浸润对最大化切除肿瘤同时保留功能脑组织至关重要，但荧光寿命成像的临床效用受生物异质性、类别不平衡和组织病理学标记变异性的挑战。
ai.method: 集成置信学习、类别细化和目标标签评估的数据中心AI框架，对192个组织边缘的FLIm数据进行处理，将初始七类标签合并为三类，并训练分类器。
ai.result: 三分类任务准确率达96%，SHAP分析揭示类别特异性FLIm特征重要性，盲法重新评估显示病理学家自身变异。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过数据质量改进提升术中光学诊断模型的可靠性，并识别影响预测置信度的生物学和采集因素。

idea_spark.idea: 结合主动学习和置信学习，在术中实时选择最不确定的样本进行病理学家重新标注，迭代优化分类器。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖专家重新标注可能引入主观偏差，且实时应用时计算开销需优化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从置信学习识别标签不一致性出发，启发开发自动标签校正算法，减少人工审查负担。

en.tldr: A data-centric AI framework integrating confident learning, class refinement, and targeted label evaluation improves the accuracy and robustness of intraoperative fluorescence lifetime imaging for glioma infiltration assessment.
en.motivation: Accurate intraoperative assessment of glioma infiltration is critical for maximizing tumor resection while preserving functional brain tissue, but clinical utility of FLIm is challenged by biological heterogeneity, class imbalance, and variability in histopathological labeling.
en.method: A data-centric AI framework using confident learning, class refinement, and targeted label evaluation processes FLIm data from 192 tissue margins, merging initial seven tumor cellularity classes into three, and trains a classifier.
en.result: Achieves 96% accuracy in three-class classification; SHAP analysis reveals class-specific FLIm feature importance; blinded re-evaluation demonstrates intra-pathologist variability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how data quality improvement enhances reliability of intraoperative optical diagnostic models and identifies biological and acquisition factors affecting prediction confidence.

idea_spark.idea: Combine active learning with confident learning to select the most uncertain samples for real-time pathologist re-labeling, iteratively optimizing the classifier.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on expert re-labeling may introduce subjective bias, and computational overhead needs optimization for real-time application.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by confident learning identifying label inconsistencies, develop automatic label correction algorithms to reduce manual review burden.

papers.title: MemOVCD: Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Change Detection via Cross-Temporal Memory Reasoning and Global-Local Adaptive Rectification
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary change detection aims to identify semantic changes in bi-temporal remote sensing images without predefined categories. Recent methods combine foundation models such as SAM, DINO and CLIP, but typically process each timestamp independently or interact only at the final comparison stage. Such paradigms suffer from insufficient temporal coupling during semantic reasoning, which limits their ability to distinguish genuine semantic changes from non-semantic appearance discrepancies. In addition, patch-dominant inference on high-resolution images often weakens global semantic continuity and produces fragmented change regions. To address these issues, we propose MemOVCD, a training-free open-vocabulary change detection framework based on cross-temporal memory reasoning and global-local adaptive rectification. Specifically, we reformulate bi-temporal change detection as a two-frame tracking problem and introduce weighted bidirectional propagation to aggregate semantic evidence from both temporal directions. To stabilize memory propagation across large temporal gaps, we construct histogram-aligned transition frames to smooth abrupt appearance changes. Moreover, a global-local adaptive rectification strategy adaptively fuses local and global-view predictions, improving spatial consistency while preserving fine-grained details. Experiments on five benchmarks demonstrate that MemOVCD achieves favorable performance on two change detection tasks, validating its effectiveness and generalization under diverse open-vocabulary settings.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的开集变化检测框架，通过跨时间记忆推理和全局-局部自适应修正，有效区分语义变化与非语义外观差异。
ai.motivation: 现有方法独立处理每个时间戳或仅在最终比较阶段交互，导致时间耦合不足，难以区分真实语义变化与非语义外观差异；同时，高分辨率图像上的块主导推理削弱了全局语义连续性，产生碎片化变化区域。
ai.method: 将双时相变化检测重新表述为两帧跟踪问题，引入加权双向传播聚合两个时间方向的语义证据；构建直方图对齐过渡帧以稳定跨大时间间隔的记忆传播；采用全局-局部自适应修正策略融合局部和全局视图预测，提升空间一致性同时保留细节。
ai.result: 在五个基准数据集上，MemOVCD在两个变化检测任务上取得了良好性能，验证了其在多种开集设置下的有效性和泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户无需训练即可从双时相遥感图像中检测任意类别的语义变化，适用于快速变化监测和应急响应场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将变化检测视为跟踪问题，利用记忆传播和过渡帧平滑，为无需训练的开集视觉任务提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练基础模型（SAM、DINO、CLIP）的质量和泛化能力，在极端域偏移或低质量图像上可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴跟踪中的双向传播和记忆机制，启发其他时序视觉任务（如动作识别、事件检测）采用类似的无训练范式。

en.tldr: Proposes a training-free open-vocabulary change detection framework that uses cross-temporal memory reasoning and global-local adaptive rectification to effectively distinguish genuine semantic changes from non-semantic appearance discrepancies.
en.motivation: Existing methods process each timestamp independently or interact only at the final comparison stage, leading to insufficient temporal coupling and difficulty in distinguishing semantic changes from non-semantic appearance discrepancies; patch-dominant inference on high-resolution images weakens global semantic continuity and produces fragmented change regions.
en.method: Reformulates bi-temporal change detection as a two-frame tracking problem with weighted bidirectional propagation to aggregate semantic evidence from both temporal directions; constructs histogram-aligned transition frames to stabilize memory propagation across large temporal gaps; employs a global-local adaptive rectification strategy to fuse local and global-view predictions, improving spatial consistency while preserving fine-grained details.

en.help_to_user: Helps users detect semantic changes of arbitrary categories from bi-temporal remote sensing images without training, suitable for rapid change monitoring and emergency response scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Treating change detection as a tracking problem with memory propagation and transition frame smoothing offers a new paradigm for training-free open-vocabulary visual tasks.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on the quality and generalization of pre-trained foundation models (SAM, DINO, CLIP), which may fail under extreme domain shifts or low-quality images.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing bidirectional propagation and memory mechanisms from tracking inspires other temporal visual tasks (e.g., action recognition, event detection) to adopt similar training-free paradigms.

papers.title: Imaginarity-generating power of unitaries: A resource-theoretic approach
papers.summary: Imaginarity, stemming from the complex structure of quantum mechanics, has recently emerged as a fundamental resource, yet its dynamical generation remains largely unexplored. In this work, we introduce the notion of imaginarity-generating power (IGP) of unitary dynamics, which quantifies the ability of unitary operations to produce imaginarity from initially real quantum states. To quantify imaginarity, we employ a measure based on the Hilbert--Schmidt norm, which we show to be monotone under real unital operations. Within the framework of dynamical resource theories, we derive an exact expression for the purity-constrained IGP in arbitrary dimensions and show that, for pure real input states, it depends solely on intrinsic and experimentally accessible properties of the unitary. We further analyze its average behavior over ensembles of states with varying purity under both uniform and Hilbert--Schmidt distributions. We prove that it satisfies the essential properties of a valid resource monotone within the dynamical resource theory of imaginarity. We also characterize the unitaries that maximize the IGP and determine the corresponding bounds. Moreover, for Haar-random unitaries, we show that the IGP concentrates near its maximal value in high dimensions with small fluctuations, indicating that typical high-dimensional quantum dynamics are highly effective at generating imaginarity.

ai.tldr: 提出并分析了酉算子的虚数生成能力（IGP），证明其满足资源单调性，并发现高维Haar随机酉算子能高效生成虚数。
ai.motivation: 量子力学中虚数作为资源的重要性已被认识，但其动态生成机制尚未充分研究。
ai.method: 基于Hilbert-Schmidt范数定义虚数量度，在动态资源理论框架下推导纯度约束IGP的精确表达式，并分析其平均行为与极值。
ai.result: IGP仅依赖于酉算子的内在性质；高维Haar随机酉算子的IGP接近最大值且波动小。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子计算中虚数资源的生成机制，指导设计高效生成虚数的量子门。

idea_spark.idea: 利用高维随机酉算子作为虚数生成器，优化量子算法中的虚数资源消耗。
idea_spark.risk: 实验实现高维酉算子可能面临噪声和退相干挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 虚数生成能力与量子混沌或随机性之间的联系值得进一步探索。

en.tldr: Introduces and analyzes the imaginarity-generating power (IGP) of unitaries, proves its resource monotonicity, and shows that high-dimensional Haar-random unitaries are highly effective at generating imaginarity.
en.motivation: Imaginarity is recognized as a fundamental resource in quantum mechanics, but its dynamical generation remains largely unexplored.
en.method: Defines an imaginarity measure based on the Hilbert-Schmidt norm, derives an exact expression for purity-constrained IGP within dynamical resource theory, and analyzes its average behavior and extremal properties.
en.result: IGP depends solely on intrinsic properties of the unitary; high-dimensional Haar-random unitaries achieve near-maximal IGP with small fluctuations.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into generating imaginarity as a resource, guiding the design of quantum gates that efficiently produce imaginarity.

idea_spark.idea: Use high-dimensional random unitaries as imaginarity generators to optimize resource consumption in quantum algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Experimental implementation of high-dimensional unitaries may face challenges from noise and decoherence.
idea_spark.inspiration: The connection between imaginarity generation and quantum chaos or randomness warrants further investigation.

papers.title: Distributed Multi-View Vision-Only RSSI Estimation
papers.summary: Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) estimation is essential for wireless link management, yet conventional feedback-based approaches incur uplink overhead, suffer from measurement instability, and are subject to inherent feedback loop latency, rendering proactive adaptation infeasible. Although vision-based approaches have been explored, existing methods remain limited by hardware dependency or auxiliary inputs, and lack the spatial diversity needed to resolve camera-side NLoS conditions. To address these limitations, we propose MulViT-TF, a vision-only RSSI estimation framework that exploits distributed multi-view observations through Transformer-based fusion, achieving complementary spatial coverage without any auxiliary sensing inputs. Experimental results across two distinct indoor scenes demonstrate that MulViT-TF achieves RMSE reductions of up to 26.3% and improves the 3dB error coverage by up to 13.8 percentage points over the best-performing single-view baseline, while using fewer FLOPs and parameters.

ai.tldr: 提出一种纯视觉的分布式多视角RSSI估计框架MulViT-TF，通过Transformer融合多视角图像，无需辅助传感输入，在室内场景中显著降低估计误差。
ai.motivation: 传统RSSI估计依赖反馈，存在上行开销、测量不稳定和延迟问题，无法主动适应；现有视觉方法受限于硬件依赖或辅助输入，且缺乏空间多样性以解决相机侧非视距条件。
ai.method: 采用分布式多视角摄像头采集图像，通过Transformer架构融合多视角特征，实现互补空间覆盖，无需任何辅助传感输入。
ai.result: 在两个室内场景中，MulViT-TF相比最佳单视角基线，RMSE降低高达26.3%，3dB误差覆盖提升最多13.8个百分点，且计算量和参数量更少。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用纯视觉和多视角融合来提升无线信号强度估计的精度和鲁棒性。

en.tldr: Proposes MulViT-TF, a vision-only distributed multi-view RSSI estimation framework using Transformer fusion, achieving significant error reduction without auxiliary sensing inputs in indoor scenes.
en.motivation: Conventional RSSI estimation relies on feedback, causing uplink overhead, measurement instability, and latency, hindering proactive adaptation; existing vision methods suffer from hardware dependency or auxiliary inputs and lack spatial diversity to handle camera-side NLoS conditions.
en.method: Employs distributed multi-view cameras to capture images and fuses multi-view features via a Transformer architecture, achieving complementary spatial coverage without any auxiliary sensing inputs.
en.result: In two indoor scenes, MulViT-TF reduces RMSE by up to 26.3% and improves 3dB error coverage by up to 13.8 percentage points over the best single-view baseline, with fewer FLOPs and parameters.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to leverage pure vision and multi-view fusion to improve accuracy and robustness of wireless signal strength estimation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining visual RSSI estimation with online learning for adaptive model updates in dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-camera deployment incurs cost and depends on scene lighting and occlusion; generalization needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by distributed sensing and Transformer attention mechanisms, using spatial complementarity to overcome single-view limitations.

papers.title: Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings for Robust Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
papers.summary: Zero-shot 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is a critical capability for open-world embodied AI. However, existing methods are fundamentally bottlenecked by the poor quality of open-vocabulary 3D proposals, suffering from inaccurate categories and imprecise geometries, as well as the spatial redundancy of exhaustive multi-view reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose MCM-VG, a novel framework that achieves robust zero-shot 3DVG by explicitly establishing Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings. Instead of passively relying on noisy 3D segments, MCM-VG enforces 2D-3D consistency across three fundamental dimensions to achieve precise target localization and reliable reasoning. First, a Semantic Alignment module corrects category mismatches via LLM-driven query parsing and coarse-to-fine 2D-3D matching. Second, an Instance Rectification module leverages VLM-guided 2D segmentations to reconstruct missing targets, back-projecting these reliable visual priors to establish accurate 3D geometries. Finally, to eliminate spatial redundancy, a Viewpoint Distillation module clusters 3D camera directions to extract optimal frames. By pairing these optimal RGB frames with Bird's Eye View maps into concise visual prompt sets, we formulate the final target disambiguation as a multiple-choice reasoning task for Vision-Language Models.   Extensive evaluations on ScanRefer and Nr3D benchmarks demonstrate that MCM-VG sets a new state-of-the-art for zero-shot 3D visual grounding. Remarkably, it achieves 62.0\% and 53.6\% in Acc@0.25 and Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer, outperforming previous baselines by substantial margins of 6.4\% and 4.0\%.

ai.tldr: 提出MCM-VG框架，通过建立多重一致的2D-3D映射，在零样本3D视觉定位任务上达到新SOTA。
ai.motivation: 现有零样本3D视觉定位方法受限于低质量的开放词汇3D提议和冗余的多视角推理。
ai.method: MCM-VG包含语义对齐、实例修正和视角蒸馏三个模块，分别解决类别错配、目标缺失和空间冗余问题。
ai.result: 在ScanRefer上Acc@0.25和Acc@0.5分别达到62.0%和53.6%，超越基线6.4%和4.0%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用2D-3D一致性提升零样本3D视觉定位的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 将视角蒸馏与LLM/VLM结合，通过最优视角选择减少计算冗余。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM/VLM的推理质量，可能在高噪声场景下失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用多视角2D先验修正3D几何，启发其他模态对齐方法。

en.tldr: Proposes MCM-VG, a framework that establishes multiple consistent 2D-3D mappings, achieving new SOTA in zero-shot 3D visual grounding.
en.motivation: Existing zero-shot 3DVG methods suffer from poor-quality open-vocabulary 3D proposals and redundant multi-view reasoning.
en.method: MCM-VG consists of Semantic Alignment, Instance Rectification, and Viewpoint Distillation modules to address category mismatch, missing targets, and spatial redundancy.
en.result: Achieves 62.0% Acc@0.25 and 53.6% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer, outperforming baselines by 6.4% and 4.0%.

idea_spark.inspiration: Using multi-view 2D priors to correct 3D geometry inspires other modality alignment methods.

papers.title: Qvine: Vine Structured Quantum Circuits for Loading High Dimensional Distributions
papers.summary: Loading high dimensional distributions is an important task for utilizing quantum computers on applications ranging from machine learning to finance. The high dimensionality leads to a curse of dimensionality, representing a d-dimensional distribution with k resolution requires dk qubits and an unstructured parameterized circuit would express a unitary in an exponential operator space in the number of qubits, leading to vanishing gradients and poor convergence guarantees even at high depth.   Vine copula decompositions are widely used to represent high dimensional distributions classically, showing high quality approximation in many important applications, such as financial modeling. We present Qvine, a vine structured ansatz for quantum circuits, that mirrors the vine decomposition to construct scalable quantum circuits with efficient trainability while achieving similarly high quality approximation for amplitude encoding distributions. For regular vines (R-vines), we show that the circuit depth scales at most quadratic in the dimension of the distribution, while for D-vines, as well as many practical R-vines, the circuit depth scales linear in the dimension. For 3-dimensional and 4-dimensional Gaussians and empirical joint stock price return distributions for selected stocks, our experiments show Qvines achieve high quality loading.

ai.tldr: 提出Qvine，一种基于藤结构（vine copula）的量子电路，用于高效加载高维分布，电路深度随维度线性或二次增长，实验显示高质量加载。
ai.motivation: 高维分布加载是量子计算在机器学习和金融等领域的关键任务，但高维度导致量子比特需求大、参数化电路训练困难（梯度消失、收敛差）。
ai.method: 借鉴经典藤结构分解（vine copula），设计Qvine量子电路，将高维分布分解为低维条件分布，构建可扩展且可训练的振幅编码电路。
ai.result: 对于R-vine，电路深度最多随维度二次增长；对于D-vine及许多实际R-vine，深度线性增长。在3维和4维高斯分布及股票收益分布上，Qvine实现高质量加载。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的量子电路设计方法，帮助用户高效加载高维概率分布，适用于金融建模、机器学习等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Qvine与变分量子算法结合，用于高维概率分布的采样或参数估计。
idea_spark.risk: 实际量子硬件噪声可能影响电路性能，需验证在近期量子设备上的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 经典统计中的藤结构为量子电路提供结构化设计，启发利用其他经典分解（如张量网络）优化量子电路。

en.tldr: Proposes Qvine, a vine-structured quantum circuit for loading high-dimensional distributions, with circuit depth scaling at most quadratically in dimension, achieving high-quality loading in experiments.
en.motivation: Loading high-dimensional distributions is crucial for quantum computing in machine learning and finance, but high dimensionality leads to large qubit requirements and poor trainability due to vanishing gradients.
en.method: Leverages classical vine copula decomposition to design Qvine quantum circuits, decomposing high-dimensional distributions into lower-dimensional conditional distributions for scalable and trainable amplitude encoding.
en.result: For R-vines, circuit depth scales at most quadratically; for D-vines and many practical R-vines, depth scales linearly. Experiments on 3D/4D Gaussians and stock return distributions show high-quality loading.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable quantum circuit design for efficiently loading high-dimensional probability distributions, useful in financial modeling and machine learning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining Qvine with variational quantum algorithms for sampling or parameter estimation of high-dimensional distributions.
idea_spark.risk: Real quantum hardware noise may affect performance; robustness on near-term devices needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Classical vine structures inspire structured quantum circuit design, suggesting other classical decompositions (e.g., tensor networks) could optimize quantum circuits.

papers.title: Skill-informed Data-driven Haptic Nudges for High-dimensional Human Motor Learning
papers.summary: In this work, we propose a data-driven framework to design optimal haptic nudge feedback leveraging the learner's estimated skill to address the challenge of learning a novel motor task in a high-dimensional, redundant motor space. A nudge is a series of vibrotactile feedback delivered to the learner to encourage motor movements that aid in task completion. We first model the stochastic dynamics of human motor learning under haptic nudges using an Input-Output Hidden Markov Model (IOHMM), which explicitly decouples latent skill evolution from observable performance measures. Leveraging this predictive model, we formulate the haptic nudge feedback design problem as a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP). This allows us to derive an optimal nudging policy that minimizes long-term performance cost and implicitly guides the learner toward superior skill states. We validate our approach through a human participant study (N=30) involving a high-dimensional motor task rendered through a hand exoskeleton. Results demonstrate that participants trained with the POMDP-derived policy exhibit significantly accelerated movement efficiency and endpoint accuracy compared to groups receiving heuristic-based feedback or no feedback. Furthermore, synergy analysis reveals that the POMDP group discovers efficient low-dimensional motor representations more rapidly.

ai.tldr: 提出数据驱动框架，利用学习者技能估计设计最优触觉提示反馈，加速高维运动学习。
ai.motivation: 高维冗余运动空间中学习新任务困难，现有反馈方法未充分利用学习者技能状态。
ai.method: 用输入输出隐马尔可夫模型建模触觉提示下的运动学习随机动态，将反馈设计问题建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程，求解最优提示策略。
ai.result: 30人手外骨骼实验表明，POMDP策略组比启发式反馈组和无反馈组显著提升运动效率和终点精度，更快发现低维运动表征。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何结合技能估计与最优控制设计个性化触觉反馈，提升运动学习效果。

idea_spark.idea: 将技能状态作为隐变量，通过POMDP优化反馈策略，实现自适应学习引导。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖准确的状态估计和动力学假设，实际应用中可能因个体差异或环境变化导致性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将用户模型与最优决策结合，设计更智能的交互式学习辅助系统。

en.tldr: A data-driven framework designs optimal haptic nudge feedback using estimated learner skill to accelerate high-dimensional motor learning.
en.motivation: Learning novel motor tasks in high-dimensional redundant spaces is challenging; existing feedback methods do not leverage learner skill state.
en.method: Model stochastic motor learning dynamics under haptic nudges with an Input-Output Hidden Markov Model, formulate feedback design as a POMDP, and derive an optimal nudging policy.
en.result: A 30-participant hand exoskeleton study shows the POMDP group significantly improves movement efficiency and endpoint accuracy over heuristic or no feedback, and discovers efficient low-dimensional motor representations faster.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to combine skill estimation with optimal control to design personalized haptic feedback for enhanced motor learning.

idea_spark.idea: Treat skill state as a latent variable and optimize feedback policy via POMDP for adaptive learning guidance.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on accurate state estimation and dynamics assumptions; real-world performance may degrade due to individual differences or environmental changes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining user models with optimal decision-making to design more intelligent interactive learning assistance systems.

papers.title: Virtual-reality based patient-specific simulation of spine surgical procedures: A fast, highly automated and high-fidelity system for surgical education and planning
papers.summary: Surgical training involves didactic teaching, mentor-led learning, surgical skills laboratories, and direct exposure to surgery; however, increasing clinical pressures have limited operating room (OR) exposure. This work leverages virtual reality (VR) to provide a safe and immersive training environment. Existing VR training is often based on standardized scenarios not tailored to individual clinical cases. This study addresses this limitation using artificial intelligence (AI) based computer vision methods to generate patient-specific simulations from computed tomography (CT) and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). This study focuses on patient-specific spinal decompression simulation for spinal stenosis in a virtual operating room. The objectives were (1) automatic creation of 3D anatomical models and (2) VR simulation of spinal decompression procedures including laminectomy, disc resection, and foraminotomy. Model construction required multimodal fusion (registration) of CT and MRI and segmentation of relevant structures. Segmentation was evaluated using the Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC), and registration accuracy using Target Registration Error (TRE). Qualitative feedback was obtained from surgeons and trainees. High-fidelity patient-specific 3D models were generated efficiently (approximately 2.5 minutes per case, N = 15). Segmentation accuracy was high, with a DSC of 0.95 (+/- 0.03) for vertebral bone and 0.895 (+/- 0.02) for soft tissue structures. Registration accuracy showed a mean TRE of 1.73 (+/- 0.42) mm. Semi-structured interviews indicated improved spatial understanding, increased procedural confidence, and strong perceived educational value. This platform significantly reduced the time and costs of patient-specific modelling, thereby facilitating pre-operative planning, post-procedural assessments, and comprehensive surgical simulation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于虚拟现实的患者特异性脊柱手术模拟系统，利用AI视觉方法从CT和MRI自动构建3D解剖模型，实现椎管减压手术的沉浸式训练与规划。
ai.motivation: 传统手术培训受限于临床压力与手术室暴露不足，现有VR训练缺乏患者特异性，无法针对个体病例进行模拟。
ai.method: 采用多模态融合（配准）CT与MRI，分割相关结构，自动生成高保真3D模型，并在虚拟手术室中模拟椎板切除术、椎间盘切除和椎间孔切开术。
ai.result: 每例模型构建约2.5分钟，骨分割DSC达0.95，软组织DSC达0.895，配准TRE为1.73mm；医生反馈空间理解与操作信心提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助外科医生和学员在无风险环境中进行术前规划、术后评估及重复练习，提高手术技能与安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合实时力反馈与触觉渲染，增强模拟真实感；或集成术中导航数据，实现术前计划与术中执行的闭环验证。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖高质量多模态影像，低分辨率或伪影数据可能影响分割与配准精度；临床验证样本量较小，需更大规模评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用AI自动化生成患者特异性解剖模型，大幅降低传统手工建模的时间与成本，为个性化手术模拟开辟新路径。

en.tldr: A VR-based patient-specific spine surgical simulation system that uses AI computer vision to automatically build 3D anatomical models from CT and MRI, enabling immersive training and planning for spinal decompression procedures.
en.motivation: Traditional surgical training suffers from limited OR exposure and lacks patient-specific VR scenarios tailored to individual clinical cases.
en.method: Multimodal fusion (registration) of CT and MRI, segmentation of relevant structures, automatic generation of high-fidelity 3D models, and VR simulation of laminectomy, discectomy, and foraminotomy.
en.result: Model construction takes ~2.5 minutes per case; bone segmentation DSC 0.95, soft tissue DSC 0.895, registration TRE 1.73 mm; surgeons reported improved spatial understanding and procedural confidence.
en.help_to_user: Enables surgeons and trainees to perform preoperative planning, post-procedural assessment, and repetitive practice in a risk-free virtual environment, enhancing surgical skills and safety.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate real-time haptic feedback and force rendering for higher realism; or combine with intraoperative navigation data to close the loop between planning and execution.
idea_spark.risk: Model quality depends on high-quality multimodal images; low resolution or artifacts may degrade segmentation and registration accuracy; clinical validation with larger cohorts is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging AI to automate patient-specific anatomical modeling dramatically reduces time and cost compared to manual methods, opening new avenues for personalized surgical simulation.

papers.title: $\text{PKS}^4$:Parallel Kinematic Selective State Space Scanners for Efficient Video Understanding
papers.summary: Temporal modeling remains a fundamental challenge in video understanding, particularly as sequence lengths scale. Traditional video models relying on dense spatiotemporal attention suffer from quadratic computational costs for long videos. To circumvent these costs, recent approaches adapt image models for videos via Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods such as adapters. However, deeply inserting these modules incurs prohibitive activation memory overhead during back-propagation. While recent efficient State Space Models (SSMs) introduce linear complexity, they disrupt 2D spatial relationships and rely on extensive masked pre-training to recover spatial awareness.   To overcome these limitations, we propose Parallel Kinematic Selective State Space Scanners (PKS$^4$). We retain a standard 2D vision backbone for spatial semantics and insert a single plug-and-play PKS$^4$ module with linear-complexity temporal scanning, avoiding temporal attention and multi-layer adapters. We first extract kinematic priors via a Kinematic Prior Encoder, which captures local displacements and motion boundaries through inter-frame correlations and differences. These priors drive linear-complexity SSMs to track underlying kinematic states, adaptively modulating update speeds and read-write strategies at each time step.   Instead of global scanning, we deploy parallel scanners along the temporal dimension for each spatial location, preserving spatial structures while reducing overhead. Experiments on spatial-heavy and temporal-heavy action recognition benchmarks show that PKS$^4$ achieves state-of-the-art performance. Remarkably, our method converges in merely $20$ epochs, achieving approximately $10\times$ lower training compute than pure video SSMs, establishing a new paradigm for efficient video understanding.

ai.tldr: 提出PKS⁴模块，利用并行运动学选择性状态空间扫描实现线性复杂度的视频时序建模，在动作识别任务上达到最优性能且训练效率提升约10倍。
ai.motivation: 现有视频模型依赖密集时空注意力导致二次计算成本，或通过适配器插入图像模型带来高激活内存开销；纯状态空间模型破坏2D空间结构且需大量掩码预训练。
ai.method: 保留标准2D视觉骨干，插入单个PKS⁴模块：先由运动学先验编码器提取帧间位移与运动边界，驱动线性复杂度的SSM自适应调节更新速度与读写策略；沿时间维度对每个空间位置并行扫描，保持空间结构。
ai.result: 在空间密集和时间密集的动作识别基准上达到最优性能，仅需20轮收敛，训练计算量约为纯视频SSM的1/10。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效视频理解新范式，适合长视频场景，降低训练成本且易于集成到现有2D骨干中。

idea_spark.idea: 将运动学先验与并行SSM结合，替代传统注意力或适配器，实现线性复杂度时序建模。
idea_spark.risk: 运动学先验编码器可能对快速运动或遮挡场景敏感；并行扫描在极端长序列下仍需验证内存效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受机器人运动学中并行机构启发，将空间位置视为独立运动链，沿时间轴并行扫描以保持空间结构。

en.tldr: Proposes PKS⁴, a plug-and-play module with linear-complexity temporal scanning driven by kinematic priors, achieving SOTA on action recognition with ~10× training compute reduction.
en.motivation: Existing video models suffer from quadratic cost of dense spatiotemporal attention or high activation memory of adapters; pure SSMs disrupt 2D spatial structure and require heavy masked pre-training.
en.method: Retains a standard 2D vision backbone, inserts a single PKS⁴ module: a Kinematic Prior Encoder extracts inter-frame displacements and motion boundaries, driving linear-complexity SSMs to adaptively modulate update speed and read-write strategies; parallel scanners along temporal dimension for each spatial location preserve spatial structure.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art on spatial-heavy and temporal-heavy action recognition benchmarks, converges in 20 epochs, with ~10× lower training compute than pure video SSMs.
en.help_to_user: Offers an efficient video understanding paradigm suitable for long videos, reducing training cost and easy to integrate into existing 2D backbones.

idea_spark.idea: Combine kinematic priors with parallel SSMs to replace traditional attention or adapters for linear-complexity temporal modeling.
idea_spark.risk: Kinematic prior encoder may be sensitive to fast motion or occlusion; parallel scanning memory efficiency on extremely long sequences needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by parallel mechanisms in robotics kinematics, treating each spatial location as an independent kinematic chain and scanning along time in parallel to preserve spatial structure.

papers.title: Solve Crude Oil Scheduling Problems by Using Quantum-Classical Hybrid Algorithms
papers.summary: The optimization of front-end crude oil scheduling is a critical determinant of refinery profitability and operational stability. However, the coupling of discrete logistics events (e.g., vessel berthing) with continuous material flows (e.g., pipeline transfers) renders this problem an NP-hard Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) challenge, often intractable for classical solvers at industrial scales. This study proposes a novel hybrid quantum-classical framework to address these computational bottlenecks. We employ Benders Decomposition to decouple the monolithic model into a discrete Master Problem (MP) and a continuous Subproblem (SP). To exploit the search capabilities of quantum computing, the MP is reformulated as a Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) model and solved via a hybrid quantum solver, while the SP enforces mass balance and quality constraints through iterative optimality and feasibility cuts. Extensive experiments on 15 multi-scale instances demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly outperforms traditional metaheuristics (e.g., Genetic Algorithms, Tabu Search), reducing total operating costs by approximately 73--80% and achieving computational speeds comparable to state-of-the-art commercial solvers (Gurobi). By effectively leveraging global optimality cuts, the method overcomes the tendency of heuristic approaches to trap in local optima, providing a robust and scalable solution for complex refinery logistics.

ai.tldr: 提出一种量子-经典混合框架，通过Benders分解将原油调度MILP问题解耦，用量子求解器处理离散主问题，经典方法处理连续子问题，在15个实例上比传统元启发式降低73-80%成本，速度接近商业求解器。
ai.motivation: 原油前端调度是NP难的MILP问题，工业规模下经典求解器难以处理，而传统启发式易陷入局部最优。
ai.method: 采用Benders分解将模型分为离散主问题（MP）和连续子问题（SP）；MP转化为QUBO由混合量子求解器求解，SP通过迭代最优性/可行性切割保证质量平衡。
ai.result: 在15个多尺度实例上，总运营成本比遗传算法、禁忌搜索等降低约73-80%，计算速度与Gurobi相当。
ai.help_to_user: 为炼油厂调度提供一种可扩展、鲁棒的优化方案，尤其适合大规模复杂物流场景。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将量子求解器用于主问题中的组合爆炸部分，经典方法处理连续约束，形成通用解耦范式。
idea_spark.risk: 当前量子硬件规模和噪声可能限制实际部署，需验证在更大实例上的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: Benders分解与QUBO的结合为量子计算在工业优化中提供了实用路径，启发探索更多分解策略。

zh.tldr: 提出一种量子-经典混合框架，通过Benders分解将原油调度MILP问题解耦，用量子求解器处理离散主问题，经典方法处理连续子问题，在15个实例上比传统元启发式降低73-80%成本，速度接近商业求解器。

zh.result: 在15个多尺度实例上，总运营成本比遗传算法、禁忌搜索等降低约73-80%，计算速度与Gurobi相当。
zh.help_to_user: 为炼油厂调度提供一种可扩展、鲁棒的优化方案，尤其适合大规模复杂物流场景。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将量子求解器用于主问题中的组合爆炸部分，经典方法处理连续约束，形成通用解耦范式。
idea_spark.risk: 当前量子硬件规模和噪声可能限制实际部署，需验证在更大实例上的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: Benders分解与QUBO的结合为量子计算在工业优化中提供了实用路径，启发探索更多分解策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a quantum-classical hybrid framework that uses Benders decomposition to decouple the crude oil scheduling MILP, solves the discrete master problem with a quantum solver, and handles the continuous subproblem classically, reducing costs by 73-80% over metaheuristics on 15 instances with speed comparable to Gurobi.
en.motivation: Front-end crude oil scheduling is an NP-hard MILP problem intractable for classical solvers at industrial scale, and traditional heuristics often get trapped in local optima.
en.method: Benders decomposition splits the model into a discrete Master Problem (MP) and a continuous Subproblem (SP); the MP is reformulated as QUBO and solved by a hybrid quantum solver, while the SP enforces mass balance and quality constraints via iterative optimality/feasibility cuts.
en.result: On 15 multi-scale instances, total operating costs are reduced by approximately 73-80% compared to Genetic Algorithms and Tabu Search, with computational speed matching Gurobi.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable and robust optimization solution for refinery scheduling, especially for large-scale complex logistics.

idea_spark.idea: Use quantum solvers for the combinatorial explosion part of the master problem and classical methods for continuous constraints, forming a general decoupling paradigm.
idea_spark.risk: Current quantum hardware size and noise may limit practical deployment; stability on larger instances needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of Benders decomposition and QUBO offers a practical path for quantum computing in industrial optimization, inspiring exploration of more decomposition strategies.

papers.title: Delta Score Matters! Spatial Adaptive Multi Guidance in Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in synthesizing complex static and temporal visuals, a breakthrough largely driven by Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG). However, despite its pivotal role in aligning generated content with textual prompts, standard CFG relies on a globally uniform scalar. This homogeneous amplification traps models in a well-documented "detail-artifact dilemma": low guidance scales fail to inject intricate semantics, while high scales inevitably cause structural degradation, color over-saturation, and temporal inconsistencies in videos. In this paper, we expose the physical root of this flaw through the lens of differential geometry. By analyzing Tweedie's Formula, we reveal that CFG intrinsically performs a tangential linear extrapolation. Because the natural data manifold is highly curved, this uniform linear step introduces a severe orthogonal deviation. To keep the generation trajectory safely bounded, we formulate a theoretical upper bound for spatial and adaptive guidance. Based on these geometric insights, we propose Spatial Adaptive Multi Guidance (SAMG), a training-free and virtually zero-cost sampling algorithm. SAMG dynamically computes point-wise conditional guidance energy, applying a conservative minimum scale to high-energy boundary regions to preserve delicate micro-textures, while deploying an aggressive maximum scale in low-energy regions to maximize semantic injection. Extensive experiments across diverse image (SD 1.5, SDXL, SD3.5 Medium) and video (CogVideoX, ModelScope) architectures demonstrate that SAMG effectively resolves the detail-artifact dilemma, achieving superior semantic alignment, structural integrity, and temporal smoothness without any computational overhead.

ai.tldr: 提出空间自适应多重引导（SAMG），通过微分几何分析解决扩散模型中全局统一引导尺度导致的细节-伪影困境。
ai.motivation: 标准无分类器引导（CFG）使用全局统一标量，导致低引导尺度语义不足、高引导尺度结构退化与颜色过饱和，陷入细节-伪影困境。
ai.method: 基于Tweedie公式的微分几何分析，揭示CFG本质是切向线性外推，因数据流形高度弯曲产生正交偏差；据此推导空间自适应引导的理论上界，提出SAMG算法，动态计算逐点条件引导能量，在高能边界区域使用保守最小尺度以保留微纹理，在低能区域使用激进最大尺度以最大化语义注入。
ai.result: 在SD 1.5、SDXL、SD3.5 Medium、CogVideoX、ModelScope等架构上，SAMG有效解决细节-伪影困境，实现更优的语义对齐、结构完整性和时间平滑性，且无额外计算开销。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解扩散模型中引导尺度的几何根源，并提供一种无需训练、零额外成本的改进采样方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将空间自适应引导思想扩展到多模态条件（如文本+图像）或跨模态生成任务中。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导依赖流形曲率假设，在高度非平滑流形上可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从微分几何中流形曲率与切空间外推的偏差出发，启发其他生成任务中全局均匀操作的局部自适应改进。

zh.motivation: 标准无分类器引导（CFG）使用全局统一标量，导致低引导尺度语义不足、高引导尺度结构退化与颜色过饱和，陷入细节-伪影困境。

idea_spark.risk: 理论推导依赖流形曲率假设，在高度非平滑流形上可能失效。

en.tldr: Proposes Spatial Adaptive Multi Guidance (SAMG), which resolves the detail-artifact dilemma in diffusion models by analyzing the geometric root of uniform guidance scales.
en.motivation: Standard Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) uses a globally uniform scalar, causing insufficient semantics at low scales and structural degradation, color over-saturation at high scales—the detail-artifact dilemma.
en.method: Through differential geometry analysis of Tweedie's Formula, reveals CFG as tangential linear extrapolation that incurs severe orthogonal deviation due to curved data manifold; derives a theoretical upper bound for spatial adaptive guidance, and proposes SAMG—a training-free, zero-cost sampling algorithm that dynamically computes point-wise conditional guidance energy, applying conservative minimum scale in high-energy boundary regions to preserve micro-textures and aggressive maximum scale in low-energy regions to maximize semantic injection.
en.result: Across SD 1.5, SDXL, SD3.5 Medium, CogVideoX, ModelScope architectures, SAMG effectively resolves the detail-artifact dilemma, achieving superior semantic alignment, structural integrity, and temporal smoothness with no computational overhead.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the geometric root of guidance scale issues in diffusion models and provides a training-free, zero-cost improved sampling method.

idea_spark.idea: Extend spatial adaptive guidance to multi-modal conditions (e.g., text+image) or cross-modal generation tasks.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical derivation relies on manifold curvature assumptions, which may fail on highly non-smooth manifolds.
idea_spark.inspiration: The deviation between manifold curvature and tangent-space extrapolation in differential geometry inspires local adaptive improvements for globally uniform operations in other generation tasks.

papers.title: 3D-LENS: A 3D Lifting-based Elevated Novel-view Synthesis method for Single-View Aerial-Ground Re-Identification
papers.summary: Aerial-Ground Re-Identification (AG-ReID) is constrained by the viewpoint-domain gap, as drastic viewpoint disparities occlude or distort discriminative features, making cross-viewpoint image retrieval challenging. While existing methods rely on paired cross-view annotations, real-world deployments, such as wilderness search-and-rescue (SAR), often lack target-domain data, requiring retrieval from ground-level references alone. To our knowledge, we are the first to address this challenge by formalizing the Single-View AG-ReID (SV AG-ReID) setting, where models trained on a single real viewpoint must generalize to an unseen viewpoint. We propose 3D Lifting-based Elevated Novel-view Synthesis (3D-LENS), a unified framework combining geometrically-consistent novel view synthesis that leverages large-scale 3D mesh reconstruction, with a robust representation learning scheme to mitigate synthetic-to-real bias. Unlike 2D generative baselines that suffer from geometric inconsistencies or prior 3D methods that are restricted to class-specific templates, our approach ensures view-consistent synthesis across diverse categories without predefined templates that fail to capture fine-grained details, such as carried objects. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on SV AG-ReID scenarios. Code and data will be released at https://github.com/TurtleSmoke/3D-LENS.

ai.tldr: 提出首个单视角航地再识别任务，并设计3D-LENS框架，通过3D网格重建和新视角合成实现跨视角检索。
ai.motivation: 现有航地再识别依赖成对跨视角标注，实际场景（如野外搜救）缺乏目标域数据，需从单一视角泛化到未见视角。
ai.method: 结合大规模3D网格重建的几何一致新视角合成，以及鲁棒表示学习以缓解合成到真实的偏差。
ai.result: 在单视角航地再识别场景中达到最先进性能。
ai.help_to_user: 若您从事跨视角行人/车辆再识别或无人机视觉任务，本方法可帮助在缺乏目标域数据时提升检索鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练3D重建模型生成多视角训练数据，结合对抗域适应进一步缩小合成-真实差距。
idea_spark.risk: 3D网格重建质量依赖输入图像，对遮挡或低分辨率场景可能引入伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将几何先验与生成模型结合，为无配对数据的跨视角学习提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出首个单视角航地再识别任务，并设计3D-LENS框架，通过3D网格重建和新视角合成实现跨视角检索。
zh.motivation: 现有航地再识别依赖成对跨视角标注，实际场景（如野外搜救）缺乏目标域数据，需从单一视角泛化到未见视角。
zh.method: 结合大规模3D网格重建的几何一致新视角合成，以及鲁棒表示学习以缓解合成到真实的偏差。
zh.result: 在单视角航地再识别场景中达到最先进性能。
zh.help_to_user: 若您从事跨视角行人/车辆再识别或无人机视觉任务，本方法可帮助在缺乏目标域数据时提升检索鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练3D重建模型生成多视角训练数据，结合对抗域适应进一步缩小合成-真实差距。
idea_spark.risk: 3D网格重建质量依赖输入图像，对遮挡或低分辨率场景可能引入伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将几何先验与生成模型结合，为无配对数据的跨视角学习提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes the first single-view aerial-ground re-identification task and a 3D-LENS framework leveraging 3D mesh reconstruction and novel view synthesis for cross-view retrieval.
en.motivation: Existing AG-ReID relies on paired cross-view annotations, but real-world deployments (e.g., wilderness SAR) lack target-domain data, requiring generalization from a single viewpoint to unseen ones.
en.method: Combines geometrically-consistent novel view synthesis via large-scale 3D mesh reconstruction with robust representation learning to mitigate synthetic-to-real bias.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on single-view AG-ReID scenarios.
en.help_to_user: If you work on cross-view person/vehicle re-identification or drone vision, this method helps improve retrieval robustness when target-domain data is unavailable.

idea_spark.idea: Use pretrained 3D reconstruction models to generate multi-view training data, combined with adversarial domain adaptation to further reduce synthetic-real gap.
idea_spark.risk: 3D mesh quality depends on input images; occlusions or low resolution may introduce artifacts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining geometric priors with generative models offers a new direction for cross-view learning without paired data.

papers.title: A Multistage Extraction Pipeline for Long Scanned Financial Documents: An Empirical Study in Industrial KYC Workflows
papers.summary: Structured information extraction from long, multilingual scanned financial documents is a core requirement in industrial KYC and compliance workflows. These documents are typically non machine readable, noisy, and visually heterogeneous. They usually span dozens of pages while containing only sparse task relevant information. Although recent vision-language models achieve strong benchmark performance, directly applying them end to end to full financial reports often leads to unreliable extraction under real world conditions. We present a multistage extraction framework that integrates image preprocessing, multilingual OCR, hybrid page-level retrieval, and compact VLM-based structured extraction. The design separates page localization from multimodal reasoning, enabling more accurate extraction from complex multipage documents. We evaluated the framework on 120 production KYC documents comprising about 3000 multilingual scanned pages. Across multiple OCR-VLM combinations, the proposed pipeline consistently outperforms direct PDF-to-VLM baselines, improving field-level accuracy by up to 31.9 percentage points. The best configuration, PaddleOCR with MiniCPM2.6, achieves 87.27 percent accuracy. Ablation studies show that page-level retrieval is the dominant factor in performance improvements, particularly for complex financial statements and non-English documents.

ai.tldr: 提出一个多阶段提取流水线，用于处理长篇幅、多语种、扫描的金融文档，在工业KYC场景中显著优于端到端VLM基线。
ai.motivation: 工业KYC流程中需要从长篇幅、多语种、非机器可读的扫描金融文档中提取结构化信息，直接应用视觉语言模型效果不可靠。
ai.method: 集成图像预处理、多语种OCR、混合页面级检索和紧凑VLM结构化提取的多阶段框架，将页面定位与多模态推理分离。
ai.result: 在120份生产KYC文档（约3000页）上，最佳配置PaddleOCR+MiniCPM2.6达到87.27%字段准确率，比直接PDF-to-VLM基线提升最多31.9个百分点；消融实验表明页面级检索是性能提升的主导因素。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你需要从复杂、多页、多语种的扫描文档中提取结构化信息，这个多阶段流水线提供了可落地的方案和配置参考。

idea_spark.idea: 将页面级检索与紧凑VLM结合，先定位相关页面再精细提取，避免全文档推理的噪声和成本。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖OCR质量，且页面检索模块可能漏检关键信息；多阶段流水线增加了系统复杂度和延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 分离定位与推理的思路启发：对于稀疏信息的长文档，先检索再提取比端到端更鲁棒，可推广至多模态RAG系统。

en.tldr: A multistage extraction pipeline for long, multilingual scanned financial documents significantly outperforms end-to-end VLM baselines in industrial KYC workflows.
en.motivation: Structured information extraction from long, multilingual, non-machine-readable scanned financial documents is unreliable when directly applying vision-language models end-to-end in industrial KYC and compliance workflows.
en.method: A multistage framework integrating image preprocessing, multilingual OCR, hybrid page-level retrieval, and compact VLM-based structured extraction, separating page localization from multimodal reasoning.
en.result: Evaluated on 120 production KYC documents (~3000 pages), the best configuration (PaddleOCR + MiniCPM2.6) achieves 87.27% field-level accuracy, improving up to 31.9 percentage points over direct PDF-to-VLM baselines; ablation studies show page-level retrieval is the dominant factor.
en.help_to_user: If you need to extract structured information from complex, multi-page, multilingual scanned documents, this multistage pipeline provides a practical solution and configuration guidance.

idea_spark.idea: Combine page-level retrieval with compact VLM to first locate relevant pages then perform fine-grained extraction, avoiding noise and cost of full-document reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on OCR quality and potential missing of critical information by the retrieval module; increased system complexity and latency.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of separating localization from reasoning inspires that for sparse-information long documents, retrieve-then-extract is more robust than end-to-end, and can be extended to multimodal RAG systems.

papers.title: Atomic-Probe Governance for Skill Updates in Compositional Robot Policies
papers.summary: Skill libraries in deployed robotic systems are continually updated through fine-tuning, fresh demonstrations, or domain adaptation, yet existing typed-composition methods (BLADE, SymSkill, Generative Skill Chaining) treat the library as frozen at test time and do not analyze how composition outcomes change when a skill is replaced. We introduce a paired-sampling cross-version swap protocol on robosuite manipulation tasks to characterize this dimension of compositional skill learning. On a dual-arm peg-in-hole task we discover a dominant-skill effect: one ECM achieves 86.7% atomic success rate while every other ECM is at or below 26.7%, and whether this dominant ECM enters a composition shifts the success rate by up to +50pp. We characterize the boundary on a simpler pick task where all atomic policies saturate at 100% and the effect is undefined. Across three tasks we further find that off-policy behavioral distance metrics fail to identify the dominant ECM, ruling out the natural cheap predictor. We propose an atomic-quality probe and a Hybrid Selector combining per-skill probes (zero per-decision cost) with selective composition revalidation (full cost), and characterize its Pareto frontier on 144 skill-update decisions. On T6 the atomic-only probe sits 23pp below full revalidation (64.6% vs 87.5% oracle match) at zero per-decision cost; a Hybrid Selector with m=10 closes most of that gap to ~12pp at 46% of full-revalidation cost. On the cross-task average over 144 events, atomic-only is within 3pp of full revalidation under a mixed-oracle caveat. The atomic-quality probe is, to our knowledge, the first principled, deployment-ready primitive for skill-update governance in compositional robot policies.

ai.tldr: 提出原子质量探针和混合选择器，用于管理组合机器人策略中技能更新的影响。
ai.motivation: 现有组合方法在测试时冻结技能库，无法分析技能替换后组合结果的变化。
ai.method: 引入配对采样跨版本交换协议，在robosuite任务上测试，提出原子质量探针和混合选择器。
ai.result: 在双轴插孔任务中发现主导技能效应，原子探针在零决策成本下与完全重验证差距23pp，混合选择器（m=10）将差距缩小至12pp，成本降低54%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助机器人系统在更新技能库时快速评估新技能对整体组合的影响，避免全面重验证的高成本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用原子质量探针作为轻量级代理，预测技能替换后的组合性能，结合选择性重验证平衡成本与准确性。
idea_spark.risk: 探针可能无法捕捉复杂交互效应，在高度耦合的任务中性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件工程中回归测试选择启发，将类似思想应用于机器人技能组合的持续集成。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件工程中回归测试选择启发，将类似思想应用于机器人技能组合的持续集成。

en.tldr: Proposes atomic-quality probe and hybrid selector to govern skill-update effects in compositional robot policies.
en.motivation: Existing composition methods freeze skill libraries at test time, ignoring how composition outcomes change when a skill is replaced.
en.method: Introduces a paired-sampling cross-version swap protocol on robosuite tasks, proposes atomic-quality probe and hybrid selector.
en.result: Discovers dominant-skill effect on dual-arm peg-in-hole task; atomic-only probe trails full revalidation by 23pp at zero cost; hybrid selector (m=10) reduces gap to ~12pp at 46% cost.
en.help_to_user: Helps robotic systems quickly assess the impact of skill updates on overall composition without costly full revalidation.

idea_spark.idea: Use atomic-quality probe as lightweight proxy to predict composition performance after skill replacement, combined with selective revalidation to balance cost and accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Probe may fail to capture complex interaction effects in highly coupled tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by regression test selection in software engineering, applying similar ideas to continuous integration of robot skills.

papers.title: MetaSR: Content-Adaptive Metadata Orchestration for Generative Super-Resolution
papers.summary: We study generative super-resolution (SR) in real-world scenarios where content and degradations vary across domains, genres, and segments. For example, images and videos may alternate between text overlays, fast motion, smooth cartoons, and low-light faces, each benefiting from different forms of side information. Existing metadata-guided SR methods typically use a fixed conditioning design, which is suboptimal when useful cues are content dependent and transmission budgets are limited. We propose MetaSR, a Diffusion Transformer (DiT)-based framework that selects and injects task-relevant metadata to guide SR under resource constraints. Specifically, we use the DiT's own VAE and transformer backbone to fuse heterogeneous metadata, and adopt an efficient distillation strategy that enables one-step diffusion inference. Experiments across diverse content buckets and degradation regimes show that MetaSR outperforms reference solutions by up to 1.0~dB PSNR while achieving up to 50\% transmission bitrate saving at matched quality. We assess these gains under a rate--distortion optimization (RDO) framework that jointly accounts for sender-side bitrate and receiver/display quality metrics (e.g., PSNR and SSIM).

ai.tldr: 提出MetaSR，一种基于扩散Transformer的框架，通过内容自适应的元数据编排来指导生成式超分辨率，在节省传输码率的同时提升重建质量。
ai.motivation: 现有元数据引导的超分辨率方法采用固定条件设计，无法适应内容（如文字、运动、卡通、低光人脸）和退化的多样性，且传输预算有限。
ai.method: 利用扩散Transformer自身的VAE和Transformer骨干融合异构元数据，并采用高效蒸馏策略实现单步扩散推理；在率失真优化框架下联合优化发送端码率和接收端质量指标。
ai.result: 在多种内容桶和退化场景下，相比参考方案PSNR提升最高1.0 dB，同等质量下传输码率节省高达50%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过自适应元数据选择与注入，在资源受限条件下提升生成式超分辨率的效率与质量。

idea_spark.idea: 利用扩散模型自身特征提取能力融合异构元数据，避免额外编码器，并通过蒸馏实现高效推理。
idea_spark.risk: 元数据选择策略可能对极端内容或未见退化泛化不足；单步蒸馏可能牺牲部分生成多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将传输优化与生成质量联合建模，启发在通信受限场景下设计更智能的端到端生成系统。
