idea_spark.idea: 利用扩散模型自身特征提取能力融合异构元数据，避免额外编码器，并通过蒸馏实现高效推理。
idea_spark.risk: 元数据选择策略可能对极端内容或未见退化泛化不足；单步蒸馏可能牺牲部分生成多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将传输优化与生成质量联合建模，启发在通信受限场景下设计更智能的端到端生成系统。

en.tldr: Proposes MetaSR, a Diffusion Transformer-based framework that orchestrates content-adaptive metadata to guide generative super-resolution, achieving bitrate savings while improving reconstruction quality.
en.motivation: Existing metadata-guided SR methods use fixed conditioning, which is suboptimal for diverse content (e.g., text, motion, cartoons, low-light faces) and degradation, especially under limited transmission budgets.
en.method: Leverages the DiT's own VAE and transformer backbone to fuse heterogeneous metadata, and adopts an efficient distillation strategy for one-step diffusion inference; jointly optimizes sender bitrate and receiver quality metrics under a rate-distortion optimization framework.
en.result: Outperforms reference solutions by up to 1.0 dB PSNR across diverse content and degradation regimes, while saving up to 50% transmission bitrate at matched quality.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how adaptive metadata selection and injection can improve the efficiency and quality of generative super-resolution under resource constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Use the diffusion model's own feature extraction to fuse heterogeneous metadata without extra encoders, and achieve efficient inference via distillation.
idea_spark.risk: Metadata selection may generalize poorly to extreme content or unseen degradations; one-step distillation may sacrifice some generative diversity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Jointly modeling transmission optimization and generation quality inspires the design of smarter end-to-end generative systems in communication-constrained scenarios.

papers.title: Select to Think: Unlocking SLM Potential with Local Sufficiency
papers.summary: Small language models (SLMs) offer computational efficiency for scalable deployment, yet they often fall short of the reasoning power exhibited by their larger counterparts (LLMs). To mitigate this gap, current approaches invoke an LLM to generate tokens at points of reasoning divergence, but these external calls introduce substantial latency and costs. Alternatively, standard distillation is often hindered by the capacity limitation, as SLMs struggle to accurately mimic the LLM's complex generative distribution. We address this dilemma by identifying local sufficiency: at divergence points, the LLM's preferred token consistently resides within the SLM's top-K next-token predictions, even when failing to emerge as the SLM top-1 choice. We therefore propose SELECT TO THINK (S2T), which reframes the LLM's role from open-ended generation to selection among the SLM's proposals, simplifying the supervision signal to discrete candidate rankings. Leveraging this, we introduce S2T-LOCAL, which distills the selection logic into the SLM, empowering it to perform autonomous re-ranking without inference-time LLM dependency. Empirically, we demonstrate that a 1.5B SLM's top-8 candidates capture the 32B LLM's choice with 95% hit rate. Translating this potential into performance, S2T-LOCAL improves greedy decoding by 24.1% on average across benchmarks, effectively matching the efficacy of 8-path self-consistency while operating with single-trajectory efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出SELECT TO THINK方法，利用小语言模型自身top-K候选中的局部充分性，将大语言模型从生成者转变为选择者，并通过蒸馏使小模型自主重排序，提升推理性能。
ai.motivation: 小语言模型推理能力不足，现有方法依赖大语言模型生成token导致高延迟和成本，而标准蒸馏受限于小模型容量难以准确模仿大模型分布。
ai.method: 识别局部充分性：在分歧点，大模型偏好token始终在小模型top-K预测内。将大模型角色从开放生成转为在小模型候选中选择，简化监督信号为离散排序，并蒸馏选择逻辑到小模型，实现无推理时依赖的自主重排序。
ai.result: 1.5B小模型top-8候选以95%命中率包含32B大模型选择；S2T-LOCAL使贪婪解码平均提升24.1%，达到8路径自一致性效果，但仅需单轨迹效率。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需外部大模型推理时调用即可提升小语言模型推理能力的高效方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将局部充分性概念应用于多任务学习或持续学习，使小模型在多个领域自主选择最优预测路径。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖top-K候选的命中率，若任务分布变化导致命中率下降，性能可能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“选择而非生成”角度重新设计模型协作范式，启发更高效的蒸馏和推理加速策略。

zh.tldr: 提出SELECT TO THINK方法，利用小语言模型自身top-K候选中的局部充分性，将大语言模型从生成者转变为选择者，并通过蒸馏使小模型自主重排序，提升推理性能。
zh.motivation: 小语言模型推理能力不足，现有方法依赖大语言模型生成token导致高延迟和成本，而标准蒸馏受限于小模型容量难以准确模仿大模型分布。

zh.result: 1.5B小模型top-8候选以95%命中率包含32B大模型选择；S2T-LOCAL使贪婪解码平均提升24.1%，达到8路径自一致性效果，但仅需单轨迹效率。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需外部大模型推理时调用即可提升小语言模型推理能力的高效方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将局部充分性概念应用于多任务学习或持续学习，使小模型在多个领域自主选择最优预测路径。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖top-K候选的命中率，若任务分布变化导致命中率下降，性能可能退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“选择而非生成”角度重新设计模型协作范式，启发更高效的蒸馏和推理加速策略。

en.tldr: Proposes SELECT TO THINK (S2T), leveraging local sufficiency in SLM's top-K candidates to reframe LLM from generator to selector, and distills selection logic into SLM for autonomous re-ranking, improving reasoning without inference-time LLM dependency.
en.motivation: SLMs lack reasoning power; existing methods invoking LLMs for token generation incur latency and cost, while standard distillation fails due to capacity limitations in mimicking complex distributions.
en.method: Identifies local sufficiency: at divergence points, LLM's preferred token lies within SLM's top-K predictions. Reframes LLM role to selection among SLM proposals, simplifying supervision to discrete rankings, and distills selection logic into SLM for autonomous re-ranking without LLM at inference.
en.result: 1.5B SLM's top-8 candidates capture 32B LLM's choice with 95% hit rate; S2T-LOCAL improves greedy decoding by 24.1% on average, matching 8-path self-consistency with single-trajectory efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient method to enhance SLM reasoning without external LLM calls during inference.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying local sufficiency to multi-task or continual learning, enabling SLMs to autonomously select optimal prediction paths across domains.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade if task distribution shifts reduce top-K hit rate.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redesigns model collaboration paradigm from 'generation' to 'selection', inspiring more efficient distillation and inference acceleration strategies.

papers.title: Rank Distribution and Dynamics of Gram Matrices from Binary m-Sequences with Applications to LCD Codes
papers.summary: The Gram matrix is a classical object formed from the pairwise inner products of a collection of vectors, with fundamental roles in functional analysis, statistics, combinatorics, and coding theory. In the realm of sequence design, maximum-length sequences (m-sequences) are among the most fundamental classes of sequences, traditionally characterized by their span, decimation, shift-and-add, balance, run, and ideal autocorrelation properties.   In this paper, we bridge the two foundational concepts by uncovering novel structural features of m-sequences through the lens of a family of Gram matrices. Specifically, for each $1 \le t \le 2^n - 1$, we extract $n$ consecutive subsequences of length $t$ from an m-sequence of period $2^n - 1$, construct their corresponding $n \times n$ Gram matrix, and investigate its rank, denoted by $r_n(t)$. Utilizing semilinear representation of Galois groups and Bézoutian of polynomials, we derive an explicit formula for $r_n(t)$ for all $t$, thereby establishing the complete rank distribution of these Gram matrices. Notably, we prove that full rank is attained for approximately half of the admissible values of $t$. We further uncover the intricate dynamics of $r_n(t)$: rank-deficient states are strictly unstable (i.e., $r_n(t) < n$ implies $r_n(t+1) \ne r_n(t)$), whereas the full-rank state exhibits strong persistence, remaining at $n$ over a nontrivial interval of consecutive values of $t$. Altogether, our results fully characterize both the global rank distribution and the local dynamics of rank function, as invariant of m-sequences. As an application, our findings completely determine the hull distribution of the family of punctured cyclic simplex codes.

ai.tldr: 本文通过Gram矩阵研究二元m-序列的秩分布与动态，完全刻画了秩函数，并应用于确定打孔循环单形码的壳分布。
ai.motivation: 连接m-序列与Gram矩阵两个经典概念，揭示m-序列的新结构特征。
ai.method: 利用Galois群的半线性表示和多项式的Bézoutian，推导出所有t下秩r_n(t)的显式公式。

en.tldr: This paper studies the rank distribution and dynamics of Gram matrices from binary m-sequences, fully characterizes the rank function, and applies the results to determine the hull distribution of punctured cyclic simplex codes.
en.motivation: To bridge m-sequences and Gram matrices, revealing novel structural features of m-sequences.
en.method: Using semilinear representation of Galois groups and Bézoutian of polynomials to derive an explicit formula for the rank r_n(t) for all t.
en.result: Complete characterization of global rank distribution and local dynamics: rank-deficient states are strictly unstable, full-rank states exhibit strong persistence; fully determines the hull distribution of punctured cyclic simplex codes.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the linear structure of m-sequences and their applications in coding theory, such as LCD codes.

idea_spark.idea: Use rank persistence to design sequence sets with stable rank for constructing error-correcting codes with better performance.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical derivation relies on specific algebraic structures; generalization to non-binary or nonlinear sequences may be difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining classical sequence properties (e.g., autocorrelation) with matrix rank opens new perspectives for sequence analysis.

papers.title: Breaking the Autoregressive Chain: Hyper-Parallel Decoding for Efficient LLM-Based Attribute Value Extraction
papers.summary: Some text generation tasks, such as Attribute Value Extraction (AVE), require decoding multiple independent sequences from the same document context. While standard autoregressive decoding is slow due to its sequential nature, the independence between output sequences offers an opportunity for parallelism. We present Hyper-Parallel Decoding, a novel decoding algorithm that accelerates offline decoding by leveraging both shared memory and computation across batches. HPD enables out-of-order token generation through position ID manipulation, significantly improving efficiency. Experiments on AVE show that attribute-value pairs are conditionally independent, enabling us to parallelize value generation within each prompt. By further stacking multiple documents within a single prompt, we can decode in parallel up to 96 tokens per prompt. HPD works with all LLMs, and reduces both inference costs and total inference time by up to 13.8X without compromising output quality, potentially saving hundreds of thousands of dollars on industry AVE tasks. Although designed for attribute extraction, HPD makes no assumptions unique to the AVE domain and can in theory be applied to other scenarios with independent output structures.

ai.tldr: 提出超并行解码算法，通过位置ID操作实现乱序生成，在属性值提取任务中加速高达13.8倍。
ai.motivation: 标准自回归解码在属性值提取等需生成多个独立序列的任务中效率低下，而输出序列间的独立性提供了并行机会。

en.method: Leverages shared memory and computation, manipulates position IDs for out-of-order token generation, enabling parallel decoding of up to 96 tokens per prompt.
en.result: Reduces inference cost and total inference time by up to 13.8x on AVE tasks without compromising output quality, potentially saving hundreds of thousands of dollars.
en.help_to_user: If you need to extract multiple independent attribute-value pairs from documents, this method can significantly accelerate LLM decoding.

idea_spark.idea: Combine hyper-parallel decoding with speculative decoding for further acceleration.
idea_spark.risk: Violation of output sequence independence assumption may degrade quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging output structure independence to design parallel decoding strategies inspires similar optimizations in other domains.

papers.title: Multi-Periodogram Velocity Estimation with Irregular Reference Signals for Robot-Aided ISAC
papers.summary: This paper addresses velocity estimation within robot-aided integrated sensing and communications (ISAC), where mobile robots act as sensing nodes but can only opportunistically reuse irregular 5G/6G reference signals (RSs). We show that the velocity profile induced by such irregular time-domain patterns can be decomposed into a periodic-peak component and an amplitude-shaping (weighting) component. Leveraging this structure, we propose a multi-periodogram velocity estimation algorithm that is standard-compliant and does not require new sensing-dedicated RSs or 3GPP modifications. Simulation results demonstrate that, compared with conventional periodogram processing, the proposed method improves low-SNR robustness by achieving a 3 dB SNR gain at the 10% missed-detection rate and reducing false alarms by 51%.

ai.tldr: 针对机器人辅助的集成感知与通信系统，提出一种利用不规则参考信号的多周期图速度估计算法，无需修改3GPP标准即可提升低信噪比下的鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 在机器人辅助ISAC中，移动机器人只能机会性地重用不规则的5G/6G参考信号，传统周期图方法在低信噪比下性能不佳。
ai.method: 将不规则时域模式引起的速度剖面分解为周期峰值分量和幅度整形分量，据此设计多周期图速度估计算法。
ai.result: 相比传统周期图方法，在10%漏检率下获得3 dB信噪比增益，虚警率降低51%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在不改变现有通信标准的前提下，利用不规则参考信号提升机器人感知的速度估计精度。

en.tldr: A multi-periodogram velocity estimation algorithm for robot-aided ISAC that reuses irregular 5G/6G reference signals without 3GPP modifications, achieving 3 dB SNR gain and 51% false alarm reduction.
en.motivation: In robot-aided ISAC, mobile robots can only opportunistically reuse irregular 5G/6G reference signals, and conventional periodogram methods perform poorly under low SNR.
en.method: Decompose the velocity profile induced by irregular time-domain patterns into a periodic-peak component and an amplitude-shaping component, then design a multi-periodogram algorithm.
en.result: Compared to conventional periodogram, the proposed method achieves 3 dB SNR gain at 10% missed-detection rate and reduces false alarms by 51%.
en.help_to_user: Understand how to improve velocity estimation accuracy in robot sensing by reusing irregular reference signals without changing existing communication standards.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage structural decomposition of irregular reference signals to design more robust joint sensing and communication algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Real-world irregular reference signal patterns may be more complex, requiring validation of the decomposition assumption.
idea_spark.inspiration: Enhance sensing by exploiting existing communication signal structure, avoiding standard modifications.

papers.title: FunFace: Feature Utility and Norm Estimation for Face Recognition
papers.summary: Face Recognition (FR) is used in a variety of application domains, from entertainment and banking to security and surveillance. Such applications rely on the FR model to be robust and perform well in a variety of settings. To achieve this, state-of-the-art FR models typically use expressive adaptive margin loss functions, which tie the feature norm to concepts related to sample quality, such as recognizability and perceptual image quality. Recently, through the development of Face Image Quality Assessment (FIQA) techniques, biometric utility has become the preferred measure of face-image quality and has been shown to be a better predictor of the usefulness of samples for face recognition compared to more human-centric aspects, such as resolution, blur, and lighting, tied to general image quality. While image quality expressed through feature norms exhibits a certain level of correlation with biometric utility, it does not fully encapsulate all aspects of utility. To address this point, we propose a new adaptive margin loss, FunFace (Face Recognition Through Utility and Norm Estimation), which incorporates biometric utility, estimated by the Certainty Ratio, into the adaptive margin, taking inspiration from AdaFace. We show that FunFace (when used to train a face recognition model) achieves competitive results to other state-of-the-art FR models on benchmarks containing high-quality samples, while surpassing them on low quality benchmarks.

ai.tldr: 提出FunFace损失函数，将生物特征效用（通过确定性比率估计）融入自适应边界，提升低质量人脸识别性能。
ai.motivation: 现有自适应边界损失仅依赖特征范数表示图像质量，未能完全捕捉生物特征效用。
ai.method: 借鉴AdaFace，用确定性比率估计的生物特征效用替代或补充特征范数，设计新的自适应边界损失FunFace。
ai.result: 在高质量基准上达到竞争性结果，在低质量基准上超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过融合效用估计提升人脸识别模型在低质量图像上的鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将确定性比率与其他质量指标（如光照、模糊度）联合建模，进一步提升泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 效用估计可能依赖特定数据集，跨域泛化需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受AdaFace启发，将特征范数与效用解耦，启发更细粒度的质量感知损失设计。

en.tldr: Proposes FunFace loss that incorporates biometric utility (estimated via Certainty Ratio) into adaptive margin, improving face recognition on low-quality benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing adaptive margin losses rely solely on feature norm to represent image quality, failing to fully capture biometric utility.
en.method: Inspired by AdaFace, uses Certainty Ratio to estimate biometric utility and integrates it into the adaptive margin loss FunFace.
en.result: Achieves competitive results on high-quality benchmarks and surpasses state-of-the-art on low-quality benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how incorporating utility estimation can improve face recognition robustness on low-quality images.

idea_spark.idea: Explore joint modeling of Certainty Ratio with other quality indicators (e.g., illumination, blur) to further improve generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Utility estimation may depend on specific datasets; cross-domain generalization needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by AdaFace, decoupling feature norm from utility inspires finer-grained quality-aware loss design.

papers.title: Breaking the Rigid Prior: Towards Articulated 3D Anomaly Detection
papers.summary: Existing 3D anomaly detection methods are built on a rigid prior: normal geometry is pose-invariant and can be canonicalized through registration or alignment. This prior does not hold for articulated objects with hinge or sliding joints, where valid pose changes induce structured geometric variations that cannot be collapsed to a single canonical template, causing pose-induced deformations to be misidentified as anomalies while true structural defects are obscured. No existing benchmark addresses this challenge. We introduce ArtiAD, the first large-scale benchmark for articulated 3D anomaly detection, comprising 15,229 point clouds across 39 object categories with dense joint-angle variations and six structural anomaly types. Each sample is annotated with its joint configuration and part-level motion labels, enabling explicit disentanglement of pose-induced geometry from structural defects. ArtiAD also provides a seen/unseen articulation split to evaluate both interpolation and extrapolation to novel joint configurations. We propose Shape-Pose-Aware Signed Distance Field (SPA-SDF), a baseline that replaces the rigid prior with a continuous pose-conditioned implicit field, factorized into an articulation-independent structural prior and a Fourier-encoded joint embedding. At inference, the articulation state is recovered by minimizing reconstruction energy, and anomalies are identified as point-wise deviations from the learned manifold. SPA-SDF achieves 0.884 object-level AUROC on seen configurations and 0.874 on unseen configurations, substantially outperforming all rigid-based baselines. Our code and benchmark will be publicly released to facilitate future research.

ai.tldr: 提出首个面向铰接物体的3D异常检测基准ArtiAD，并设计姿态感知隐式场模型SPA-SDF，有效区分姿态变化与结构缺陷。
ai.motivation: 现有3D异常检测方法依赖刚性先验，无法处理铰接物体（如带铰链或滑轨的物体）因关节运动产生的几何变化，导致误检。
ai.method: 构建包含15,229个点云、39类物体、6种结构异常的ArtiAD基准；提出SPA-SDF，用连续姿态条件隐式场替代刚性先验，分解为结构先验与傅里叶编码关节嵌入，推理时通过最小化重建能量恢复关节状态并检测异常。
ai.result: 在已知和未知关节配置上分别达到0.884和0.874的物体级AUROC，显著优于所有基于刚性先验的基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解铰接物体异常检测的挑战，并提供基准和基线方法以推动该方向研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将关节状态作为可学习隐变量，通过重建能量最小化实现无监督姿态估计与异常定位。
idea_spark.risk: 对复杂多关节物体，关节状态空间可能过大导致优化困难；真实场景中关节标注获取成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经辐射场（NeRF）中条件隐式表示启发，将姿态视为连续条件变量，而非离散模板匹配。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解铰接物体异常检测的挑战，并提供基准和基线方法以推动该方向研究。

idea_spark.risk: 对复杂多关节物体，关节状态空间可能过大导致优化困难；真实场景中关节标注获取成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受神经辐射场（NeRF）中条件隐式表示启发，将姿态视为连续条件变量，而非离散模板匹配。

en.tldr: Introduces ArtiAD, the first large-scale benchmark for articulated 3D anomaly detection, and proposes SPA-SDF, a pose-conditioned implicit field that disentangles pose-induced geometry from structural defects.
en.motivation: Existing 3D anomaly detection methods rely on a rigid prior, failing on articulated objects where valid pose changes cause structured geometric variations misidentified as anomalies.
en.method: Constructs ArtiAD with 15,229 point clouds across 39 categories and 6 anomaly types; proposes SPA-SDF replacing rigid prior with a continuous pose-conditioned implicit field factorized into a structural prior and Fourier-encoded joint embedding, recovering articulation state by minimizing reconstruction energy.
en.result: Achieves 0.884 object-level AUROC on seen configurations and 0.874 on unseen configurations, substantially outperforming all rigid-based baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the challenge of articulated anomaly detection and provides a benchmark and baseline to advance research in this direction.

idea_spark.idea: Treat joint state as a learnable latent variable and achieve unsupervised pose estimation and anomaly localization via reconstruction energy minimization.
idea_spark.risk: For complex multi-joint objects, the joint state space may be too large for efficient optimization; obtaining joint annotations in real-world scenarios is costly.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by conditional implicit representations in NeRF, treating pose as a continuous conditioning variable rather than discrete template matching.

papers.title: MixerCA: An Efficient and Accurate Model for High-Performance Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.summary: Over the past decade, hyperspectral image (HSI) classification has drawn considerable interest due to HSIs' ability to effectively distinguish terrestrial objects by capturing detailed, continuous spectral information. The strong performance of recent deep learning techniques in tasks like image classification and semantic segmentation has led to their growing use in HSI classification, due to their ability to capture complex spatial and spectral features more effectively than traditional methods. This paper presents MixerCA, a novel lightweight model for HSI classification that leverages depthwise convolution and a self-attention mechanism. MixerCA integrates depth-wise convolutions, token and channel mixing, and coordinate attention into a unified structure to decouple spatial and channel interactions, maintain consistent resolution throughout the network, and directly process HSI patches. Extensive experiments on four hyperspectral benchmark datasets reveal MixerCA's clear advantages over several competing algorithms, including 2D-CNN, 3D-CNN, Tri-CNN, HybridSN, ViT, and Swin Transformer. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/MixerCA.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级高光谱图像分类模型MixerCA，结合深度可分离卷积和自注意力机制，在四个基准数据集上优于多种现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在高光谱图像分类中计算量大、结构复杂，需要更高效且准确的轻量级模型。
ai.method: MixerCA通过深度可分离卷积、令牌与通道混合以及坐标注意力机制，解耦空间与通道交互，保持网络分辨率一致，直接处理高光谱图像块。
ai.result: 在四个高光谱基准数据集上，MixerCA在分类精度和效率上均优于2D-CNN、3D-CNN、Tri-CNN、HybridSN、ViT和Swin Transformer等对比算法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效准确的高光谱图像分类方案，代码开源，便于复现和应用。

idea_spark.idea: 可探索将MixerCA的轻量级结构应用于实时或边缘设备上的高光谱图像分类场景。

zh.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级高光谱图像分类模型MixerCA，结合深度可分离卷积和自注意力机制，在四个基准数据集上优于多种现有方法。
zh.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在高光谱图像分类中计算量大、结构复杂，需要更高效且准确的轻量级模型。
zh.method: MixerCA通过深度可分离卷积、令牌与通道混合以及坐标注意力机制，解耦空间与通道交互，保持网络分辨率一致，直接处理高光谱图像块。
zh.result: 在四个高光谱基准数据集上，MixerCA在分类精度和效率上均优于2D-CNN、3D-CNN、Tri-CNN、HybridSN、ViT和Swin Transformer等对比算法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效准确的高光谱图像分类方案，代码开源，便于复现和应用。

en.tldr: Proposes MixerCA, a lightweight model for hyperspectral image classification that combines depthwise convolution and self-attention, outperforming several existing methods on four benchmark datasets.
en.motivation: Existing deep learning models for HSI classification are computationally heavy and complex, necessitating a more efficient and accurate lightweight model.
en.method: MixerCA integrates depthwise convolution, token and channel mixing, and coordinate attention to decouple spatial and channel interactions, maintain consistent resolution, and directly process HSI patches.
en.result: On four hyperspectral benchmark datasets, MixerCA achieves superior classification accuracy and efficiency compared to 2D-CNN, 3D-CNN, Tri-CNN, HybridSN, ViT, and Swin Transformer.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and accurate solution for HSI classification with open-source code for easy reproduction and application.

idea_spark.idea: Explore deploying MixerCA's lightweight architecture for real-time or edge-device HSI classification scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization under extreme spectral noise or few-shot conditions may be limited and requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The fusion of depthwise convolution and attention mechanisms inspires more efficient hybrid architectures for multimodal data fusion.

papers.title: What Kind of Language is Easy to Language-Model Under Curriculum Learning?
papers.summary: Many of the thousands of attested languages share common configurations of features, creating a spectrum from typologically very rare (e.g., object-verb-subject word order) or impossible languages to very common combinations of features (e.g., subject-object-verb word order). One central question is under what conditions such typological tendencies can be predicted, and specifically whether the learning bias of language models (LMs) is sufficient to reproduce such patterns. In this study, we add one dimensionality to such analysis -- the learning scenario for LMs -- to explore its interaction with the inductive bias of LMs. Specifically, as a first study, we examine the effect of curriculum learning (CL), as a developmentally motivated learning scenario, i.e., starting with simpler sentences rather than randomly-ordered input. We expand existing LM-based exploration (El-Naggar et al., 2025a,b) with a simple CL variant and find that CL substantially impacts the apparent inductive bias of LMs.

ai.tldr: 研究课程学习如何影响语言模型对语言类型特征的归纳偏好。
ai.motivation: 探索语言模型的学习场景（如课程学习）是否以及如何改变其对不同语言类型（如语序）的偏好，从而解释语言类型学中的常见与罕见模式。
ai.method: 在现有语言模型探索基础上，引入简单的课程学习变体（从简单句子开始训练），比较其与随机输入顺序下的模型归纳偏好差异。
ai.result: 课程学习显著改变了语言模型的归纳偏好，表明学习场景与模型内在偏好存在交互作用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解课程学习在语言模型训练中的作用，以及语言类型学倾向可能源于学习机制。

idea_spark.idea: 设计更精细的课程（如按类型频率或复杂度排序）来引导模型学习罕见语言结构。
idea_spark.risk: 课程学习可能引入人为偏差，导致模型过度拟合简单模式而忽略真实语言多样性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合发展心理学中的学习顺序理论，优化语言模型训练策略以提升泛化能力。

en.tldr: Investigates how curriculum learning affects language models' inductive bias toward typological features.
en.motivation: To explore whether the learning scenario (e.g., curriculum learning) interacts with language models' inductive bias, potentially explaining typological tendencies in natural languages.
en.method: Extends prior LM-based work by introducing a simple curriculum learning variant (training from simpler sentences) and comparing inductive biases against random-order input.
en.result: Curriculum learning substantially alters the apparent inductive bias of language models, indicating an interaction between learning scenario and model preferences.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how curriculum learning shapes LM behavior and how typological patterns may emerge from learning dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Design more refined curricula (e.g., sorted by typological frequency or complexity) to steer models toward learning rare linguistic structures.
idea_spark.risk: Curriculum learning may introduce artificial biases, causing models to overfit simple patterns and neglect real language diversity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from developmental psychology's learning order theories to optimize LM training strategies for better generalization.

papers.title: CacheRAG: A Semantic Caching System for Retrieval-Augmented Generation in Knowledge Graph Question Answering
papers.summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has significantly advanced Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA). However, existing LLM-driven KGQA systems act as stateless planners, generating retrieval plans in isolation without exploiting historical query patterns: analogous to a database system that optimizes every query from scratch without a plan cache. This fundamental design flaw leads to schema hallucinations and limited retrieval coverage. We propose CacheRAG, a systematic cache-augmented architecture for LLM-based KGQA that transforms stateless planners into continual learners. Unlike traditional database plan caching (which optimizes for frequency), CacheRAG introduces three novel design principles tailored for LLM contexts: (1) Schema-agnostic user interface: A two-stage semantic parsing framework via Intermediate Semantic Representation (ISR) enables non-expert users to interact purely in natural language, while a Backend Adapter grounds the LLM with local schema context to compile executable physical queries safely. (2) Diversity-optimized cache retrieval: A two-layer hierarchical index (Domain $\rightarrow$ Aspect) coupled with Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) maximizes structural variety in cached examples, effectively mitigating reasoning homogeneity. (3) Bounded heuristic expansion: Deterministic depth and breadth subgraph operators with strict complexity guarantees significantly enhance retrieval recall without risking unbounded API execution. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that CacheRAG significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines (e.g., +13.2% accuracy and +17.5% truthfulness on the CRAG dataset).

ai.tldr: 提出CacheRAG，一种面向知识图谱问答的语义缓存系统，将无状态规划器转变为持续学习者，显著提升准确性和真实性。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的KGQA系统作为无状态规划器，每次独立生成检索计划，未利用历史查询模式，导致模式幻觉和检索覆盖不足。
ai.method: 设计三部分架构：模式无关用户界面（两阶段语义解析+后端适配器）、多样性优化缓存检索（双层层次索引+MMR）、有界启发式扩展（确定性深度广度子图操作符）。
ai.result: 在多个基准上显著优于基线，例如CRAG数据集上准确率提升13.2%，真实性提升17.5%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助非专家用户通过自然语言进行知识图谱问答，同时利用历史查询缓存提高效率和准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将缓存机制与LLM规划结合，通过中间语义表示实现模式无关交互，并利用MMR保证缓存多样性。
idea_spark.risk: 缓存可能引入过时或错误信息，需定期更新；多样性策略可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受数据库计划缓存启发，但针对LLM上下文重新设计，强调语义理解和多样性而非频率优化。

en.tldr: Proposes CacheRAG, a semantic caching system for KGQA that transforms stateless planners into continual learners, significantly improving accuracy and truthfulness.
en.motivation: Existing LLM-driven KGQA systems act as stateless planners, generating retrieval plans in isolation without exploiting historical query patterns, leading to schema hallucinations and limited retrieval coverage.
en.method: Designs a three-part architecture: schema-agnostic user interface (two-stage semantic parsing + backend adapter), diversity-optimized cache retrieval (two-layer hierarchical index + MMR), and bounded heuristic expansion (deterministic depth/breadth subgraph operators).
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on multiple benchmarks, e.g., +13.2% accuracy and +17.5% truthfulness on the CRAG dataset.
en.help_to_user: Enables non-expert users to interact with knowledge graphs via natural language while leveraging historical query caches for improved efficiency and accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Combines caching with LLM planning, using intermediate semantic representation for schema-agnostic interaction and MMR to ensure cache diversity.
idea_spark.risk: Caching may introduce stale or incorrect information, requiring periodic updates; diversity strategies may increase computational overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by database plan caching but redesigned for LLM contexts, emphasizing semantic understanding and diversity over frequency optimization.

papers.title: Galilean Reeh--Schlieder Obstruction
papers.summary: We prove that the standard Galilean Haag--Kastler axioms, augmented by Bargmann mass superselection, are inconsistent with the Reeh--Schlieder property: no such net admits a vacuum that is cyclic and separating for every local field algebra. Two ingredients combine: Galilean Schrödinger fields annihilate the Fock vacuum, and Bargmann mass superselection forbids the Hermitian-combination evasion that keeps relativistic axioms consistent. The result extends beyond the Fock-representation hypothesis: any Galilean Haag--Kastler net whose canonical fields carry definite Bargmann mass charges and admit time-zero restrictions on a field-algebra-stable common dense domain is incompatible with Reeh--Schlieder. The bounded-below mass spectrum and the vacuum-at-spectral-minimum, usually imposed as separate axioms, are derived consequences -- of positive-energy boost positivity and a Bose-CCR algebraic descent, respectively. The Tomita--Takesaki modular flow is consequently unavailable on Galilean local field algebras. We identify the Reeh--Schlieder property as the precise structural ingredient distinguishing relativistic from Galilean algebraic quantum field theory: relativistic AQFT has it as a theorem, Galilean AQFT cannot.

ai.tldr: 证明伽利略Haag-Kastler公理与Bargmann质量超选择结合时，与Reeh-Schlieder性质不相容，从而区分了相对论性与伽利略代数量子场论。
ai.motivation: 揭示伽利略代数量子场论中Reeh-Schlieder性质缺失的根本原因，阐明其与相对论性理论的本质区别。
ai.method: 利用伽利略Schrödinger场湮灭Fock真空以及Bargmann质量超选择禁止厄米组合规避，结合正能升压正性和Bose-CCR代数下降推导有界质量谱和真空谱最小性。
ai.result: 任何满足伽利略Haag-Kastler公理且具有确定Bargmann质量荷的规范场网，均无法拥有循环且分离的真空态，Tomita-Takesaki模流不可用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解代数量子场论中对称性与Reeh-Schlieder性质的关系，为研究非相对论性量子场论提供结构洞察。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在伽利略系统中是否存在替代的真空循环分离条件，或通过修改公理恢复类似性质。
idea_spark.risk: 可能无法找到非平凡替代条件，或修改公理后失去物理合理性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Bargmann质量超选择与厄米组合规避的冲突中，启发对超选择规则在量子场论中作用的更深入分析。

en.tldr: We prove that Galilean Haag-Kastler axioms augmented by Bargmann mass superselection are inconsistent with the Reeh-Schlieder property, distinguishing relativistic from Galilean algebraic quantum field theory.
en.motivation: To identify the precise structural ingredient that separates relativistic and Galilean algebraic quantum field theories, namely the Reeh-Schlieder property.
en.method: Using Galilean Schrödinger fields annihilating the Fock vacuum and Bargmann mass superselection forbidding Hermitian-combination evasion, combined with positive-energy boost positivity and Bose-CCR algebraic descent to derive bounded-below mass spectrum and vacuum-at-spectral-minimum.
en.result: Any Galilean Haag-Kastler net with definite Bargmann mass charges and time-zero restrictions on a common dense domain cannot admit a cyclic and separating vacuum; Tomita-Takesaki modular flow is unavailable.
en.help_to_user: Provides structural insight into the role of symmetry and the Reeh-Schlieder property in algebraic quantum field theory, aiding in the study of non-relativistic quantum field theories.

idea_spark.risk: Non-trivial alternatives may not exist, or axiom modifications could lose physical plausibility.
idea_spark.inspiration: The conflict between Bargmann mass superselection and Hermitian-combination evasion inspires deeper analysis of the role of superselection rules in quantum field theory.

papers.title: Power-Law Approach of the Stress-Energy Tensor to the Unruh State after Gravitational Collapse
papers.summary: We establish the rate at which the renormalized stress--energy tensor of a massless minimally coupled scalar field in the in-vacuum state of a collapsing null-shell spacetime approaches the corresponding Unruh-state value. At finite exterior radius, we establish the upper bound \[ |Δ\langle T_{μν}\rangle|\leq C(r)\,t_s^{-3} \] from the Cauchy-surface decomposition of the Hadamard difference and the branch-cut structure of the retarded Green function. At future null infinity, we show that the leading coefficient in the late-time expansion \[ Δ\langle T_{uu}\rangle\sim C_{uu}\,u_s^{-3} \] is nonzero, by computing the branch-cut residue explicitly at small frequency and using the Planck suppression of the thermal spectrum at large frequency to show that the dominant contribution to $C_{uu}$ has a definite sign. The result gives \[ Δ\langle T_{uu}\rangle\big|_{\Iscr^+}(u_s) \sim C_{uu}\,u_s^{-3}, \qquad u_s\to\infty, \] with $C_{uu}\neq 0$. The exponent is determined by the $ω^2\lnω$ branch-point singularity in the Wronskian of the $\ell=0$ radial wave equation, the same structure responsible for Price's law. The sign $C_{uu}<0$ is supported by a physical argument and by the numerical mode data of Gholizadeh Siahmazgi, Anderson, and Fabbri. The result confirms their conjecture that the approach is a power law. We conjecture that the same mechanism gives an analogous $t_s^{-7}$ bound for gravitational perturbations ($\ell_{\min}=2$), though the extension to the spin-2 case involves gauge issues not addressed here.

ai.tldr: 建立了在引力坍缩后，无质量标量场的重整化应力-能量张量趋近Unruh态的幂律速率，并证明了在无穷远处领先项系数非零。
ai.motivation: 验证Gholizadeh Siahmazgi等人关于趋近Unruh态是幂律的猜想，并确定其指数和系数符号。
ai.method: 利用Cauchy面分解Hadamard差和推迟格林函数的支点割结构，结合小频率支点留数计算和大频率Planck抑制。
ai.result: 在有限半径处得到上界|Δ⟨Tμν⟩|≤C(r)t_s^{-3}，在将来零无穷远处得到Δ⟨Tuu⟩∼C_{uu}u_s^{-3}，且C_{uu}<0。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解引力坍缩后量子场趋近热平衡态的精确动力学行为。

idea_spark.idea: 将类似方法用于自旋2引力扰动，可能得到t_s^{-7}的幂律。
idea_spark.risk: 自旋2情况涉及规范问题，需小心处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: Price定律的机制在量子场论中同样适用，启发跨领域类比。

idea_spark.risk: 自旋2情况涉及规范问题，需小心处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: Price定律的机制在量子场论中同样适用，启发跨领域类比。

en.tldr: Establishes the power-law rate at which the renormalized stress-energy tensor of a massless scalar field approaches the Unruh state after gravitational collapse, with a nonzero leading coefficient at future null infinity.
en.motivation: To confirm the conjecture by Gholizadeh Siahmazgi et al. that the approach to the Unruh state is a power law, and to determine the exponent and sign of the coefficient.
en.method: Cauchy-surface decomposition of the Hadamard difference and branch-cut analysis of the retarded Green function, combined with explicit branch-cut residue calculation at small frequency and Planck suppression at large frequency.
en.result: Upper bound |Δ⟨Tμν⟩|≤C(r)t_s^{-3} at finite radius, and Δ⟨Tuu⟩∼C_{uu}u_s^{-3} at future null infinity with C_{uu}<0.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the precise dynamical approach to thermal equilibrium for quantum fields after gravitational collapse.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar methods to spin-2 gravitational perturbations to obtain a t_s^{-7} power law.
idea_spark.risk: Gauge issues in the spin-2 case require careful handling.
idea_spark.inspiration: The mechanism behind Price's law also applies in quantum field theory, inspiring cross-domain analogies.

keywords_normalized: quantum field theory in curved spacetime

papers.title: One Voice, Many Tongues: Cross-Lingual Voice Cloning for Scientific Speech
papers.summary: Preserving a speaker's voice identity while generating speech in a different language remains a fundamental challenge in spoken language technology, particularly in specialized domains such as scientific communication. In this paper, we address this challenge through our system submission to the International Conference on Spoken Language Translation (IWSLT 2026), the Cross-Lingual Voice Cloning shared task. First, we evaluate several state-of-the-art voice cloning models for cross-lingual speech generation of scientific texts in Arabic, Chinese, and French. Then, we build voice cloning systems based on the OmniVoice foundation model. We employ data augmentation via multi-model ensemble distillation from the ACL 60/60 corpus. We investigate the effect of using this synthetic data for fine-tuning, demonstrating consistent improvements in intelligibility (WER and CER) across languages while preserving speaker similarity.

en.tldr: This paper presents a cross-lingual voice cloning system for scientific speech, built on OmniVoice with data augmentation via multi-model ensemble distillation, improving intelligibility (WER, CER) across Arabic, Chinese, and French while preserving speaker similarity.
en.motivation: Preserving speaker voice identity while generating speech in a different language remains a fundamental challenge, especially in specialized domains like scientific communication.
en.method: Evaluated several state-of-the-art voice cloning models, built systems based on OmniVoice, employed data augmentation via multi-model ensemble distillation from the ACL 60/60 corpus, and fine-tuned with synthetic data.
en.result: Consistent improvements in word error rate (WER) and character error rate (CER) across languages, with maintained speaker similarity.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage data augmentation and foundation models for cross-lingual voice cloning and evaluate its effectiveness.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining domain adaptation (e.g., scientific text) with cross-lingual voice cloning to further improve pronunciation accuracy of technical terms.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic data may introduce noise or bias, affecting model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of using existing academic corpora (e.g., ACL 60/60) for data augmentation can inspire voice cloning research in other specialized domains.

papers.title: Auto-Relational Reasoning
papers.summary: Background & Objectives: In the last decade, Machine learning research has grown rapidly, but large models are reaching their soft limits demonstrating diminishing returns and still lack solid reasoning abilities. These limits could be surpassed through synergistic combination of Machine Learning scalability and rigid reasoning. Methods: In this work, we propose a theoretical framework for reasoning through object-relations in an automated manner integrated with Artificial Neural Networks. We present a formal analysis of the Reasoning, and we show the theory in practice through a paradigm integrating Reasoning and Machine Learning. Results: This paradigm is a system that solves Intelligence Quotient problems without any prior knowledge of the problem. Our system achieves 98.03% solving rate corresponding to the top 1% percentile or 132-144 iq score. This result is only limited by the small size of the model and the processing capabilities of the machine it run on. Conclusions: With the integration of prior knowledge in the system and the expansion of the dataset, the system can be generalized to solve a large category of problems. The functionality of the system inherently favors the solution of such problems in few-shot or zero-shot attempts.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自动关系推理的理论框架，将机器学习与严格推理结合，在智商测试中无需先验知识达到98.03%的解决率。
ai.motivation: 大型模型在推理能力上遇到瓶颈，需要将机器学习的可扩展性与严格推理协同结合。
ai.method: 提出自动对象关系推理的理论框架，形式化分析推理过程，并设计集成推理与机器学习的范式。
ai.result: 系统在智商问题中达到98.03%解决率，对应前1%或132-144智商分数，仅受模型规模和计算能力限制。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过关系推理增强机器学习模型的推理能力，尤其在少样本或零样本场景下。

idea_spark.idea: 将自动关系推理与预训练语言模型结合，用于复杂问答或科学文献中的关系抽取。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖形式化推理，可能难以处理模糊或非结构化输入；扩展至大规模数据集时计算开销可能较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受智商测试问题结构启发，将对象关系推理自动化，为神经符号系统提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a theoretical framework for auto-relational reasoning that integrates machine learning with rigid reasoning, achieving 98.03% solving rate on IQ tests without prior knowledge.
en.motivation: Large models face diminishing returns and lack solid reasoning abilities; synergistic combination of ML scalability and rigid reasoning is needed.
en.method: A theoretical framework for automated object-relation reasoning is proposed, with formal analysis of reasoning and a paradigm integrating reasoning and ML.
en.result: The system solves IQ problems with 98.03% accuracy, corresponding to top 1% or 132-144 IQ score, limited only by model size and compute.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how relational reasoning can enhance ML model reasoning, especially in few-shot or zero-shot settings.

idea_spark.idea: Combine auto-relational reasoning with pretrained language models for complex question answering or relation extraction in scientific literature.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on formal reasoning, which may struggle with ambiguous or unstructured input; scaling to large datasets may incur high computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by IQ test problem structures, automating object-relation reasoning offers a new direction for neural-symbolic systems.

papers.title: Anchored Confabulation: Partial Evidence Non-Monotonically Amplifies Confident Hallucination in LLMs
papers.summary: We identify a previously unknown calibration property of large language models: providing one confirmed intermediate fact toward a multi-step reasoning chain increases the model's confident-wrong-answer rate before full evidence eliminates it. We call this anchored confabulation: a partial anchor commits the model to confident parametric completion of remaining reasoning steps. We formalize it as Parametric Hallucination Confidence (PHC) and establish it across six lines of evidence including a causal injection experiment (PHC 0.613 to 0.656 to 0.595 to 0.536, N=160) and capability scaling across five model families (Spearman rho=0.900, p=0.037). The Anchoring Threshold Law k*(n)=floor(n/3) predicts PHC amplification by hop depth with four confirmed predictions. Applied to RAG routing, a LearnedRouter exploiting PHC closes 81.1% of the oracle performance gap (macro F1=0.426, p<1e-6) on 1,800 queries across four benchmarks with no model fine-tuning and 50x fewer labels than prior RL-based work. An epistemic humility prompt reduces the PHC spike by -0.118; explicit self-rating (PHC=0.684, p<0.001) outperforms lexical confidence as a routing signal.

ai.tldr: 发现大语言模型在获得部分中间证据后，自信错误率会非单调上升，直至完整证据消除幻觉。
ai.motivation: 现有研究关注完整证据下的幻觉，但部分证据如何影响模型自信错误尚不清楚。
ai.method: 定义参数化幻觉置信度，通过因果注入实验、能力缩放分析、锚定阈值定律验证，并设计学习路由器和认知谦逊提示。
ai.result: 部分证据使自信错误率上升，锚定阈值定律预测跳数效应，学习路由器缩小81.1%性能差距，认知谦逊提示降低置信度峰值。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解LLM在推理中因部分证据产生自信幻觉的机制，并提供缓解策略。

idea_spark.idea: 利用部分证据的置信度变化作为早期预警信号，动态调整推理策略。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖置信度信号可能导致误判，需结合其他校准方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将认知科学中的锚定效应与LLM推理结合，启发新的校准理论。

en.tldr: We identify that providing one confirmed intermediate fact in multi-step reasoning non-monotonically amplifies LLMs' confident-wrong-answer rate before full evidence eliminates it.
en.motivation: Existing work focuses on hallucination under full evidence; the effect of partial evidence on confident errors is unknown.
en.method: We formalize Parametric Hallucination Confidence (PHC), conduct causal injection experiments, capability scaling, and derive the Anchoring Threshold Law; we also design a LearnedRouter and epistemic humility prompt.
en.result: Partial evidence amplifies PHC; the Anchoring Threshold Law predicts hop-depth effects; LearnedRouter closes 81.1% of oracle gap; epistemic humility prompt reduces PHC spike by -0.118.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how partial evidence triggers confident hallucinations in LLM reasoning and offers mitigation strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Use confidence changes from partial evidence as early warning signals to dynamically adjust reasoning strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on confidence signals may cause misjudgment; needs combination with other calibration methods.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining anchoring effects from cognitive science with LLM reasoning inspires new calibration theories.

papers.title: CheXthought: A global multimodal dataset of clinical chain-of-thought reasoning and visual attention for chest X-ray interpretation
papers.summary: Chest X-ray interpretation is one of the most frequently performed diagnostic tasks in medicine and a primary target for AI development, yet current vision--language models are primarily trained on datasets of paired images and reports, not the cognitive processes and visual attention that underlie clinical reasoning. Here, we present CheXthought, a global, multimodal resource containing 103,592 chain-of-thought reasoning traces and 6,609,082 synchronized visual attention annotations across 50,312 multi-read chest X-rays from 501 radiologists in 71 countries. Our analysis reveals clinical reasoning patterns in how experts deploy distinct visual search strategies, integrate clinical context, and communicate uncertainty. We demonstrate the clinical utility of CheXthought across four dimensions. First, CheXthought reasoning significantly outperforms state--of--the--art vision--language model chain-of-thought in factual accuracy and spatial grounding. Second, visual attention data used as an inference--time hint recovers missed findings and significantly reduces hallucinations. Third, models trained on CheXthought data achieve significantly stronger pathology classification, visual faithfulness, temporal reasoning and uncertainty communication. Fourth, leveraging CheXthought's multi-reader annotations, we predict both human--human and human--AI disagreement directly from an image, enabling transparent communication of case difficulty, uncertainty and model reliability. These findings establish CheXthought as a resource for advancing multimodal clinical reasoning and the development of more transparent, interpretable vision--language models.

ai.tldr: 提出了CheXthought，一个包含103,592条思维链推理和660万视觉注意力标注的全球多模态数据集，用于胸部X光解读。
ai.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型主要训练于图像-报告对，缺乏临床推理中的认知过程和视觉注意力数据。
ai.method: 收集501名放射科医生对50,312张胸部X光的思维链推理和视觉注意力标注，覆盖71个国家。
ai.result: CheXthought在事实准确性、空间定位、幻觉减少、病理分类、时间推理和不确定性沟通上显著优于现有模型，并能预测人-人和人-AI分歧。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解临床推理过程，提升AI模型的透明度和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用多读者标注预测人-AI分歧，可构建自适应AI系统，根据病例难度调整输出置信度。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集依赖放射科医生主观标注，可能存在标注偏差；多国数据需考虑医疗实践差异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将认知科学中的思维链和视觉注意力引入医学AI，为模型提供类似人类的推理路径。

en.tldr: CheXthought is a global multimodal dataset with 103,592 chain-of-thought reasoning traces and 6,609,082 visual attention annotations for chest X-ray interpretation.
en.motivation: Current vision-language models lack cognitive processes and visual attention data underlying clinical reasoning.
en.method: Collected chain-of-thought reasoning and visual attention annotations from 501 radiologists on 50,312 chest X-rays across 71 countries.
en.result: CheXthought outperforms state-of-the-art models in factual accuracy, spatial grounding, hallucination reduction, pathology classification, temporal reasoning, and uncertainty communication, and predicts human-human and human-AI disagreement.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand clinical reasoning processes and improves transparency and interpretability of AI models.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging multi-reader annotations to predict human-AI disagreement can build adaptive AI systems that adjust confidence based on case difficulty.
idea_spark.risk: Dataset relies on subjective radiologist annotations, which may introduce bias; multi-country data must account for differences in medical practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating cognitive science concepts of chain-of-thought and visual attention into medical AI provides human-like reasoning pathways for models.

papers.title: Motion-Driven Multi-Object Tracking of Model Organisms in Space Science Experiments
papers.summary: Automated animal behavior analysis relies on long-term, interpretable individual trajectories; however, multi-animal tracking in space science experimental videos remains highly challenging due to weak appearance cues, low-quality imaging, complex maneuvering behaviors, and frequent interactions. To address this problem, we first construct the SpaceAnimal-MOT dataset to characterize the motion complexity and long-term identity preservation challenges in biological videos acquired under microgravity conditions. We then propose ART-Track (Adaptive Robust Tracking), a motion-driven tracking framework tailored to this setting. Specifically, multi-model motion estimation is introduced to handle abrupt maneuvers and nonlinear motion, motion-state-driven association is designed to reduce identity switches under dense interactions and temporary mismatch, and uncertainty-adaptive fusion is used to dynamically balance spatial and motion cues when prediction reliability varies. Experimental results show that ART-Track significantly reduces identity switches on zebrafish and fruitfly sequences, while maintaining more stable association under occlusion, deformation, and high-density interactions, thereby providing a more reliable tracking foundation for downstream quantitative behavior analysis. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/yyy7777777/ART_TRACK/tree/main.

ai.tldr: 提出ART-Track框架，通过运动驱动跟踪解决空间科学实验中多动物跟踪的身份切换问题。
ai.motivation: 空间科学实验中的多动物跟踪面临弱外观线索、低质量成像和复杂交互等挑战，现有方法难以保持长期身份。
ai.method: 构建SpaceAnimal-MOT数据集，提出ART-Track框架，包含多模型运动估计、运动状态驱动关联和不确定性自适应融合。
ai.result: 在斑马鱼和果蝇视频上显著减少身份切换，在遮挡、变形和高密度交互下保持更稳定的关联。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可靠的多动物跟踪基础，支持下游定量行为分析。

idea_spark.idea: 结合运动预测和不确定性融合，可进一步探索在极端动态环境下的自适应跟踪。
idea_spark.risk: 对运动模型假设的依赖性可能限制在完全随机运动场景的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴运动状态驱动关联思想，可启发设计更鲁棒的交互式多智能体跟踪系统。

idea_spark.risk: 对运动模型假设的依赖性可能限制在完全随机运动场景的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴运动状态驱动关联思想，可启发设计更鲁棒的交互式多智能体跟踪系统。

en.tldr: Proposes ART-Track, a motion-driven tracking framework to reduce identity switches in multi-animal tracking for space science experiments.
en.motivation: Multi-animal tracking in space science videos is challenging due to weak appearance cues, low-quality imaging, and complex interactions, hindering long-term identity preservation.
en.method: Constructs the SpaceAnimal-MOT dataset and proposes ART-Track with multi-model motion estimation, motion-state-driven association, and uncertainty-adaptive fusion.
en.result: Significantly reduces identity switches on zebrafish and fruitfly sequences, maintaining stable association under occlusion, deformation, and high-density interactions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reliable tracking foundation for downstream quantitative behavior analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combining motion prediction with uncertainty fusion could be further explored for adaptive tracking in extremely dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on motion model assumptions may limit generalization to completely random motion scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: The motion-state-driven association idea can inspire more robust interactive multi-agent tracking systems.

papers.title: Can Cross-Layer Design Bridge Security and Efficiency? A Robust Authentication Framework for Healthcare Information Exchange Systems
papers.summary: As healthcare systems become increasingly interconnected, ensuring secure and continuous device authentication in health information exchange (HIE) networks is critical to safeguarding patient data and clinical operations. In this context, this paper proposes a novel cross-layer authentication scheme for HIE networks that integrates cryptographic mechanisms with physical (PHY) layer-based authentication to ensure reliable communication while minimizing computational and communication overheads. The initial authentication phase leverages a traditional public key infrastructure (PKI)-based approach, employing elliptic curve cryptography (ECC) and digital certificates to verify the legitimacy of communicating devices. Simultaneously, it extracts unique hardware-level features such as carrier frequency offset (CFO) and quadrature skewness from the devices. These features are then used to train a machine learning (ML) model during an offline phase managed by a regional centralized authority (RCA). For re-authentication, the system re-extracts these PHY-layer features from incoming orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) symbols and verifies the device identity in real-time using the trained ML classifier. This cross-layer strategy enables continuous, lightweight identity verification without the need to exchange and validate cryptographic signatures for each message, thereby reducing system overhead. The proposed scheme further enhances privacy through the use of encrypted, frequently refreshed pseudo-identities, ensuring unlinkability and resistance to identity tracking. A formal security analysis using Burrows-Abadi-Needham (BAN) logic demonstrates the scheme's robustness against various threats, including impersonation, man-in-the-middle (MitM), replay, and Sybil attacks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种跨层认证框架，结合密码学与物理层特征，实现医疗信息交换系统的安全高效设备认证。
ai.motivation: 医疗系统互联加深，需在保障患者数据安全的同时降低认证开销。
ai.method: 初始认证使用PKI与ECC，同时提取CFO等硬件特征训练ML模型；重认证时实时提取物理层特征进行身份验证。
ai.result: 形式化安全分析证明方案能抵抗冒充、中间人、重放和女巫攻击，且计算与通信开销低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何融合密码学与物理层技术设计轻量级认证方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用物理层不可克隆特征替代频繁的密码学握手，实现持续无感认证。
idea_spark.risk: 物理层特征可能受环境噪声影响，ML模型需定期更新。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将硬件指纹与加密身份结合，平衡安全性与效率。

en.tldr: Proposes a cross-layer authentication framework combining cryptography and physical-layer features for secure and efficient device authentication in healthcare information exchange systems.
en.motivation: Increasing interconnectivity in healthcare demands secure device authentication with low overhead to protect patient data.
en.method: Initial authentication uses PKI with ECC while extracting hardware features (CFO, quadrature skewness) to train an ML model; re-authentication extracts PHY-layer features from OFDM symbols for real-time verification.
en.result: Formal security analysis (BAN logic) shows robustness against impersonation, MitM, replay, and Sybil attacks with reduced computational and communication overhead.
en.help_to_user: Illustrates how to design a lightweight authentication scheme by integrating cryptographic and physical-layer techniques.

idea_spark.idea: Use physical-layer unclonable features to replace frequent cryptographic handshakes for continuous transparent authentication.
idea_spark.risk: PHY-layer features may be affected by environmental noise; ML models require periodic retraining.
idea_spark.inspiration: Balance security and efficiency by combining hardware fingerprints with encrypted identities.

papers.title: ProcFunc: Function-Oriented Abstractions for Procedural 3D Generation in Python
papers.summary: We introduce ProcFunc, a library for Blender-based procedural 3D generation in Python. ProcFunc provides a library of easy-to-use Python functions, which streamline creating, combining, analyzing, and executing procedural generation code. ProcFunc makes it easy to create large-scale diverse training data, by combinatorial compositions of semantic components. VLMs can use ProcFunc to edit procedural material and geometry code and can create new procedural code with significantly fewer coding errors. Finally, as an example use case, we use ProcFunc to develop a new procedural generator of indoor rooms, which includes a collection of new compositional procedural materials. We demonstrate the detail, runtime efficiency, and diversity of this room generator, as well as its use for 3D synthetic data generation. Please visit https://github.com/princeton-vl/procfunc for source code.

ai.tldr: ProcFunc 是一个基于 Blender 的 Python 库，用于简化程序化 3D 生成，支持组合式语义组件、VLM 编辑代码，并提供了室内房间生成器示例。
ai.motivation: 现有程序化 3D 生成工具使用复杂，难以组合和扩展，且生成代码易出错，需要更易用的抽象层。
ai.method: 设计一组 Python 函数，封装创建、组合、分析和执行程序化生成代码的流程，支持语义组件组合，并兼容 VLM 编辑。
ai.result: 实现了高效、多样化的室内房间生成器，可生成大规模合成训练数据，且 VLM 使用后编码错误显著减少。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速构建程序化 3D 内容，降低编码门槛，提升数据生成效率与多样性。

idea_spark.idea: 将 VLM 与程序化生成库结合，实现自然语言驱动的 3D 场景编辑与生成。
idea_spark.risk: VLM 可能生成不符合物理或几何约束的代码，需增加验证与回退机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴函数式编程思想，将复杂生成流程拆解为可组合、可复用的原子操作。

en.tldr: ProcFunc is a Blender-based Python library for procedural 3D generation, enabling combinatorial composition, VLM code editing, and includes an indoor room generator.
en.motivation: Existing procedural 3D tools are complex, hard to combine, and error-prone; a simpler abstraction layer is needed.
en.method: Design a set of Python functions that streamline creating, combining, analyzing, and executing procedural generation code, with support for semantic component composition and VLM editing.
en.result: Achieves an efficient, diverse indoor room generator for large-scale synthetic training data, with significantly fewer coding errors when used by VLMs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly build procedural 3D content, lowers coding barriers, and improves data generation efficiency and diversity.

idea_spark.idea: Combine VLMs with procedural generation libraries for natural-language-driven 3D scene editing and generation.
idea_spark.risk: VLMs may generate code violating physical or geometric constraints; validation and fallback mechanisms are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow from functional programming to decompose complex generation pipelines into composable, reusable atomic operations.

papers.title: The Schrodinger Equation as a Gauge Theory
papers.summary: In this paper, we reformulate the Schrodinger equation in gauge-theoretic terms. Starting from the Madelung representation, we rewrite the conserved probability-current using gauge fields, namely a one-form gauge field in the $(2+1)$-dimensional theory and a two-form gauge field in the $(3+1)$-dimensional theory. This gives a local equivalence between the Schrodinger equation, quantum hydrodynamics, and a gauge formulation, while the global information is carried by the quantization of phase winding around zeros of the wavefunction. We then explore how this correspondence organizes structures on both sides of the duality. On the gauge side, BF couplings to additional one-forms describe electromagnetic coupling, Berry connections, spinor dynamics, projected non-abelian adiabatic connections, and intrinsic holonomy, while Chern--Simons term generate Hopf functionals, charge-flux attachment, and anyonic sectors. In the presence of boundaries, the topological terms produce edge degrees of freedom and boundary charge algebras. Finally, in the nonlinear regime with a Bogoliubov sound mode, the dual two-form description relates acoustic memory, large gauge transformations and the corresponding soft theorem, organizing them into an infrared triangle.

ai.tldr: 将薛定谔方程重新表述为规范理论，建立量子力学与规范场论之间的对偶关系。
ai.motivation: 探索薛定谔方程更深层的几何与拓扑结构，统一量子力学与规范场论的语言。
ai.method: 从Madelung表示出发，利用一形式或二形式规范场重写概率流，并引入BF耦合、Chern-Simons项等拓扑项。
ai.result: 建立了薛定谔方程、量子流体力学与规范表述之间的局部等价，全局信息由波函数零点周围的相位缠绕量化携带。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将量子力学问题映射到规范场论框架的新视角，有助于理解拓扑相、任意子以及边界效应。

idea_spark.idea: 利用规范场论中的拓扑项（如Chern-Simons）来设计量子模拟或量子计算中的任意子编码方案。
idea_spark.risk: 对偶关系的严格性可能依赖于特定边界条件或正则化方案，实际物理实现可能面临挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从声学记忆与软定理的红外三角结构出发，启发在凝聚态系统中寻找类似的红外行为。

en.tldr: Reformulates the Schrödinger equation as a gauge theory, establishing a duality between quantum mechanics and gauge field theory.
en.motivation: To uncover deeper geometric and topological structures of the Schrödinger equation and unify the languages of quantum mechanics and gauge theory.
en.method: Starting from the Madelung representation, the probability current is rewritten using one-form or two-form gauge fields, with topological terms such as BF couplings and Chern-Simons terms introduced.
en.result: A local equivalence is established among the Schrödinger equation, quantum hydrodynamics, and a gauge formulation; global information is carried by the quantization of phase winding around zeros of the wavefunction.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new perspective for mapping quantum mechanical problems into the framework of gauge field theory, aiding understanding of topological phases, anyons, and boundary effects.

idea_spark.idea: Use topological terms (e.g., Chern-Simons) from gauge theory to design anyon encoding schemes for quantum simulation or quantum computation.
idea_spark.risk: The rigor of the duality may depend on specific boundary conditions or regularization schemes, posing challenges for practical physical realization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The infrared triangle structure relating acoustic memory and soft theorems inspires searching for similar infrared behaviors in condensed matter systems.

papers.title: When to Retrieve During Reasoning: Adaptive Retrieval for Large Reasoning Models
papers.summary: Large reasoning models such as DeepSeek-R1 and OpenAI o1 generate extended chains of thought spanning thousands of tokens, yet their integration with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) remains fundamentally misaligned. Current RAG systems optimize for providing context before reasoning begins, while reasoning models require evidence injection during multi-step inference chains. We introduce ReaLM-Retrieve, a reasoning-aware retrieval framework that addresses this mismatch through three key innovations: (1) a step-level uncertainty detector that identifies knowledge gaps at reasoning-step granularity rather than token or sentence level; (2) a retrieval intervention policy that learns when external evidence maximally benefits ongoing reasoning; and (3) an efficiency-optimized integration mechanism that reduces per-retrieval overhead by 3.2x compared to naive integration. Experiments on MuSiQue, HotpotQA, and 2WikiMultiHopQA demonstrate that ReaLM-Retrieve achieves on average 10.1% absolute improvement in answer F1 over standard RAG (range: 9.0-11.8% across the three benchmarks) while reducing retrieval calls by 47% compared to fixed-interval approaches like IRCoT (all improvements significant at p<0.01, paired bootstrap). On the challenging MuSiQue benchmark requiring 2-4 hop reasoning, our method achieves 71.2% F1 with an average of only 1.8 retrieval calls per question. Analysis shows that ReaLM-Retrieve also improves retrieval quality itself, achieving 81.3% Recall@5 with consistently higher precision and MRR than fixed-interval baselines on supporting evidence, establishing new state-of-the-art efficiency-accuracy trade-offs for reasoning-intensive retrieval tasks.

ai.tldr: 提出ReaLM-Retrieve框架，在推理过程中自适应检索外部证据，解决大型推理模型与检索增强生成之间的错配问题。
ai.motivation: 现有RAG系统在推理前提供上下文，而推理模型需要在多步推理中注入证据，两者存在根本性错配。
ai.method: 三步创新：步骤级不确定性检测器、检索干预策略、效率优化集成机制。
ai.result: 在三个基准上平均F1提升10.1%，检索调用减少47%，在MuSiQue上达到71.2% F1且平均仅需1.8次检索。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在推理过程中高效利用外部知识，提升复杂推理任务的准确性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性检测与检索时机学习结合，实现推理过程中的动态知识注入。
idea_spark.risk: 对不确定性阈值的敏感度可能影响泛化性，且多步推理场景下证据质量难以保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类推理中“遇到困难时查阅资料”的行为启发，模拟推理过程中的知识需求动态。

zh.result: 在三个基准上平均F1提升10.1%，检索调用减少47%，在MuSiQue上达到71.2% F1且平均仅需1.8次检索。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在推理过程中高效利用外部知识，提升复杂推理任务的准确性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性检测与检索时机学习结合，实现推理过程中的动态知识注入。
idea_spark.risk: 对不确定性阈值的敏感度可能影响泛化性，且多步推理场景下证据质量难以保证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类推理中“遇到困难时查阅资料”的行为启发，模拟推理过程中的知识需求动态。

en.tldr: Proposes ReaLM-Retrieve, a framework that adaptively retrieves external evidence during reasoning, addressing the misalignment between large reasoning models and RAG.
en.motivation: Current RAG systems provide context before reasoning, while reasoning models need evidence injection during multi-step inference, causing a fundamental mismatch.
en.method: Three innovations: step-level uncertainty detector, retrieval intervention policy, and efficiency-optimized integration mechanism.
en.result: Average 10.1% absolute F1 improvement over standard RAG, 47% fewer retrieval calls than fixed-interval methods, achieving 71.2% F1 on MuSiQue with only 1.8 retrievals per question.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently leverage external knowledge during reasoning, improving accuracy and efficiency in complex reasoning tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining uncertainty detection with retrieval timing learning enables dynamic knowledge injection during reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitivity to uncertainty thresholds may affect generalization, and evidence quality is hard to guarantee in multi-step scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human behavior of consulting references when encountering difficulties, simulating dynamic knowledge needs during reasoning.

papers.title: World2VLM: Distilling World Model Imagination into VLMs for Dynamic Spatial Reasoning
papers.summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have shown strong performance on static visual understanding, yet they still struggle with dynamic spatial reasoning that requires imagining how scenes evolve under egocentric motion. Recent efforts address this limitation either by scaling spatial supervision with synthetic data or by coupling VLMs with world models at inference time. However, the former often lacks explicit modeling of motion-conditioned state transitions, while the latter incurs substantial computational overhead. In this work, we propose World2VLM, a training framework that distills spatial imagination from a generative world model into a vision-language model. Given an initial observation and a parameterized camera trajectory, we use a view-consistent world model to synthesize geometrically aligned future views and derive structured supervision for both forward (action-to-outcome) and inverse (outcome-to-action) spatial reasoning. We post-train the VLM with a two-stage recipe on a compact dataset generated by this pipeline and evaluate it on multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks. World2VLM delivers consistent improvements over the base model across diverse benchmarks, including SAT-Real, SAT-Synthesized, VSI-Bench, and MindCube. It also outperforms the test-time world-model-coupled methods while eliminating the need for expensive inference-time generation. Our results suggest that world models can serve not only as inference-time tools, but also as effective training-time teachers, enabling VLMs to internalize spatial imagination in a scalable and efficient manner.

ai.tldr: 提出World2VLM框架，通过生成式世界模型蒸馏空间想象力到视觉语言模型中，提升动态空间推理能力。
ai.motivation: 现有VLM在静态视觉理解上表现良好，但在需要想象自我运动下场景演变的动态空间推理上仍存在困难。
ai.method: 利用视图一致的世界模型合成几何对齐的未来视图，生成前向和逆向空间推理的结构化监督，并通过两阶段后训练将知识蒸馏到VLM中。
ai.result: 在SAT-Real、SAT-Synthesized、VSI-Bench和MindCube等多个基准上，World2VLM一致优于基础模型，并超越测试时耦合世界模型的方法，同时避免昂贵的推理时生成。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将世界模型作为训练时的教师，使VLM内化空间想象力，实现可扩展且高效的空间推理。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将世界模型蒸馏用于多模态大模型的时间推理或物理常识学习。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据可能引入分布偏移，导致在真实场景中泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 世界模型不仅是推理工具，更是高效的训练教师，启发将生成模型用于其他认知能力的蒸馏。

zh.tldr: 提出World2VLM框架，通过生成式世界模型蒸馏空间想象力到视觉语言模型中，提升动态空间推理能力。
zh.motivation: 现有VLM在静态视觉理解上表现良好，但在需要想象自我运动下场景演变的动态空间推理上仍存在困难。

zh.result: 在SAT-Real、SAT-Synthesized、VSI-Bench和MindCube等多个基准上，World2VLM一致优于基础模型，并超越测试时耦合世界模型的方法，同时避免昂贵的推理时生成。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将世界模型蒸馏用于多模态大模型的时间推理或物理常识学习。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据可能引入分布偏移，导致在真实场景中泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 世界模型不仅是推理工具，更是高效的训练教师，启发将生成模型用于其他认知能力的蒸馏。

en.tldr: Proposes World2VLM, a training framework that distills spatial imagination from a generative world model into a vision-language model to enhance dynamic spatial reasoning.
en.motivation: Existing VLMs excel at static visual understanding but struggle with dynamic spatial reasoning that requires imagining scene evolution under egocentric motion.
en.method: Uses a view-consistent world model to synthesize geometrically aligned future views, derives structured supervision for forward and inverse spatial reasoning, and post-trains the VLM via a two-stage recipe.
en.result: World2VLM consistently outperforms the base model on SAT-Real, SAT-Synthesized, VSI-Bench, and MindCube, and surpasses test-time world-model-coupled methods while eliminating expensive inference-time generation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how world models can serve as training-time teachers, enabling VLMs to internalize spatial imagination in a scalable and efficient manner.

idea_spark.idea: Explore distilling world models into multimodal large models for temporal reasoning or physical commonsense learning.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic data may introduce distribution shift, leading to insufficient generalization in real-world scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: World models are not only inference-time tools but also effective training-time teachers, inspiring distillation of generative models for other cognitive abilities.

papers.title: Attribution-Guided Multimodal Deepfake Detection via Cross-Modal Forensic Fingerprints
papers.summary: Audio-visual deepfakes have reached a level of realism that makes perceptual detection unreliable, threatening media integrity and biometric security. While multimodal detection has shown promise, most approaches are binary classification tasks that often latch onto dataset-specific artifacts rather than genuine generative traces. We argue that a detector incapable of identifying how a video was forged is likely learning the wrong signal. Unlike binary detection, attribution-guided learning imposes a stronger geometric constraint on the shared embedding space, forcing the model to encode generator-specific forensic content rather than shortcuts.   We propose the Attribution-Guided Multimodal Deepfake Detection (AMDD) framework, which jointly learns to detect and attribute manipulation. AMDD treats generator attribution as a structured regularization that constrains representation geometry toward forensically meaningful features. We introduce a Cross-Modal Forensic Fingerprint Consistency (CMFFC) loss to enforce alignment between generator-induced artifacts in visual and audio streams. This exploits the fact that coherent manipulation leaves correlated traces across modalities, grounded in the physical coupling between speech and facial articulation that synthetic pipelines routinely disrupt.   Architecturally, we pair a ResNet50 with temporal attention for visual encoding against a pretrained ResNet18 for mel spectrograms, closing the encoder capacity gap found in prior models. On FakeAVCeleb, AMDD achieves 99.7% balanced accuracy and 99.8% AUC with 95.9% attribution accuracy. Cross-dataset evaluation on DeepfakeTIMIT, DFDM, and LAV-DF confirms that real video detection generalizes robustly, while fake detection on unseen generators remains an open challenge that we analyze in depth.

ai.tldr: 提出AMDD框架，通过跨模态法医指纹一致性损失联合检测与归因音视频深度伪造，在FakeAVCeleb上达到99.7%平衡准确率。
ai.motivation: 现有二元分类检测器易学习数据集特定伪影而非真实生成痕迹，缺乏归因能力导致泛化性差。
ai.method: 将生成器归因作为结构化正则化约束嵌入空间几何，引入跨模态法医指纹一致性损失对齐视觉与音频流中的生成痕迹。
ai.result: FakeAVCeleb上平衡准确率99.7%、AUC 99.8%、归因准确率95.9%；跨数据集测试真实视频检测鲁棒，但未见生成器上的伪造检测仍有挑战。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过归因引导和跨模态一致性提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性与可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将归因引导与对比学习结合，进一步区分不同生成器产生的伪造痕迹。
idea_spark.risk: 跨数据集泛化中未见生成器的伪造检测准确率可能不足，需更多生成器数据或域适应技术。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用物理耦合（如语音与面部运动）作为先验，设计更通用的跨模态一致性约束。

en.tldr: Proposes AMDD framework that jointly detects and attributes audio-visual deepfakes via cross-modal forensic fingerprint consistency, achieving 99.7% balanced accuracy on FakeAVCeleb.
en.motivation: Binary classifiers often learn dataset-specific artifacts rather than genuine generative traces, lacking attribution capability and generalizability.
en.method: Uses generator attribution as structured regularization to constrain embedding geometry, and introduces Cross-Modal Forensic Fingerprint Consistency loss to align generator-induced artifacts across visual and audio streams.
en.result: 99.7% balanced accuracy, 99.8% AUC, 95.9% attribution accuracy on FakeAVCeleb; robust real video detection on cross-dataset tests, but fake detection on unseen generators remains challenging.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how attribution guidance and cross-modal consistency improve robustness and interpretability in deepfake detection.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining attribution guidance with contrastive learning to better discriminate forgery traces from different generators.
idea_spark.risk: Fake detection on unseen generators may have insufficient accuracy in cross-dataset settings, requiring more generator data or domain adaptation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage physical coupling (e.g., speech and facial motion) as prior to design more general cross-modal consistency constraints.

papers.title: Point Cloud Registration via Probabilistic Self-Update Local Correspondence and Line Vector Sets
papers.summary: Point cloud registration (PCR) is a fundamental task for integrating 3D observations in remote sensing applications. This paper proposes a fast and effective PCR algorithm utilizing probabilistic self-updating local correspondence and line vector sets. Our dual RANSAC interaction model comprises a global RANSAC evaluating the global correspondence set and a local RANSAC operating on dynamically updated local sets. Initially, these local sets are constructed using angle histogram statistics and line vector length preservation techniques. To improve accuracy, a probabilistic self-updating strategy refines the local sets after each interaction round. To reduce runtime, we introduce a global early termination condition that optimally balances accuracy and efficiency. Finally, a weighted singular value decomposition estimates the registration solution. Evaluations on public datasets demonstrate our algorithm achieves superior time efficiency and at least a 10% root mean square error improvement over state-of-the-art methods. The C++ source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ivpml84079/Probabilistic-Self-Update-Line-Vector-Set-Based-Point-Cloud-Registration.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于概率自更新局部对应和线向量集的快速点云配准算法，在公共数据集上实现了至少10%的均方根误差改进。
ai.motivation: 现有点云配准方法在精度和效率之间难以平衡，需要一种快速且准确的算法。
ai.method: 采用双RANSAC交互模型，包括全局RANSAC和局部RANSAC，通过角度直方图统计和线向量长度保持构建初始局部集，并利用概率自更新策略逐步优化，同时引入全局提前终止条件。
ai.result: 在公共数据集上，算法在时间效率上优于现有方法，均方根误差至少降低10%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效的点云配准实现，可应用于遥感、三维重建等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部对应集的动态更新与全局终止条件结合，实现精度与效率的平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 在噪声较大或点云重叠度低的情况下，局部集构建可能不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 双RANSAC框架和线向量集的使用为处理局部几何特征提供了新思路。
