zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效利用VFM几何知识进行密集3D任务的策略。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将最后一层锚点替换为多锚点或动态锚点，以适应不同场景的几何复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 线性适配器可能限制跨层特征的表达能力，需验证更复杂融合机制的效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受层间几何信息非均匀分布启发，可进一步研究VFM中知识组织的层级结构。

en.tldr: Proposes a Last-Layer-Centric Feature Recombination (LFR) module that adaptively selects complementary intermediate layers to improve monocular depth estimation accuracy.
en.motivation: Existing methods uniformly sample intermediate features, underutilizing the non-uniformly distributed 3D geometric information in VFMs.
en.method: Systematically analyzes DINOv3 layers for depth predictability, uses the final layer as a geometric anchor, selects complementary layers via minimal-similarity criterion, and fuses with compact linear adapters.
en.result: LFR consistently improves MDE accuracy and achieves state-of-the-art performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient strategy for unlocking geometric knowledge in VFMs for dense 3D tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing the single last-layer anchor with multi-anchor or dynamic anchors to adapt to varying geometric complexity.
idea_spark.risk: Linear adapters may limit expressiveness; more complex fusion mechanisms need validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the non-uniform distribution of geometric information across layers, further study of VFM knowledge organization is promising.

papers.title: Lightweight Quantum Agent for Edge Systems: Joint PQC and NOMA Resource Allocation
papers.summary: In the context of quantum secure scenarios, existing research on mobile edge devices and intelligent computing and edge (ICE) systems based on the Non-Orthogonal Multiple Access (NOMA) communication model have overlooked the energy consumption overhead of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) modules, and the high complexity of traditional resource allocation algorithms fails to meet the demands of real-time decision-making. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a lightweight agentic AI framework designed for online joint optimization within ICE-enabled mobile devices. The scheme constructs a multi-stage stochastic Mixed Integer Nonlinear Programming (MINLP) model that incorporates static power-consumption constraints for PQC modules. Based on Lyapunov optimization theory, the long-term optimization problem is decoupled, and a linear complexity algorithm is proposed to solve the nonconvex challenges of NOMA power allocation . Simulation results verify that the proposed scheme significantly improves computational throughput while ensuring system queue stability and energy consumption constraints. Compared with traditional Successive Convex Approximation (SCA) algorithms, the complexity is reduced to $\mathcal{O}(N)$, achieving a speedup of approximately 46 times when the number of devices $N=35$, thereby meeting the real-time decision-making requirements in dynamic wireless environments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种轻量级智能体AI框架，用于移动边缘设备中PQC与NOMA资源的联合在线优化，显著降低复杂度并满足实时决策需求。
ai.motivation: 现有研究忽略PQC模块能耗开销，传统资源分配算法复杂度高，无法满足实时决策需求。
ai.method: 构建多阶段随机MINLP模型，引入PQC静态功耗约束；基于Lyapunov优化解耦长期优化问题，提出线性复杂度算法求解NOMA功率分配非凸挑战。
ai.result: 相比传统SCA算法，复杂度降至O(N)，设备数N=35时加速约46倍，在保证队列稳定和能耗约束下显著提升计算吞吐量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在边缘系统中高效联合优化PQC和NOMA资源，实现低复杂度实时决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将Lyapunov优化与线性复杂度算法结合，解决非凸MINLP问题，为实时边缘AI提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署中PQC模块能耗模型可能不够精确，需进一步校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将量子安全与边缘资源分配深度耦合，探索更多轻量级AI优化方法。

zh.tldr: 提出一种轻量级智能体AI框架，用于移动边缘设备中PQC与NOMA资源的联合在线优化，显著降低复杂度并满足实时决策需求。
zh.motivation: 现有研究忽略PQC模块能耗开销，传统资源分配算法复杂度高，无法满足实时决策需求。
zh.method: 构建多阶段随机MINLP模型，引入PQC静态功耗约束；基于Lyapunov优化解耦长期优化问题，提出线性复杂度算法求解NOMA功率分配非凸挑战。
zh.result: 相比传统SCA算法，复杂度降至O(N)，设备数N=35时加速约46倍，在保证队列稳定和能耗约束下显著提升计算吞吐量。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在边缘系统中高效联合优化PQC和NOMA资源，实现低复杂度实时决策。

idea_spark.idea: 将Lyapunov优化与线性复杂度算法结合，解决非凸MINLP问题，为实时边缘AI提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 实际部署中PQC模块能耗模型可能不够精确，需进一步校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将量子安全与边缘资源分配深度耦合，探索更多轻量级AI优化方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a lightweight agentic AI framework for joint online optimization of PQC and NOMA resource allocation in mobile edge devices, significantly reducing complexity and meeting real-time decision-making requirements.
en.motivation: Existing research overlooks PQC module energy overhead, and traditional resource allocation algorithms are too complex for real-time decisions.
en.method: Constructs a multi-stage stochastic MINLP model with static PQC power constraints; decouples long-term optimization via Lyapunov theory and proposes a linear-complexity algorithm to solve nonconvex NOMA power allocation.
en.result: Compared to traditional SCA, complexity is reduced to O(N), achieving ~46x speedup with N=35, improving computational throughput while ensuring queue stability and energy constraints.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently jointly optimize PQC and NOMA resources in edge systems for low-complexity real-time decisions.

idea_spark.idea: Combining Lyapunov optimization with linear-complexity algorithms to solve nonconvex MINLP problems offers a new approach for real-time edge AI.
idea_spark.risk: The PQC module energy model may be inaccurate in real deployment and requires further calibration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires deeper coupling of quantum security with edge resource allocation and exploration of more lightweight AI optimization methods.

papers.title: A Toolkit for Detecting Spurious Correlations in Speech Datasets
papers.summary: We introduce a toolkit for uncovering spurious correlations between recording characteristics and target class in speech datasets. Spurious correlations may arise due to heterogeneous recording conditions, a common scenario for health-related datasets. When present both in the training and test data, these correlations result in an overestimation of the system performance -- a dangerous situation, specially in high-stakes application where systems are required to satisfy minimum performance requirements. Our toolkit implements a diagnostic method based on the detection of the target class using only the non-speech regions in the audio. Better than chance performance at this task indicates that information about the target class can be extracted from the non-speech regions, flagging the presence of spurious correlations. The toolkit is publicly available for research use.

ai.tldr: 介绍了一个用于检测语音数据集中虚假相关性的工具包，通过分析非语音区域来识别记录条件与目标类别之间的虚假关联。
ai.motivation: 语音数据集中的记录条件异质性可能导致虚假相关性，从而高估系统性能，尤其在健康相关的高风险应用中，需要检测并避免这种风险。
ai.method: 工具包实现了一种诊断方法，仅利用音频中的非语音区域来检测目标类别，若性能优于随机水平，则表明存在虚假相关性。
ai.result: 该方法能有效标记语音数据集中因记录条件引起的虚假相关性，工具包已公开供研究使用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员识别语音数据集中的虚假相关性，避免模型性能被高估，提升系统可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将非语音区域检测扩展到多模态数据（如视频中的静默帧），以检测跨模态的虚假相关性。
idea_spark.risk: 非语音区域可能包含其他有用信息（如背景噪声），过度依赖此方法可能忽略其他类型的虚假相关性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受语音处理中记录条件偏差的启发，类似思路可用于图像数据中背景与目标的虚假关联检测。

en.tldr: Introduces a toolkit to detect spurious correlations in speech datasets by analyzing non-speech regions, flagging when recording conditions correlate with target classes.
en.motivation: Heterogeneous recording conditions in speech datasets can cause spurious correlations, leading to overestimated system performance, especially in high-stakes health applications.
en.method: The toolkit uses a diagnostic method that detects target class from non-speech audio regions; performance above chance indicates spurious correlations.
en.result: Effectively flags spurious correlations due to recording conditions; toolkit is publicly available for research.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers identify spurious correlations in speech datasets, preventing overestimation of model performance and improving system reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Extend non-speech region detection to multimodal data (e.g., silent frames in video) to detect cross-modal spurious correlations.
idea_spark.risk: Non-speech regions may contain other useful information (e.g., background noise); over-reliance on this method may miss other types of spurious correlations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by recording condition bias in speech processing; similar approach could detect background-object spurious correlations in image data.

papers.title: Explaining the "Why": A Unified Framework for the Additive Attribution of Changes in Arbitrary Measures
papers.summary: Explaining why aggregated measures change is a critical challenge in data analytics that existing systems struggle to address. While current attribution methods exist, they lack a unified solution that is simultaneously general for arbitrary measures, holistic across both data dimensions and measure composition, and rigorous in its interpretability. To bridge this gap, we introduce a principled framework that reframes attribution through the powerful lens of cooperative game theory. Our key contribution is a classification of measures based on their mathematical structure, which enables a spectrum of algorithms-from general approximations to exact, closed-form solutions-that offer a principled trade-off between generality and performance. We demonstrate our framework's superiority through a multi-faceted evaluation: simulations first confirm its numerical accuracy and then its generality for non-additive measures; a case study on Simpson's Paradox showcases its unique interpretability; and a final experiment proves its practical utility by significantly outperforming existing root cause analysis systems.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于合作博弈论的统一框架，用于解释任意聚合度量的变化原因，支持一般性、整体性和可解释性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法缺乏统一解决方案，无法同时处理任意度量、数据维度和度量组成的整体性以及严格的可解释性。
ai.method: 通过度量数学结构分类，设计从通用近似到精确闭式解的算法谱系，实现通用性与性能的权衡。
ai.result: 模拟验证数值精度和通用性；辛普森悖论案例展示可解释性；根因分析实验显著优于现有系统。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助数据分析师和研究人员理解聚合指标变化背后的根本原因，提升决策透明度。

idea_spark.idea: 将度量分类思想与博弈论结合，为不同结构的度量定制高效归因算法。
idea_spark.risk: 对非加性度量的近似可能引入误差，需谨慎选择算法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从合作博弈论中Shapley值等概念出发，重新定义归因问题的数学基础。

en.tldr: A unified framework based on cooperative game theory for explaining changes in arbitrary aggregated measures, achieving generality, holism, and interpretability.
en.motivation: Existing methods lack a unified solution that is simultaneously general for arbitrary measures, holistic across data dimensions and measure composition, and rigorous in interpretability.
en.method: Classifies measures by mathematical structure and designs a spectrum of algorithms from general approximations to exact closed-form solutions, offering a principled trade-off between generality and performance.
en.result: Simulations confirm numerical accuracy and generality for non-additive measures; a Simpson's Paradox case study demonstrates unique interpretability; root cause analysis experiments significantly outperform existing systems.
en.help_to_user: Helps data analysts and researchers understand the root causes behind changes in aggregated metrics, improving decision transparency.

idea_spark.idea: Combine measure classification with game theory to design efficient attribution algorithms tailored to different measure structures.
idea_spark.risk: Approximations for non-additive measures may introduce errors, requiring careful algorithm selection.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulate the mathematical foundation of attribution problems using concepts like Shapley value from cooperative game theory.

papers.title: EvoSelect: Data-Efficient LLM Evolution for Targeted Task Adaptation
papers.summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to a targeted task efficiently and effectively remains a fundamental challenge. Such adaptation often requires iteratively improving the model toward a targeted task, yet collecting high-quality human-labeled data to support this process is costly and difficult to scale. As a result, synthetic data generation has emerged as a flexible and scalable alternative. One straightforward approach is through an iterative generation-training loop, where candidate data are synthesized through an external generator, the model is updated using these data and the process is repeated over iterations. However, generated samples can be noisy, highly redundant, or even misaligned with the targeted task distribution. Training indiscriminately on such data can dilute useful learning signals and even degrade model performance. To address this, we introduce a refined paradigm, namely an iterative generation-selection-training loop, which incorporates a selection step prior to model updates. Building on this paradigm, we propose EvoSelect, a data-efficient framework to evolve LLM effectively. Given candidate samples produced by the data generator, EvoSelect selects training data by jointly modeling targeted task alignment and diversity. We estimate task relevance through optimal transport with proxy gradient representations, which quantifies how well candidate samples align with the targeted task distribution. To mitigate redundancy, we incorporate a diversification mechanism that promotes coverage of complementary training samples. By interleaving alignment and diversification, EvoSelect enables progressive LLM evolution toward targeted tasks. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that with either weak or strong data generators, EvoSelect consistently improves adaptation efficacy over existing data selection methods.

ai.tldr: 提出EvoSelect框架，通过联合建模任务对齐性和多样性，在迭代生成-选择-训练循环中高效选择合成数据，实现大语言模型对目标任务的适应性进化。
ai.motivation: 现有迭代生成-训练方法中，合成数据存在噪声、冗余或与目标任务分布不匹配的问题，直接训练会稀释有效信号甚至降低模型性能。
ai.method: 在每次模型更新前加入数据选择步骤，利用最优传输和代理梯度表示估计候选样本与目标任务的分布对齐度，并通过多样化机制促进互补样本覆盖，交替进行对齐与多样化。
ai.result: 在多个基准测试中，无论使用弱或强数据生成器，EvoSelect均持续优于现有数据选择方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户更高效地利用合成数据微调大语言模型，减少人工标注成本，提升目标任务性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将最优传输与代理梯度结合用于任务对齐估计，并引入多样化机制，为数据选择提供了新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 最优传输计算可能带来额外开销，且代理梯度表示的质量依赖于预训练模型，可能影响对齐估计的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受主动学习与多样性采样启发，将两者结合到迭代进化框架中，平衡探索与利用。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受主动学习与多样性采样启发，将两者结合到迭代进化框架中，平衡探索与利用。

en.tldr: Proposes EvoSelect, a data-efficient framework that jointly models task alignment and diversity to select synthetic data in an iterative generation-selection-training loop, enabling effective LLM adaptation to targeted tasks.
en.motivation: Existing iterative generation-training loops suffer from noisy, redundant, or misaligned synthetic data, which can dilute learning signals and degrade performance.
en.method: Introduces a selection step before model updates, using optimal transport with proxy gradient representations to estimate task alignment, and a diversification mechanism to reduce redundancy, interleaving alignment and diversification.
en.result: Extensive benchmarks show EvoSelect consistently outperforms existing data selection methods with both weak and strong data generators.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently fine-tune LLMs with synthetic data, reducing human annotation costs and improving targeted task performance.

idea_spark.idea: Combining optimal transport with proxy gradients for task alignment estimation and incorporating diversification offers a novel approach to data selection.
idea_spark.risk: Optimal transport may introduce computational overhead, and proxy gradient quality depends on the pretrained model, potentially affecting alignment accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by active learning and diversity sampling, integrating both into an iterative evolution framework balances exploration and exploitation.

papers.title: ACPO: Anchor-Constrained Perceptual Optimization for Diffusion Models with No-Reference Quality Guidance
papers.summary: Diffusion models have achieved remarkable success in image generation, yet their training is predominantly driven by full-reference objectives that enforce pixel-wise similarity to ground-truth images.Such supervision, while effective for fidelity, may insufficient in terms of subjective visual perception quality and text-image semantic consistency. In this work, we investigate the problem of incorporating no-reference perceptual quality into diffusion training. A key challenge is that directly optimizing perceptual signals, such as those provided by no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA) models, introduces a mismatch with the original diffusion objective, leading to training instability and distributional drift during fine-tuning. To address this issue, we propose an anchor-constrained optimization framework that enables stable perceptual adaptation. Specifically, we leverage a learned NR-IQA model as a perceptual guidance signal, while introducing an anchor-based regularization that enforces consistency with the base diffusion model in terms of noise prediction. This design effectively balances perceptual quality improvement and generative fidelity, allowing controlled adaptation toward perceptually favorable outputs without compromising the original generative behavior. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method consistently enhances perceptual quality while preserving generation diversity and training stability, highlighting the effectiveness of anchor-constrained perceptual optimization for diffusion models.

ai.tldr: 提出锚定约束感知优化框架，在扩散模型训练中引入无参考质量引导，平衡感知质量与生成保真度。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型依赖全参考目标，忽略主观视觉感知和文本-图像语义一致性。
ai.method: 利用无参考图像质量评估模型作为感知信号，并引入锚定正则化约束噪声预测一致性。
ai.result: 在保持生成多样性和训练稳定性的同时，持续提升感知质量。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在不牺牲生成保真度的前提下，提升扩散模型输出的主观视觉质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将无参考质量评估与锚定正则化结合，实现可控的感知适应。
idea_spark.risk: 锚定约束可能限制感知改进幅度，需平衡正则化强度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从训练稳定性角度解决感知信号与原始目标不匹配问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从训练稳定性角度解决感知信号与原始目标不匹配问题。

en.tldr: Proposes an anchor-constrained perceptual optimization framework that incorporates no-reference quality guidance into diffusion model training, balancing perceptual quality and generative fidelity.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion models rely on full-reference objectives, neglecting subjective visual perception and text-image semantic consistency.
en.method: Leverages a learned NR-IQA model as perceptual guidance and introduces anchor-based regularization to enforce noise prediction consistency.
en.result: Consistently enhances perceptual quality while preserving generation diversity and training stability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users improve the subjective visual quality of diffusion model outputs without sacrificing generative fidelity.

idea_spark.idea: Combining no-reference quality assessment with anchor regularization enables controlled perceptual adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: Anchor constraints may limit the degree of perceptual improvement; regularization strength needs careful balancing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addresses the mismatch between perceptual signals and original objectives from a training stability perspective.

papers.title: SpatialFusion: Endowing Unified Image Generation with Intrinsic 3D Geometric Awareness
papers.summary: Recent unified image generation models have achieved remarkable success by employing MLLMs for semantic understanding and diffusion backbones for image generation. However, these models remain fundamentally limited in spatially-aware tasks due to a lack of intrinsic spatial understanding and the absence of explicit geometric guidance during generation. In this paper, we propose SpatialFusion, a novel framework that internalizes 3D geometric awareness into unified image generation models. Specifically, we first employ a Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT) architecture to augment the MLLM with a parallel spatial transformer to enhance 3D geometric modeling capability. By sharing self-attention with the MLLM, the spatial transformer learns to derive metric-depth maps of target images from rich semantic contexts. These explicit geometric scaffolds are then injected into the diffusion backbone through a specialized depth adapter, providing precise spatial constraints for spatially-coherent image generation. Through a progressive two-stage training strategy, SpatialFusion significantly enhances performance on spatially-aware benchmarks, notably outperforming leading models such as GPT-4o. Additionally, it achieves generalized performance gains across both text-to-image generation and image editing scenarios, all while maintaining negligible inference overhead.

ai.tldr: 提出 SpatialFusion 框架，通过混合 Transformer 架构和深度适配器，将内在 3D 几何感知注入统一图像生成模型，显著提升空间感知任务性能。
ai.motivation: 现有统一图像生成模型缺乏内在空间理解和显式几何引导，在空间感知任务中表现受限。
ai.method: 采用混合 Transformer 架构增强 MLLM 的 3D 几何建模能力，通过共享自注意力学习度量深度图，并利用深度适配器将几何约束注入扩散主干。
ai.result: 在空间感知基准上显著超越 GPT-4o 等领先模型，并在文本到图像生成和图像编辑场景中取得通用性能提升，推理开销可忽略。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户生成具有精确空间一致性的图像，支持文本到图像生成和图像编辑任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将显式几何约束（如深度图）作为条件注入扩散模型，可提升生成图像的空间一致性，类似思路可应用于多视图生成或布局控制。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖 MLLM 的语义理解能力，若语义理解不准确可能导致深度图错误，进而影响生成质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用共享自注意力机制在语言和空间模态间传递信息，启发设计更通用的多模态融合架构。

idea_spark.idea: 将显式几何约束（如深度图）作为条件注入扩散模型，可提升生成图像的空间一致性，类似思路可应用于多视图生成或布局控制。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖 MLLM 的语义理解能力，若语义理解不准确可能导致深度图错误，进而影响生成质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用共享自注意力机制在语言和空间模态间传递信息，启发设计更通用的多模态融合架构。

en.tldr: SpatialFusion endows unified image generation models with intrinsic 3D geometric awareness via a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture and a depth adapter, achieving state-of-the-art spatial understanding.
en.motivation: Current unified image generation models lack intrinsic spatial understanding and explicit geometric guidance, limiting performance on spatially-aware tasks.
en.method: A Mixture-of-Transformers architecture augments the MLLM with a parallel spatial transformer to learn metric-depth maps, which are injected into the diffusion backbone via a specialized depth adapter.
en.result: Significantly outperforms leading models like GPT-4o on spatially-aware benchmarks, with generalized gains in text-to-image generation and image editing, and negligible inference overhead.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to generate spatially coherent images with precise geometric constraints, applicable to both text-to-image and image editing tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Injecting explicit geometric constraints (e.g., depth maps) as conditioning into diffusion models improves spatial consistency; similar ideas could apply to multi-view generation or layout control.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on MLLM semantic understanding may lead to inaccurate depth maps if semantics are misinterpreted, degrading generation quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Shared self-attention between language and spatial transformers suggests a general paradigm for multimodal fusion that could inspire more versatile architectures.

papers.title: AnimateAnyMesh++: A Flexible 4D Foundation Model for High-Fidelity Text-Driven Mesh Animation
papers.summary: Recent advances in 4D content generation have attracted increasing attention, yet creating high-quality animated 3D models remains challenging due to the complexity of modeling spatio-temporal distributions and the scarcity of 4D training data. We present AnimateAnyMesh++, a feed-forward framework for text-driven animation of arbitrary 3D meshes with substantial upgrades in data, architecture, and generative capability. First, we expand the DyMesh-XL dataset by mining dynamic content from Objaverse-XL, increasing the number of unique identities from 60K to 300K and substantially broadening category and motion diversity. Second, we redesign DyMeshVAE-Flex with power-law topology-aware attention and vertex-normal enhanced features, which significantly improves trajectory reconstruction, local geometry preservation, and mitigates trajectory-sticking artifacts. Third, we introduce architectural changes to both DyMeshVAE-Flex and the rectified-flow (RF) generator to support variable-length sequence training and generation, enabling longer animations while preserving reconstruction fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AnimateAnyMesh++ generates semantically accurate and temporally coherent mesh animations within seconds, surpassing prior approaches in quality and efficiency. The enlarged DyMesh-XL, the upgraded DyMeshVAE-Flex, and variable-length RF together deliver consistent gains across benchmarks and in-the-wild meshes. We will release code, models, and the expanded DyMesh-XL upon acceptance of this manuscript to facilitate research in 4D content creation.

ai.tldr: 提出AnimateAnyMesh++，一种前馈式4D基础模型，通过扩展数据集、改进VAE架构和支持变长序列训练，实现高质量文本驱动网格动画。
ai.motivation: 现有4D内容生成方法受限于时空分布建模复杂和训练数据稀缺，难以生成高质量动画3D模型。
ai.method: 扩展DyMesh-XL数据集至30万唯一身份；设计DyMeshVAE-Flex，引入幂律拓扑感知注意力和顶点法线增强特征；采用整流流生成器并支持变长序列训练。
ai.result: 在数秒内生成语义准确、时间一致的网格动画，在质量和效率上超越先前方法，并在基准和野外网格上取得一致提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速从文本描述生成任意3D网格的高保真动画，降低4D内容创作门槛。

idea_spark.idea: 将变长序列训练与整流流结合，可推广至其他时序生成任务，如视频预测或动作序列生成。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集扩展可能引入噪声或低质量样本，影响生成一致性；变长训练可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从大规模静态3D数据挖掘动态信息的方法可启发其他领域（如医学影像）的时序数据增强。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速从文本描述生成任意3D网格的高保真动画，降低4D内容创作门槛。

idea_spark.idea: 将变长序列训练与整流流结合，可推广至其他时序生成任务，如视频预测或动作序列生成。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集扩展可能引入噪声或低质量样本，影响生成一致性；变长训练可能增加计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从大规模静态3D数据挖掘动态信息的方法可启发其他领域（如医学影像）的时序数据增强。

en.tldr: Proposes AnimateAnyMesh++, a feed-forward 4D foundation model that achieves high-quality text-driven mesh animation by expanding the dataset, improving VAE architecture, and supporting variable-length sequence training.
en.motivation: Existing 4D content generation methods struggle with modeling spatio-temporal distributions and suffer from limited training data, hindering high-quality animated 3D model creation.
en.method: Expands DyMesh-XL dataset to 300K unique identities; designs DyMeshVAE-Flex with power-law topology-aware attention and vertex-normal enhanced features; employs a rectified-flow generator with variable-length sequence training.
en.result: Generates semantically accurate and temporally coherent mesh animations within seconds, surpassing prior methods in quality and efficiency, with consistent gains on benchmarks and in-the-wild meshes.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to quickly generate high-fidelity animations of arbitrary 3D meshes from text descriptions, lowering the barrier for 4D content creation.

idea_spark.idea: Combining variable-length sequence training with rectified flow could generalize to other temporal generation tasks, like video prediction or action sequence generation.
idea_spark.risk: Dataset expansion may introduce noise or low-quality samples, affecting generation consistency; variable-length training may increase computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach of mining dynamic information from large-scale static 3D data could inspire temporal data augmentation in other domains, such as medical imaging.

papers.title: Robust Alignment: Harmonizing Clean Accuracy and Adversarial Robustness in Adversarial Training
papers.summary: Adversarial Training (AT) is one of the most effective methods for developing robust deep neural networks (DNNs). However, AT faces a trade-off problem between clean accuracy and adversarial robustness. In this work, we reveal a surprising phenomenon for the first time: Varying input perturbation intensities for training samples near decision boundaries in AT have minimal impact on model robustness. This finding directly exposes the inconsistency between accuracy and robustness score fluctuations, leading us to identify the misalignment between input and latent spaces as a critical driver of the robustness-accuracy trade-off. To mitigate this misalignment for harmonizing accuracy and robustness, we define Robust Alignment as a new AT target, encouraging the model perception to change with input perturbations provided the final label prediction remains unchanged, which can be achieved via two novel ideas. First, we suggest a reduced and fixed perturbation intensity for those boundary samples, which facilitates the model to utilize the perturbations as learnable patterns, instead of noises that complicate decision boundaries meaninglessly. Second, we propose a Domain Interpolation Consistency Adversarial Regularization (DICAR), based on rigorous theoretical derivations, which explicitly introduces semantic alignment between input and latent spaces into AT. Based on these two ideas, we end up with a new Robust Alignment Adversarial Training (RAAT) method, effectively harmonizing accuracy and robustness. Extensive experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet with ResNet-18, PreActResNet-18, and WideResNet-28-10 demonstrate the effectiveness of RAAT in improving the trade-off beyond four common baselines and a total of 14 related state-of-the-art (SOTA) works.

ai.tldr: 提出鲁棒对齐对抗训练方法，通过调整边界样本扰动强度和域插值一致性正则化，缓解对抗训练中准确率与鲁棒性的矛盾。
ai.motivation: 对抗训练存在干净准确率与对抗鲁棒性之间的权衡问题，现有方法难以同时优化两者。
ai.method: 定义鲁棒对齐为目标，对边界样本使用固定低扰动强度，并引入域插值一致性对抗正则化实现输入与隐空间语义对齐。
ai.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和Tiny-ImageNet上，RAAT优于14种SOTA方法和4种基线，有效改善权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种平衡模型准确率与鲁棒性的实用训练策略，适用于安全敏感场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用边界样本的扰动模式作为可学习特征，而非噪声，可能启发新的数据增强或正则化方法。
idea_spark.risk: 固定扰动强度可能不适用于所有数据集或攻击类型，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 输入与隐空间的对齐概念可推广至多模态学习或迁移学习中的特征对齐问题。

zh.tldr: 提出鲁棒对齐对抗训练方法，通过调整边界样本扰动强度和域插值一致性正则化，缓解对抗训练中准确率与鲁棒性的矛盾。

zh.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和Tiny-ImageNet上，RAAT优于14种SOTA方法和4种基线，有效改善权衡。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种平衡模型准确率与鲁棒性的实用训练策略，适用于安全敏感场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用边界样本的扰动模式作为可学习特征，而非噪声，可能启发新的数据增强或正则化方法。
idea_spark.risk: 固定扰动强度可能不适用于所有数据集或攻击类型，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 输入与隐空间的对齐概念可推广至多模态学习或迁移学习中的特征对齐问题。

en.tldr: Proposes Robust Alignment Adversarial Training (RAAT) that harmonizes clean accuracy and adversarial robustness by adjusting perturbation intensity for boundary samples and introducing domain interpolation consistency regularization.
en.motivation: Adversarial training suffers from a trade-off between clean accuracy and adversarial robustness, and existing methods struggle to optimize both simultaneously.
en.method: Defines robust alignment as the training objective, uses reduced fixed perturbation intensity for boundary samples, and proposes Domain Interpolation Consistency Adversarial Regularization (DICAR) to enforce semantic alignment between input and latent spaces.
en.result: On CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet, RAAT outperforms 14 SOTA methods and 4 baselines, effectively improving the accuracy-robustness trade-off.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical training strategy to balance model accuracy and robustness, suitable for safety-critical applications.

idea_spark.idea: Treating perturbations on boundary samples as learnable patterns rather than noise may inspire new data augmentation or regularization techniques.
idea_spark.risk: Fixed perturbation intensity may not generalize across datasets or attack types; further validation is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of aligning input and latent spaces can be extended to feature alignment in multimodal learning or transfer learning.

papers.title: Speech Emotion Recognition Using MFCC Features and LSTM-Based Deep Learning Model
papers.summary: Speech Emotion Recognition (SER) is the use of machines to detect the emotional state of humans based on the speech, which is gaining importance in natural human-computer interaction. Speech is a very valuable source of information, as emotions modify the patterns of speech; pitch, energy and even timing. Nonetheless, SER is not an easy task because speakers are not constant, and situations vary when recording and the sound similarity between specific feelings. In this work, the author introduces a speech emotion recognition system relying on the Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficient and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) neural network, as a feature extraction method. The Toronto Emotional Speech Set (TESS) speech signal was pre-processed, and transformed into MFCC features to understand the important aspects in terms of time. The resultant features were then introduced to LSTM model, which is able to learn long term features of sequential audio data. The trained model was measured over several emotion classes occurring in the dataset. As seen in the results of experiments, the proposed MFCC-LSTM approach succeeds in capturing the patterns of emotions in speech and provides highly realistic classifications in all the chosen emotion classifications. This study presents a speech emotion recognition system using Mel-Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCCs) as features and a deep learning LSTM classifier. A Support Vector Machine (SVM) with an RBF kernel served as a classical baseline, achieving 98% accuracy, against which the proposed LSTM model, achieving 99% accuracy, was validated. Overall, it is possible to confirm that LSTM-based architectures can be used to address the task of speech emotion recognition. Actual applications of the proposed system may be virtual assistants and mental health surveillance.

ai.tldr: 提出基于MFCC特征和LSTM深度学习的语音情感识别系统，在TESS数据集上达到99%准确率，优于SVM基线。
ai.motivation: 语音情感识别在人机交互中日益重要，但面临说话人差异、录音环境变化和情感间声学相似性等挑战。
ai.method: 对TESS语音信号进行预处理并提取MFCC时域特征，输入LSTM模型学习序列长期依赖，以SVM（RBF核）作为基线对比。
ai.result: LSTM模型在多个情感类别上达到99%准确率，SVM基线为98%，证明LSTM能有效捕捉语音情感模式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高精度的语音情感识别方案，可应用于虚拟助手和心理健康监测。

idea_spark.idea: 结合注意力机制或多模态信息（如文本、面部表情）进一步提升情感识别鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集规模较小（TESS），模型在真实噪声环境下的泛化能力可能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑使用自监督预训练（如wav2vec 2.0）替代MFCC，减少手工特征依赖。

zh.tldr: 提出基于MFCC特征和LSTM深度学习的语音情感识别系统，在TESS数据集上达到99%准确率，优于SVM基线。
zh.motivation: 语音情感识别在人机交互中日益重要，但面临说话人差异、录音环境变化和情感间声学相似性等挑战。
zh.method: 对TESS语音信号进行预处理并提取MFCC时域特征，输入LSTM模型学习序列长期依赖，以SVM（RBF核）作为基线对比。
zh.result: LSTM模型在多个情感类别上达到99%准确率，SVM基线为98%，证明LSTM能有效捕捉语音情感模式。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高精度的语音情感识别方案，可应用于虚拟助手和心理健康监测。

idea_spark.idea: 结合注意力机制或多模态信息（如文本、面部表情）进一步提升情感识别鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集规模较小（TESS），模型在真实噪声环境下的泛化能力可能不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑使用自监督预训练（如wav2vec 2.0）替代MFCC，减少手工特征依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes a speech emotion recognition system using MFCC features and LSTM deep learning, achieving 99% accuracy on the TESS dataset, outperforming an SVM baseline.
en.motivation: Speech emotion recognition is important for natural human-computer interaction but faces challenges from speaker variability, recording conditions, and acoustic similarity between emotions.
en.method: Preprocess TESS speech signals, extract MFCC time-domain features, feed into an LSTM model to capture long-term sequential dependencies, with an SVM (RBF kernel) as baseline.
en.result: The LSTM model achieves 99% accuracy across multiple emotion classes, compared to 98% for SVM, demonstrating effective capture of emotional patterns in speech.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-accuracy speech emotion recognition solution applicable to virtual assistants and mental health monitoring.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate attention mechanisms or multimodal information (e.g., text, facial expressions) to further improve robustness.
idea_spark.risk: The dataset (TESS) is small; generalization to real-world noisy environments may be limited.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider using self-supervised pretraining (e.g., wav2vec 2.0) instead of MFCC to reduce reliance on handcrafted features.

papers.title: Agentic AI in the Software Development Lifecycle: Architecture, Empirical Evidence, and the Reshaping of Software Engineering
papers.summary: The arrival of large language models (LLMs) capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and long-horizon planning has produced a qualitative shift in software engineering. Where earlier code-completion tools such as GitHub Copilot operated at the granularity of a line or function, modern agentic systems -- Claude Code, OpenAI Codex CLI, Google Jules, Devin, OpenHands, SWE-agent, MetaGPT, ChatDev, and DeepMind's AlphaEvolve -- operate at the granularity of a repository, a feature, or an algorithm. We synthesize work from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft Research, Princeton, Stanford, and the broader academic community to characterize this transition. We propose a six-layer reference architecture for agentic software engineering systems, contrast a traditional Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) with an emerging Agentic SDLC (A-SDLC), and consolidate empirical evidence on performance (a rise from 1.96% to 78.4% on SWE-bench Verified between October 2023 and April 2026), productivity (13.6%-55.8% time savings across controlled studies), and labor-market impact (49% of jobs sampled by Anthropic in 2026 saw AI used for at least a quarter of their tasks). We argue that the central object of inquiry has shifted from code generation to delegated execution under human supervision, and we identify five open problems -- evaluation, governance, technical debt, skill redistribution, and the economics of attention -- that will determine whether the agentic transition is net-positive for the discipline.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了从代码补全到智能体系统的转变，提出了六层参考架构和智能体SDLC，并汇总了性能、生产力和劳动力市场影响的实证证据。
ai.motivation: 大语言模型具备多步推理、工具使用和长期规划能力，使软件工程从代码生成转向人类监督下的委托执行，需要新的架构和评估框架。
ai.method: 综合Anthropic、OpenAI、Google DeepMind、微软研究院、普林斯顿、斯坦福等机构的工作，提出六层参考架构，对比传统SDLC与智能体SDLC，并汇总SWE-bench等基准上的实证数据。
ai.result: SWE-bench Verified上性能从1.96%提升至78.4%，受控研究中节省13.6%-55.8%时间，2026年Anthropic样本中49%的工作至少四分之一任务使用AI。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员和从业者理解智能体AI在软件工程中的现状、架构和影响，识别评估、治理、技术债务、技能再分配和注意力经济学等开放问题。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个基于智能体SDLC的协作平台，让人类开发者以自然语言委托任务，智能体自动完成编码、测试和部署，同时保留人类对关键决策的监督。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖智能体可能导致技能退化、技术债务积累，以及注意力经济下的认知过载。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类监督下的委托执行模式出发，探索如何平衡自动化与人类控制，借鉴航空业自动驾驶与飞行员协作的经验。

zh.tldr: 本文综述了从代码补全到智能体系统的转变，提出了六层参考架构和智能体SDLC，并汇总了性能、生产力和劳动力市场影响的实证证据。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个基于智能体SDLC的协作平台，让人类开发者以自然语言委托任务，智能体自动完成编码、测试和部署，同时保留人类对关键决策的监督。

en.tldr: This paper surveys the shift from code completion to agentic systems, proposes a six-layer reference architecture and an Agentic SDLC, and consolidates empirical evidence on performance, productivity, and labor-market impact.
en.motivation: LLMs capable of multi-step reasoning, tool use, and long-horizon planning have shifted software engineering from code generation to delegated execution under human supervision, necessitating new architectures and evaluation frameworks.
en.method: Synthesizes work from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft Research, Princeton, Stanford, and others; proposes a six-layer reference architecture; contrasts traditional SDLC with Agentic SDLC; consolidates empirical data from SWE-bench and controlled studies.
en.result: Performance on SWE-bench Verified rose from 1.96% to 78.4%; controlled studies show 13.6%-55.8% time savings; 49% of jobs in Anthropic's 2026 sample used AI for at least a quarter of tasks.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers and practitioners understand the current state, architecture, and impact of agentic AI in software engineering, and identifies open problems in evaluation, governance, technical debt, skill redistribution, and the economics of attention.

idea_spark.idea: Design a collaborative platform based on Agentic SDLC where human developers delegate tasks via natural language, and agents autonomously complete coding, testing, and deployment while humans oversee key decisions.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on agents may lead to skill degradation, accumulation of technical debt, and cognitive overload in the attention economy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from the model of delegated execution under human supervision, explore how to balance automation and human control, inspired by the pilot-autopilot collaboration in aviation.

papers.title: Recommendations for Efficient and Responsible LLM Adoption within Industrial Software Development
papers.summary: Context: Large language models (LLMs) are observed to have a significant positive impact on various software engineering (SE) activities. With improved accessibility, the adoption of powerful LLMs in industry has surged recently. However, there is a lack of actionable best practices for the efficient and responsible adoption of LLMs within industrial software settings. Objectives: We developed seven actionable recommendations to address this research gap. Methods: We conducted a multi-case study with three organisations that use LLMs within their SE activities and synthesised seven recommendations through qualitative thematic analysis. We conducted a complementary online survey with software practitioners from various industries to evaluate the perceived relevance of our recommendations. Results: Our results and recommendations focus on (i) users' preference to use LLMs as AI assistants, (ii) the importance of relevant stakeholders' satisfaction in the LLM-output evaluation, (iii) scoping the applicability of LLMs within SE tasks, (iv) the effect of LLMs on SE workflows, (v) the necessity and directions for developing human oversight mechanisms, and (vi) the necessary skills for practitioners for leveraging LLMs within SE. The online survey indicates a high level of agreement from the participants regarding the perceived relevance of the recommendations. Conclusion: We outline future research directions, including mapping the seven recommendations to the principles of the EU AI Act (AIA) in order to examine how they relate to the current regulatory compliance frameworks.

en.tldr: Through a multi-case study and online survey, seven actionable recommendations are proposed for efficient and responsible LLM adoption in industrial software development.
en.motivation: Despite LLMs' significant potential in software engineering, there is a lack of actionable best practices for industrial settings.
en.method: Conducted a multi-case study with three organizations, synthesized recommendations via qualitative thematic analysis, and evaluated relevance via an online survey.
en.result: Recommendations cover LLM as AI assistant, stakeholder satisfaction, task scoping, workflow impact, human oversight, and required skills; survey shows high agreement.
en.help_to_user: Provides directly usable guidelines for industrial software teams to adopt LLMs efficiently and responsibly, mitigating risks.

papers.title: Cognitive Atrophy and Systemic Collapse in AI-Dependent Software Engineering
papers.summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into the software development lifecycle (SDLC) masks a critical socio-technical failure: Cognitive-Systemic Collapse. This paper introduces "Epistemological Debt," the hidden carrying cost incurred when engineers substitute logical derivation with passive AI verification. This debt erodes the mental models essential for root-cause analysis, widening the gap between system complexity and human comprehension. Furthermore, recursive training on synthetic code threatens to homogenize the global software reservoir, diminishing the variance required for robust engineering. Using the 2026 Amazon outages as a case study, this research illustrates how "mechanized convergence" leads to systemic fragility. To preserve long-term resilience, engineering leaders must move beyond prompt-based development to implement rigorous human-in-the-loop pedagogical standards. This framework balances AI-driven productivity with the epistemic sovereignty necessary to manage increasingly opaque software ecosystems.

ai.tldr: 本文提出“认知系统性崩溃”概念，指出LLM集成到软件开发生命周期中导致工程师逻辑推理能力退化、系统脆弱性增加，并以2026年亚马逊宕机为例，呼吁建立人机协作的教学标准以维护认知主权。
ai.motivation: 揭示LLM在软件工程中广泛应用所隐藏的认知与系统性风险，特别是工程师依赖AI验证而丧失根本原因分析能力的问题。
ai.method: 引入“认知债务”和“机械化收敛”概念，结合2026年亚马逊宕机案例，分析递归训练合成代码对软件多样性的侵蚀。
ai.result: 指出认知债务导致心智模型退化，合成代码同质化削弱工程韧性，最终引发系统性崩溃。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助软件工程师和管理者识别AI辅助开发中的长期风险，并理解为何需要坚持人机协作的教学标准。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种“认知债务审计”工具，量化工程师在AI辅助下逻辑推理能力的下降程度，并推荐干预措施。
idea_spark.risk: 过度强调人机协作可能降低开发效率，且教学标准的实施需要额外培训成本，可能遭遇团队抵触。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从软件工程中的认知债务联想到金融领域的债务周期，可探索类似的风险累积与崩溃模型。

en.tldr: This paper introduces 'Cognitive-Systemic Collapse' in AI-dependent software engineering, highlighting how LLM integration erodes engineers' reasoning skills and system robustness, using the 2026 Amazon outages as a case study, and calls for human-in-the-loop pedagogical standards.
en.motivation: To expose the hidden cognitive and systemic risks of integrating LLMs into the SDLC, particularly the loss of root-cause analysis capability due to passive AI verification.
en.method: Introduces concepts of 'Epistemological Debt' and 'mechanized convergence', analyzing the 2026 Amazon outages to illustrate how recursive training on synthetic code homogenizes the software reservoir.
en.result: Epistemological debt degrades mental models, synthetic code homogenization reduces engineering resilience, leading to systemic collapse.
en.help_to_user: Helps software engineers and managers recognize long-term risks in AI-assisted development and understand the necessity of human-in-the-loop pedagogical standards.

idea_spark.idea: Design a 'cognitive debt audit' tool to quantify the decline in engineers' logical reasoning under AI assistance and recommend interventions.
idea_spark.risk: Overemphasis on human-in-the-loop may reduce development efficiency, and implementing pedagogical standards requires additional training costs, potentially facing team resistance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogous to financial debt cycles, explore risk accumulation and collapse models in software engineering cognitive debt.
